scripts.source:
local ContentProvider = game:GetService("ContentProvider")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedFirst = game:GetService("ReplicatedFirst")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local BACKGROUND_IMAGE = "rbxassetid://127539948539559"
local HIGH_QUALITY_LOGO_IMAGE = "rbxassetid://72585587327009"
local FALLBACK_LOGO_IMAGE = "rbxassetid://137479516081769"

local MINIMUM_DISPLAY_TIME = 3.25
local MAXIMUM_DISPLAY_TIME = 20
local FADE_DURATION = 0.8
local STUDIO_PREVIEW_MODE = false

local COLORS = {
	DeepBlue = Color3.fromRGB(17, 82, 151),
	MidBlue = Color3.fromRGB(42, 128, 187),
	LightBlue = Color3.fromRGB(126, 192, 222),
	FallbackSky = Color3.fromRGB(79, 157, 219),
}

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

ReplicatedFirst:RemoveDefaultLoadingScreen()

local existing = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishyFishLoadingScreen")
if existing then
	existing:Destroy()
end

local existingBackground = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishyFishLoadingBackground")
if existingBackground then
	existingBackground:Destroy()
end

-- The background ignores every device inset so no part of the 3D world can
-- show through around notches, rounded corners, ultrawide screens, or TVs.
local backgroundScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
backgroundScreenGui.Name = "FishyFishLoadingBackground"
backgroundScreenGui.ScreenInsets = Enum.ScreenInsets.None
backgroundScreenGui.SafeAreaCompatibility = Enum.SafeAreaCompatibility.None
backgroundScreenGui.ClipToDeviceSafeArea = false
backgroundScreenGui.DisplayOrder = 99999
backgroundScreenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
backgroundScreenGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
backgroundScreenGui.Parent = playerGui

local backgroundRoot = Instance.new("CanvasGroup")
backgroundRoot.Name = "FullBleedBackgroundCanvas"
backgroundRoot.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
backgroundRoot.BackgroundColor3 = COLORS.FallbackSky
backgroundRoot.BorderSizePixel = 0
backgroundRoot.GroupTransparency = 0
backgroundRoot.Active = true
backgroundRoot.Parent = backgroundScreenGui

-- Foreground artwork stays inside the device-safe area so it remains clear of
-- phone notches and rounded screen cutouts while using the available space.
local screenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
screenGui.Name = "FishyFishLoadingScreen"
screenGui.ScreenInsets = Enum.ScreenInsets.DeviceSafeInsets
screenGui.SafeAreaCompatibility = Enum.SafeAreaCompatibility.None
screenGui.ClipToDeviceSafeArea = true
screenGui.DisplayOrder = 100000
screenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false
screenGui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
screenGui.Parent = playerGui

local root = Instance.new("CanvasGroup")
root.Name = "LoadingCanvas"
root.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
root.BackgroundTransparency = 1
root.BorderSizePixel = 0
root.GroupTransparency = 0
root.Active = true
root.Parent = screenGui

local background = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
background.Name = "HarborBackground"
background.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
background.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
background.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1.012, 1.012)
background.BackgroundTransparency = 1
background.BorderSizePixel = 0
background.Image = BACKGROUND_IMAGE
background.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Crop
background.ResampleMode = Enum.ResamplerMode.Default
background.ZIndex = 1
background.Parent = backgroundRoot

local lowerShade = Instance.new("Frame")
lowerShade.Name = "LowerContrastShade"
lowerShade.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
lowerShade.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(5, 43, 91)
lowerShade.BackgroundTransparency = 0.82
lowerShade.BorderSizePixel = 0
lowerShade.ZIndex = 2
lowerShade.Parent = backgroundRoot

local lowerShadeGradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
lowerShadeGradient.Rotation = 90
lowerShadeGradient.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
	NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 1),
	NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.58, 1),
	NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0.35),
})
lowerShadeGradient.Parent = lowerShade

local logoMotion = Instance.new("Frame")
logoMotion.Name = "LogoMotion"
logoMotion.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
logoMotion.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
logoMotion.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
logoMotion.BackgroundTransparency = 1
logoMotion.ZIndex = 5
logoMotion.Parent = root

local logo = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
logo.Name = "FishyFishLogo"
logo.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
logo.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.43)
logo.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.54, 0.54)
logo.BackgroundTransparency = 1
logo.Image = HIGH_QUALITY_LOGO_IMAGE
logo.ImageTransparency = 1
logo.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
logo.ResampleMode = Enum.ResamplerMode.Default
logo.ZIndex = 6
logo.Parent = logoMotion

local logoAspect = Instance.new("UIAspectRatioConstraint")
logoAspect.AspectRatio = 1307 / 720
logoAspect.DominantAxis = Enum.DominantAxis.Width
logoAspect.Parent = logo

local fallbackLogo = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
fallbackLogo.Name = "FishyFishLogoFallback"
fallbackLogo.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
fallbackLogo.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.43)
fallbackLogo.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.54, 0.54)
fallbackLogo.BackgroundTransparency = 1
fallbackLogo.Image = FALLBACK_LOGO_IMAGE
fallbackLogo.ImageTransparency = 1
fallbackLogo.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
fallbackLogo.ResampleMode = Enum.ResamplerMode.Default
fallbackLogo.ZIndex = 5
fallbackLogo.Parent = logoMotion

local fallbackLogoAspect = Instance.new("UIAspectRatioConstraint")
fallbackLogoAspect.AspectRatio = 1672 / 941
fallbackLogoAspect.DominantAxis = Enum.DominantAxis.Width
fallbackLogoAspect.Parent = fallbackLogo

local lowerUi = Instance.new("Frame")
lowerUi.Name = "LoadingInformation"
lowerUi.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
lowerUi.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.775)
lowerUi.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.56, 0.22)
lowerUi.BackgroundTransparency = 1
lowerUi.ZIndex = 10
lowerUi.Parent = root

local ornament = Instance.new("Frame")
ornament.Name = "AnchorAndWaves"
ornament.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
ornament.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0)
ornament.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.42, 0.28)
ornament.BackgroundTransparency = 1
ornament.ZIndex = 10
ornament.Parent = lowerUi

local function makeWave(parent, direction)
	local wave = Instance.new("Frame")
	wave.Name = direction < 0 and "LeftWave" or "RightWave"
	wave.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(direction < 0 and 1 or 0, 0.5)
	wave.Position = UDim2.fromScale(direction < 0 and 0.38 or 0.62, 0.53)
	wave.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.24, 0.52)
	wave.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	wave.ZIndex = 10
	wave.Parent = parent

	local segmentCount = 18
	local segments = {}
	for index = 1, segmentCount do
		local segment = Instance.new("Frame")
		segment.Name = "CurveSegment" .. index
		segment.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		segment.BackgroundColor3 = COLORS.MidBlue
		segment.BorderSizePixel = 0
		segment.ZIndex = 10
		segment.Parent = wave

		local segmentCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		segmentCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
		segmentCorner.Parent = segment

		table.insert(segments, segment)
	end

	local function layoutCurve()
		local size = wave.AbsoluteSize
		if size.X <= 0 or size.Y <= 0 then
			return
		end

		local centerY = size.Y * 0.5
		local amplitude = size.Y * 0.19
		local cycles = 2.35
		local thickness = math.clamp(size.Y * 0.17, 2.5, 4.2)

		for index, segment in ipairs(segments) do
			local progress0 = (index - 1) / segmentCount
			local progress1 = index / segmentCount
			local sample0 = direction < 0 and 1 - progress0 or progress0
			local sample1 = direction < 0 and 1 - progress1 or progress1
			local x0 = progress0 * size.X
			local x1 = progress1 * size.X
			local y0 = centerY + math.sin(sample0 * math.pi * 2 * cycles) * amplitude
			local y1 = centerY + math.sin(sample1 * math.pi * 2 * cycles) * amplitude
			local deltaX = x1 - x0
			local deltaY = y1 - y0

			segment.Position = UDim2.fromOffset((x0 + x1) * 0.5, (y0 + y1) * 0.5)
			segment.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(math.sqrt(deltaX * deltaX + deltaY * deltaY) + 1.5, thickness)
			segment.Rotation = math.deg(math.atan2(deltaY, deltaX))
		end
	end

	task.defer(layoutCurve)
	wave:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(layoutCurve)
end

makeWave(ornament, -1)
makeWave(ornament, 1)

local anchor = Instance.new("TextLabel")
anchor.Name = "Anchor"
anchor.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
anchor.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.53)
anchor.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.18, 1.08)
anchor.BackgroundTransparency = 1
anchor.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
anchor.Text = utf8.char(0x2693)
anchor.TextColor3 = COLORS.DeepBlue
anchor.TextScaled = true
anchor.ZIndex = 11
anchor.Parent = ornament

local anchorTextSize = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
anchorTextSize.MinTextSize = 16
anchorTextSize.MaxTextSize = 42
anchorTextSize.Parent = anchor

local statusText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
statusText.Name = "StatusText"
statusText.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
statusText.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.34)
statusText.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 0.3)
statusText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
statusText.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
statusText.Text = "PREPARING YOUR FISHING ADVENTURE..."
statusText.TextColor3 = COLORS.DeepBlue
statusText.TextScaled = true
statusText.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(220, 241, 249)
statusText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.82
statusText.ZIndex = 10
statusText.Parent = lowerUi

local statusTextSize = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
statusTextSize.MinTextSize = 12
statusTextSize.MaxTextSize = 25
statusTextSize.Parent = statusText

local dotRow = Instance.new("Frame")
dotRow.Name = "LoadingDots"
dotRow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
dotRow.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.7)
dotRow.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(150, 24)
dotRow.BackgroundTransparency = 1
dotRow.ZIndex = 10
dotRow.Parent = lowerUi

local dotLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
dotLayout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
dotLayout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
dotLayout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
dotLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 10)
dotLayout.Parent = dotRow

local dots = {}
for index = 1, 5 do
	local dot = Instance.new("Frame")
	dot.Name = "Dot" .. index
	dot.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(18, 18)
	dot.BackgroundColor3 = COLORS.LightBlue
	dot.BackgroundTransparency = 0.35
	dot.BorderSizePixel = 0
	dot.LayoutOrder = index
	dot.ZIndex = 10
	dot.Parent = dotRow

	local dotCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	dotCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
	dotCorner.Parent = dot

	table.insert(dots, dot)
end

local dotScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
dotScale.Scale = 1
dotScale.Parent = dotRow

local logoBaseY = 0.43

local function updateResponsiveLayout()
	local viewport = root.AbsoluteSize
	if viewport.X <= 0 or viewport.Y <= 0 then
		return
	end

	local aspect = viewport.X / viewport.Y
	local logoWidth
	local fallbackLogoWidth
	if aspect < 0.8 then
		logoWidth = 0.77
		fallbackLogoWidth = 0.98
		logoBaseY = 0.35
		lowerUi.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.72)
		lowerUi.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.9, 0.22)
	elseif aspect < 1.35 then
		logoWidth = 0.61
		fallbackLogoWidth = 0.78
		logoBaseY = 0.39
		lowerUi.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.74)
		lowerUi.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.78, 0.22)
	else
		logoWidth = 0.425
		fallbackLogoWidth = 0.54
		logoBaseY = 0.43
		lowerUi.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.775)
		lowerUi.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.56, 0.22)
	end

	logo.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, logoBaseY)
	fallbackLogo.Position = logo.Position
	local logoWidthPixels = math.min(viewport.X * logoWidth, viewport.Y * 0.46 * logoAspect.AspectRatio)
	local fallbackLogoWidthPixels = math.min(
		viewport.X * fallbackLogoWidth,
		viewport.Y * 0.46 * fallbackLogoAspect.AspectRatio
	)
	logo.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(logoWidthPixels, logoWidthPixels)
	fallbackLogo.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(fallbackLogoWidthPixels, fallbackLogoWidthPixels)
	dotScale.Scale = math.clamp(math.min(viewport.X, viewport.Y) / 760, 0.78, 1.12)
end

updateResponsiveLayout()
root:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateResponsiveLayout)

local backgroundTween = TweenService:Create(
	background,
	TweenInfo.new(12, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, -1, true),
	{
		Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.498, 0.502),
		Size = UDim2.fromScale(1.025, 1.025),
	}
)
backgroundTween:Play()

local logoFloatStartedAt = os.clock()
local logoFloatDistance = 8
local logoFloatConnection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	local elapsed = os.clock() - logoFloatStartedAt
	local offsetY = math.sin(elapsed * math.pi * 2 / 4.8) * logoFloatDistance
	local position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, logoBaseY, offsetY)
	logo.Position = position
	fallbackLogo.Position = position
end)

local ornamentTween = TweenService:Create(
	ornament,
	TweenInfo.new(2.5, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, -1, true),
	{ Rotation = 1.2 }
)
ornamentTween:Play()

local textPulseTween = TweenService:Create(
	statusText,
	TweenInfo.new(1.7, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, -1, true),
	{ TextTransparency = 0.13 }
)
textPulseTween:Play()

local animationRunning = true
task.spawn(function()
	local activeIndex = 1
	while animationRunning and screenGui.Parent do
		for index, dot in ipairs(dots) do
			local isActive = index == activeIndex
			TweenService:Create(
				dot,
				TweenInfo.new(0.2, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
				{
					BackgroundColor3 = isActive and COLORS.DeepBlue or COLORS.LightBlue,
					BackgroundTransparency = isActive and 0 or 0.38,
					Size = isActive and UDim2.fromOffset(20, 20) or UDim2.fromOffset(18, 18),
				}
			):Play()
		end

		activeIndex = (activeIndex % #dots) + 1
		task.wait(0.32)
	end
end)

local loadStartedAt = os.clock()
local gameLoaded = game:IsLoaded()

if not gameLoaded then
	task.spawn(function()
		game.Loaded:Wait()
		gameLoaded = true
	end)
end

local uiAssetsLoaded = false
local highQualityLogoLoaded = false

task.spawn(function()
	local success = pcall(function()
		ContentProvider:PreloadAsync({ logo })
	end)
	if not success or not logo.IsLoaded or not screenGui.Parent then
		return
	end

	highQualityLogoLoaded = true
	TweenService:Create(
		logo,
		TweenInfo.new(0.45, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
		{ ImageTransparency = 0 }
	):Play()
	TweenService:Create(
		fallbackLogo,
		TweenInfo.new(0.3, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
		{ ImageTransparency = 1 }
	):Play()
end)

task.spawn(function()
	local success, preloadError = pcall(function()
		ContentProvider:PreloadAsync({ background, fallbackLogo })
	end)
	if not success then
		warn("[FishyFishLoadingScreen] Base image preload failed:", preloadError)
	end
	uiAssetsLoaded = true

	if screenGui.Parent and not highQualityLogoLoaded then
		TweenService:Create(
			fallbackLogo,
			TweenInfo.new(0.45, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
			{ ImageTransparency = 0 }
		):Play()
	end
end)

while screenGui.Parent do
	local elapsed = os.clock() - loadStartedAt
	local minimumReached = elapsed >= MINIMUM_DISPLAY_TIME
	local ready = gameLoaded and uiAssetsLoaded and minimumReached
	local timedOut = elapsed >= MAXIMUM_DISPLAY_TIME
	if ready or timedOut then
		break
	end
	task.wait(0.05)
end

-- Keep the animated loading screen visible for inspection while testing in Studio.
-- Set STUDIO_PREVIEW_MODE to false when you want Studio to follow the live-game timing.
if RunService:IsStudio() and STUDIO_PREVIEW_MODE then
	while screenGui.Parent do
		task.wait(0.25)
	end
	logoFloatConnection:Disconnect()
	return
end

animationRunning = false
logoFloatConnection:Disconnect()

local fadeTween = TweenService:Create(
	root,
	TweenInfo.new(FADE_DURATION, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut),
	{ GroupTransparency = 1 }
)
local backgroundFadeTween = TweenService:Create(
	backgroundRoot,
	TweenInfo.new(FADE_DURATION, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut),
	{ GroupTransparency = 1 }
)
backgroundFadeTween:Play()
fadeTween:Play()
fadeTween.Completed:Wait()

screenGui:Destroy()
backgroundScreenGui:Destroy()

local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")

local BeginnerPondBuilder = {}

local function createLabel(part, textValue)
	local gui = Instance.new("SurfaceGui")
	gui.Name = part.Name .. "_SurfaceGui"
	gui.Face = Enum.NormalId.Front
	gui.CanvasSize = Vector2.new(800, 300)
	gui.Parent = part

	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.Text = textValue
	label.TextScaled = true
	label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(25, 30, 35)
	label.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	label.Parent = gui
end

local function removeExistingBeginnerPond()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		if (descendant:IsA("Model") or descendant:IsA("Folder")) and (descendant.Name == "BeginnerPondArea" or descendant.Name == "BeginnerPond_ExtraLarge" or descendant.Name == "Beginner Pond") then
			descendant:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

function BeginnerPondBuilder.build(parent, biome)
	local block = 4
	local biomePosition = (biome and biome.position) or Vector3.new(0, 8, 0)
	local center = Vector3.new(biomePosition.X, -2, biomePosition.Z)
	local areaName = (biome and biome.displayName) or "Lilyshore Island"

	local groundRadiusX = 32
	local groundRadiusZ = 29
	local waterRadiusX = 22
	local waterRadiusZ = 17
	local borderRadiusX = waterRadiusX + 1
	local borderRadiusZ = waterRadiusZ + 1
	local dockHalfWidth = 4
	local eastDockInnerX = waterRadiusX - 2
	local eastDockOuterX = waterRadiusX + 3
	local westDockInnerX = -eastDockInnerX
	local westDockOuterX = -eastDockOuterX
	local northDockInnerZ = -waterRadiusZ
	local northDockOuterZ = -(waterRadiusZ + 5)
	local southDockInnerZ = waterRadiusZ
	local southDockOuterZ = waterRadiusZ + 5
	local cornerPlatformX = waterRadiusX - 2
	local cornerPlatformZ = waterRadiusZ - 2
	local pathRadiusX = groundRadiusX - 4
	local pathRadiusZ = groundRadiusZ - 3

	removeExistingBeginnerPond()

	local pond = Instance.new("Model")
	pond.Name = "BeginnerPondArea"
	pond.Parent = parent

	local function makeFolder(parentObject, name, className)
		local folder = Instance.new(className or "Folder")
		folder.Name = name
		folder.Parent = parentObject
		return folder
	end

	local groundFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Ground")
	local pondFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Pond")
	local waterFolder = makeFolder(pondFolder, "Water")
	local deepWaterFolder = makeFolder(pondFolder, "DeepWater")
	local pondBorderFolder = makeFolder(pondFolder, "PondBorder")
	local lilyPadsFolder = makeFolder(pondFolder, "LilyPads")
	local fishingZoneFolder = makeFolder(pondFolder, "FishingZone")
	local dockFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Docks")
	local eastDockFolder = makeFolder(dockFolder, "Dock_East", "Model")
	local westDockFolder = makeFolder(dockFolder, "Dock_West", "Model")
	local northDockFolder = makeFolder(dockFolder, "Dock_North", "Model")
	local southDockFolder = makeFolder(dockFolder, "Dock_South", "Model")
	local platformDockFolder = makeFolder(dockFolder, "Dock_CornerPlatforms", "Model")
	local dockPostsFolder = makeFolder(dockFolder, "Posts")
	local pathsFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Paths")
	local lampsFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Lamps")
	local signsFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Signs")
	local treesFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Trees")
	makeFolder(pond, "Benches")
	local spotsFolder = makeFolder(pond, "FishingSpots")
	local barriersFolder = makeFolder(pond, "InvisibleBorders")
	local decorFolder = makeFolder(pond, "Decorations")

	local function localPosition(position)
		return center + position
	end

	local function makePondPart(parentObject, name, size, position, color, material, transparency, canCollide)
		local part = Instance.new("Part")
		part.Name = name
		part.Size = size
		part.Position = localPosition(position)
		part.Anchored = true
		part.Color = color
		part.Material = material or Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
		part.Transparency = transparency or 0
		part.CanCollide = canCollide ~= false
		part.TopSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
		part.BottomSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
		part.Parent = parentObject
		return part
	end

	local function makeBlock(parentObject, name, gridX, gridY, gridZ, color, material)
		return makePondPart(parentObject, name, Vector3.new(block, block, block), Vector3.new(gridX * block, gridY * block, gridZ * block), color, material)
	end

	local grassColor = Color3.fromRGB(95, 170, 65)
	local grassDark = Color3.fromRGB(68, 135, 50)
	local dirtColor = Color3.fromRGB(105, 72, 42)
	local stoneColor = Color3.fromRGB(125, 125, 125)
	local stoneDark = Color3.fromRGB(88, 88, 88)
	local waterColor = Color3.fromRGB(50, 145, 220)
	local deepWaterColor = Color3.fromRGB(35, 110, 180)
	local woodColor = Color3.fromRGB(135, 85, 45)
	local woodDark = Color3.fromRGB(90, 55, 28)
	local leafColor = Color3.fromRGB(65, 150, 55)
	local reedColor = Color3.fromRGB(75, 145, 55)
	local flowerWhite = Color3.fromRGB(245, 245, 220)
	local flowerYellow = Color3.fromRGB(245, 210, 65)
	local flowerPurple = Color3.fromRGB(150, 95, 230)
	local flowerBlue = Color3.fromRGB(80, 140, 255)

	for x = -groundRadiusX, groundRadiusX do
		for z = -groundRadiusZ, groundRadiusZ do
			if math.abs(x) <= waterRadiusX and math.abs(z) <= waterRadiusZ then
				makeBlock(groundFolder, "PondFloor", x, -1, z, dirtColor, Enum.Material.Ground)
			else
				makeBlock(groundFolder, "GrassBlock", x, 0, z, grassColor, Enum.Material.Grass)
				makeBlock(groundFolder, "DirtBlock", x, -1, z, dirtColor, Enum.Material.Ground)
			end
		end
	end

	for _, pos in ipairs({
		{ -groundRadiusX + 1, -groundRadiusZ + 1 }, { -groundRadiusX + 2, -groundRadiusZ + 1 }, { -groundRadiusX + 1, -groundRadiusZ + 2 }, { -groundRadiusX + 3, -groundRadiusZ + 1 }, { -groundRadiusX + 2, -groundRadiusZ + 2 },
		{ groundRadiusX - 1, -groundRadiusZ + 1 }, { groundRadiusX - 2, -groundRadiusZ + 1 }, { groundRadiusX - 1, -groundRadiusZ + 2 }, { groundRadiusX - 3, -groundRadiusZ + 1 }, { groundRadiusX - 2, -groundRadiusZ + 2 },
		{ -groundRadiusX + 1, groundRadiusZ - 1 }, { -groundRadiusX + 2, groundRadiusZ - 1 }, { -groundRadiusX + 1, groundRadiusZ - 2 }, { -groundRadiusX + 3, groundRadiusZ - 1 }, { -groundRadiusX + 2, groundRadiusZ - 2 },
		{ groundRadiusX - 1, groundRadiusZ - 1 }, { groundRadiusX - 2, groundRadiusZ - 1 }, { groundRadiusX - 1, groundRadiusZ - 2 }, { groundRadiusX - 3, groundRadiusZ - 1 }, { groundRadiusX - 2, groundRadiusZ - 2 },

	local function makeTree(x, z)

	makePondPart(signsFolder, "SignPost", Vector3.new(1, 5, 1), Vector3.new(-8, 4.5, 104), woodDark, Enum.Material.Wood)

	local barrierHeight = 36
	local barrierThickness = 4
	local outerX = (groundRadiusX * block) + (block / 2)
	local outerZ = (groundRadiusZ * block) + (block / 2)

	for _, barrier in ipairs({
		{ "BeginnerAreaBarrier_North", Vector3.new((outerX * 2) + barrierThickness, barrierHeight, barrierThickness), Vector3.new(0, barrierY, -outerZ - (barrierThickness / 2)) },
		{ "BeginnerAreaBarrier_South", Vector3.new((outerX * 2) + barrierThickness, barrierHeight, barrierThickness), Vector3.new(0, barrierY, outerZ + (barrierThickness / 2)) },
		{ "BeginnerAreaBarrier_West", Vector3.new(barrierThickness, barrierHeight, (outerZ * 2) + barrierThickness), Vector3.new(-outerX - (barrierThickness / 2), barrierY, 0) },
		{ "BeginnerAreaBarrier_East", Vector3.new(barrierThickness, barrierHeight, (outerZ * 2) + barrierThickness), Vector3.new(outerX + (barrierThickness / 2), barrierY, 0) },
	}) do

	local fishZone = makePondPart(fishingZoneFolder, "FishZone", Vector3.new((waterRadiusX * 2 + 4) * block, 12, (waterRadiusZ * 2 + 4) * block), Vector3.new(0, 5, 0), Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255), Enum.Material.ForceField, 1, false)
	fishZone:SetAttribute("AreaName", areaName)

	CollectionService:AddTag(fishZone, "FishingZone")

	pond.PrimaryPart = fishZone
	return pond
end

return BeginnerPondBuilder

local EconomyConfig = {}

EconomyConfig.IslandTiers = {
	LilyshoreIsland = 1,
	RiverbendIsland = 2,
	CoralCoastIsland = 3,
}

EconomyConfig.ExpectedWeightedFishValues = {
	LilyshoreIsland = 25.63,
	RiverbendIsland = 97.62,
	CoralCoastIsland = 231.2,
}

function EconomyConfig.EconomyValueForTier(tier)
	local normalizedTier = math.max(1, math.floor(tonumber(tier) or 1))
	return 25 * normalizedTier * normalizedTier
end

function EconomyConfig.GetIslandTier(islandId, islandConfig)
	local configuredTier = type(islandConfig) == "table" and islandConfig.economyTier or nil
	return math.max(1, math.floor(tonumber(configuredTier or EconomyConfig.IslandTiers[islandId]) or 1))
end

function EconomyConfig.GetHighestUnlockedTier(unlockedIslands, gameConfig)
	local highestTier = 1
	for _, islandId in ipairs(gameConfig.IslandOrder or gameConfig.BiomeOrder or {}) do
		if type(unlockedIslands) == "table" and unlockedIslands[islandId] == true then
			highestTier = math.max(highestTier, EconomyConfig.GetIslandTier(islandId, gameConfig.Biomes[islandId]))
		end
	end
	return highestTier
end

function EconomyConfig.CalculateWeightedFishValue(islandConfig)
	local chanceTotal = 0
	local weightedValueTotal = 0
	for _, fish in ipairs(islandConfig.fish or {}) do
		local chance = tonumber(fish.chance) or 0
		chanceTotal += chance
		weightedValueTotal += chance * (tonumber(fish.value) or 0)
	end

	local weightedAverage = chanceTotal > 0 and weightedValueTotal / chanceTotal or 0
	return chanceTotal, weightedAverage
end

function EconomyConfig.ValidateFishEconomy(gameConfig)
	local report = {}
	for _, islandId in ipairs(gameConfig.IslandOrder or gameConfig.BiomeOrder or {}) do
		local islandConfig = gameConfig.Biomes[islandId]
		assert(islandConfig, "Missing island configuration for " .. tostring(islandId))

		local chanceTotal, weightedAverage = EconomyConfig.CalculateWeightedFishValue(islandConfig)
		assert(math.abs(chanceTotal - 100) < 0.001, string.format("%s fish chances total %.4f instead of 100", islandId, chanceTotal))

		local expected = EconomyConfig.ExpectedWeightedFishValues[islandId]
		if expected then
			assert(math.abs(weightedAverage - expected) < 0.01, string.format("%s weighted value is %.4f instead of approximately %.2f", islandId, weightedAverage, expected))
		end

		report[islandId] = {
			tier = EconomyConfig.GetIslandTier(islandId, islandConfig),
			chanceTotal = chanceTotal,
			weightedAverage = weightedAverage,
		}
	end

	return report
end

return EconomyConfig

local FishingMinigameSimulation = {}

local FIXED_STEP = 1 / 60
local FIXED_STEP_EPSILON = 1e-7
local MAX_ADVANCE_SECONDS = 60

local Simulation = {}
Simulation.__index = Simulation

local function normalizeRarity(rarity)
	if rarity == "Mythical" then
		return "Mythic"
	end
	return rarity or "Common"
end

local function isSpecialRarity(rarity)
	return rarity == "Epic" or rarity == "Legendary" or rarity == "Mythic"
end

local function chooseFishTarget(self, preferFarTarget)
	if preferFarTarget then
		local jumpMin = tonumber(self.difficulty.jumpMin) or 0.12
		local jumpMax = math.max(jumpMin, tonumber(self.difficulty.jumpMax) or jumpMin)
		local direction = self.random:NextInteger(0, 1) == 0 and -1 or 1
		local distance = self.random:NextNumber(jumpMin, jumpMax)
		local target = self.fishY + (direction * distance)
		if target < 0.08 or target > 0.92 then
			target = self.fishY - (direction * distance)
		end
		return math.clamp(target, 0.08, 0.92)
	end

	return self.random:NextNumber(0.08, 0.92)
end

local function getMovementDirection(self)
	if self.fishVelocity > 0.01 then
		return 1
	elseif self.fishVelocity < -0.01 then
		return -1
	end
	return self.fishTarget >= self.fishY and 1 or -1
end

local function triggerRareReversal(self)
	local reverseDirection = -getMovementDirection(self)
	local availableDistance = reverseDirection < 0 and (self.fishY - 0.04) or (0.96 - self.fishY)
	if availableDistance < 0.12 then
		self.progress = math.min(self.progress, 0.849)
		return
	end

	self.rareReversalTriggered = true
	self.forcedReverseDirection = reverseDirection
	self.forcedReverseUntil = self.elapsed + 0.32
	local reverseSpeed = math.max((tonumber(self.difficulty.moveSpeed) or 0.25) * 2.4, 0.72)
	self.fishVelocity = reverseDirection * reverseSpeed
	self.fishTarget = math.clamp(self.fishY + (reverseDirection * 0.42), 0.06, 0.94)
	self.pauseUntil = 0
	self.burstUntil = 0
	self.nextDecisionAt = self.forcedReverseUntil + 0.10
end

function FishingMinigameSimulation.new(config, difficulty, seed, rarity)
	local resolvedRarity = normalizeRarity(rarity)
	local random = Random.new(math.floor(tonumber(seed) or 1))
	local barSize = math.clamp(tonumber(config.barSize) or 0.24, 0.16, 0.58)
	local simulation = setmetatable({
		config = config,
		difficulty = difficulty,
		rarity = resolvedRarity,
		random = random,
		barSize = barSize,
		maxBarTop = 1 - barSize,
		barTop = math.clamp(0.70, 0, 1 - barSize),
		barVelocity = 0,
		fishY = random:NextNumber(0.20, 0.80),
		fishTarget = random:NextNumber(0.15, 0.85),
		fishVelocity = 0,
		progress = math.clamp(tonumber(config.startProgress) or 0.34, 0.08, 0.86),
		elapsed = 0,
		accumulator = 0,
		pauseUntil = 0,
		burstUntil = 0,
		forcedReverseUntil = 0,
		forcedReverseDirection = 0,
		rareReversalTriggered = false,
		reelCompletedAt = nil,
		failedAt = nil,
	}, Simulation)
	simulation.nextDecisionAt = random:NextNumber(
		difficulty.turnIntervalMin or 1,
		difficulty.turnIntervalMax or 2
	)
	return simulation
end

function Simulation:_step(holding)
	if self.reelCompletedAt or self.failedAt then
		return
	end

	local deltaTime = FIXED_STEP
	self.elapsed += deltaTime

	if self.elapsed >= self.nextDecisionAt then
		local pauseChance = self.difficulty.pauseChance or 0
		local jumpChance = self.difficulty.jumpChance or 0
		local burstChance = self.difficulty.burstChance or 0
		self.fishTarget = chooseFishTarget(self, jumpChance > 0 and self.random:NextNumber() < jumpChance)

		if pauseChance > 0 and self.random:NextNumber() < pauseChance then
			self.pauseUntil = self.elapsed
				+ self.random:NextNumber(self.difficulty.pauseMin or 0.12, self.difficulty.pauseMax or 0.45)
		end
		if burstChance > 0 and self.random:NextNumber() < burstChance then
			self.burstUntil = self.elapsed
				+ self.random:NextNumber(self.difficulty.burstMin or 0.18, self.difficulty.burstMax or 0.38)
		end
		self.nextDecisionAt = self.elapsed
			+ self.random:NextNumber(self.difficulty.turnIntervalMin or 1, self.difficulty.turnIntervalMax or 2)
	end

	local targetVelocity = 0
	if self.elapsed < self.forcedReverseUntil then
		targetVelocity = self.forcedReverseDirection
			* math.max((tonumber(self.difficulty.moveSpeed) or 0.25) * 2.4, 0.72)
	elseif self.elapsed >= self.pauseUntil then
		local distance = self.fishTarget - self.fishY
		local targetSlack = tonumber(self.difficulty.targetSlack) or 0.025
		if math.abs(distance) < targetSlack then
			self.fishTarget = chooseFishTarget(self, false)
			distance = self.fishTarget - self.fishY
		end

		local direction = distance >= 0 and 1 or -1
		local jitter = self.random:NextNumber(-(self.difficulty.jitter or 0), self.difficulty.jitter or 0)
		local speed = tonumber(self.difficulty.moveSpeed) or 0.25
		if self.elapsed < self.burstUntil then
			speed *= tonumber(self.difficulty.burstMultiplier) or 1.35
		end
		targetVelocity = (direction * speed) + jitter
	end

	local fishAcceleration = tonumber(self.difficulty.acceleration) or 6
	self.fishVelocity += (targetVelocity - self.fishVelocity) * math.min(1, fishAcceleration * deltaTime)
	self.fishY += self.fishVelocity * deltaTime
	if self.fishY <= 0.04 then
		self.fishY = 0.04
		self.fishVelocity = math.abs(self.fishVelocity) * 0.35
		self.fishTarget = math.max(self.fishTarget, 0.16)
	elseif self.fishY >= 0.96 then
		self.fishY = 0.96
		self.fishVelocity = -math.abs(self.fishVelocity) * 0.35
		self.fishTarget = math.min(self.fishTarget, 0.84)
	end

	local barAcceleration = holding and -(self.config.lift or 2.75) or (self.config.gravity or 1.8)
	self.barVelocity += barAcceleration * deltaTime
	self.barVelocity = math.clamp(
		self.barVelocity,
		-(self.config.maxBarVelocity or 1.65),
		self.config.maxBarVelocity or 1.65
	)
	self.barVelocity *= math.pow(self.config.damping or 0.90, deltaTime * 60)
	self.barTop += self.barVelocity * deltaTime
	if self.barTop <= 0 then
		self.barTop = 0
		self.barVelocity = math.abs(self.barVelocity) * (self.config.bounceDamping or 0.36)
	elseif self.barTop >= self.maxBarTop then
		self.barTop = self.maxBarTop
		self.barVelocity = -math.abs(self.barVelocity) * (self.config.bounceDamping or 0.36)
	end

	local gainMultiplier = self.rarity == "Uncommon" and 0.88 or 1
	if self.fishY >= self.barTop and self.fishY <= self.barTop + self.barSize then
		self.progress += (self.config.progressGainPerSecond or 0.34) * gainMultiplier * deltaTime
	else
		self.progress -= (self.config.progressDrainPerSecond or 0.16) * deltaTime
	end
	self.progress = math.clamp(self.progress, 0, 1)

	if self.rarity == "Rare" and not self.rareReversalTriggered and self.progress >= 0.85 then
		triggerRareReversal(self)
	end
	if self.rarity == "Rare" and self.elapsed < self.forcedReverseUntil and self.progress >= 1 then
		self.progress = 0.995
	end

	if self.progress <= 0 then
		self.failedAt = self.elapsed
	elseif self.progress >= 1 then
		local minDuration = tonumber(self.config.minSuccessDuration) or 1.75
		if isSpecialRarity(self.rarity) or self.elapsed >= minDuration then
			self.reelCompletedAt = self.elapsed
		end
	end
end

function Simulation:advance(duration, holding)
	duration = math.clamp(tonumber(duration) or 0, 0, MAX_ADVANCE_SECONDS)
	self.accumulator += duration
	while self.accumulator + FIXED_STEP_EPSILON >= FIXED_STEP
		and not self.reelCompletedAt
		and not self.failedAt
	do
		self.accumulator = math.max(0, self.accumulator - FIXED_STEP)
		self:_step(holding == true)
	end
	return self:getSnapshot()
end

function Simulation:getSnapshot()
	return {
		barSize = self.barSize,
		barTop = self.barTop,
		fishY = self.fishY,
		progress = self.progress,
		elapsed = self.elapsed,
		reelCompletedAt = self.reelCompletedAt,
		failedAt = self.failedAt,
	}
end

return FishingMinigameSimulation

local ContentProvider = game:GetService("ContentProvider")
local Debris = game:GetService("Debris")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local FishingSFX = {}

local ASSET_IDS = {
	Cast = "rbxassetid://83682073380871",
	BiteAlert = "rbxassetid://72291234208295",
	ReelLoop = "rbxassetid://92659416339023",
	RevealCommon = "rbxassetid://74332544003952",
	RevealUncommon = "rbxassetid://125758019916365",
	RevealRare = "rbxassetid://109598132007713",
	RevealEpic = "rbxassetid://107836963921337",
	RevealLegendary = "rbxassetid://93961696300593",
	RevealMythic = "rbxassetid://110938581306711",
}

local REVEAL_ASSET_BY_RARITY = {
	Common = ASSET_IDS.RevealCommon,
	Uncommon = ASSET_IDS.RevealUncommon,
	Rare = ASSET_IDS.RevealRare,
	Epic = ASSET_IDS.RevealEpic,
	Legendary = ASSET_IDS.RevealLegendary,
	Mythic = ASSET_IDS.RevealMythic,
}

local REVEAL_VOLUME_BY_RARITY = {
	Common = 0.34,
	Uncommon = 0.38,
	Rare = 0.44,
	Epic = 0.50,
	Legendary = 0.58,
	Mythic = 0.64,
}

local soundRoot = SoundService:FindFirstChild("FishyFishSFX")
if not soundRoot then
	soundRoot = Instance.new("Folder")
	soundRoot.Name = "FishyFishSFX"
	soundRoot.Parent = SoundService
end

local random = Random.new()
local activeReelSound = nil
local reelFadeTween = nil

local function isSFXEnabled()
	return SoundService:GetAttribute("FishyFishSFXEnabled") ~= false
end

local function normalizeRarity(rarity)
	if rarity == "Mythical" then
		return "Mythic"
	end
	return REVEAL_ASSET_BY_RARITY[rarity] and rarity or "Common"
end

local function createSound(name, soundId, volume, playbackSpeed)
	local sound = Instance.new("Sound")
	sound.Name = name
	sound.SoundId = soundId
	sound.Volume = volume
	sound.PlaybackSpeed = playbackSpeed or 1
	sound:SetAttribute("FishyFishSFX", true)
	sound:SetAttribute("FishyFishOriginalVolume", volume)
	sound.Parent = soundRoot
	return sound
end

local function playOneShot(name, soundId, volume, playbackSpeed, cleanupDelay, startOffset)
	if not isSFXEnabled() then
		return nil
	end
	local sound = createSound(name, soundId, volume, playbackSpeed)
	if startOffset and startOffset > 0 then
		sound.TimePosition = startOffset
	end
	sound:Play()
	Debris:AddItem(sound, cleanupDelay or 5)
	return sound
end

function FishingSFX.getAssetId(assetName)
	return ASSET_IDS[assetName]
end

function FishingSFX.isEnabled()
	return isSFXEnabled()
end

function FishingSFX.playCast()
	playOneShot(
		"FishingCastSFX",
		ASSET_IDS.Cast,
		0.55,
		1,
		4,
		1.5
	)
end

function FishingSFX.playBiteAlert()
	playOneShot(
		"FishingBiteAlertSFX",
		ASSET_IDS.BiteAlert,
		0.52,
		1 + random:NextNumber(-0.012, 0.012),
		3
	)
end

function FishingSFX.startReeling(isAutoFish)
	FishingSFX.stopReeling(true)
	if not isSFXEnabled() then
		return
	end

	activeReelSound = createSound(
		"FishingReelLoopSFX",
		ASSET_IDS.ReelLoop,
		isAutoFish and 0.10 or 0.15,
		0.88
	)
	activeReelSound.Looped = true
	activeReelSound:Play()
end

function FishingSFX.setReelingHolding(holding)
	local reelSound = activeReelSound
	if not reelSound or reelSound.Parent == nil then
		return
	end

	if reelFadeTween then
		reelFadeTween:Cancel()
		reelFadeTween = nil
	end
	local targetVolume = holding and 0.34 or 0.15
	reelSound:SetAttribute("FishyFishOriginalVolume", targetVolume)
	reelSound.Volume = isSFXEnabled() and targetVolume or 0
	reelSound.PlaybackSpeed = holding and 1.04 or 0.88
end

function FishingSFX.stopReeling(immediate)
	local reelSound = activeReelSound
	activeReelSound = nil
	if reelFadeTween then
		reelFadeTween:Cancel()
		reelFadeTween = nil
	end
	if not reelSound or reelSound.Parent == nil then
		return
	end

	if immediate then
		reelSound:Stop()
		reelSound:Destroy()
		return
	end

	local fade = TweenService:Create(
		reelSound,
		TweenInfo.new(0.10, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear),
		{ Volume = 0 }
	)
	reelFadeTween = fade
	fade.Completed:Once(function()
		if reelFadeTween == fade then
			reelFadeTween = nil
		end
		if reelSound.Parent then
			reelSound:Stop()
			reelSound:Destroy()
		end
	end)
	fade:Play()
end

function FishingSFX.playCatchReveal(rarity, isAutoFish)
	local normalized = normalizeRarity(rarity)
	local volume = REVEAL_VOLUME_BY_RARITY[normalized] or REVEAL_VOLUME_BY_RARITY.Common
	if isAutoFish then
		volume *= 0.70
	end

	playOneShot(
		"FishingReveal" .. normalized .. "SFX",
		REVEAL_ASSET_BY_RARITY[normalized],
		volume,
		1,
		4
	)
end

task.spawn(function()
	local preloadSounds = {}
	for _, soundId in pairs(ASSET_IDS) do
		local sound = Instance.new("Sound")
		sound.SoundId = soundId
		table.insert(preloadSounds, sound)
	end
	pcall(function()
		ContentProvider:PreloadAsync(preloadSounds)
	end)
	for _, sound in ipairs(preloadSounds) do
		sound:Destroy()
	end
end)

return FishingSFX

local FishingWater = {}

FishingWater.NEARBY_RADIUS = 20
FishingWater.MAX_NEARBY_VERTICAL_DIFFERENCE = 18

local NEARBY_DISTANCES = { 0, 5, 10, 15, 20 }
local NEARBY_ANGLES = { 0, 45, 90, 135, 180, 225, 270, 315 }
local CAST_DISTANCES = { 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21, 25, 30, 36, 44 }
local CAST_ANGLES = { 0, 12, -12, 24, -24, 36, -36, 48, -48, 60, -60, 72, -72 }

local function makeRaycastParams(ignoreInstances)
	local params = RaycastParams.new()
	params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude
	params.FilterDescendantsInstances = ignoreInstances or {}
	params.IgnoreWater = false
	return params
end

local function isWaterResult(result)
	if not result then
		return false
	end

	if result.Material == Enum.Material.Water then
		return true
	end

	local instance = result.Instance
	local lowerName = instance and string.lower(instance.Name) or ""
	return string.find(lowerName, "water", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(lowerName, "ocean surface", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(lowerName, "oceansurface", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(lowerName, "pond surface", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(lowerName, "pondsurface", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(lowerName, "river surface", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(lowerName, "riversurface", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function castDown(candidate, referenceY, params, rayHeight, rayDepth)
	local origin = Vector3.new(candidate.X, referenceY + rayHeight, candidate.Z)
	local result = workspace:Raycast(origin, Vector3.new(0, -rayDepth, 0), params)
	if isWaterResult(result) then
		return result.Position, result
	end
	return nil, nil
end

function FishingWater.findNearbySurface(position, ignoreInstances, radius)
	local searchRadius = math.max(0, tonumber(radius) or FishingWater.NEARBY_RADIUS)
	local params = makeRaycastParams(ignoreInstances)

	for _, rawDistance in ipairs(NEARBY_DISTANCES) do
		local distance = rawDistance == 0 and 0 or math.min(rawDistance, searchRadius)
		if rawDistance > searchRadius and rawDistance ~= 0 then
			continue
		end

		local angles = distance == 0 and { 0 } or NEARBY_ANGLES
		for _, angleDegrees in ipairs(angles) do
			local angle = math.rad(angleDegrees)
			local candidate = position + Vector3.new(
				math.cos(angle) * distance,
				0,
				math.sin(angle) * distance
			)
			local surfacePosition, result = castDown(candidate, position.Y, params, 30, 150)
			if surfacePosition
				and math.abs(surfacePosition.Y - position.Y) <= FishingWater.MAX_NEARBY_VERTICAL_DIFFERENCE
			then
				return surfacePosition, result
			end
		end
	end

	return nil, nil
end

function FishingWater.isNearWater(position, ignoreInstances, radius)
	return FishingWater.findNearbySurface(position, ignoreInstances, radius) ~= nil
end

function FishingWater.findCastSurface(origin, forward, side, ignoreInstances, options)
	options = options or {}
	local horizontalForward = Vector3.new(forward.X, 0, forward.Z)
	if horizontalForward.Magnitude < 0.0001 then
		return nil, nil
	end
	horizontalForward = horizontalForward.Unit

	local horizontalSide = Vector3.new(side.X, 0, side.Z)
	if horizontalSide.Magnitude < 0.0001 then
		horizontalSide = Vector3.new(-horizontalForward.Z, 0, horizontalForward.X)
	else
		horizontalSide = horizontalSide.Unit
	end

	local params = makeRaycastParams(ignoreInstances)
	local distances = options.distances or CAST_DISTANCES
	local angles = options.angles or CAST_ANGLES
	local sideOffset = tonumber(options.sideOffset) or 0
	local rayHeight = tonumber(options.rayHeight) or 30
	local rayDepth = tonumber(options.rayDepth) or 160

	for _, distance in ipairs(distances) do
		for _, angleDegrees in ipairs(angles) do
			local angle = math.rad(angleDegrees)
			local direction = (horizontalForward * math.cos(angle))
				+ (horizontalSide * math.sin(angle))
			if direction.Magnitude > 0.0001 then
				direction = direction.Unit
			end

			local candidate = origin
				+ (direction * distance)
				+ (horizontalSide * sideOffset)
			local surfacePosition, result = castDown(candidate, origin.Y, params, rayHeight, rayDepth)
			if surfacePosition then
				return surfacePosition, result
			end
		end
	end

	return nil, nil
end

return FishingWater

function GameConfig.getFishingMinigameConfig(rarity, rodId)
	local defaults = GameConfig.FishingMinigame.Defaults
	local difficulty = GameConfig.FishingMinigame.RarityDifficulty[rarity] or GameConfig.FishingMinigame.RarityDifficulty.Common
	local rodBonus = GameConfig.FishingMinigame.RodBonuses[rodId] or GameConfig.FishingMinigame.RodBonuses.WoodenRod

	return {
		barSize = math.clamp(defaults.baseBarSize * rodBonus.barSizeMultiplier, 0.16, 0.58),
		progressGainPerSecond = defaults.progressGainPerSecond * rodBonus.progressGainMultiplier,
		progressDrainPerSecond = defaults.progressDrainPerSecond * rodBonus.progressDrainMultiplier,
		gravity = defaults.gravity,
		lift = defaults.lift,
		damping = defaults.damping,
		bounceDamping = defaults.bounceDamping,
		maxBarVelocity = defaults.maxBarVelocity,
		startProgress = defaults.startProgress,
		minSuccessDuration = defaults.minSuccessDuration,
		maxDuration = defaults.maxDuration + (GameConfig.FishingMinigame.ExtraDurationByRarity[rarity] or 0),
		difficulty = difficulty,
	}
end

function GameConfig.getAquariumFishSpace(fishOrId)
	local fishId = fishOrId
	local rarity = nil

	if type(fishOrId) == "table" then
		fishId = fishOrId.id or fishOrId.imageKey
		rarity = fishOrId.rarity
	end

	if fishId and GameConfig.FishAquariumSpace[fishId] then
		return GameConfig.FishAquariumSpace[fishId]
	end

	local raritySpace = {
		Common = 1,
		Uncommon = 3,
		Rare = 4,
		Epic = 5,
		Legendary = 10,
		Mythic = 14,
	}

	return raritySpace[rarity] or 2
end

function GameConfig.getAquariumUsedSpace(fishList)
	local total = 0
	for _, fish in ipairs(fishList or {}) do
		total += GameConfig.getAquariumFishSpace(fish)
	end
	return total
end

function GameConfig.normalizeIslandId(areaId)
	local normalized = IslandConfig.normalizeIslandId(areaId)
	return GameConfig.Biomes[normalized] and normalized or nil
end

function GameConfig.normalizeBiomeId(areaId)
	return GameConfig.normalizeIslandId(areaId)
end

function GameConfig.getLevelFromXP(xp)
	local level = 1
	local remaining = GameConfig.clampXP(xp)

	while level < GameConfig.MAX_LEVEL do
		local needed = GameConfig.getXPForNextLevel(level)
		if remaining < needed then
			break
		end

		remaining -= needed
		level += 1
	end

	return level, remaining, GameConfig.getXPForNextLevel(level)
end

function GameConfig.getXPForNextLevel(level)
	if level >= GameConfig.MAX_LEVEL then
		return 0
	end

	return 100 + ((level - 1) * 45)
end

function GameConfig.getFishCount()
	local total = 0

	for _, biomeId in ipairs(GameConfig.BiomeOrder) do
		total += #GameConfig.Biomes[biomeId].fish
	end

	return total
end

function GameConfig.findFish(fishId)
	for _, biomeId in ipairs(GameConfig.BiomeOrder) do
		local biome = GameConfig.Biomes[biomeId]
		for _, fish in ipairs(biome.fish) do
			if fish.id == fishId then
				return fish, biomeId
			end
		end
	end

	return nil, nil
end

function GameConfig.getFishImage(fishId)
	local imageId = GameConfig.FishImageIds[fishId]
	if type(imageId) == "string" and imageId ~= "" then
		return imageId
	end

	return nil
end

function GameConfig.getRodImage(rodId)
	local imageId = GameConfig.RodImageIds[rodId]
	if type(imageId) == "string" and imageId ~= "" then
		return imageId
	end

	return nil
end

function GameConfig.getTotalXPForLevel(level)
	local total = 0
	local targetLevel = math.clamp(math.floor(tonumber(level) or 1), 1, GameConfig.MAX_LEVEL)
	for currentLevel = 1, targetLevel - 1 do
		total += GameConfig.getXPForNextLevel(currentLevel)
	end
	return total
end

function GameConfig.getMaxXP()
	return GameConfig.getTotalXPForLevel(GameConfig.MAX_LEVEL)
end

function GameConfig.clampXP(xp)
	return math.clamp(math.floor(tonumber(xp) or 0), 0, GameConfig.getMaxXP())
end

function GameConfig.getBaitImage(baitId)
	local imageId = GameConfig.BaitImageIds[baitId]
	if type(imageId) == "string" and imageId ~= "" then
		return imageId
	end

	return nil
end

function GameConfig.getBiomeUnlockText(biomeId)
	biomeId = GameConfig.normalizeIslandId(biomeId)
	local biome = GameConfig.Biomes[biomeId]
	if not biome then
		return "Unknown"
	end

	if biome.cost == 0 then
		return "Free"
	end

	local text = string.format("Level %d + %d Coins", biome.unlockLevel, biome.cost)
	if biome.requiredRod and GameConfig.Rods[biome.requiredRod] then
		text ..= " + " .. GameConfig.Rods[biome.requiredRod].displayName
	end

	return text
end

return GameConfig

local LoginRewardConfig = {}

LoginRewardConfig.MilestoneDays = {
	[7] = true,
	[14] = true,
	[21] = true,
}

LoginRewardConfig.FinalDecorationPool = {
	"Coral",
	"Seaweed",
	"TreasureChest",
	"Rocks",
	"ShipwreckPiece",
	"BubbleMachine",
	"Clams",
	"Driftwood",
}

local VALID_CYCLE_LENGTHS = {
	[28] = true,
	[29] = true,
	[30] = true,
	[31] = true,
}

local function nonnegativeInteger(value)
	local number = tonumber(value)
	if not number or number ~= number or number == math.huge or number == -math.huge then
		return 0
	end
	return math.max(0, math.floor(number))
end

function LoginRewardConfig.IsLeapYear(year)
	year = math.floor(tonumber(year) or 0)
	return year % 400 == 0 or (year % 4 == 0 and year % 100 ~= 0)
end

function LoginRewardConfig.DaysInMonth(year, month)
	year = math.floor(tonumber(year) or 1970)
	month = math.clamp(math.floor(tonumber(month) or 1), 1, 12)
	if month == 2 then
		return LoginRewardConfig.IsLeapYear(year) and 29 or 28
	end
	if month == 4 or month == 6 or month == 9 or month == 11 then
		return 30
	end
	return 31
end

function LoginRewardConfig.UtcNow(timestamp)
	local date = os.date("!*t", timestamp)
	return {
		year = date.year,
		month = date.month,
		day = date.day,
		hour = date.hour,
		min = date.min,
		sec = date.sec,
	}
end

function LoginRewardConfig.MonthKey(date)
	return string.format("%04d-%02d", date.year, date.month)
end

function LoginRewardConfig.DateKey(date)
	return string.format("%04d-%02d-%02d", date.year, date.month, date.day)
end

function LoginRewardConfig.IsValidMonthKey(value)
	if type(value) ~= "string" then
		return false
	end
	local yearText, monthText = string.match(value, "^(%d%d%d%d)%-(%d%d)$")
	local year = tonumber(yearText)
	local month = tonumber(monthText)
	return year ~= nil and year >= 1970 and month ~= nil and month >= 1 and month <= 12
end

function LoginRewardConfig.IsValidDateKey(value)
	if value == "" then
		return true
	end
	if type(value) ~= "string" then
		return false
	end
	local yearText, monthText, dayText = string.match(value, "^(%d%d%d%d)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d)$")
	local year = tonumber(yearText)
	local month = tonumber(monthText)
	local day = tonumber(dayText)
	return year ~= nil
		and year >= 1970
		and month ~= nil
		and month >= 1
		and month <= 12
		and day ~= nil
		and day >= 1
		and day <= LoginRewardConfig.DaysInMonth(year, month)
end

function LoginRewardConfig.MakeDefault(now)
	now = now or LoginRewardConfig.UtcNow()
	return {
		CurrentDay = 1,
		DaysInCycle = LoginRewardConfig.DaysInMonth(now.year, now.month),
		CycleMonthKey = LoginRewardConfig.MonthKey(now),
		LastClaimDate = "",
		CompletedCycles = 0,
	}
end

function LoginRewardConfig.Normalize(value, now)
	now = now or LoginRewardConfig.UtcNow()
	local defaults = LoginRewardConfig.MakeDefault(now)
	local source = type(value) == "table" and value or {}
	local daysInCycle = nonnegativeInteger(source.DaysInCycle)
	if not VALID_CYCLE_LENGTHS[daysInCycle] then
		daysInCycle = defaults.DaysInCycle
	end

	local monthKey = source.CycleMonthKey
	if not LoginRewardConfig.IsValidMonthKey(monthKey) then
		monthKey = defaults.CycleMonthKey
	end

	local lastClaimDate = source.LastClaimDate
	if not LoginRewardConfig.IsValidDateKey(lastClaimDate) then
		lastClaimDate = ""
	end

	return {
		CurrentDay = math.clamp(nonnegativeInteger(source.CurrentDay), 1, daysInCycle),
		DaysInCycle = daysInCycle,
		CycleMonthKey = monthKey,
		LastClaimDate = lastClaimDate,
		CompletedCycles = nonnegativeInteger(source.CompletedCycles),
	}
end

function LoginRewardConfig.GetReward(day, daysInCycle, economyValue)
	day = math.clamp(math.floor(tonumber(day) or 1), 1, math.max(1, math.floor(tonumber(daysInCycle) or 28)))
	daysInCycle = math.max(day, math.floor(tonumber(daysInCycle) or 28))
	economyValue = math.max(0, tonumber(economyValue) or 0)

	local reward = {
		day = day,
		coins = math.round(2 * economyValue),
		bait = { FreshBait = 2 },
		seaStars = 0,
		resourceCount = 0,
		isMilestone = false,
		isFinal = false,
	}

	if day == daysInCycle then
		reward.coins = math.round(30 * economyValue)
		reward.bait = { MysticBait = 5 }
		reward.seaStars = 30
		reward.cycleSeaStars = 75
		reward.decorationReward = true
		reward.isFinal = true
		reward.isMilestone = true
	elseif day == 7 then
		reward.coins = math.round(8 * economyValue)
		reward.bait = { LuckyBait = 5 }
		reward.seaStars = 10
		reward.resourceCount = 3
		reward.isMilestone = true
	elseif day == 14 then
		reward.coins = math.round(12 * economyValue)
		reward.bait = { MysticBait = 3 }
		reward.seaStars = 15
		reward.isMilestone = true
	elseif day == 21 then
		reward.coins = math.round(18 * economyValue)
		reward.bait = {}
		reward.seaStars = 20
		reward.resourceCount = 6
		reward.guaranteeUncommon = true
		reward.isMilestone = true
	elseif day % 3 == 0 then
		reward.bait = { LuckyBait = 1 }
	end

	return reward
end

function LoginRewardConfig.FormatReward(reward)
	local parts = {}
	if (reward.coins or 0) > 0 then
		table.insert(parts, tostring(reward.coins) .. " Coins")
	end
	for _, baitId in ipairs({ "FreshBait", "LuckyBait", "MysticBait" }) do
		local amount = reward.bait and reward.bait[baitId] or 0
		if amount > 0 then
			local displayName = string.gsub(baitId, "Bait$", " Bait")
			table.insert(parts, tostring(amount) .. " " .. displayName)
		end
	end
	if (reward.seaStars or 0) > 0 then
		table.insert(parts, tostring(reward.seaStars) .. " Sea Stars")
	end
	if (reward.cycleSeaStars or 0) > 0 then
		table.insert(parts, tostring(reward.cycleSeaStars) .. " Cycle Sea Stars")
	end
	if (reward.resourceCount or 0) > 0 then
		table.insert(parts, tostring(reward.resourceCount) .. " weighted resources")
	end
	if reward.decorationReward then
		table.insert(parts, "1 new aquarium decoration (or 10 Sea Stars)")
	end
	return table.concat(parts, " • ")
end

function LoginRewardConfig.Validate()
	assert(LoginRewardConfig.DaysInMonth(2025, 3) == 31, "March must have 31 days")
	assert(LoginRewardConfig.DaysInMonth(2025, 4) == 30, "April must have 30 days")
	assert(LoginRewardConfig.DaysInMonth(2025, 2) == 28, "Normal February must have 28 days")
	assert(LoginRewardConfig.DaysInMonth(2024, 2) == 29, "Leap-year February must have 29 days")
	assert(LoginRewardConfig.GetReward(7, 31, 25).resourceCount == 3, "Day 7 reward is incorrect")
	assert(LoginRewardConfig.GetReward(14, 31, 25).bait.MysticBait == 3, "Day 14 reward is incorrect")
	assert(LoginRewardConfig.GetReward(21, 31, 25).guaranteeUncommon == true, "Day 21 guarantee is missing")
	local final = LoginRewardConfig.GetReward(30, 30, 25)
	assert(final.isFinal and final.seaStars == 30 and final.cycleSeaStars == 75, "Final reward is incorrect")
	return true
end

return LoginRewardConfig

local function rebuildDeveloperProductIndex()
	local developerProductById = {}
	for key, product in pairs(MonetizationConfig.DeveloperProducts) do
		local productId = tonumber(product.id) or tonumber(product.Id)
		if productId and productId > 0 then
			developerProductById[productId] = key
		end
	end
	MonetizationConfig.DeveloperProductById = developerProductById
end

rebuildDeveloperProductIndex()

local function normalizeCatalogName(value)
	return string.lower(tostring(value or "")):gsub("%s+", " "):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
end

function MonetizationConfig.ApplyDeveloperProductCatalog(products)
	if type(products) ~= "table" then
		return 0
	end

	local configuredByName = {}
	for productKey, product in pairs(MonetizationConfig.DeveloperProducts) do
		local catalogName = normalizeCatalogName(product.catalogName or product.name)
		if catalogName ~= "" then
			configuredByName[catalogName] = { key = productKey, product = product }
		end
	end

	local resolvedCount = 0
	for _, catalogProduct in ipairs(products) do
		local productId = tonumber(catalogProduct.ProductId)
			or tonumber(catalogProduct.productId)
			or tonumber(catalogProduct.Id)
			or tonumber(catalogProduct.id)
		local catalogName = normalizeCatalogName(catalogProduct.Name or catalogProduct.name)
		local configured = configuredByName[catalogName]
		local catalogPrice = tonumber(catalogProduct.PriceInRobux)
			or tonumber(catalogProduct.priceInRobux)
			or tonumber(catalogProduct.Price)
		if configured and productId and productId > 0 then
			local expectedPrice = tonumber(configured.product.priceRobux or configured.product.Price)
			if not expectedPrice or not catalogPrice or expectedPrice == catalogPrice then
				configured.product.id = productId
				configured.product.Id = productId
				resolvedCount += 1
			end
		end
	end

	rebuildDeveloperProductIndex()
	return resolvedCount
end

function MonetizationConfig.ApplyResolvedProductIds(productIds)
	if type(productIds) ~= "table" then
		return 0
	end

	local applied = 0
	for productKey, productIdValue in pairs(productIds) do
		local product = MonetizationConfig.DeveloperProducts[productKey]
		local productId = tonumber(productIdValue)
		if product and productId and productId > 0 then
			product.id = productId
			product.Id = productId
			applied += 1
		end
	end
	rebuildDeveloperProductIndex()
	return applied
end

function MonetizationConfig.ResolveDeveloperProductIds(marketplaceService)
	if not marketplaceService or type(marketplaceService.GetDeveloperProductsAsync) ~= "function" then
		return false, "MarketplaceService:GetDeveloperProductsAsync is unavailable"
	end

	local success, pagesOrError = pcall(function()
		return marketplaceService:GetDeveloperProductsAsync()
	end)
	if not success then
		return false, pagesOrError
	end

	local pages = pagesOrError
	local allProducts = {}
	while pages do
		for _, product in ipairs(pages:GetCurrentPage()) do
			table.insert(allProducts, product)
		end
		if pages.IsFinished then
			break
		end

		local advanced, advanceError = pcall(function()
			pages:AdvanceToNextPageAsync()
		end)
		if not advanced then
			return false, advanceError
		end
	end
	local resolvedCount = MonetizationConfig.ApplyDeveloperProductCatalog(allProducts)

	local missing = {}
	for _, productKey in ipairs(MonetizationConfig.SeaStarProductOrder) do
		local product = MonetizationConfig.DeveloperProducts[productKey]
		if not product or (tonumber(product.id) or 0) <= 0 then
			table.insert(missing, productKey)
		end
	end

	if #missing > 0 then
		return false, "Missing catalog products: " .. table.concat(missing, ", ")
	end

	return true, resolvedCount
end

return MonetizationConfig
