local function sanitizeNonnegativeInteger(value)
	local number = tonumber(value)
	if not number or number ~= number or number == math.huge or number == -math.huge then
		return 0
	end
	return math.max(0, math.floor(number))
end

function ResourceConfig.NormalizeInventory(inventory)
	local normalized = {}
	for _, resourceId in ipairs(ResourceConfig.ResourceOrder) do
		normalized[resourceId] = sanitizeNonnegativeInteger(type(inventory) == "table" and inventory[resourceId])
	end
	return normalized
end

function ResourceConfig.NormalizePity(value)
	return sanitizeNonnegativeInteger(value)
end

function ResourceConfig.GetIslandDropTable(islandId)
	return ResourceConfig.IslandDropTables[islandId]
end

function ResourceConfig.GetDropChance(rating, isAutoFish)
	if isAutoFish then
		return ResourceConfig.DropChances.AutoFish
	end
	return ResourceConfig.DropChances[rating] or ResourceConfig.DropChances.Weak
end

function ResourceConfig.SelectResource(islandId, unitRoll)
	local dropTable = ResourceConfig.GetIslandDropTable(islandId)
	if not dropTable then
		return nil
	end

	local roll = math.clamp(tonumber(unitRoll) or 0, 0, 0.999999999) * 100
	local cumulative = 0
	for _, entry in ipairs(dropTable) do
		cumulative += entry.weight
		if roll < cumulative then
			return entry.resourceId
		end
	end

	return dropTable[#dropTable] and dropTable[#dropTable].resourceId or nil
end

function ResourceConfig.Validate(gameConfig)
	local seenResources = {}
	for order, resourceId in ipairs(ResourceConfig.ResourceOrder) do
		local resource = ResourceConfig.Resources[resourceId]
		assert(resource, "Missing resource " .. resourceId)
		assert(resource.id == resourceId, resourceId .. " must expose its stable id")
		assert(type(resource.displayName) == "string" and resource.displayName ~= "", resourceId .. " needs a display name")
		assert(resource.category == "Metals" or resource.category == "Gems", resourceId .. " has an invalid category")
		assert(resource.bazaarEligible == true and resource.loginEligible == true, resourceId .. " eligibility flags are incorrect")
		assert(resource.displayOrder == order, resourceId .. " has an invalid display order")
		assert(type(resource.usedFor) == "string" and resource.usedFor ~= "", resourceId .. " needs a usedFor rod id")
		assert(resource.iconId == nil or type(resource.iconId) == "string" or type(resource.iconId) == "number", resourceId .. " iconId must be optional")
		assert(resource.npcFloorValue == nil or tonumber(resource.npcFloorValue) ~= nil, resourceId .. " npcFloorValue must be optional")
		seenResources[resourceId] = true
	end

	local resourceCount = 0
	for resourceId in pairs(ResourceConfig.Resources) do
		resourceCount += 1
		assert(seenResources[resourceId] == true, "Unexpected resource " .. tostring(resourceId))
	end
	assert(resourceCount == 4, "ResourceConfig must contain exactly four resources")

	for islandId, dropTable in pairs(ResourceConfig.IslandDropTables) do
		local totalWeight = 0
		for _, entry in ipairs(dropTable) do
			assert(ResourceConfig.Resources[entry.resourceId], islandId .. " references an unknown resource")
			totalWeight += tonumber(entry.weight) or 0
		end
		assert(totalWeight == 100, islandId .. " resource weights must total 100")
	end
	assert(ResourceConfig.IslandDropTables.CoralCoastIsland == nil, "Coral Coast must not have a resource drop table")

	if gameConfig then
		for rodId, recipe in pairs(ResourceConfig.RodRecipes) do
			local rod = gameConfig.Rods and gameConfig.Rods[rodId]
			assert(rod, "Missing configured rod " .. rodId)
			assert(rod.previousRod == recipe.previousRod, rodId .. " previous rod is incorrect")
			assert(rod.unlockLevel == recipe.level, rodId .. " level requirement is incorrect")
			assert(rod.cost == recipe.coins, rodId .. " coin requirement is incorrect")
			for resourceId, amount in pairs(recipe.resources) do
				assert(rod.resourceCosts and rod.resourceCosts[resourceId] == amount, rodId .. " resource requirement is incorrect")
			end
		end
	end

	return true
end

return ResourceConfig

local ServerStorage = game:GetService("ServerStorage")

local AquariumThemeService = {}

local THEME_FOLDER_NAME = "AquariumThemesV21"
local THEME_MODEL_NAME = "AquariumPremiumTheme"
local STANDARD_TANK_SIZE = Vector3.new(40, 15, 14)

local function isBackdropPart(part)
	return string.find(string.upper(part.Name), "BACKDROP", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function isThemeHelperPart(part)
	local name = string.upper(part.Name)
	return string.find(name, "PIVOT", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(name, "ANCHORMARKER", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function configurePart(part)
	local isStructuralFrame = not isBackdropPart(part) and not isThemeHelperPart(part)
	part.Anchored = true
	part.CanCollide = isStructuralFrame
	part.CanTouch = false
	part.CanQuery = isStructuralFrame
	part.Massless = true
	part.CastShadow = false
	if isStructuralFrame then
		pcall(function()
			part.CollisionGroup = "Default"
		end)
	end
	part:SetAttribute("AquariumThemeSavedTransparency", part.Transparency)
end

local function setBackdropVisible(model, visible)
	for _, descendant in ipairs(model:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and isBackdropPart(descendant) then
			local savedTransparency = descendant:GetAttribute("AquariumThemeSavedTransparency")
			if savedTransparency == nil then
				savedTransparency = descendant.Transparency
				descendant:SetAttribute("AquariumThemeSavedTransparency", savedTransparency)
			end
			descendant.Transparency = visible and savedTransparency or 1
		end
	end
end

local function isDefaultFramePart(part)
	local name = part.Name
	return name == "AquariumFramePost"
		or string.sub(name, 1, 16) == "AquariumTopFrame"
		or string.sub(name, 1, 19) == "AquariumBottomFrame"
end

local function setDefaultFrameVisible(tank, visible)
	for _, descendant in ipairs(tank:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and isDefaultFramePart(descendant) then
			local savedTransparency = descendant:GetAttribute("AquariumDefaultFrameTransparency")
			if savedTransparency == nil then
				savedTransparency = descendant.Transparency
				descendant:SetAttribute("AquariumDefaultFrameTransparency", savedTransparency)
			end
			descendant.Transparency = visible and savedTransparency or 1
		end
	end
end

local function scaleAndPlace(template, name, targetAnchor, dimensions)
	local clone = template:Clone()
	clone.Name = name

	local sourcePivot = clone:GetPivot()
	local scale = Vector3.new(
		dimensions.tankWidth / STANDARD_TANK_SIZE.X,
		dimensions.tankHeight / STANDARD_TANK_SIZE.Y,
		dimensions.tankDepth / STANDARD_TANK_SIZE.Z
	)

	for _, descendant in ipairs(clone:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
			local relative = sourcePivot:ToObjectSpace(descendant.CFrame)
			local relativePosition = relative.Position
			local scaledPosition = Vector3.new(
				relativePosition.X * scale.X,
				relativePosition.Y * scale.Y,
				relativePosition.Z * scale.Z
			)
			descendant.Size = Vector3.new(
				descendant.Size.X * scale.X,
				descendant.Size.Y * scale.Y,
				descendant.Size.Z * scale.Z
			)
			descendant.CFrame = targetAnchor * CFrame.new(scaledPosition) * relative.Rotation
			configurePart(descendant)
		end
	end

	return clone
end

function AquariumThemeService.apply(tank, themeId, origin, dimensions, backdropEnabled)
	local oldTheme = tank:FindFirstChild(THEME_MODEL_NAME)
	if oldTheme then
		oldTheme:Destroy()
	end

	-- Remove legacy split assets from aquariums created before the v2.1 combined models.
	local oldFrame = tank:FindFirstChild("AquariumPremiumThemeFrame")
	if oldFrame then
		oldFrame:Destroy()
	end

	local oldBackdrop = tank:FindFirstChild("AquariumPremiumThemeBackdrop")
	if oldBackdrop then
		oldBackdrop:Destroy()
	end

	local proceduralBackdrop = tank:FindFirstChild("AquariumDesignerBackground")
	local themeFolder = ServerStorage:FindFirstChild(THEME_FOLDER_NAME)
	local themeTemplate = themeFolder and themeFolder:FindFirstChild(themeId)
	if not (themeTemplate and themeTemplate:IsA("Model")) then
		warn(string.format("[AquariumThemeService] Missing imported v2.1 theme asset for %s", tostring(themeId)))
		setDefaultFrameVisible(tank, true)
		if proceduralBackdrop and proceduralBackdrop:IsA("BasePart") then
			proceduralBackdrop.Transparency = backdropEnabled and 0.08 or 1
		end
		return false
	end

	setDefaultFrameVisible(tank, false)
	if proceduralBackdrop and proceduralBackdrop:IsA("BasePart") then
		proceduralBackdrop.Transparency = 1
	end

	local targetAnchor = CFrame.new(origin + Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)) * CFrame.Angles(0, math.pi, 0)
	local theme = scaleAndPlace(themeTemplate, THEME_MODEL_NAME, targetAnchor, dimensions)
	theme.Parent = tank
	setBackdropVisible(theme, backdropEnabled)

	return true
end

return AquariumThemeService

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local TEMPLATE_NAME = "FishingBackpackTemplate"
local VISUAL_NAME = "FishingBackpackVisual"
local STOWED_ROD_NAME = "StowedFishingRodVisual"

local BACKPACK_VERTICAL_OFFSET = 0.08
local BACKPACK_GAP = 0.06
local ROD_VFX_PREFIX = "FishyFishRodVFX_"

local function isStowedRodEffect(descendant)
	return string.sub(descendant.Name, 1, #ROD_VFX_PREFIX) == ROD_VFX_PREFIX
		or descendant:IsA("ParticleEmitter")
		or descendant:IsA("Trail")
		or descendant:IsA("Beam")
		or descendant:IsA("Smoke")
		or descendant:IsA("Fire")
		or descendant:IsA("Sparkles")
		or descendant:IsA("Light")
		or descendant:IsA("Highlight")
end

local function configurePart(part)
	part.Anchored = false
	part.CanCollide = false
	part.CanTouch = false
	part.CanQuery = false
	part.Massless = true
	part.CastShadow = true
end

local function findPrimaryPart(model)
	if model.PrimaryPart then
		return model.PrimaryPart
	end

	local part = model:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart", true)
	if part then
		model.PrimaryPart = part
	end
	return part
end

local function clearStowedRod(backpackVisual)
	local existing = backpackVisual and backpackVisual:FindFirstChild(STOWED_ROD_NAME)
	if existing then
		existing:Destroy()
	end
end

local function createStowedRod(player, character, backpackVisual, backpackPart)
	clearStowedRod(backpackVisual)
	-- Never show the backpack copy while the real rod is equipped. Checking the
	-- character first also closes the brief Backpack/Character reparenting race.
	if character:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod") then
		return
	end

	local playerBackpack = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("Backpack")
	local sourceTool = playerBackpack and playerBackpack:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
	if not sourceTool or not sourceTool:IsA("Tool") then
		return
	end

	local container = Instance.new("Model")
	container.Name = STOWED_ROD_NAME
	container.Parent = backpackVisual

	local rodClone = sourceTool:Clone()
	rodClone.Name = "FishingRod"
	rodClone:SetAttribute("DisableRodVFX", true)
	rodClone:SetAttribute("ActiveRodVFXPreset", nil)
	rodClone.Parent = container

	for _, descendant in rodClone:GetDescendants() do
		if descendant:IsA("LuaSourceContainer") then
			descendant:Destroy()
		elseif isStowedRodEffect(descendant) then
			descendant:Destroy()
		elseif descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
			configurePart(descendant)
		end
	end

	local handle = rodClone:FindFirstChild("Handle")
	if not handle or not handle:IsA("BasePart") then
		container:Destroy()
		return
	end

	-- The rod sits vertically along the player's right side, slightly outside the pack.
	handle.CFrame = character:GetPivot()
		* CFrame.new(0.98, 0.15, 1.12)
		* CFrame.Angles(0, 0, math.rad(-11))

	local weld = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
	weld.Name = "BackpackRodWeld"
	weld.Part0 = backpackPart
	weld.Part1 = handle
	weld.Parent = handle
end

local function attachBackpack(player, character)
	local torso = character:WaitForChild("UpperTorso", 8) or character:WaitForChild("Torso", 2)
	if not torso or not torso:IsA("BasePart") then
		return
	end

	local previous = character:FindFirstChild(VISUAL_NAME)
	if previous then
		previous:Destroy()
	end

	local template = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild(TEMPLATE_NAME, 12)
	if not template or not template:IsA("Model") then
		warn("[BackpackVisual] Missing ReplicatedStorage." .. TEMPLATE_NAME)
		return
	end

	local visual = template:Clone()
	visual.Name = VISUAL_NAME
	visual.Parent = character

	local backpackPart = findPrimaryPart(visual)
	if not backpackPart then
		visual:Destroy()
		return
	end

	for _, descendant in visual:GetDescendants() do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
			configurePart(descendant)
		end
	end

	-- Rotate the imported model so its decorated buckle-and-pocket face points
	-- away from the character, its bedroll stays above the pack, and the
	-- shoulder-strap side rests against the torso.
	local target = torso.CFrame
		* CFrame.new(0, BACKPACK_VERTICAL_OFFSET, torso.Size.Z * 0.5 + BACKPACK_GAP)
		* CFrame.Angles(math.pi, 0, 0)
	visual:PivotTo(target)

	local weld = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
	weld.Name = "BackpackWeld"
	weld.Part0 = torso
	weld.Part1 = backpackPart
	weld.Parent = backpackPart

	local refreshQueued = false
	local function refreshStowedRod()
		if refreshQueued then
			return
		end
		refreshQueued = true
		task.defer(function()
			refreshQueued = false
			if not visual.Parent or not character.Parent then
				return
			end
			createStowedRod(player, character, visual, backpackPart)
		end)
	end

	local playerBackpack = player:WaitForChild("Backpack", 8)
	if playerBackpack then
		playerBackpack.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
			if child.Name == "Fishing Rod" then
				refreshStowedRod()
			end
		end)
		playerBackpack.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(child)
			if child.Name == "Fishing Rod" then
				clearStowedRod(visual)
				refreshStowedRod()
			end
		end)
		playerBackpack.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
			local tool = descendant:FindFirstAncestor("Fishing Rod")
			if tool and tool:IsA("Tool") then
				refreshStowedRod()
			end
		end)
		playerBackpack.DescendantRemoving:Connect(function(descendant)
			local tool = descendant:FindFirstAncestor("Fishing Rod")
			if tool and tool:IsA("Tool") then
				refreshStowedRod()
			end
		end)
	end
	character.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		if child.Name == "Fishing Rod" then
			clearStowedRod(visual)
		end
	end)
	character.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(child)
		if child.Name == "Fishing Rod" then
			refreshStowedRod()
		end
	end)

	refreshStowedRod()
end

local function bindPlayer(player)
	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
		task.spawn(attachBackpack, player, character)
	end)

	if player.Character then
		task.spawn(attachBackpack, player, player.Character)
	end
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(bindPlayer)
for _, player in Players:GetPlayers() do
	bindPlayer(player)
end

local BAG_ICON = "rbxassetid://75795273892452"

local BAG_TOOL_NAMES = {
	Bag = true,
	Backpack = true,
}

local function isBagTool(instance)
	return instance:IsA("Tool") and BAG_TOOL_NAMES[instance.Name] == true
end

local function applyBagIcon(tool)
	if not isBagTool(tool) then
		return
	end

	tool.RequiresHandle = false
	tool.CanBeDropped = false
	tool.TextureId = BAG_ICON

	print("[BagIconFix] Applied:", tool:GetFullName(), tool.TextureId)
end

local function bindBagTool(tool)
	if not isBagTool(tool) then
		return
	end

	applyBagIcon(tool)

	if tool:GetAttribute("BagIconFixBound") then
		return
	end

	tool:SetAttribute("BagIconFixBound", true)

	tool:GetPropertyChangedSignal("TextureId"):Connect(function()
		if tool.TextureId ~= BAG_ICON then
			warn("[BagIconFix] Someone changed Bag TextureId:", tool:GetFullName(), tool.TextureId)
			tool.TextureId = BAG_ICON
		end
	end)
end

for _, instance in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
	bindBagTool(instance)
end

game.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(instance)
	task.defer(function()
		bindBagTool(instance)
	end)
end)

local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local ServerStorage = game:GetService("ServerStorage")
local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")
local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")

local Installer = {}

local TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME = "FishyFishModelTemplates"
local TEMPLATE_NAME = "Carp"
local IMPORTED_NAME = "Carp_New"
local DEFAULT_YAW_DEGREES = 90

local function getTemplateFolder()
	local folder = ServerStorage:FindFirstChild(TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME)
	if not folder then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME
		folder.Parent = ServerStorage
	end
	return folder
end

local function collectParts(root)
	local parts = {}
	local largestPart = nil
	local largestVolume = 0
	for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
			table.insert(parts, descendant)
			local volume = descendant.Size.X * descendant.Size.Y * descendant.Size.Z
			if volume > largestVolume then
				largestVolume = volume
				largestPart = descendant
			end
		end
	end
	return parts, largestPart
end

local function printHierarchy(root)
	print("[CarpAquarium] hierarchy inside " .. root:GetFullName())
	local function visit(instance, depth)
		local details = ""
		if instance:IsA("MeshPart") then
			details = " MeshId=" .. instance.MeshId .. " TextureID=" .. instance.TextureID
		end
		print(string.rep("  ", depth) .. "- " .. instance.Name .. " [" .. instance.ClassName .. "]" .. details)
		for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetChildren()) do
			visit(child, depth + 1)
		end
	end
	visit(root, 0)
end

local function isShopCarpReference(instance)
	local path = string.lower(instance:GetFullName())
	if instance:IsA("ImageLabel") or instance:IsA("ImageButton") then
		return string.find(path, "carp", 1, true) ~= nil
			or string.find(instance.Image, "85530716090863", 1, true) ~= nil
	end
	return instance:IsA("ViewportFrame") and string.find(path, "carp", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function captureShopReferences()
	local references = {}
	for _, root in ipairs({ StarterGui, ReplicatedStorage, Workspace }) do
		for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
			if isShopCarpReference(descendant) then
				local value = if descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") or descendant:IsA("ImageButton")
					then descendant.Image
					else "ViewportFrame"
				table.insert(references, descendant:GetFullName() .. "|" .. descendant.ClassName .. "|" .. value)
			end
		end
	end
	table.sort(references)
	return references
end

local function printShopReferences(references)
	print("[CarpAquarium] Seaside Shop Carp image/icon references (read-only):")
	if #references == 0 then
		print("  No live Carp-named ImageLabel/ImageButton/ViewportFrame instances found in Edit mode.")
	end
	for _, reference in ipairs(references) do
		print("  " .. reference)
	end
	print("  Source image asset: ReplicatedStorage.Shared.GameConfig.FishImageAssets.Carp = rbxassetid://85530716090863")
	print("  Source icon path: ReplicatedStorage.Shared.GameConfig.FishImageFiles.Carp = assets/fish_icons/Carp.png")
end

local function clearOldVisualGeometry(container)
	for _, descendant in ipairs(container:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("WeldConstraint") or descendant:IsA("Motor6D") then
			descendant:Destroy()
		end
	end
	for _, descendant in ipairs(container:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
			descendant:Destroy()
		end
	end
	for _, descendant in ipairs(container:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("Model") and #descendant:GetChildren() == 0 then
			descendant:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function prepareTemplate(model)
	model.Name = TEMPLATE_NAME
	model:SetAttribute("FishTemplateId", TEMPLATE_NAME)
	model:SetAttribute("AquariumOnlyTemplate", true)
	if model:GetAttribute("FishVisualYawDegrees") == nil then
		model:SetAttribute("FishVisualYawDegrees", DEFAULT_YAW_DEGREES)
	end

	local parts, largestPart = collectParts(model)
	assert(#parts > 0, "Workspace.Carp_New contains no BasePart or MeshPart descendants.")
	model.PrimaryPart = largestPart or parts[1]

	for _, part in ipairs(parts) do
		part.Anchored = true
		part.CanCollide = false
		part.CanTouch = false
		part.CanQuery = true
		part.Massless = true
	end

	local boundsCFrame = select(1, model:GetBoundingBox())
	model.PrimaryPart.PivotOffset = model.PrimaryPart.CFrame:ToObjectSpace(boundsCFrame)

	for _, part in ipairs(parts) do
		if part ~= model.PrimaryPart then
			local weld = Instance.new("WeldConstraint")
			weld.Name = "CarpAquariumTemplateWeld"
			weld.Part0 = model.PrimaryPart
			weld.Part1 = part
			weld.Parent = part
		end
	end
end

local function removeRuntimeClones()
	local removed = {}
	for _, descendant in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("Model") and descendant.Name == "AquariumFish_Carp" then
			table.insert(removed, descendant:GetFullName())
			descendant:Destroy()
		end
	end
	return removed
end

function Installer.inspect()
	local folder = ServerStorage:FindFirstChild(TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME)
	local oldTemplate = folder and folder:FindFirstChild(TEMPLATE_NAME)
	local imported = Workspace:FindFirstChild(IMPORTED_NAME)

	print("[CarpAquarium] exact aquarium Carp template path:", oldTemplate and oldTemplate:GetFullName() or "none; FishingServer procedural fallback")
	print("[CarpAquarium] exact runtime clone source:", "ServerStorage." .. TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME .. "." .. TEMPLATE_NAME)
	printShopReferences(captureShopReferences())
	assert(imported and imported:IsA("Model"), "Expected the existing Workspace.Carp_New Model.")
	printHierarchy(imported)
	return true
end

function Installer.install()
	local imported = Workspace:FindFirstChild(IMPORTED_NAME)
	assert(imported and imported:IsA("Model"), "Expected the existing Workspace.Carp_New Model.")
	local shopBefore = captureShopReferences()
	local folder = getTemplateFolder()
	local template = folder:FindFirstChild(TEMPLATE_NAME)

	if template and template:IsA("Model") then
		clearOldVisualGeometry(template)
	else
		if template then
			template:Destroy()
		end
		template = Instance.new("Model")
		template.Name = TEMPLATE_NAME
		template.Parent = folder
	end

	for _, tag in ipairs(CollectionService:GetTags(imported)) do
		CollectionService:AddTag(template, tag)
	end
	for attributeName, attributeValue in pairs(imported:GetAttributes()) do
		if string.sub(attributeName, 1, 3) == "RBX" then
			print("[CarpAquarium] skipped protected import attribute:", attributeName)
		else
			local copied = pcall(function()
				template:SetAttribute(attributeName, attributeValue)
			end)
			if not copied then
				print("[CarpAquarium] skipped unwritable import attribute:", attributeName)
			end
		end
	end

	local children = imported:GetChildren()
	assert(#children > 0, "Workspace.Carp_New has no visual children to install.")
	for _, child in ipairs(children) do
		child.Parent = template
	end

	prepareTemplate(template)
	template.Parent = folder
	template:PivotTo(CFrame.new(0, -1000, 0))
	local removedClones = removeRuntimeClones()
	imported:Destroy()

	local shopAfter = captureShopReferences()
	assert(#shopBefore == #shopAfter, "A shop Carp image/icon reference count changed during installation.")
	for index, reference in ipairs(shopBefore) do
		assert(shopAfter[index] == reference, "A shop Carp image/icon reference changed during installation: " .. reference)
	end

	print("[CarpAquarium] final aquarium Carp template path:", template:GetFullName())
	print("[CarpAquarium] runtime clone source remains:", "ServerStorage." .. TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME .. "." .. TEMPLATE_NAME)
	print("[CarpAquarium] old aquarium Carp clones regenerated on next aquarium render; removed now:", #removedClones)
	for _, path in ipairs(removedClones) do
		print("  " .. path)
	end
	print("[CarpAquarium] Workspace.Carp_New removed after safe transfer.")
	print("[CarpAquarium] VERIFIED: no Seaside Shop Carp image/icon property changed.")
	return template:GetFullName(), #removedClones
end

function Installer.verifyRuntime()
	local folder = ServerStorage:FindFirstChild(TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME)
	local template = folder and folder:FindFirstChild(TEMPLATE_NAME)
	assert(template and template:IsA("Model"), "Aquarium Carp template is missing.")
	local templateParts = collectParts(template)
	assert(#templateParts > 0, "Aquarium Carp template has no visual parts.")

	local clones = {}
	for _, descendant in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("Model") and descendant.Name == "AquariumFish_Carp" then
			table.insert(clones, descendant)
		end
	end
	print("[CarpAquarium] runtime AquariumFish_Carp clones:", #clones)
	for _, clone in ipairs(clones) do
		local visual = clone:FindFirstChild("FishVisual")
		local parts = visual and collectParts(visual) or {}
		print("  ", clone:GetFullName(), "FishVisual=", visual ~= nil, "parts=", #parts)
	end
	printShopReferences(captureShopReferences())
	return #clones
end

return Installer

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local GameConfig = require(ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared"):WaitForChild("GameConfig"))
local Remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("FishingRemotes")

local GetCastConfig = Remotes:FindFirstChild("GetCastConfig")
if not GetCastConfig then
	GetCastConfig = Instance.new("RemoteFunction")
	GetCastConfig.Name = "GetCastConfig"
	GetCastConfig.Parent = Remotes
end

local CastConfigService = {}

local pendingCasts = {}
local lastCenters = {}
local options = {}
local random = Random.new()

local function getCastingConfig()
	return GameConfig.Casting or {}
end

local function normalizeIslandId(areaId)
	if GameConfig.normalizeIslandId then
		return GameConfig.normalizeIslandId(areaId) or areaId
	end

	return areaId
end

local function getRodPerfectBonus(rodId)
	local casting = getCastingConfig()
	local bonuses = casting.RodPerfectZoneBonuses or {}
	return tonumber(bonuses[rodId or "WoodenRod"]) or 0
end

local function chooseSpeed()
	local casting = getCastingConfig()
	local speeds = casting.meterSpeeds or {
		{ name = "Slow", min = 0.62, max = 0.78 },
		{ name = "Medium", min = 0.86, max = 1.04 },
		{ name = "Fast", min = 1.10, max = 1.28 },
	}

	local choice = speeds[random:NextInteger(1, #speeds)]
	return random:NextNumber(choice.min, choice.max), choice.name
end

local function chooseStart()
	return 0, 1, "Left"
end

local function makeAttemptId(player)
	return tostring(player.UserId) .. ":" .. tostring(math.floor(os.clock() * 1000)) .. ":" .. tostring(random:NextInteger(100000, 999999))
end

local function generateConfig(player, data, biomeId)
	local casting = getCastingConfig()
	local minRadius = tonumber(casting.perfectRadiusMin) or 0.035
	local maxRadius = tonumber(casting.perfectRadiusMax) or 0.058
	local rodId = data and data.EquippedRod or "WoodenRod"
	local perfectRadius = math.clamp(random:NextNumber(minRadius, maxRadius) * (1 + getRodPerfectBonus(rodId)), 0.03, 0.09)
	local edgeMargin = math.max(tonumber(casting.perfectEdgeMargin) or 0.08, perfectRadius + 0.035)
	local perfectCenter = random:NextNumber(edgeMargin, 1 - edgeMargin)
	local previousCenter = lastCenters[player]
	local minShift = tonumber(casting.minPerfectCenterShift) or 0.08

	if previousCenter and math.abs(perfectCenter - previousCenter) < minShift then
		local direction = perfectCenter >= 0.5 and -1 or 1
		perfectCenter = math.clamp(previousCenter + direction * random:NextNumber(minShift, minShift + 0.12), edgeMargin, 1 - edgeMargin)
	end

	lastCenters[player] = perfectCenter

	local meterSpeed, speedName = chooseSpeed()
	local startProgress, direction, startName = chooseStart()
	local attemptId = makeAttemptId(player)
	local config = {
		attemptId = attemptId,
		biomeId = biomeId,
		rodId = rodId,
		perfectCenter = perfectCenter,
		perfectRadius = perfectRadius,
		greatRadius = math.clamp(perfectRadius + (tonumber(casting.greatExtraRadius) or 0.065), perfectRadius, 0.5),
		goodRadius = math.clamp(perfectRadius + (tonumber(casting.goodExtraRadius) or 0.20), perfectRadius, 0.5),
		meterSpeed = meterSpeed,
		speedName = speedName,
		startProgress = startProgress,
		startName = startName,
		direction = direction,
		createdAt = os.clock(),
		expiresAt = os.clock() + (tonumber(casting.castConfigLifetime) or 20),
	}

	pendingCasts[player] = config
	return config
end

local function publicConfig(config)
	return {
		ok = true,
		attemptId = config.attemptId,
		perfectCenter = config.perfectCenter,
		perfectRadius = config.perfectRadius,
		greatRadius = config.greatRadius,
		goodRadius = config.goodRadius,
		meterSpeed = config.meterSpeed,
		speedName = config.speedName,
		startProgress = config.startProgress,
		startName = config.startName,
		direction = config.direction,
	}
end

function CastConfigService.configure(nextOptions)
	options = nextOptions or {}
end

function CastConfigService.getCastResult(castPower, castConfig)
	local casting = getCastingConfig()
	local power = math.clamp(tonumber(castPower) or casting.defaultPower or 0.5, 0, 1)
	local perfectCenter = math.clamp(tonumber(castConfig and castConfig.perfectCenter) or tonumber(casting.perfectCenter) or 0.72, 0, 1)
	local perfectRadius = math.clamp(tonumber(castConfig and castConfig.perfectRadius) or tonumber(casting.perfectRadius) or 0.045, 0.01, 0.5)
	local greatRadius = math.clamp(tonumber(castConfig and castConfig.greatRadius) or tonumber(casting.greatRadius) or 0.11, perfectRadius, 0.5)
	local goodRadius = math.clamp(tonumber(castConfig and castConfig.goodRadius) or tonumber(casting.goodRadius) or 0.24, greatRadius, 0.5)
	local accuracy = math.abs(power - perfectCenter)
	local rating = "Weak"

	if accuracy <= perfectRadius then
		rating = "Perfect"
	elseif accuracy <= greatRadius then
		rating = "Great"
	elseif accuracy <= goodRadius then
		rating = "Good"
	end

	local ratingConfig = (casting.Ratings and casting.Ratings[rating]) or {}
	return {
		power = power,
		rating = rating,
		displayName = ratingConfig.displayName or rating,
		accuracy = accuracy,
		biteSpeedMultiplier = tonumber(ratingConfig.biteSpeedMultiplier) or 1,
		progressGainMultiplier = tonumber(ratingConfig.progressGainMultiplier) or 1,
		countsAsPerfect = ratingConfig.countsAsPerfect == true or rating == "Perfect",
		sparkle = ratingConfig.sparkle == true,
	}
end

function CastConfigService.consume(player, castRequest, data, biomeId)
	local power = castRequest and (castRequest.castPower or castRequest.power) or nil
	if tonumber(power) == nil then
		return nil
	end

	local attemptId = castRequest and castRequest.castAttemptId
	local config = pendingCasts[player]
	pendingCasts[player] = nil

	if not config
		or config.attemptId ~= attemptId
		or config.biomeId ~= biomeId
		or os.clock() > config.expiresAt
	then
		return CastConfigService.getCastResult(power, nil)
	end

	return CastConfigService.getCastResult(power, config)
end

function CastConfigService.clearPlayer(player)
	pendingCasts[player] = nil
	lastCenters[player] = nil
end

GetCastConfig.OnServerInvoke = function(player, biomeId)
	local data = options.getPlayerData and options.getPlayerData(player)
	if not data then
		return { ok = false, message = "Player data is still loading." }
	end

	local currentBiome = normalizeIslandId(options.getPlayerFishingBiome and options.getPlayerFishingBiome(player))
	if not currentBiome then
		return { ok = false, message = "Move to a fishing area first." }
	end

	biomeId = normalizeIslandId(biomeId)
	if biomeId and biomeId ~= currentBiome then
		return { ok = false, message = "You can only cast where you are standing." }
	end

	if options.isBiomeUnlocked and not options.isBiomeUnlocked(data, currentBiome) then
		return { ok = false, message = "Unlock that island first." }
	end

	return publicConfig(generateConfig(player, data, currentBiome))
end

return CastConfigService

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")

local MonetizationConfig = require(ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared"):WaitForChild("MonetizationConfig"))
local Remotes = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("FishingRemotes")
local Notice = Remotes and Remotes:FindFirstChild("Notice")
local OpenShop = Remotes and Remotes:FindFirstChild("OpenShop")

local CastleShopService = {}

local MODEL_NAME = "CastleShop"
local LEGACY_MODEL_NAME = "CastleShopArea"
local DEFAULT_ORIGIN = Vector3.new(-420, 0, 260)
local currentOrigin = DEFAULT_ORIGIN

local LIMESTONE = Color3.fromRGB(222, 218, 180)
local LIMESTONE_SHADOW = Color3.fromRGB(194, 190, 152)
local SAFETY_BLUE = Color3.fromRGB(80, 210, 255)
local STONE_DARK = Color3.fromRGB(74, 78, 84)
local STONE = Color3.fromRGB(104, 109, 116)
local STONE_LIGHT = Color3.fromRGB(156, 160, 166)
local STONE_TRIM = Color3.fromRGB(184, 186, 190)
local WOOD = Color3.fromRGB(94, 61, 38)
local WOOD_DARK = Color3.fromRGB(54, 37, 27)
local GOLD = Color3.fromRGB(238, 186, 64)
local BLUE = Color3.fromRGB(42, 96, 190)
local RED = Color3.fromRGB(176, 46, 52)
local GREEN = Color3.fromRGB(38, 150, 86)
local PURPLE = Color3.fromRGB(112, 72, 170)

local promptConnections = {}
local connectedPrompts = {}

local function makeFolder(parent, name)
	local folder = Instance.new("Folder")
	folder.Name = name
	folder.Parent = parent
	return folder
end

local function notify(player, message)
	if player and Notice then
		Notice:FireClient(player, message)
	end
end

local function getOpenShopRemote()
	if OpenShop and OpenShop.Parent then
		return OpenShop
	end

	Remotes = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("FishingRemotes")
	if not Remotes then
		return nil
	end

	OpenShop = Remotes:FindFirstChild("OpenShop")
	if not OpenShop then
		OpenShop = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
		OpenShop.Name = "OpenShop"
		OpenShop.Parent = Remotes
	end

	return OpenShop
end

local function makePart(parent, name, size, position, color, material, transparency, canCollide)
	local part = Instance.new("Part")
	part.Name = name
	part.Size = size
	part.Position = position
	part.Anchored = true
	part.Color = color
	part.Material = material or Enum.Material.Slate
	part.Transparency = transparency or 0
	part.CanCollide = canCollide ~= false
	part.TopSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	part.BottomSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	part.Parent = parent
	return part
end

local function addText(part, textValue, face, textColor, textSize)
	local gui = Instance.new("SurfaceGui")
	gui.Name = "CastleShopText"
	gui.Face = face or Enum.NormalId.Front
	gui.CanvasSize = Vector2.new(900, 360)
	gui.Parent = part

	local text = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	text.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	text.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	text.Text = textValue
	text.TextColor3 = textColor or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	text.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	text.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(18, 20, 24)
	text.TextScaled = true
	text.TextWrapped = true
	text.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	text.Parent = gui

	local constraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
	constraint.MinTextSize = 10
	constraint.MaxTextSize = textSize or 38
	constraint.Parent = text
end

local function makeSign(parent, name, position, size, textValue, color, face, textColor, textSize)
	local sign = makePart(parent, name, size, position, color, Enum.Material.Wood)
	addText(sign, textValue, face or Enum.NormalId.Front, textColor, textSize)
	return sign
end

local function makePromptPart(parent, name, position, size, purchaseKind, purchaseKey, actionText, objectText)
	local promptPart = makePart(parent, name, size, position, Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255), Enum.Material.ForceField, 1, false)
	promptPart:SetAttribute("PurchaseKind", purchaseKind)
	promptPart:SetAttribute("PurchaseKey", purchaseKey)

	local prompt = Instance.new("ProximityPrompt")
	prompt.Name = "CastleShopPurchasePrompt"
	prompt.ActionText = actionText or "Purchase"
	prompt.ObjectText = objectText or "Castle Shop"
	prompt.KeyboardKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.E
	prompt.HoldDuration = 0.25
	prompt.MaxActivationDistance = 12
	prompt.RequiresLineOfSight = false
	prompt.Parent = promptPart
	return prompt
end

local function makeOpenShopPromptPart(parent, name, position, size, shopTab, actionText, objectText)
	local promptPart = makePart(parent, name, size, position, Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 255), Enum.Material.ForceField, 1, false)
	promptPart:SetAttribute("CastleShopAction", "OpenShop")
	promptPart:SetAttribute("ShopTab", shopTab or "Passes")

	local prompt = Instance.new("ProximityPrompt")
	prompt.Name = "CastleShopOpenPrompt"
	prompt.ActionText = actionText or "Open Shop"
	prompt.ObjectText = objectText or "Castle Shop"
	prompt.KeyboardKeyCode = Enum.KeyCode.E
	prompt.HoldDuration = 0.15
	prompt.MaxActivationDistance = 14
	prompt.RequiresLineOfSight = false
	prompt.Enabled = true
	prompt.Parent = promptPart
	return prompt
end

local function makeSafetyWall(parent, name, size, offset)
	local wall = makePart(parent, name, size, currentOrigin + offset, SAFETY_BLUE, Enum.Material.ForceField, 1, true)
	wall.CanTouch = false
	wall.CanQuery = true
	pcall(function()
		wall.CollisionGroup = "Default"
	end)
	return wall
end

local function makeBattlements(parent, prefix, z, xStart, xEnd, y)
	local index = 0
	for x = xStart, xEnd, 10 do
		index += 1
		makePart(parent, prefix .. "_Battlement_" .. tostring(index), Vector3.new(5, 5, 5), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, y, z), STONE_TRIM, Enum.Material.Slate)
	end
end

local function makeSideBattlements(parent, prefix, x, zStart, zEnd, y)
	local index = 0
	for z = zStart, zEnd, 10 do
		index += 1
		makePart(parent, prefix .. "_Battlement_" .. tostring(index), Vector3.new(5, 5, 5), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, y, z), STONE_TRIM, Enum.Material.Slate)
	end
end

local function makeTower(parent, name, x, z)
	local tower = Instance.new("Model")
	tower.Name = name
	tower.Parent = parent

	local base = makePart(tower, "TowerBase", Vector3.new(24, 34, 24), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 16, z), STONE_DARK, Enum.Material.Slate)
	makePart(tower, "TowerLightTrim", Vector3.new(26, 3, 26), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 31.5, z), STONE_LIGHT, Enum.Material.Slate)
	makePart(tower, "TowerTop", Vector3.new(28, 4, 28), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 36, z), STONE, Enum.Material.Slate)

	for dx = -10, 10, 10 do
		for dz = -10, 10, 10 do
			if math.abs(dx) == 10 or math.abs(dz) == 10 then
				makePart(tower, "TowerCrenel", Vector3.new(5, 5, 5), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x + dx, 40.5, z + dz), STONE_TRIM, Enum.Material.Slate)
			end
		end
	end

	tower.PrimaryPart = base
end

local function makeBanner(parent, name, x, z, color)
	makePart(parent, name .. "_Pole", Vector3.new(0.5, 11, 0.5), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 19, z), WOOD_DARK, Enum.Material.Wood, 0, false)
	makePart(parent, name .. "_Cloth", Vector3.new(5, 9, 0.5), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 16.5, z - 0.15), color, Enum.Material.Fabric, 0, false)
	makePart(parent, name .. "_Tip", Vector3.new(1.3, 1.3, 1.3), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 25, z), GOLD, Enum.Material.Metal, 0, false)
end

local function makeBooth(parent, name, x, z, boothColor, title, description, options)
	local booth = Instance.new("Model")
	booth.Name = name
	booth.Parent = parent

	makePart(booth, "BoothFloor", Vector3.new(30, 1, 18), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 1.2, z), STONE, Enum.Material.Slate)
	makePart(booth, "BoothCounter", Vector3.new(25, 5, 4), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 4.2, z - 6), WOOD, Enum.Material.WoodPlanks)
	makePart(booth, "BoothBack", Vector3.new(28, 16, 2), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 10, z + 8), STONE_DARK, Enum.Material.Slate)
	makePart(booth, "BoothTrim", Vector3.new(30, 2, 3), currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 17.2, z + 7.5), boothColor, Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic)
	makeBanner(booth, "BannerLeft", x - 11, z + 6.6, boothColor)
	makeBanner(booth, "BannerRight", x + 11, z + 6.6, boothColor)

	makeSign(
		booth,
		"BoothSign",
		currentOrigin + Vector3.new(x, 11.2, z + 6.35),
		Vector3.new(25, 11, 0.6),
		title .. "\n" .. description,
		Color3.fromRGB(35, 42, 54),
		Enum.NormalId.Front,
		Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
		24
	)

	local optionCount = math.max(1, #options)
	local spacing = optionCount > 1 and 8 or 0
	local startX = x - ((optionCount - 1) * spacing / 2)
	for index, option in ipairs(options) do
		local optionX = startX + ((index - 1) * spacing)
		local optionSign = makeSign(
			booth,
			option.key .. "_OptionSign",
			currentOrigin + Vector3.new(optionX, 6.6, z - 8.4),
			Vector3.new(optionCount > 1 and 7.2 or 18, 3.5, 0.5),
			option.label,
			boothColor,
			Enum.NormalId.Front,
			Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
			18
		)
		if option.kind == "OpenShop" then
			makeOpenShopPromptPart(
				booth,
				option.key .. "_PromptPart",
				optionSign.Position + Vector3.new(0, -0.5, -2.2),
				Vector3.new(optionCount > 1 and 8 or 20, 5, 4),
				option.shopTab or option.key,
				option.actionText or "Open Shop",
				option.objectText or title
			)
		else
			makePromptPart(
				booth,
				option.key .. "_PromptPart",
				optionSign.Position + Vector3.new(0, -0.5, -2.2),
				Vector3.new(optionCount > 1 and 8 or 20, 5, 4),
				option.kind,
				option.key,
				option.actionText or "Purchase",
				option.objectText or title
			)
		end
	end
end

function CastleShopService.clear()
	for _, connection in ipairs(promptConnections) do
		connection:Disconnect()
	end
	table.clear(promptConnections)
	table.clear(connectedPrompts)

	for _, modelName in ipairs({ MODEL_NAME, LEGACY_MODEL_NAME }) do
		local existing = workspace:FindFirstChild(modelName, true)
		while existing do
			existing:Destroy()
			existing = workspace:FindFirstChild(modelName, true)
		end
	end
end

function CastleShopService.promptPurchase(player, purchaseKind, purchaseKey)
	if purchaseKind == "GamePass" then
		local pass = MonetizationConfig.GamePasses[purchaseKey]
		if not pass then
			return
		end
		if pass.purchasable == false then
			notify(player, pass.name .. " is coming soon.")
			return
		end

		local ownsPass = false
		local ownsSuccess = pcall(function()
			ownsPass = MarketplaceService:UserOwnsGamePassAsync(player.UserId, pass.id)
		end)
		if ownsSuccess and ownsPass then
			notify(player, "You already own " .. pass.name .. ".")
			return
		end

		local success, err = pcall(function()
			print("Prompting purchase:", pass.name or purchaseKey, pass.id)
			if purchaseKey == "VipAngler" then
				print("Prompting VIP Angler Pass purchase:", pass.id)
			elseif purchaseKey == "SmallBag" then
				print("Prompting Small Bag Upgrade purchase:", pass.id)
			elseif purchaseKey == "MediumBag" then
				print("Prompting Medium Bag Upgrade purchase:", pass.id)
			elseif purchaseKey == "LargeBag" then
				print("Prompting Large Bag Upgrade purchase:", pass.id)
			end
			MarketplaceService:PromptGamePassPurchase(player, pass.id)
		end)
		if not success then
			warn("Castle shop game pass prompt failed", player.Name, purchaseKey, err)
			notify(player, "Purchase prompt failed. Check the game pass ID before publishing.")
		end
	elseif purchaseKind == "Product" then
		local product = MonetizationConfig.DeveloperProducts[purchaseKey]
		if not product then
			return
		end
		local productId = tonumber(product.id) or tonumber(product.Id)
		if product.purchasable == false or not productId or productId <= 0 then
			notify(player, (product.name or "That product") .. " is coming soon.")
			return
		end

		local success, err = pcall(function()
			print("Prompting purchase:", product.name or purchaseKey, productId)
			MarketplaceService:PromptProductPurchase(player, productId)
		end)
		if not success then
			warn("Castle shop product prompt failed", player.Name, purchaseKey, err)
			notify(player, "Purchase prompt failed. Check the product ID before publishing.")
		end
	end
end

function CastleShopService.openShop(player, shopTab)
	local remote = getOpenShopRemote()
	if not remote then
		warn("Castle shop could not open Shop UI because OpenShop remote is missing.")
		notify(player, "Shop is not ready yet. Try again in a moment.")
		return
	end

	print("Opening shop from castle")
	remote:FireClient(player, shopTab or "Passes")
end

function CastleShopService.connectPrompts(root)
	for _, descendant in ipairs((root or workspace):GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("ProximityPrompt")
			and (descendant.Name == "CastleShopPurchasePrompt" or descendant.Name == "CastleShopOpenPrompt")
			and not connectedPrompts[descendant]
		then
			connectedPrompts[descendant] = true
			descendant.Enabled = true
			descendant.RequiresLineOfSight = false
			descendant:SetAttribute("CastleShopConnected", true)
			table.insert(promptConnections, descendant.Triggered:Connect(function(player)
				print("Castle shop interaction triggered")
				local promptPart = descendant.Parent
				if promptPart and promptPart:IsA("BasePart") then
					local action = promptPart:GetAttribute("CastleShopAction")
					if action == "OpenShop" then
						CastleShopService.openShop(player, promptPart:GetAttribute("ShopTab"))
						return
					end

					local purchaseKind = promptPart:GetAttribute("PurchaseKind")
					local purchaseKey = promptPart:GetAttribute("PurchaseKey")
					if purchaseKind == "GamePass" or purchaseKind == "Product" then
						CastleShopService.promptPurchase(player, purchaseKind, purchaseKey)
					else
						CastleShopService.openShop(player, "Passes")
					end
				end
			end))
			descendant.Destroying:Connect(function()
				connectedPrompts[descendant] = nil
			end)
		end
	end
end

local function ensureCastleOpenShopPrompt(castle)
	if castle:FindFirstChild("CastleShopOpenPrompt", true) then
		return
	end

	local pivot, size = castle:GetBoundingBox()
	local promptFolder = castle:FindFirstChild("Prompts")
	if not promptFolder then
		promptFolder = Instance.new("Folder")
		promptFolder.Name = "Prompts"
		promptFolder.Parent = castle
	end

	makeOpenShopPromptPart(
		promptFolder,
		"CastleShopOpenPromptPart",
		pivot.Position + Vector3.new(0, 5, -size.Z / 2 - 8),
		Vector3.new(math.max(24, math.min(52, size.X * 0.28)), 10, 10),
		"Passes",
		"Open Shop",
		"Castle Shop"
	)
end

local function findExistingCastle()
	for _, modelName in ipairs({ MODEL_NAME, LEGACY_MODEL_NAME }) do
		local existing = workspace:FindFirstChild(modelName, true)
		if existing and existing:IsA("Model") then
			return existing
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function repairExistingCastle(castle)
	local seaStarBooth = castle:FindFirstChild("SeaStarBooth", true) or castle:FindFirstChild("AquariumDesignerBooth", true)
	if seaStarBooth then
		seaStarBooth:Destroy()
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(castle:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and descendant:FindFirstAncestor("AntiFallBorder") then
			descendant.Transparency = 1
			descendant.CanCollide = true
			descendant.CanTouch = false
			descendant.CanQuery = true
			pcall(function()
				descendant.CollisionGroup = "Default"
			end)
		end
	end

	ensureCastleOpenShopPrompt(castle)
	CastleShopService.connectPrompts(castle)
	return castle
end

local function findLobbyArea()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("Model") and descendant.Name == "LobbyArea" and not descendant:FindFirstAncestor(MODEL_NAME) then
			return descendant
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function isFloorCandidate(part)
	local lowerName = string.lower(part.Name)
	if string.find(lowerName, "trigger")
		or string.find(lowerName, "zone")
		or string.find(lowerName, "sign")
		or string.find(lowerName, "roof")
		or string.find(lowerName, "awning")
		or string.find(lowerName, "wall")
		or string.find(lowerName, "border")
		or string.find(lowerName, "lantern")
	then
		return false
	end

	if part.Transparency >= 0.95 and part.Material == Enum.Material.ForceField then
		return false
	end

	if part.Position.Y > 12 or part.Size.Y > 4 then
		return false
	end

	if part.Size.X < 2 or part.Size.Z < 2 then
		return false
	end

	return (part.Size.X * part.Size.Z) >= 16
end

local function calculateOrigin()
	local lobby = findLobbyArea()
	if not lobby then
		return DEFAULT_ORIGIN
	end

	local minX = math.huge
	local maxX = -math.huge
	local minZ = math.huge
	local maxZ = -math.huge
	local topY = -math.huge
	local candidateCount = 0

	for _, descendant in ipairs(lobby:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and isFloorCandidate(descendant) then
			candidateCount += 1
			topY = math.max(topY, descendant.Position.Y + descendant.Size.Y / 2)

			for _, xSign in ipairs({ -1, 1 }) do
				for _, zSign in ipairs({ -1, 1 }) do
					local corner = descendant.CFrame:PointToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(
						xSign * descendant.Size.X / 2,
						0,
						zSign * descendant.Size.Z / 2
					))
					minX = math.min(minX, corner.X)
					maxX = math.max(maxX, corner.X)
					minZ = math.min(minZ, corner.Z)
					maxZ = math.max(maxZ, corner.Z)
				end
			end
		end
	end

	if candidateCount == 0 then
		local success, pivot, size = pcall(function()
			local modelCFrame, modelSize = lobby:GetBoundingBox()
			return modelCFrame, modelSize
		end)

		if success and pivot and size then
			return Vector3.new(pivot.Position.X, DEFAULT_ORIGIN.Y, pivot.Position.Z + size.Z / 2 + 128)
		end

		return DEFAULT_ORIGIN
	end

	return Vector3.new((minX + maxX) / 2, topY - 0.4, maxZ + 128)
end

function CastleShopService.ensure()
	local existing = findExistingCastle()
	if existing then
		return repairExistingCastle(existing)
	end

	return CastleShopService.build()
end

function CastleShopService.start()
	CastleShopService.ensure()

	if not CastleShopService._workspaceConnection then
		CastleShopService._workspaceConnection = workspace.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
			if child.Name == "FishyFishWorld" then
				task.defer(function()
					CastleShopService.ensure()
				end)
			end
		end)
	end
end

return CastleShopService

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local ServerStorage = game:GetService("ServerStorage")

local EarlyModelMigrationService = {}

local EARLY_ROD_TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME = "FishyFishModelTemplates"
local function normalizeEarlyRodName(name)
	return string.lower(name):gsub("[%s_%-]", "")
end

local function shouldStoreEarlyRodModel(name)
	local normalized = normalizeEarlyRodName(name)
	return normalized == "woodenrodmk411"
		or normalized == "bluegillnew"
		or normalized == "bassnew"
		or normalized == "woodenrodsplit"
		or normalized == "woodenrodsplit2"
		or normalized == "woodenrodmk4"
		or normalized == "woodenrodmk3"
		or normalized == "woodenrod"
		or normalized == "wooden"
		or normalized == "ironrodsplit"
		or normalized == "ironrodsplit2"
		or normalized == "ironrod11"
		or normalized == "ironrod"
		or normalized == "iron"
		or normalized == "emeraldrodsplit"
		or normalized == "emeraldrodsplit2"
		or normalized == "emeraldrod11"
		or normalized == "emeraldrod"
		or normalized == "emerald"
		or normalized == "goldenrodsplit"
		or normalized == "goldenrodsplit2"
		or normalized == "goldenrod11"
		or normalized == "goldenrod"
		or normalized == "goldrod"
		or normalized == "golden"
		or normalized == "oceanrodsplit"
		or normalized == "oceanrodsplit2"
		or normalized == "oceanrod11"
		or normalized == "oceanrod"
		or normalized == "ocean"
end

local function isImportedSplitRodModel(instance)
	if not instance:IsA("Model") then
		return false
	end

	local normalized = normalizeEarlyRodName(instance.Name)
	if normalized == "woodenrodsplit2" then
		return true
	end

	if normalized == "goldenrodsplit" or normalized == "goldenrodsplit2" then
		return true
	end

	if normalized == "emeraldrodsplit" or normalized == "emeraldrodsplit2" then
		return true
	end

	if normalized == "oceanrodsplit" or normalized == "oceanrodsplit2" then
		return true
	end

	return instance:FindFirstChild("Rod_Body", true) ~= nil
		and instance:FindFirstChild("Rod_Bobber", true) ~= nil
		and instance:FindFirstChild("Rod_String", true) ~= nil
end

function EarlyModelMigrationService.getImportedSplitRodTemplateName(instance)
	local normalized = normalizeEarlyRodName(instance.Name)
	if instance:IsA("Model") or instance:IsA("BasePart") then
		if normalized == "bluegillnew" then
			return "Bluegill"
		elseif normalized == "bassnew" then
			return "Bass"
		end
	end

	if not isImportedSplitRodModel(instance) then
		return nil
	end

	if normalized == "ironrodsplit" or normalized == "ironrodsplit2" then
		return "IronRod_Split"
	end

	if normalized == "goldenrodsplit" or normalized == "goldenrodsplit2" then
		return "GoldenRod_Split"
	end

	if normalized == "emeraldrodsplit" or normalized == "emeraldrodsplit2" then
		return "EmeraldRod_Split"
	end

	if normalized == "oceanrodsplit" or normalized == "oceanrodsplit2" then
		return "OceanRod_Split"
	end

	if normalized == "woodenrodsplit2" then
		return "WoodenRod_Split2"
	end

	if normalized == "woodenrodsplit" or normalized == "scene" then
		return "WoodenRod_split"
	end

	return nil
end

local function disablePhysicsForSourceModel(instance)
	if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
		instance.Anchored = true
		instance.CanCollide = false
		instance.Massless = true
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(instance:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
			descendant.Anchored = true
			descendant.CanCollide = false
			descendant.Massless = true
		end
	end
end

local function removeWorkspaceModelsFolder()
	local models = workspace:FindFirstChild("Models")
	local storage = ServerStorage:FindFirstChild(EARLY_ROD_TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME)
	if not storage then
		storage = Instance.new("Folder")
		storage.Name = EARLY_ROD_TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME
		storage.Parent = ServerStorage
	end

	local moved = {}
	local function moveRodSource(instance)
		if moved[instance] then
			return
		end

		local splitTemplateName = EarlyModelMigrationService.getImportedSplitRodTemplateName(instance)
		if not shouldStoreEarlyRodModel(instance.Name) and not splitTemplateName then
			return
		end

		if instance:IsA("Model") or instance:IsA("BasePart") then
			moved[instance] = true
			local fishTemplateName = if splitTemplateName == "Bluegill" or splitTemplateName == "Bass"
				then splitTemplateName
				else nil
			if splitTemplateName then
				instance.Name = splitTemplateName
			end
			if fishTemplateName then
				local existingFishTemplate = storage:FindFirstChild(fishTemplateName)
				if existingFishTemplate and existingFishTemplate ~= instance then
					existingFishTemplate:Destroy()
				end
				instance:SetAttribute("FishTemplateId", fishTemplateName)
				if instance:GetAttribute("FishVisualYawDegrees") == nil then
					instance:SetAttribute("FishVisualYawDegrees", 90)
				end
			end
			disablePhysicsForSourceModel(instance)
			instance.Parent = storage
			if fishTemplateName then
				local clientFolder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(EARLY_ROD_TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME)
				if not clientFolder then
					clientFolder = Instance.new("Folder")
					clientFolder.Name = EARLY_ROD_TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME
					clientFolder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
				end

				local existingClientFishTemplate = clientFolder:FindFirstChild(fishTemplateName)
				if existingClientFishTemplate then
					existingClientFishTemplate:Destroy()
				end

				local clientFishTemplate = instance:Clone()
				clientFishTemplate.Name = fishTemplateName
				clientFishTemplate.Parent = clientFolder
				disablePhysicsForSourceModel(clientFishTemplate)

				for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
					if descendant:IsA("Model") and descendant.Name == "AquariumFish_" .. fishTemplateName then
						descendant:Destroy()
					end
				end

				print("[FishyFish] " .. fishTemplateName .. " template source:", instance:GetFullName())
				print("[FishyFish] Aquarium runtime source path:", "ServerStorage." .. EARLY_ROD_TEMPLATE_FOLDER_NAME .. "." .. fishTemplateName)
			end
		end
	end

	if models then
		for _, child in ipairs(models:GetChildren()) do
			moveRodSource(child)
		end
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(workspace:GetChildren()) do
		if child ~= models then
			moveRodSource(child)
		end
	end
end

function EarlyModelMigrationService.start()
	removeWorkspaceModelsFolder()
	workspace.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		if child.Name == "Models" then
			task.defer(removeWorkspaceModelsFolder)
		end
	end)
	
end

return EarlyModelMigrationService

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local STORE_NAME = "FishyFish_fish_caught_v1"
local BOARD_MODEL_NAME = "LimestoneFishCaughtLeaderboard"
local DATASTORE_ENABLED = not RunService:IsStudio()
local DEFAULT_BOARD_CFRAME = CFrame.new(-330, 21, -418)

local leaderboardStore = DataStoreService:GetOrderedDataStore(STORE_NAME)

local Service = {
	nameCache = {},
	lastText = nil,
	playerData = {},
}

function Service.configure(options)
	Service.playerData = options and options.playerData or Service.playerData
end

function Service.getDisplayName(userId)
	local cached = Service.nameCache[userId]
	if cached then
		return cached
	end

	local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(userId)
	if player then
		Service.nameCache[userId] = player.DisplayName
		return player.DisplayName
	end

	local success, name = pcall(function()
		return Players:GetNameFromUserIdAsync(userId)
	end)

	if success and name then
		Service.nameCache[userId] = name
		return name
	end

	return "Player " .. tostring(userId)
end

function Service.isInsideRuntimeWorld(instance)
	local current = instance
	while current do
		if current.Name == "FishyFishWorld" then
			return true
		end
		current = current.Parent
	end

	return false
end

function Service.findSavedBoardModel()
	local exact = workspace:FindFirstChild(BOARD_MODEL_NAME, true)
	if exact and exact:IsA("Model") and not Service.isInsideRuntimeWorld(exact) then
		return exact
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("Model")
			and descendant.Name == "Leaderboard"
			and not Service.isInsideRuntimeWorld(descendant)
			and (
				descendant:FindFirstChild("LeaderboardPanel", true)
				or descendant:FindFirstChild("LeaderboardBoard", true)
				or descendant:FindFirstChild("FishCaughtLeaderboardGui", true)
			)
		then
			return descendant
		end
	end

	return nil
end

function Service.findBoardPanel(model)
	local existingGui = model:FindFirstChild("FishCaughtLeaderboardGui", true)
	if existingGui and existingGui.Parent and existingGui.Parent:IsA("BasePart") then
		return existingGui.Parent
	end

	for _, name in ipairs({ "LeaderboardPanel", "LeaderboardBoard" }) do
		local part = model:FindFirstChild(name, true)
		if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
			return part
		end
	end

	return nil
end

function Service.ensurePart(parent, name, size, position, color, material, transparency, canCollide)
	local part = parent:FindFirstChild(name)
	local created = false
	if not part or not part:IsA("BasePart") then
		if part then
			part:Destroy()
		end
		part = Instance.new("Part")
		part.Name = name
		part.Parent = parent
		created = true
		part.Size = size
		part.Position = position
	end

	part.Anchored = true
	if created then
		part.Color = color
		part.Material = material or Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
		part.Transparency = transparency or 0
		part.CanCollide = canCollide ~= false
	end
	part.TopSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	part.BottomSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	return part
end

function Service.ensureBoard()
	local model = Service.findSavedBoardModel()
	local createdModel = false
	if not model then
		model = Instance.new("Model")
		model.Name = BOARD_MODEL_NAME
		model.Parent = workspace
		createdModel = true
	end

	local parts = model:FindFirstChild("EditableParts")
	if not parts then
		parts = Instance.new("Folder")
		parts.Name = "EditableParts"
		parts.Parent = model
	end

	local wood = Color3.fromRGB(110, 72, 42)
	local darkWood = Color3.fromRGB(70, 45, 28)
	local boardBlue = Color3.fromRGB(28, 75, 118)
	local gold = Color3.fromRGB(245, 190, 65)

	local panel = Service.findBoardPanel(model)
	local createdPanel = false
	if not panel then
		panel = Service.ensurePart(parts, "LeaderboardPanel", Vector3.new(64, 34, 1.2), DEFAULT_BOARD_CFRAME.Position, boardBlue, Enum.Material.Wood, 0, false)
		createdPanel = true
	end

	if createdModel or createdPanel then
		local boardCFrame = panel.CFrame
		Service.ensurePart(parts, "LeftPost", Vector3.new(2.2, 31, 2.2), (boardCFrame * CFrame.new(-33, -8.5, -0.4)).Position, darkWood, Enum.Material.Wood, 0, true)
		Service.ensurePart(parts, "RightPost", Vector3.new(2.2, 31, 2.2), (boardCFrame * CFrame.new(33, -8.5, -0.4)).Position, darkWood, Enum.Material.Wood, 0, true)
		Service.ensurePart(parts, "TopTrim", Vector3.new(68, 2.2, 2), (boardCFrame * CFrame.new(0, 18, -0.7)).Position, gold, Enum.Material.Metal, 0, false)
		Service.ensurePart(parts, "BottomTrim", Vector3.new(68, 2.2, 2), (boardCFrame * CFrame.new(0, -18, -0.7)).Position, wood, Enum.Material.Wood, 0, true)
	end

	local gui = panel:FindFirstChild("FishCaughtLeaderboardGui")
	if not gui or not gui:IsA("SurfaceGui") then
		if gui then
			gui:Destroy()
		end
		gui = Instance.new("SurfaceGui")
		gui.Name = "FishCaughtLeaderboardGui"
		gui.Parent = panel
	end

	gui.Face = Enum.NormalId.Front
	gui.CanvasSize = Vector2.new(1200, 700)
	gui.AlwaysOnTop = false

	local title = gui:FindFirstChild("Title")
	if not title or not title:IsA("TextLabel") then
		if title then
			title:Destroy()
		end
		title = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		title.Name = "Title"
		title.Parent = gui
	end

	title.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	title.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.04, 0.04)
	title.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.92, 0.2)
	title.Text = "Leaderboard - Most Fish Caught"
	title.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 238, 170)
	title.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	title.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(10, 18, 28)
	title.TextScaled = true
	title.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne

	local rows = gui:FindFirstChild("Rows")
	if not rows or not rows:IsA("TextLabel") then
		if rows then
			rows:Destroy()
		end
		rows = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		rows.Name = "Rows"
		rows.Parent = gui
	end

	rows.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	rows.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.08, 0.27)
	rows.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.84, 0.66)
	rows.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(245, 250, 255)
	rows.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.25
	rows.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(5, 10, 18)
	rows.TextScaled = true
	rows.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	rows.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
	rows.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	rows.Text = Service.lastText or "1. ---\n2. ---\n3. ---\n4. ---\n5. ---"

	model.PrimaryPart = panel
	return rows
end

function Service.getOnlineRows()
	local rows = {}
	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		local data = Service.playerData[player]
		if type(data) == "table" then
			table.insert(rows, {
				userId = player.UserId,
				name = player.DisplayName,
				count = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(data.TotalFishCaught) or 0)),
			})
		end
	end

	table.sort(rows, function(a, b)
		if a.count == b.count then
			return a.name < b.name
		end
		return a.count > b.count
	end)

	while #rows > 5 do
		table.remove(rows)
	end

	return rows
end

function Service.getStoredRows()
	if not DATASTORE_ENABLED then
		return nil
	end

	local success, pages = pcall(function()
		return leaderboardStore:GetSortedAsync(false, 5)
	end)

	if not success then
		return nil
	end

	local rows = {}
	for _, item in ipairs(pages:GetCurrentPage()) do
		local userId = tonumber(item.key)
		if userId then
			table.insert(rows, {
				userId = userId,
				name = Service.getDisplayName(userId),
				count = tonumber(item.value) or 0,
			})
		end
	end

	return rows
end

function Service.setRows(rows)
	local textRows = {}
	for index = 1, 5 do
		local row = rows[index]
		if row and row.count > 0 then
			table.insert(textRows, string.format("%d. %s - %d", index, row.name, row.count))
		else
			table.insert(textRows, string.format("%d. ---", index))
		end
	end

	Service.lastText = table.concat(textRows, "\n")
	local label = Service.ensureBoard()
	label.Text = Service.lastText
end

function Service.refresh(useOnlineFallback)
	local rows = Service.getStoredRows()
	if not rows or #rows == 0 then
		rows = useOnlineFallback and Service.getOnlineRows() or {}
	end
	Service.setRows(rows)
end

function Service.publish(player, data)
	local count = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(data.TotalFishCaught) or 0))
	if not DATASTORE_ENABLED then
		Service.refresh(true)
		return
	end

	task.spawn(function()
		local success, err = pcall(function()
			leaderboardStore:SetAsync(tostring(player.UserId), count)
		end)
		if not success then
			warn("Fish caught leaderboard update failed for", player.UserId, err)
		end
		Service.refresh(true)
	end)
end

return Service

local FISHDEX_ICON = "rbxassetid://135629767511743"

local FISHDEX_TOOL_NAMES = {
	Fishdex = true,
	FishDex = true,
	FISHDEX = true,
}

local function isFishdexTool(instance)
	return instance:IsA("Tool") and FISHDEX_TOOL_NAMES[instance.Name] == true
end

local function applyFishdexIcon(tool)
	if not isFishdexTool(tool) then
		return
	end

	tool.RequiresHandle = false
	tool.CanBeDropped = false
	tool.TextureId = FISHDEX_ICON

	print("[FishdexIconFix] Applied:", tool:GetFullName(), tool.TextureId)
end

local function bindFishdexTool(tool)
	if not isFishdexTool(tool) then
		return
	end

	applyFishdexIcon(tool)

	if tool:GetAttribute("FishdexIconFixBound") then
		return
	end

	tool:SetAttribute("FishdexIconFixBound", true)

	tool:GetPropertyChangedSignal("TextureId"):Connect(function()
		if tool.TextureId ~= FISHDEX_ICON then
			warn("[FishdexIconFix] Someone changed Fishdex TextureId:", tool:GetFullName(), tool.TextureId)
			tool.TextureId = FISHDEX_ICON
		end
	end)
end

for _, instance in ipairs(game:GetDescendants()) do
	bindFishdexTool(instance)
end

game.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(instance)
	task.defer(function()
		bindFishdexTool(instance)
	end)
end)

local cache = {}

local function cloneTable(t)
	local copy = {}
	if type(t) ~= "table" then
		return copy
	end

	for k, v in pairs(t) do
		copy[k] = v
	end
	return copy
end

function FishdexService.Hydrate(player, fishdexTable)
	cache[player] = cloneTable(fishdexTable or {})
end

function FishdexService.Push(player, fishdexTable)
	cache[player] = cloneTable(fishdexTable or {})
	fishdexUpdated:FireClient(player, cache[player])
end

function FishdexService.MarkDiscovered(player, fishId)
	if not player or not fishId then
		return
	end

	local dex = cache[player] or {}
	dex[tostring(fishId)] = true
	cache[player] = dex

	fishdexUpdated:FireClient(player, dex)
end

function FishdexService.Get(player)
	return cloneTable(cache[player] or {})
end

getFishdexData.OnServerInvoke = function(player)
	return FishdexService.Get(player)
end

Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
	cache[player] = nil
end)

return FishdexService

local FishingResources = {}

function FishingResources.getRating(castResult)
	local rating = type(castResult) == "table" and castResult.rating or nil
	if ResourceConfig.DropChances[rating] then
		return rating
	end
	return "Weak"
end

function FishingResources.rollForCatch(data, isAutoFish, castResult, dropRoll, resourceRoll)
	if type(data) ~= "table" or not ResourceConfig.GetIslandDropTable(data.CurrentBiome) then
		return nil
	end

	data.ResourceInventory = ResourceConfig.NormalizeInventory(data.ResourceInventory)
	data.ResourcePity = ResourceConfig.NormalizePity(data.ResourcePity)

	local chance = ResourceConfig.GetDropChance(FishingResources.getRating(castResult), isAutoFish)
	local guaranteed = data.ResourcePity >= ResourceConfig.PityMissesBeforeGuarantee
	local resolvedDropRoll = tonumber(dropRoll)
	if resolvedDropRoll == nil then
		resolvedDropRoll = Random.new():NextNumber()
	end

	if not guaranteed and resolvedDropRoll >= chance then
		data.ResourcePity += 1
		return nil
	end

	local resolvedResourceRoll = tonumber(resourceRoll)
	if resolvedResourceRoll == nil then
		resolvedResourceRoll = Random.new():NextNumber()
	end
	local resourceId = ResourceConfig.SelectResource(data.CurrentBiome, resolvedResourceRoll)
	if not resourceId then
		return nil
	end

	data.ResourceInventory[resourceId] += 1
	data.ResourcePity = 0
	return resourceId
end

function playerData.copyArray(source)
	local result = {}

	for index, value in ipairs(source) do
		if type(value) == "table" then
			local nested = {}
			for key, nestedValue in pairs(value) do
				nested[key] = nestedValue
			end

		end
	end

	return result
end

local DEFAULT_FISHING_ISLAND_ID = "LilyshoreIsland"

function IslandConfig.normalizeBiomeId(biomeId)
	if GameConfig.normalizeIslandId then
		return GameConfig.normalizeIslandId(biomeId)
	end

	if GameConfig.Biomes[biomeId] then
		return biomeId
	end

	return nil
end

function IslandConfig.normalizeTravelTarget(target)
	if type(target) ~= "string" then
		return nil
	end

	local normalized = IslandConfig.normalizeIslandId(target)
	if normalized == IslandConfig.SeasideIslandId
		or normalized == IslandConfig.AquariumHubId
		or GameConfig.Biomes[normalized]
	then
		return normalized
	end

	return nil
end

function IslandConfig.normalizeUnlockedBiomes(unlockedBiomes)
	local result = {}
	if type(unlockedBiomes) == "table" then
		for biomeId, unlocked in pairs(unlockedBiomes) do
			if unlocked == true then
				local normalized = IslandConfig.normalizeBiomeId(biomeId)
				if normalized then
					result[normalized] = true
				end
			end
		end
	end
	result[DEFAULT_FISHING_ISLAND_ID] = true
	return result
end

function IslandConfig.getBiomeData(data)
	local biomeId = IslandConfig.normalizeBiomeId(data.CurrentBiome) or DEFAULT_FISHING_ISLAND_ID
	data.CurrentBiome = biomeId
	return GameConfig.Biomes[biomeId] or GameConfig.Biomes[DEFAULT_FISHING_ISLAND_ID]
end

function IslandConfig.isBiomeUnlocked(data, biomeId)

end

local Bait = {
	BasicId = GameConfig.BasicBaitId or "BasicBait",
}

function Bait.normalizeId(baitId)
	if baitId and GameConfig.Baits[baitId] then
		return baitId
	end

	if type(baitId) == "string" then
		local normalized = string.lower(baitId):gsub("[%s_%-]", "")
		for _, configuredBaitId in ipairs(GameConfig.BaitOrder) do
			local bait = GameConfig.Baits[configuredBaitId]
			local configuredNormalized = string.lower(configuredBaitId):gsub("[%s_%-]", "")
			local displayNormalized = string.lower(bait.displayName or configuredBaitId):gsub("[%s_%-]", "")
			if normalized == configuredNormalized or normalized == displayNormalized then
				return configuredBaitId
			end
		end
	end

	return Bait.BasicId
end

function Bait.normalizeInventory(inventory)
	local result = {}

	for _, baitId in ipairs(GameConfig.BaitOrder) do
		if baitId ~= Bait.BasicId then
			local amount = type(inventory) == "table" and tonumber(inventory[baitId]) or 0
			result[baitId] = math.max(0, math.floor(amount or 0))
		end
	end

	return result
end

function Bait.getCount(data, baitId)
	baitId = Bait.normalizeId(baitId)
	if baitId == Bait.BasicId then
		return math.huge
	end

	data.BaitInventory = Bait.normalizeInventory(data.BaitInventory)
	return math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(data.BaitInventory[baitId]) or 0))
end

function Bait.ensureState(data)
	data.BaitInventory = Bait.normalizeInventory(data.BaitInventory)
	data.EquippedBait = Bait.normalizeId(data.EquippedBait)

	if data.EquippedBait ~= Bait.BasicId and Bait.getCount(data, data.EquippedBait) <= 0 then
		data.EquippedBait = Bait.BasicId
	end
end

function Bait.getEquippedId(data)
	Bait.ensureState(data)
	return data.EquippedBait
end

function Bait.getData(baitId)
	return GameConfig.getBait(Bait.normalizeId(baitId))
end

function Bait.getRemainingForClient(data, baitId)
	baitId = Bait.normalizeId(baitId)
	if baitId == Bait.BasicId then
		return -1
	end

	return Bait.getCount(data, baitId)
end

function Bait.consumeForCast(data)
	Bait.ensureState(data)

	local baitId = data.EquippedBait
	if baitId ~= Bait.BasicId then
		local count = Bait.getCount(data, baitId)
		if count <= 0 then
			data.EquippedBait = Bait.BasicId
			return Bait.BasicId, Bait.getData(Bait.BasicId)
		end

		data.BaitInventory[baitId] = count - 1
		if data.BaitInventory[baitId] <= 0 then
			data.EquippedBait = Bait.BasicId
		end
	end

	return baitId, Bait.getData(baitId)
end
