			notify(player, Monetization.ownsPass(data, "VipAngler") and "VIP reward already claimed today." or "VIP Angler Pass required.")
		end
	elseif action == "PurchaseAquariumTheme" then
		local theme = type(itemKey) == "string" and Monetization.Config.AquariumDesigner.themes[itemKey] or nil
		if not theme then
			notify(player, "Aquarium theme not found.")
			return
		end
		if theme.free == true or theme.purchasable ~= true then
			notify(player, theme.free == true and "That aquarium theme is already free." or "That aquarium theme is not purchasable.")
			return
		end
		if SeaStars.ownsTheme(data, itemKey) then
			notify(player, "You already own " .. theme.name .. ".")
			sendState(player)
			return
		end
		local price = SeaStars.normalizeBalance(theme.seaStarPrice)
		if data.SeaStars < price then
			notify(player, "Need " .. tostring(price) .. " Sea Stars to unlock " .. theme.name .. ".")
			return
		end
		if not SeaStars.tryAcquire(player) then
			notify(player, "A Sea Star transaction is already in progress.")
			return
		end

		local balanceBefore = data.SeaStars
		local unlocksBefore = SeaStars.normalizeUnlocks(data.SeaStarUnlocks)
		local purchaseOk, purchaseError = pcall(function()
			SeaStars.ensureState(data)
			assert(not SeaStars.ownsTheme(data, itemKey), "Theme is already owned")
			assert(data.SeaStars >= price, "Sea Star balance changed")
			data.SeaStars = SeaStars.normalizeBalance(data.SeaStars - price)
			data.SeaStarUnlocks[itemKey] = true
		end)
		SeaStars.release(player)
		if not purchaseOk then
			data.SeaStars = balanceBefore
			data.SeaStarUnlocks = unlocksBefore
			notify(player, "Theme purchase failed: " .. tostring(purchaseError))
			return
		end
		if not saveData(player) then
			data.SeaStars = balanceBefore
			data.SeaStarUnlocks = unlocksBefore
			sendState(player)
			notify(player, "Theme purchase could not be saved. No Sea Stars were spent.")
			return
		end
		sendState(player)
		notify(player, "Unlocked " .. theme.name .. " for " .. tostring(price) .. " Sea Stars.")
	elseif action == "PreviewAquariumDesign" then
		if rejectAquariumEditIfViewOnly(player) then
			return
		end

		if category ~= "Aquarium" then
			warn("Aquarium preview failed for", player.Name, "invalid category", tostring(category))
			return
		end

		if Monetization.getAquariumFreeDecorationValidationError(payload) then
			warn("Aquarium preview failed for", player.Name, "invalid decoration data:", Monetization.getAquariumFreeDecorationValidationError(payload))
			notify(player, "Preview failed: invalid decoration data.")
			return
		end
		local ownershipError = SeaStars.getDecorationOwnershipError(data, payload)
		if ownershipError then
			notify(player, "Preview failed: " .. ownershipError)
			return
		end

		data.AquariumPreviewDesign = Monetization.limitAquariumDesignForLevel(payload, data.Aquarium and data.Aquarium.Level or 1)
		local refreshed = refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
		if not refreshed then
			warn("Aquarium preview failed for", player.Name, "no aquarium found or rebuilt")
			notify(player, "Preview failed: no aquarium found.")
			sendState(player)
			return
		end

		sendStateToAll()
		notify(player, "Previewing aquarium design.")
	elseif action == "CancelAquariumPreview" then
		if rejectAquariumEditIfViewOnly(player) then
			return
		end

		data.AquariumPreviewDesign = nil
		refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
		sendStateToAll()
		notify(player, "Aquarium preview canceled.")
	elseif action == "ApplyAquariumDesign" then
		if rejectAquariumEditIfViewOnly(player) then
			return
		end

		if Monetization.getAquariumFreeDecorationValidationError(payload) then
			warn("Aquarium apply failed for", player.Name, "invalid decoration data:", Monetization.getAquariumFreeDecorationValidationError(payload))
			notify(player, "Apply failed: invalid decoration data.")
			return
		end

		local design = Monetization.limitAquariumDesignForLevel(payload, data.Aquarium and data.Aquarium.Level or 1)
		local ownershipError = SeaStars.getDecorationOwnershipError(data, design)
		if ownershipError then
			notify(player, "Apply failed: " .. ownershipError)
			return
		end
		if not SeaStars.ownsTheme(data, design.theme) then
			local theme = Monetization.Config.AquariumDesigner.themes[design.theme]
			notify(player, "Unlock " .. (theme and theme.name or tostring(design.theme)) .. " with Sea Stars before applying it.")
			return
		end

		data.AquariumDesign = design
		data.AquariumPreviewDesign = nil
		refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
		sendStateToAll()
		saveData(player)
		notify(player, "Aquarium design applied.")
	end
end)

LoginRewardAction.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, action)
	local data = playerData[player]
	if not data or action ~= "Claim" then
		return
	end
	if LoginRewards.ClaimLocks[player] then
		LoginRewardAction:FireClient(player, { Success = false, Message = "A login reward claim is already in progress." })
		return
	end
	if not SeaStars.tryAcquire(player) then
		LoginRewardAction:FireClient(player, { Success = false, Message = "A Sea Star transaction is already in progress." })
		return
	end
	LoginRewards.ClaimLocks[player] = true

	local snapshot = {
		Coins = data.Coins,
		BaitInventory = playerData.shallowCopyMap(data.BaitInventory),
		ResourceInventory = playerData.shallowCopyMap(data.ResourceInventory),
		SeaStars = data.SeaStars,
		AquariumDecorations = playerData.shallowCopyMap(data.AquariumDecorations),
		LoginRewards = playerData.shallowCopyMap(data.LoginRewards),
	}
	local function restoreSnapshot()
		data.Coins = snapshot.Coins
		data.BaitInventory = snapshot.BaitInventory
		data.ResourceInventory = snapshot.ResourceInventory
		data.SeaStars = snapshot.SeaStars
		data.AquariumDecorations = snapshot.AquariumDecorations
		data.LoginRewards = snapshot.LoginRewards
	end

	local callOk, claimed, message, reward = pcall(LoginRewards.claim, data)
	if not callOk then
		local claimError = claimed
		restoreSnapshot()
		claimed = false
		message = "Login reward grant failed. Progress was not advanced."
		warn("Login reward claim failed for", player.Name, claimError)
	elseif claimed and not saveData(player) then
		restoreSnapshot()
		claimed = false
		message = "Login reward could not be saved. Progress was not advanced."
	end

	LoginRewards.ClaimLocks[player] = nil
	SeaStars.release(player)
	if claimed then
		updateLeaderstats(player)
	end
	sendState(player)
	LoginRewardAction:FireClient(player, {
		Success = claimed == true,
		Message = message,
		Reward = claimed and reward or nil,
	})
	notify(player, message or (claimed and "Login reward claimed." or "Login reward unavailable."))
end)

UnlockBiome.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, biomeId)
	local data = playerData[player]
	if not data then
		return
	end

	if IslandPurchase.Locks[player] then
		notify(player, "Island unlock already processing.")
		return
	end

	local canUnlock, reason, normalizedBiomeId, biome = IslandPurchase.validate(data, biomeId)
	if not canUnlock then
		notify(player, reason)
		return
	end

	IslandPurchase.Locks[player] = true
	local coinsBefore = data.Coins
	local currentBiomeBefore = data.CurrentBiome
	local unlocked = false
	local canceledReason = nil
	local success, unlockError = xpcall(function()
		local stillValid, stillReason = IslandPurchase.validate(data, normalizedBiomeId)
		if not stillValid then
			canceledReason = stillReason
			return
		end
		data.Coins -= biome.cost
		data.UnlockedBiomes[normalizedBiomeId] = true
		data.CurrentBiome = normalizedBiomeId
		unlocked = true
	end, debug.traceback)
	IslandPurchase.Locks[player] = nil

	if not success then
		data.Coins = coinsBefore
		data.UnlockedBiomes[normalizedBiomeId] = nil
		data.CurrentBiome = currentBiomeBefore
		warn("Island unlock failed for", player.Name, normalizedBiomeId, unlockError)
		notify(player, "Island unlock failed. Nothing was deducted.")
		return
	end
	if not unlocked then
		notify(player, canceledReason or "Island unlock canceled.")
		return
	end

	updateLeaderstats(player)
	sendState(player)
	playerData.queueSave(player)
	notify(player, "Unlocked " .. biome.displayName .. ".")
end)

function RuntimeConfig.runResourcePhaseStudioTests()
	ResourceConfig.Validate(GameConfig)

	local expectedResources = {
		IronScrap = { "Iron Scrap", "Metals", 1, "IronRod" },
		GoldNugget = { "Gold Nugget", "Metals", 2, "GoldenRod" },
		EmeraldShard = { "Emerald Shard", "Gems", 3, "EmeraldRod" },
		OceanShard = { "Ocean Shard", "Gems", 4, "OceanRod" },
	}
	local resourceCount = 0
	for resourceId, expected in pairs(expectedResources) do
		local resource = ResourceConfig.Resources[resourceId]
		assert(resource.id == resourceId and resource.displayName == expected[1], resourceId .. " identity is incorrect")
		assert(resource.category == expected[2] and resource.displayOrder == expected[3], resourceId .. " category/order is incorrect")
		assert(resource.bazaarEligible == true and resource.loginEligible == true and resource.usedFor == expected[4], resourceId .. " future-use fields are incorrect")
		resourceCount += 1
	end
	assert(resourceCount == 4, "Exactly four resources are required")
	assert(ResourceConfig.DropChances.Weak == 0.22 and ResourceConfig.DropChances.Good == 0.22, "Weak/Good resource odds are incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.DropChances.Great == 0.26 and ResourceConfig.DropChances.Perfect == 0.30, "Great/Perfect resource odds are incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.DropChances.AutoFish == 0.11, "AutoFish resource odds are incorrect")
	local lilyDrops = ResourceConfig.IslandDropTables.LilyshoreIsland
	local riverDrops = ResourceConfig.IslandDropTables.RiverbendIsland
	assert(#lilyDrops == 3 and lilyDrops[1].resourceId == "IronScrap" and lilyDrops[1].weight == 60, "Lilyshore Iron weight is incorrect")
	assert(lilyDrops[2].resourceId == "GoldNugget" and lilyDrops[2].weight == 30, "Lilyshore Gold weight is incorrect")
	assert(lilyDrops[3].resourceId == "EmeraldShard" and lilyDrops[3].weight == 10, "Lilyshore Emerald weight is incorrect")
	assert(#riverDrops == 2 and riverDrops[1].resourceId == "EmeraldShard" and riverDrops[1].weight == 70, "Riverbend Emerald weight is incorrect")
	assert(riverDrops[2].resourceId == "OceanShard" and riverDrops[2].weight == 30, "Riverbend Ocean weight is incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.SelectResource("LilyshoreIsland", 0) == "IronScrap", "Lilyshore Iron weight is incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.SelectResource("LilyshoreIsland", 0.60) == "GoldNugget", "Lilyshore Gold weight is incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.SelectResource("LilyshoreIsland", 0.90) == "EmeraldShard", "Lilyshore Emerald weight is incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.SelectResource("LilyshoreIsland", 0.999) ~= "OceanShard", "Lilyshore must not drop Ocean Shard")
	assert(ResourceConfig.SelectResource("RiverbendIsland", 0.69) == "EmeraldShard", "Riverbend Emerald weight is incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.SelectResource("RiverbendIsland", 0.70) == "OceanShard", "Riverbend Ocean weight is incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.SelectResource("CoralCoastIsland", 0) == nil, "Coral Coast must not roll resources")

	local sanitizedInventory = ResourceConfig.NormalizeInventory({
		IronScrap = 4.9,
		GoldNugget = -10,
		EmeraldShard = "7",
		OceanShard = math.huge,
		SeaStar = 999,
	})
	local sanitizedCount = 0
	for resourceId, count in pairs(sanitizedInventory) do
		assert(expectedResources[resourceId] ~= nil, "Unexpected resource survived sanitization")
		assert(count >= 0 and count < math.huge and count == math.floor(count), resourceId .. " must sanitize to a finite nonnegative integer")
		sanitizedCount += 1
	end
	assert(sanitizedCount == 4 and sanitizedInventory.IronScrap == 4 and sanitizedInventory.GoldNugget == 0 and sanitizedInventory.EmeraldShard == 7, "Resource inventory sanitization is incorrect")
	assert(ResourceConfig.NormalizePity(-4) == 0 and ResourceConfig.NormalizePity(3.8) == 3, "Resource pity sanitization is incorrect")

	local pityData = makeDefaultData()
	pityData.CurrentBiome = "LilyshoreIsland"
	local backpackBefore = pityData.BackpackSize
	for expectedPity = 1, 5 do
		assert(FishingResources.rollForCatch(pityData, false, { rating = "Perfect" }, 0.99, 0) == nil, "Eligible miss should not award a resource")
		assert(pityData.ResourcePity == expectedPity, "Eligible miss did not increment pity")
	end
	assert(FishingResources.rollForCatch(pityData, false, { rating = "Weak" }, 0.99, 0) == "IronScrap", "Sixth eligible catch must be guaranteed")
	assert(pityData.ResourcePity == 0 and pityData.ResourceInventory.IronScrap == 1, "Resource award must reset pity and add one stack")
	assert(pityData.BackpackSize == backpackBefore, "Resources must not consume fish backpack capacity")

	local autoData = makeDefaultData()
	autoData.CurrentBiome = "RiverbendIsland"
	assert(FishingResources.rollForCatch(autoData, true, nil, 0.109, 0.71) == "OceanShard", "AutoFish must use the 11% server roll")
	assert(FishingResources.rollForCatch(autoData, true, { rating = "Perfect" }, 0.11, 0) == nil and autoData.ResourcePity == 1, "AutoFish must ignore cast rating and miss at 11% or above")

	local coralData = makeDefaultData()
	coralData.CurrentBiome = "CoralCoastIsland"
	coralData.ResourcePity = 4
	coralData.ResourceInventory.IronScrap = 3
	assert(FishingResources.rollForCatch(coralData, false, { rating = "Perfect" }, 0, 0) == nil, "Coral Coast must not award a resource")
	assert(coralData.ResourcePity == 4 and coralData.ResourceInventory.IronScrap == 3, "Coral Coast must not change pity or inventory")

	local recipes = {
		IronRod = { "WoodenRod", 5, 1500, "IronScrap", 12 },
		GoldenRod = { "IronRod", 12, 5000, "GoldNugget", 18 },
		EmeraldRod = { "GoldenRod", 20, 15000, "EmeraldShard", 24 },
		OceanRod = { "EmeraldRod", 25, 35000, "OceanShard", 20 },
	}
	for rodId, expected in pairs(recipes) do
		local rod = GameConfig.Rods[rodId]
		assert(rod.previousRod == expected[1] and rod.unlockLevel == expected[2] and rod.cost == expected[3], rodId .. " purchase requirements are incorrect")
		assert(rod.resourceCosts[expected[4]] == expected[5], rodId .. " recipe is incorrect")
		local recipeResourceCount = 0
		for resourceId in pairs(rod.resourceCosts) do
			assert(resourceId == expected[4], rodId .. " contains an extra resource requirement")
			recipeResourceCount += 1
		end
		assert(recipeResourceCount == 1, rodId .. " must require exactly one resource type")
		assert(rod.requiredBiome == nil and rod.requiredCatches == nil and rod.catchRequirement == nil, rodId .. " has an unrelated purchase requirement")
	end

	local failedPurchaseData = makeDefaultData()
	failedPurchaseData.Level = 30
	failedPurchaseData.Coins = 99999
	local coinsBeforeFailedPurchase = failedPurchaseData.Coins
	local valid, reason = RodPurchase.validate(failedPurchaseData, "IronRod")
	assert(valid == false and string.find(reason, "Iron Scrap", 1, true), "Missing resource must block the rod purchase")
	assert(failedPurchaseData.Coins == coinsBeforeFailedPurchase and failedPurchaseData.ResourceInventory.IronScrap == 0, "Failed rod validation must not deduct anything")

	local orderData = makeDefaultData()
	orderData.Level = 1
	orderData.Coins = 0
	local orderValid, orderReason = RodPurchase.validate(orderData, "GoldenRod")
	assert(orderValid == false and string.find(orderReason, "Iron Rod", 1, true), "Previous rod must validate before level/resources/coins")

	local successPurchaseData = makeDefaultData()
	successPurchaseData.Level = 5
	successPurchaseData.Coins = 1500
	successPurchaseData.ResourceInventory.IronScrap = 12
	assert(RodPurchase.validate(successPurchaseData, "IronRod") == true, "Exact Iron Rod requirements should pass")
	RodPurchase.deductAndGrant(successPurchaseData, "IronRod", GameConfig.Rods.IronRod)
	assert(successPurchaseData.Coins == 0 and successPurchaseData.ResourceInventory.IronScrap == 0, "Successful rod purchase must deduct exact costs")
	assert(successPurchaseData.OwnedRods.IronRod == true and successPurchaseData.EquippedRod == "IronRod", "Successful rod purchase must own and equip the rod")

	assert(GameConfig.Biomes.LilyshoreIsland.unlockLevel == 1 and GameConfig.Biomes.LilyshoreIsland.cost == 0 and GameConfig.Biomes.LilyshoreIsland.requiredRod == nil, "Lilyshore unlock config is incorrect")
	assert(GameConfig.Biomes.RiverbendIsland.unlockLevel == 10 and GameConfig.Biomes.RiverbendIsland.cost == 4000 and GameConfig.Biomes.RiverbendIsland.requiredRod == "IronRod", "Riverbend unlock config is incorrect")
	assert(GameConfig.Biomes.CoralCoastIsland.unlockLevel == 25 and GameConfig.Biomes.CoralCoastIsland.cost == 25000 and GameConfig.Biomes.CoralCoastIsland.requiredRod == "OceanRod", "Coral Coast unlock config is incorrect")
	for _, islandId in ipairs(GameConfig.IslandOrder) do
		local biome = GameConfig.Biomes[islandId]
		assert(biome.requiredCatches == nil and biome.catchRequirement == nil and biome.catchCountRequirement == nil, islandId .. " has a catch-count requirement")
	end
	assert(makeDefaultData().IslandCatchCounts == nil, "Island catch counts must not be added")

	print("[FishyFish Resource Test] PASS: config, weights, odds, pity, Coral exclusion, persistence sanitizers, recipes, atomic deductions, and island gates")
end

if RunService:IsStudio() then
	RuntimeConfig.runResourcePhaseStudioTests()
end

TeleportTo.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, target)
	local data = playerData[player]
	if not data then
		return
	end

	local aquariumOwnerUserId = nil
	local normalizedTarget = nil
	if type(target) == "table" then
		if target.kind ~= "PlayerAquarium" then
			return
		end

		aquariumOwnerUserId = tonumber(target.userId)
		if not aquariumOwnerUserId
			or aquariumOwnerUserId <= 0
			or math.floor(aquariumOwnerUserId) ~= aquariumOwnerUserId
		then
			return
		end
	else
		normalizedTarget = IslandConfig.normalizeTravelTarget(target)
		if not normalizedTarget then
			return
		end
	end

	if normalizedTarget and GameConfig.Biomes[normalizedTarget] and not IslandConfig.isBiomeUnlocked(data, normalizedTarget) then
		notify(player, "Unlock that island first.")
		return
	end

	local character = player.Character
	if not (character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")) then
		return
	end

	if not Travel.tryBeginRemoteTravel(player) then
		return
	end

	local success, movedOrError = pcall(function()
		if aquariumOwnerUserId then
			return Travel.teleportPlayerToAquariumUserId(player, aquariumOwnerUserId)
		end

		return Travel.teleportPlayer(player, normalizedTarget)
	end)
	Travel.finishRemoteTravel(player)

	if not success then
		warn("Travel failed for", player.Name, movedOrError)
		return
	end

	if movedOrError ~= true then
		return
	end

	if normalizedTarget and GameConfig.Biomes[normalizedTarget] then
		data.CurrentBiome = normalizedTarget
	end

	sendState(player)
end)

AquariumAction.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, action, fishSerial, fishIndex)
	local data = playerData[player]
	local changed = false
	if not data then
		return
	end

	if rejectAquariumEditIfViewOnly(player) then
		return
	end

	if action == "DisplayFish" then
		local targetIndex = findInventoryFishIndex(data, fishSerial, fishIndex)
		if not targetIndex then
			notify(player, "That fish is no longer in your Bag.")
			return
		end

		local fish = data.Inventory[targetIndex]
		local capacity = GameConfig.AquariumCapacities[data.Aquarium.Level]
		local usedCapacity = GameConfig.getAquariumUsedSpace(data.Aquarium.Fish)
		local fishSpace = GameConfig.getAquariumFishSpace(fish)
		if usedCapacity + fishSpace > capacity then
			notify(player, "Aquarium needs " .. fishSpace .. " space. Upgrade it or remove fish first.")
			return
		end

		fish = table.remove(data.Inventory, targetIndex)
		table.insert(data.Aquarium.Fish, fish)
		changed = true
		refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
		sendStateToAll()
		notify(player, "Displayed " .. fish.name .. " in your aquarium.")
	elseif action == "RemoveFish" then
		local requestedSerial = tonumber(fishSerial)
		local requestedIndex = tonumber(fishIndex)
		local targetIndex = nil

		if requestedIndex and data.Aquarium.Fish[requestedIndex] then
			local fish = data.Aquarium.Fish[requestedIndex]
			if not requestedSerial or tonumber(fish.serial) == requestedSerial then
				targetIndex = requestedIndex
			end
		end

		if not targetIndex and requestedSerial then
			for index, fish in ipairs(data.Aquarium.Fish) do
				if tonumber(fish.serial) == requestedSerial then
					targetIndex = index
					break
				end
			end
		end

		if not targetIndex then
			notify(player, "That fish is no longer in your aquarium.")
			sendState(player)
			return
		end

		if #data.Inventory >= data.BackpackSize then
			notify(player, "Bag full. Make room first.")
			return
		end

		local fish = table.remove(data.Aquarium.Fish, targetIndex)
		table.insert(data.Inventory, fish)
		changed = true
		refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
		sendStateToAll()
		notify(player, "Moved " .. fish.name .. " back to your Bag.")
	elseif action == "DisplayBest" then
		if not data.BestCatch then
			notify(player, "Catch a fish first.")
			return
		end

		local targetIndex = findInventoryFishIndex(data, data.BestCatch.serial)
		if not targetIndex then
			notify(player, "Your best fish is not in your Bag anymore.")
			return
		end

		local fish = data.Inventory[targetIndex]
		local capacity = GameConfig.AquariumCapacities[data.Aquarium.Level]
		local usedCapacity = GameConfig.getAquariumUsedSpace(data.Aquarium.Fish)
		local fishSpace = GameConfig.getAquariumFishSpace(fish)
		if usedCapacity + fishSpace > capacity then
			notify(player, "Aquarium needs " .. fishSpace .. " space. Upgrade it or remove fish first.")
			return
		end

		fish = table.remove(data.Inventory, targetIndex)
		table.insert(data.Aquarium.Fish, fish)
		changed = true
		refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
		sendStateToAll()
		notify(player, "Displayed " .. fish.name .. " in your aquarium.")
	elseif action == "Upgrade" then
		local nextLevel = data.Aquarium.Level + 1
		local cost = GameConfig.AquariumUpgradeCosts[nextLevel]

		if not cost then
			notify(player, "Aquarium already maxed.")
			return
		end

		if data.Coins < cost then
			notify(player, "Need " .. cost .. " coins.")
			return
		end

		data.Coins -= cost
		data.Aquarium.Level = nextLevel
		changed = true

		updateLeaderstats(player)
		refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
		sendStateToAll()
		notify(player, "Aquarium upgraded to level " .. nextLevel .. ".")
	end

	if changed then
		playerData.queueSave(player)
	end
end)

Monetization.MarketplaceService.PromptGamePassPurchaseFinished:Connect(function(player, gamePassId, wasPurchased)
	if not wasPurchased then
		return
	end

	local data = playerData[player]
	local passKey = Monetization.Config.GamePassById[gamePassId]
	if not data or not passKey then
		return
	end

	data.OwnedGamePasses = Monetization.normalizeOwnedPasses(data.OwnedGamePasses)
	data.OwnedGamePasses[passKey] = true
	Monetization.syncGamePassOwnership(player, data)
	updateLeaderstats(player)
	applyCharacterMonetizationVisuals(player)
	refreshPlayerAquarium(player)
	sendStateToAll()
	saveData(player)
	notify(player, "Purchase unlocked: " .. Monetization.Config.GamePasses[passKey].name .. ".")
end)

Monetization.MarketplaceService.ProcessReceipt = function(receiptInfo)
	local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(receiptInfo.PlayerId)
	if not player then
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
	end

	local data = playerData[player]
	local productKey = Monetization.Config.DeveloperProductById[receiptInfo.ProductId]
	local product = productKey and Monetization.Config.DeveloperProducts[productKey]
	if not data or not product then
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
	end

	local purchaseId = tostring(receiptInfo.PurchaseId or "")
	if purchaseId == "" then
		warn("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Missing PurchaseId for product", receiptInfo.ProductId)
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
	end

	Monetization.ensureState(data)
	if data.ProcessedReceipts[purchaseId] then
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.PurchaseGranted
	end

	local amount = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(product.amount) or tonumber(product.Amount) or 0))
	print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Product ID purchased:", receiptInfo.ProductId)
	print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Player name:", player.Name)

	local coinAmount = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(product.coinAmount) or tonumber(product.CoinAmount) or 0))
	if coinAmount > 0 then
		local coinsBefore = data.Coins
		data.Coins += coinAmount
		assert(Monetization.tryMarkReceipt(data, purchaseId), "Receipt was marked concurrently")
		if not saveData(player) then
			data.Coins = coinsBefore
			data.ProcessedReceipts[purchaseId] = nil
			updateLeaderstats(player)
			sendState(player)
			return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
		end
		print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Coins granted:", coinAmount)
		print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Coin count before purchase:", coinsBefore)
		print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Coin count after purchase:", data.Coins)
		updateLeaderstats(player)
		sendState(player)
		notify(player, "Added " .. tostring(coinAmount) .. " Coins.")
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.PurchaseGranted
	end

	local seaStarAmount = SeaStars.normalizeBalance(product.seaStarAmount)
	if seaStarAmount > 0 then
		if not SeaStars.tryAcquire(player) then
			return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
		end
		Monetization.ensureState(data)
		if data.ProcessedReceipts[purchaseId] then
			SeaStars.release(player)
			return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.PurchaseGranted
		end

		local seaStarsBefore = data.SeaStars
		data.SeaStars = SeaStars.normalizeBalance(data.SeaStars + seaStarAmount)
		assert(Monetization.tryMarkReceipt(data, purchaseId), "Receipt was marked concurrently")
		if not saveData(player) then
			data.SeaStars = seaStarsBefore
			data.ProcessedReceipts[purchaseId] = nil
			SeaStars.release(player)
			sendState(player)
			return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
		end
		SeaStars.release(player)
		print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Sea Stars granted:", seaStarAmount)
		sendState(player)
		notify(player, "Added " .. tostring(seaStarAmount) .. " Sea Stars.")
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.PurchaseGranted
	end

	local baitId = product.baitId or product.BaitId
	if not baitId or amount <= 0 then
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
	end

	local countBefore = Bait.getCount(data, baitId)
	print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Lucky Bait amount granted:", amount)
	print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Lucky Bait count before purchase:", countBefore)
	Monetization.addBait(data, baitId, amount)
	assert(Monetization.tryMarkReceipt(data, purchaseId), "Receipt was marked concurrently")
	if not saveData(player) then
		data.BaitInventory[baitId] = countBefore
		data.ProcessedReceipts[purchaseId] = nil
		Bait.ensureState(data)
		sendState(player)
		return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.NotProcessedYet
	end
	print("[DeveloperProductReceipt] Lucky Bait count after purchase:", Bait.getCount(data, baitId))
	sendState(player)
	notify(player, "Added " .. tostring(amount) .. " " .. GameConfig.Baits[baitId].displayName .. ".")
	return Enum.ProductPurchaseDecision.PurchaseGranted
end

ToggleAutoFish.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player)
	local data = playerData[player]
	if not data then
		return
	end

	if data.AutoFishEnabled then
		data.AutoFishEnabled = false
		pendingFishing[player] = nil
		sendState(player)
		notify(player, "AutoFish turned off.")
		return
	end

	if not RodVisual.getHeldFishingRodTool(player, data) then
		notify(player, "Hold your fishing rod before turning on AutoFish.")
		return
	end

	if #data.Inventory >= data.BackpackSize then
		notify(player, "Backpack full. Sell fish first.")
		return
	end

	data.AutoFishEnabled = true
	sendState(player)
	notify(player, "AutoFish turned on. It is slower and has lower rare-fish luck.")
	FishingRuntime.startAutoFish(player)
end)

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(RuntimeConfig.setupPlayer)
for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
	task.spawn(RuntimeConfig.setupPlayer, player)
end

Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
	saveData(player)
	local data = playerData[player]
	if data then
		FishCaughtLeaderboard.publish(player, data)
	end
	local slot = playerAquariumSlots[player]
	if slot then
		local folder = getAquariumsFolder()
		local aquarium = folder and folder:FindFirstChild(getAquariumSlotName(slot))
		if aquarium and aquarium:GetAttribute("OccupantUserId") == player.UserId then
			buildAquariumSlotModel(slot, nil, nil)
		end
	end

	playerData[player] = nil
	playerData.SaveLocks[player] = nil
	playerData.SaveScheduled[player] = nil
	playerData.SaveRevision[player] = nil
	pendingFishing[player] = nil
	RodPurchase.Locks[player] = nil
	IslandPurchase.Locks[player] = nil
	SeaStars.TransactionLocks[player] = nil
	LoginRewards.ClaimLocks[player] = nil

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local REMOTE_NAME = "HotbarEquipRequest"

local hotbarEquipRequest = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild(REMOTE_NAME)
if not hotbarEquipRequest then
	hotbarEquipRequest = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
	hotbarEquipRequest.Name = REMOTE_NAME
	hotbarEquipRequest.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
end

local function isBlockedUtilityTool(tool)
	local name = string.lower(tool.Name)
	return name == "bag"
		or name == "backpack"
		or name == "fishdex"
		or name == "fish dex"
		or string.find(name, "aquarium") ~= nil
end

local function isRodTool(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") then
		return false
	end

	if isBlockedUtilityTool(tool) then
		return false
	end

	local name = string.lower(tool.Name)

	return name == "fishing rod"
		or string.find(name, "rod") ~= nil
		or string.find(name, "fishing") ~= nil
		or tool:GetAttribute("HotbarType") == "Rod"
		or tool:GetAttribute("RodId") ~= nil
end

local function findRodTool(player)
	local character = player.Character
	local backpack = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("Backpack") or player:FindFirstChild("Backpack")

	if character then
		local exactEquipped = character:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
		if exactEquipped and exactEquipped:IsA("Tool") then
			return exactEquipped
		end

		for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
			if isRodTool(child) then
				return child
			end
		end
	end

	if backpack then
		local exactBackpack = backpack:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
		if exactBackpack and exactBackpack:IsA("Tool") then
			return exactBackpack
		end

		for _, child in ipairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
			if isRodTool(child) then
				return child
			end
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function equipRod(player)
	local character = player.Character or player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
	local backpack = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("Backpack") or player:WaitForChild("Backpack", 5)
	local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

	if not humanoid then
		warn("[HotbarEquipServer] Humanoid not found for", player.Name)
		return
	end

	local tool = findRodTool(player)

	if not tool then
		warn("[HotbarEquipServer] Fishing Rod Tool not found for", player.Name)
		return
	end

	if tool.Parent == character then
		print("[HotbarEquipServer] Fishing Rod already equipped:", player.Name, tool.Name)
		return
	end

	if backpack and tool.Parent ~= backpack then
		tool.Parent = backpack
		task.wait()
	end

	humanoid:EquipTool(tool)

	task.delay(0.1, function()
		if tool and tool.Parent ~= character then
			-- 마지막 안전장치: EquipTool이 실패해도 서버에서 Character 아래로 옮겨 장착 상태로 만듦.
			tool.Parent = character
		end

		print("[HotbarEquipServer] Equipped rod:", player.Name, tool:GetFullName())
	end)
end

local function unequipTools(player)
	local character = player.Character
	local backpack = player:FindFirstChildOfClass("Backpack") or player:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
	local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

	if not character or not humanoid then
		warn("[HotbarEquipServer] Cannot unequip tools for", player.Name)
		return
	end

	humanoid:UnequipTools()

	-- 서버에서도 Character 아래의 Tool을 Backpack으로 돌려 확실히 맨손 상태로 만듭니다.
	task.defer(function()
		if not backpack then
			return
		end

		for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("Tool") then
				child.Parent = backpack
			end
		end

		print("[HotbarEquipServer] Unequipped tools:", player.Name)
	end)
end

hotbarEquipRequest.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player, action)
	if action == "EquipRod" then
		equipRod(player)
	elseif action == "UnequipTools" then
		unequipTools(player)
	end
end)

local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local ServerStorage = game:GetService("ServerStorage")

local LilyshoreIslandService = {}

local ISLAND_NAME = "LilyshoreIsland"
local LEGACY_AREA_NAME = "BeginnerPond"
local BACKUP_NAME = "BeginnerPond_ExtraLarge"

local SPAWN_NAMES = {
	SeasideIsland = "LilyshoreSpawn_FromSeaside",
	Lobby = "LilyshoreSpawn_FromSeaside",
	AquariumHub = "LilyshoreSpawn_FromAquarium",
	Home = "LilyshoreSpawn_FromAquarium",
	MyAquarium = "LilyshoreSpawn_FromAquarium",
}

local PORTAL_TARGETS = {
	Lilyshore_Portal_Aquarium_Surface = "AquariumHub",
	Lilyshore_Portal_Seaside_Surface = "Lobby",
}

local function findIsland()
	local island = workspace:FindFirstChild(ISLAND_NAME)
	if island and island:IsA("PVInstance") then
		return island
	end

	return nil
end

local function findBackup()
	local backup = ServerStorage:FindFirstChild(BACKUP_NAME, true)
	if backup and backup:IsA("PVInstance") then
		return backup
	end

	return nil
end

local function findNamedBasePart(root, name)
	for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant.Name == name and descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
			return descendant
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function copyTags(source, target)
	for _, tag in ipairs(CollectionService:GetTags(source)) do
		CollectionService:AddTag(target, tag)
	end
end

local function copyAttributes(source, target)
	for name, value in pairs(source:GetAttributes()) do
		if target:GetAttribute(name) == nil then
			target:SetAttribute(name, value)
		end
	end
end

local function ensureCompatibilityContainer(island)
	local compatibility = island:FindFirstChild("BeginnerPondArea")
	if compatibility then
		return compatibility
	end

	local importedWorld = island:FindFirstChild("world")
	if importedWorld and (importedWorld:IsA("Model") or importedWorld:IsA("Folder")) then
		importedWorld.Name = "BeginnerPondArea"
		return importedWorld
	end

	return island
end

local function getScaledZoneTransform(sourceRoot, targetRoot, sourceZone)
	local sourcePivot = sourceRoot:GetPivot()
	local targetPivot = targetRoot:GetPivot()
	local sourceSize = sourceRoot:GetExtentsSize()
	local targetSize = targetRoot:GetExtentsSize()
	local relative = sourcePivot:ToObjectSpace(sourceZone.CFrame)
	local relativePosition = relative.Position
	local relativeRotation = relative - relativePosition
	local scaleX = math.clamp(targetSize.X / math.max(sourceSize.X, 1), 0.2, 5)
	local scaleY = math.clamp(targetSize.Y / math.max(sourceSize.Y, 1), 0.2, 5)
	local scaleZ = math.clamp(targetSize.Z / math.max(sourceSize.Z, 1), 0.2, 5)

	local targetCFrame = targetPivot
		* CFrame.new(relativePosition.X * scaleX, relativePosition.Y * scaleY, relativePosition.Z * scaleZ)
		* relativeRotation
	local targetSizeValue = Vector3.new(
		math.max(8, sourceZone.Size.X * scaleX),
		math.max(10, sourceZone.Size.Y * scaleY),
		math.max(8, sourceZone.Size.Z * scaleZ)
	)

	return targetCFrame, targetSizeValue
end

local function ensureFishingZone(island, compatibility)
	local existing = island:FindFirstChild("LilyshoreFishingZone", true)
	if existing and existing:IsA("BasePart") then
		CollectionService:AddTag(existing, "FishingZone")
		existing:SetAttribute("IslandId", ISLAND_NAME)
		existing:SetAttribute("BiomeId", ISLAND_NAME)
		return existing
	end

	local backup = findBackup()
	local sourceZone = backup and backup:FindFirstChild("FishZone", true)
	if not (sourceZone and sourceZone:IsA("BasePart")) then
		warn("[LilyshoreIsland] Beginner Pond backup FishZone was not found; fishing still uses island ground detection.")
		return nil
	end

	local gameplay = compatibility:FindFirstChild("Gameplay")
	if not gameplay then
		gameplay = Instance.new("Folder")
		gameplay.Name = "Gameplay"
		gameplay.Parent = compatibility
	end

	local zone = sourceZone:Clone()
	zone.Name = "LilyshoreFishingZone"
	local targetCFrame, targetSize = getScaledZoneTransform(backup, island, sourceZone)
	zone.CFrame = targetCFrame
	zone.Size = targetSize
	zone.Anchored = true
	zone.CanCollide = false
	zone.CanTouch = false
	zone.CanQuery = true
	zone.Transparency = 1
	zone:SetAttribute("IslandId", ISLAND_NAME)
	zone:SetAttribute("BiomeId", ISLAND_NAME)
	zone:SetAttribute("LegacyBiomeId", LEGACY_AREA_NAME)
	copyTags(sourceZone, zone)
	copyAttributes(sourceZone, zone)
	CollectionService:AddTag(zone, "FishingZone")
	zone.Parent = gameplay
	return zone
end

local function configureSpawn(island, spawnName, arrivalSource)
	local spawn = findNamedBasePart(island, spawnName)
	if not (spawn and spawn:IsA("BasePart")) then
		warn("[LilyshoreIsland] Missing spawn marker:", spawnName)
		return nil
	end

	spawn.Anchored = true
	spawn.CanTouch = false
	spawn:SetAttribute("IslandId", ISLAND_NAME)
	spawn:SetAttribute("ArrivalSource", arrivalSource)
	return spawn
end

local function configurePortals(island)
	for partName, targetArea in pairs(PORTAL_TARGETS) do
		local part = findNamedBasePart(island, partName)
		if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
			part.CanTouch = true
			part:SetAttribute("TargetArea", targetArea)
			part:SetAttribute("PortalName", targetArea == "AquariumHub" and "Aquarium Hub" or "Seaside Island")
			part:SetAttribute("SourceArea", ISLAND_NAME)
			CollectionService:AddTag(part, "AreaPortal")
		else
			warn("[LilyshoreIsland] Missing portal surface:", partName)
		end
	end
end

local function removeGeneratedPlaceholder()
	local generatedWorld = workspace:FindFirstChild("FishyFishWorld")
	if not generatedWorld then
		return
	end

	for _, name in ipairs({
		"Lilyshore Island",
		"Lilyshore Island Island",
		"Lilyshore Island Water",
		"LilyshoreIslandDock",
		"Lilyshore Island Sign",
	}) do
		local placeholder = generatedWorld:FindFirstChild(name)
		if placeholder then
			placeholder:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

function LilyshoreIslandService.ensure()
	local island = findIsland()
	if not island then
		warn("[LilyshoreIsland] Workspace.LilyshoreIsland was not found.")
		return nil
	end

	local backup = findBackup()
	if backup then
		copyTags(backup, island)
		copyAttributes(backup, island)
	end

	island:SetAttribute("IslandId", ISLAND_NAME)
	island:SetAttribute("BiomeId", ISLAND_NAME)
	island:SetAttribute("LegacyBiomeId", LEGACY_AREA_NAME)
	island:SetAttribute("FishTableId", ISLAND_NAME)
	island:SetAttribute("QuestAreaId", ISLAND_NAME)
	CollectionService:AddTag(island, "FishingIsland")
	CollectionService:AddTag(island, ISLAND_NAME)

	local compatibility = ensureCompatibilityContainer(island)
	compatibility:SetAttribute("IslandId", ISLAND_NAME)
	compatibility:SetAttribute("LegacyBiomeId", LEGACY_AREA_NAME)
	ensureFishingZone(island, compatibility)
	configureSpawn(island, "LilyshoreSpawn_FromSeaside", "SeasideIsland")
	configureSpawn(island, "LilyshoreSpawn_FromAquarium", "AquariumHub")
	configurePortals(island)
	removeGeneratedPlaceholder()
	return island
end

function LilyshoreIslandService.isIslandInstance(instance)
	local island = findIsland()
	return island ~= nil and instance ~= nil and (instance == island or instance:IsDescendantOf(island))
end

function LilyshoreIslandService.getSpawnPart(sourceArea)
	local island = findIsland()
	if not island then
		return nil
	end

	local spawnName = SPAWN_NAMES[sourceArea] or SPAWN_NAMES.SeasideIsland
	local spawn = findNamedBasePart(island, spawnName)
	return spawn and spawn:IsA("BasePart") and spawn or nil
end

function LilyshoreIslandService.getSpawnCFrame(sourceArea)
	local spawn = LilyshoreIslandService.getSpawnPart(sourceArea)
	if not spawn then
		return nil
	end

	return spawn.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, (spawn.Size.Y / 2) + 4, 0)
end

return LilyshoreIslandService

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local FishingMinigameSimulation = require(
	ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared"):WaitForChild("FishingMinigameSimulation")
)

local MinigameValidationService = {}

local MAX_EVENTS = 256
local EVENT_CLOCK_TOLERANCE = 2.5
local COMPLETION_CLOCK_TOLERANCE = 3
local MIN_TAP_INTERVAL = 0.065
local TAP_PHASE_CLOCK_TOLERANCE = 0.2
local DRAIN_DURATION = 0.5
local PHASE_DURATION = 4.5
local TAP_GOALS = {
	Epic = 8,
	Legendary = 14,
	Mythic = 14,
}

local function failSession(session, reason)
	session.invalidReason = session.invalidReason or reason
	return false, session.invalidReason
end

function MinigameValidationService.newSession(options)
	return {
		sessionId = options.sessionId,
		requestedAt = options.requestedAt,
		biteDelay = options.biteDelay,
		seed = options.seed,
		rarity = options.rarity,
		config = options.config,
		difficulty = options.difficulty,
		events = {},
		lastSequence = 0,
		lastElapsed = 0,
		lastTapElapsed = -math.huge,
		invalidReason = nil,
	}
end

function MinigameValidationService.recordInput(session, payload, now)
	if session.invalidReason then
		return false, session.invalidReason
	end
	if type(payload) ~= "table" or payload.sessionId ~= session.sessionId then
		return failSession(session, "session mismatch")
	end

	local sequence = tonumber(payload.sequence)
	local elapsed = tonumber(payload.elapsed)
	local serverElapsed = now - session.requestedAt
	if not sequence or sequence ~= session.lastSequence + 1 or sequence ~= math.floor(sequence) then
		return failSession(session, "input sequence mismatch")
	end
	if not elapsed or elapsed < session.lastElapsed or elapsed < 0 then
		return failSession(session, "input clock moved backwards")
	end
	if elapsed > serverElapsed + 0.75 or serverElapsed - elapsed > EVENT_CLOCK_TOLERANCE then
		return failSession(session, "input arrived outside the live validation window")
	end
	if #session.events >= MAX_EVENTS then
		return failSession(session, "too many input events")
	end

	local kind = payload.kind
	if kind == "Hold" then
		if type(payload.holding) ~= "boolean" then
			return failSession(session, "invalid hold state")
		end
		table.insert(session.events, { kind = kind, elapsed = elapsed, holding = payload.holding })
	elseif kind == "Tap" then
		if elapsed - session.lastTapElapsed < MIN_TAP_INTERVAL then
			return failSession(session, "tap rate exceeded")
		end
		session.lastTapElapsed = elapsed
		table.insert(session.events, { kind = kind, elapsed = elapsed })
	else
		return failSession(session, "unknown input kind")
	end

	session.lastSequence = sequence
	session.lastElapsed = elapsed
	return true
end

local function getTapGoalAt(events, phaseStart, goal)
	local count = 0
	for _, event in ipairs(events) do
		if event.kind == "Tap" and event.elapsed >= phaseStart - TAP_PHASE_CLOCK_TOLERANCE then
			count += 1
			if count >= goal then
				return event.elapsed
			end
		end
	end
	return nil
end

function MinigameValidationService.evaluate(session, payload, now)
	if session.invalidReason then
		return false, session.invalidReason
	end
	if type(payload) ~= "table" or payload.sessionId ~= session.sessionId then
		return false, "session mismatch"
	end
	if payload.success ~= true then
		return false, "client reported failure"
	end

	local clientElapsed = tonumber(payload.elapsed)
	local serverElapsed = now - session.requestedAt
	if not clientElapsed or clientElapsed < session.biteDelay then
		return false, "invalid completion clock"
	end
	if math.abs(serverElapsed - clientElapsed) > COMPLETION_CLOCK_TOLERANCE then
		return false, "completion arrived outside the live validation window"
	end

	local reelDuration = clientElapsed - session.biteDelay
	local maxDuration = tonumber(session.config.maxDuration) or 35
	if reelDuration > maxDuration + 0.5 then
		return false, "minigame timed out"
	end

	local simulation = FishingMinigameSimulation.new(
		session.config,
		session.difficulty,
		session.seed,
		session.rarity
	)
	local holding = false
	local replayAt = 0
	local relativeEvents = {}
	for _, event in ipairs(session.events) do
		local relativeElapsed = event.elapsed - session.biteDelay
		if relativeElapsed >= 0 and relativeElapsed <= reelDuration + 0.25 then
			local replayEvent = {
				kind = event.kind,
				elapsed = relativeElapsed,
				holding = event.holding,
			}
			table.insert(relativeEvents, replayEvent)
			if event.kind == "Hold" then
				simulation:advance(relativeElapsed - replayAt, holding)
				replayAt = relativeElapsed
				holding = event.holding
			end
		end
	end
	simulation:advance(reelDuration - replayAt, holding)
	local snapshot = simulation:getSnapshot()
	if snapshot.failedAt then
		return false, "server simulation reached zero progress"
	end
	if not snapshot.reelCompletedAt then
		return false, "server simulation did not complete"
	end

	local expectedCompletion = snapshot.reelCompletedAt
	local tapGoal = TAP_GOALS[session.rarity]
	if tapGoal then
		local secondPhaseStart = expectedCompletion + DRAIN_DURATION
		local secondTapGoalAt = getTapGoalAt(relativeEvents, secondPhaseStart, tapGoal)
		if not secondTapGoalAt then
			return false, "server did not receive the required phase taps"
		end
		expectedCompletion = math.max(secondPhaseStart + PHASE_DURATION, secondTapGoalAt)

		if session.rarity == "Mythic" then
			local thirdPhaseStart = expectedCompletion + DRAIN_DURATION
			local thirdTapGoalAt = getTapGoalAt(relativeEvents, thirdPhaseStart, tapGoal)
			if not thirdTapGoalAt then
				return false, "server did not receive the final phase taps"
			end
			expectedCompletion = math.max(thirdPhaseStart + PHASE_DURATION, thirdTapGoalAt)
		end
	end

	if reelDuration + 0.2 < expectedCompletion then
		return false, "completion was earlier than the server simulation"
	end
	return true
end

return MinigameValidationService

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local MIN_SPEED = 8
local MAX_SPEED = 24
local DEFAULT_SPEED = 16

local remotesFolder = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Remotes")

if not remotesFolder then
	remotesFolder = Instance.new("Folder")
	remotesFolder.Name = "Remotes"
	remotesFolder.Parent = ReplicatedStorage
end

local setMoveSpeedRemote =
	remotesFolder:FindFirstChild("SetMoveSpeed")

if not setMoveSpeedRemote then
	setMoveSpeedRemote = Instance.new("RemoteEvent")
	setMoveSpeedRemote.Name = "SetMoveSpeed"
	setMoveSpeedRemote.Parent = remotesFolder
end

local lastRequests = {}

local function validateSpeed(value)
	if typeof(value) ~= "number" then
		return nil
	end

	-- NaN 방지
	if value ~= value then
		return nil
	end

	return math.clamp(
		math.round(value),
		MIN_SPEED,
		MAX_SPEED
	)
end

local function applyPlayerSpeed(player, character)
	local humanoid =
		character:WaitForChild("Humanoid", 10)

	if not humanoid then
		return
	end

	local savedSpeed =
		validateSpeed(player:GetAttribute("MoveSpeed"))
		or DEFAULT_SPEED

	player:SetAttribute("MoveSpeed", savedSpeed)
	humanoid.WalkSpeed = savedSpeed
end

local function setupPlayer(player)
	if player:GetAttribute("MoveSpeed") == nil then
		player:SetAttribute("MoveSpeed", DEFAULT_SPEED)
	end

	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
		applyPlayerSpeed(player, character)
	end)

	if player.Character then
		task.spawn(
			applyPlayerSpeed,
			player,
			player.Character
		)
	end
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(setupPlayer)

for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
	setupPlayer(player)
end

setMoveSpeedRemote.OnServerEvent:Connect(
	function(player, requestedSpeed)
		local currentTime = os.clock()
		local previousTime = lastRequests[player] or 0

		if currentTime - previousTime < 0.05 then
			return
		end

		lastRequests[player] = currentTime

		local validSpeed =
			validateSpeed(requestedSpeed)

		if not validSpeed then
			return
		end

		player:SetAttribute("MoveSpeed", validSpeed)

		local character = player.Character
		local humanoid = character
			and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

		if humanoid then
			humanoid.WalkSpeed = validSpeed
		end
	end
)

Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
	lastRequests[player] = nil
end)

-- Adds presentation-only VFX to the visible surfaces behind AreaPortal triggers.
-- Teleport triggers, imported meshes, collisions, and travel logic are never changed.

local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local PORTAL_TAG = "AreaPortal"
local GENERATED_ATTRIBUTE = "FishyFishGeneratedPortalVFX"
local SPARK_TEXTURE = "rbxasset://textures/particles/sparkles_main.dds"

local DEFAULT_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(0, 221, 255)
local DEFAULT_ACCENT = Color3.fromRGB(191, 255, 255)

type AxisName = "X" | "Y" | "Z"
type PortalState = {
	surface: BasePart,
	instances: { Instance },
	tweens: { Tween },
	connections: { RBXScriptConnection },
}

local portalStates: { [BasePart]: PortalState } = {}
local triggerConnections: { [BasePart]: { RBXScriptConnection } } = {}

local function markGenerated(instance: Instance)
	instance:SetAttribute(GENERATED_ATTRIBUTE, true)
end

local function remember(state: PortalState, instance: Instance)
	markGenerated(instance)
	table.insert(state.instances, instance)
	return instance
end

local function axisSize(size: Vector3, axis: AxisName): number
	if axis == "X" then
		return size.X
	elseif axis == "Y" then
		return size.Y
	end
	return size.Z
end

local function axisVector(axis: AxisName, amount: number): Vector3
	if axis == "X" then
		return Vector3.new(amount, 0, 0)
	elseif axis == "Y" then
		return Vector3.new(0, amount, 0)
	end
	return Vector3.new(0, 0, amount)
end

local function worldAxis(part: BasePart, axis: AxisName): Vector3
	if axis == "X" then
		return part.CFrame.RightVector
	elseif axis == "Y" then
		return part.CFrame.UpVector
	end
	return -part.CFrame.LookVector
end

local function faceForAxis(axis: AxisName): Enum.NormalId
	if axis == "X" then
		return Enum.NormalId.Right
	elseif axis == "Y" then
		return Enum.NormalId.Top
	end
	return Enum.NormalId.Front
end

local function oppositeFace(face: Enum.NormalId): Enum.NormalId
	if face == Enum.NormalId.Right then
		return Enum.NormalId.Left
	elseif face == Enum.NormalId.Left then
		return Enum.NormalId.Right
	elseif face == Enum.NormalId.Top then
		return Enum.NormalId.Bottom
	elseif face == Enum.NormalId.Bottom then
		return Enum.NormalId.Top
	elseif face == Enum.NormalId.Front then
		return Enum.NormalId.Back
	end
	return Enum.NormalId.Front
end

local function getSurfaceAxes(part: BasePart): (AxisName, AxisName, AxisName)
	local sizes = {
		X = part.Size.X,
		Y = part.Size.Y,
		Z = part.Size.Z,
	}
	local axes: { AxisName } = { "X", "Y", "Z" }
	table.sort(axes, function(a, b)
		return sizes[a] < sizes[b]
	end)

	local normalAxis = axes[1]
	local planeA = axes[2]
	local planeB = axes[3]
	local aVerticality = math.abs(worldAxis(part, planeA).Y)
	local bVerticality = math.abs(worldAxis(part, planeB).Y)

	if aVerticality >= bVerticality then
		return normalAxis, planeB, planeA
	end
	return normalAxis, planeA, planeB
end

local function getColorAttribute(instance: Instance, name: string, fallback: Color3): Color3
	local value = instance:GetAttribute(name)
	if typeof(value) == "Color3" then
		return value
	end
	return fallback
end

local function getIntensity(trigger: BasePart): number
	local value = tonumber(trigger:GetAttribute("PortalVFXIntensity")) or 1
	return math.clamp(value, 0.25, 2)
end

local function hasThinPlane(part: BasePart): boolean
	local smallest = math.min(part.Size.X, part.Size.Y, part.Size.Z)
	local largest = math.max(part.Size.X, part.Size.Y, part.Size.Z)
	return largest > 0 and smallest / largest <= 0.22
end

local function isDirectSurface(part: BasePart): boolean
	return part.Transparency < 0.98 and hasThinPlane(part)
end

local function lowerName(instance: Instance): string
	return string.lower(instance.Name)
end

local function candidateScore(trigger: BasePart, candidate: BasePart, searchRadius: number): number?
	if candidate == trigger or candidate.Transparency >= 0.98 then
		return nil
	end

	local distance = (candidate.Position - trigger.Position).Magnitude
	if distance > searchRadius then
		return nil
	end

	local name = lowerName(candidate)
	local smallest = math.min(candidate.Size.X, candidate.Size.Y, candidate.Size.Z)
	local largest = math.max(candidate.Size.X, candidate.Size.Y, candidate.Size.Z)
	if largest <= 0 then
		return nil
	end

	local thinness = smallest / largest
	local score = -distance * 1.15

	if candidate:GetAttribute("PortalVFXSurface") == true then
		score += 240
	end
	if string.find(name, "warpwater", 1, true) then
		score += 150
	end
	if string.find(name, "portal_surface", 1, true)
		or (string.find(name, "portal", 1, true) and string.find(name, "surface", 1, true)) then
		score += 135
	elseif string.find(name, "surface", 1, true) then
		score += 78
	elseif string.find(name, "portal", 1, true) then
		score += 48
	elseif string.find(name, "warp", 1, true) then
		score += 42
	elseif string.find(name, "water", 1, true) then
		score += 25
	end

	if thinness <= 0.22 then
		score += 72 * (1 - thinness / 0.22)
	else
		score -= 35
	end

	if candidate:IsA("MeshPart") then
		score += 14
		if candidate.TextureID ~= "" then
			score += 8
		end
	end

	if candidate.Material == Enum.Material.Neon or candidate.Material == Enum.Material.ForceField then
		score += 12
	end

	local color = candidate.Color
	if color.B > color.R * 1.15 and color.G > color.R * 1.05 then
		score += 16
	end

	for _, rejectedWord in ipairs({ "trigger", "spawn", "zone", "sign", "_pad", "_base" }) do
		if string.find(name, rejectedWord, 1, true) then
			score -= 150
		end
	end

	return score
end

local function findExplicitSurface(trigger: BasePart): BasePart?
	local surfaceValue = trigger:FindFirstChild("PortalVFXSurface")
	if surfaceValue and surfaceValue:IsA("ObjectValue") then
		local value = surfaceValue.Value
		if value and value:IsA("BasePart") then
			return value
		end
	end

	local surfaceName = trigger:GetAttribute("PortalVFXSurfaceName")
	if type(surfaceName) ~= "string" or surfaceName == "" then
		return nil
	end

	local root: Instance? = trigger.Parent
	for _ = 1, 5 do
		if not root or root == Workspace then
			break
		end
		local candidate = root:FindFirstChild(surfaceName, true)
		if candidate and candidate:IsA("BasePart") then
			return candidate
		end
		root = root.Parent
	end

	local workspaceCandidate = Workspace:FindFirstChild(surfaceName, true)
	if workspaceCandidate and workspaceCandidate:IsA("BasePart") then
		return workspaceCandidate
	end
	return nil
end

local function findVisualSurface(trigger: BasePart): BasePart?
	local explicitSurface = findExplicitSurface(trigger)
	if explicitSurface then
		return explicitSurface
	end

	if isDirectSurface(trigger) then
		return trigger
	end

	local searchRadius = math.clamp(trigger.Size.Magnitude * 1.35, 30, 90)
	local bestPart: BasePart? = nil
	local bestScore = -math.huge
	local seen: { [BasePart]: boolean } = {}

	local function consider(instance: Instance)
		if not instance:IsA("BasePart") or seen[instance] then
			return
		end
		seen[instance] = true
		local score = candidateScore(trigger, instance, searchRadius)
		if score and score > bestScore then
			bestScore = score
			bestPart = instance
		end
	end

	local root: Instance? = trigger.Parent
	for _ = 1, 4 do
		if not root or root == Workspace then
			break
		end
		consider(root)
		for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
			consider(descendant)
		end
		root = root.Parent
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart")
			and (descendant.Position - trigger.Position).Magnitude <= searchRadius then
			consider(descendant)
		end
	end

	if bestScore >= 58 then
		return bestPart
	end
	return nil
end

local function makeAttachment(
	state: PortalState,
	surface: BasePart,
	name: string,
	position: Vector3,
	normalAxis: AxisName,
	normalDirection: number?
): Attachment
	local attachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
	attachment.Name = name
	attachment.Position = position
	attachment.SecondaryAxis = normalAxis == "Y" and Vector3.new(0, 0, 1) or Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
	attachment.Axis = axisVector(normalAxis, normalDirection or 1)
	attachment.Parent = surface
	remember(state, attachment)
	return attachment
end

local function makeEnergyEmitter(
	state: PortalState,
	surface: BasePart,
	name: string,
	face: Enum.NormalId,
	color: Color3,
	accent: Color3,
	rate: number,
	speed: NumberRange
): ParticleEmitter
	local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
	emitter.Name = name
	emitter.Texture = SPARK_TEXTURE
	emitter.Color = ColorSequence.new({
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, accent),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.45, color),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, accent),
	})
	emitter.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 1),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.12, 0.12),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.7, 0.42),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
	})
	emitter.Size = NumberSequence.new({
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.18, 0.16),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.62, 0.34),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0),
	})
	emitter.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.7, 1.45)
	emitter.Rate = rate
	emitter.Speed = speed
	emitter.Drag = 2.8
	emitter.Acceleration = Vector3.new(0, 1.2, 0)
	emitter.Rotation = NumberRange.new(-180, 180)
	emitter.RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-80, 80)
	emitter.SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(18, 18)
	emitter.EmissionDirection = face
	emitter.Shape = Enum.ParticleEmitterShape.Box
	emitter.ShapeStyle = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeStyle.Surface
	emitter.ShapeInOut = Enum.ParticleEmitterShapeInOut.Outward
	emitter.Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera
	emitter.LightEmission = 1
	emitter.LightInfluence = 0
	emitter.Brightness = 2.2
	emitter.ZOffset = 0.08
	emitter.Parent = surface
	remember(state, emitter)
	return emitter
end

local function makeEdgeSparkEmitter(
	state: PortalState,
	attachment: Attachment,
	face: Enum.NormalId,
	color: Color3,
	accent: Color3,
	rate: number
)
	local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
	emitter.Name = "PortalEdgeSparks"
	emitter.Texture = SPARK_TEXTURE
	emitter.Color = ColorSequence.new(accent, color)
	emitter.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.72, 0.2),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
	})
	emitter.Size = NumberSequence.new({
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.46),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.42, 0.24),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0),
	})
	emitter.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.65, 1.2)
	emitter.Rate = rate
	emitter.Speed = NumberRange.new(0.2, 0.8)
	emitter.Drag = 0.8
	emitter.Acceleration = Vector3.new(0, 3.4, 0)
	emitter.SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(30, 30)
	emitter.Rotation = NumberRange.new(-180, 180)
	emitter.RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-110, 110)
	emitter.EmissionDirection = face
	emitter.Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera
	emitter.LightEmission = 1
	emitter.LightInfluence = 0
	emitter.Brightness = 2.8
	emitter.ZOffset = 0.2
	emitter.Parent = attachment
	remember(state, emitter)
end

local function makeArcBeam(
	state: PortalState,
	surface: BasePart,
	name: string,
	attachment0: Attachment,
	attachment1: Attachment,
	color: Color3,
	accent: Color3,
	width: number,
	curve: number,
	speed: number
)
	local beam = Instance.new("Beam")
	beam.Name = name
	beam.Attachment0 = attachment0
	beam.Attachment1 = attachment1
	beam.Color = ColorSequence.new({
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, color),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5, accent),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, color),
	})
	beam.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.38),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.18, 0.04),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.82, 0.17),
		NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0.54),
	})
	beam.Width0 = width
	beam.Width1 = width * 0.58
	beam.CurveSize0 = curve
	beam.CurveSize1 = -curve * 0.72
	beam.Segments = 20
	beam.FaceCamera = true
	beam.LightEmission = 1
	beam.LightInfluence = 0
	beam.Brightness = 2.6
	beam.ZOffset = 0.12
	beam.Texture = SPARK_TEXTURE
	beam.TextureMode = Enum.TextureMode.Wrap
	beam.TextureLength = 1.35
	beam.TextureSpeed = speed
	beam.Parent = surface
	remember(state, beam)
end

local function cleanupPortal(trigger: BasePart)
	local state = portalStates[trigger]
	if not state then
		return
	end
	portalStates[trigger] = nil

	for _, connection in ipairs(state.connections) do
		connection:Disconnect()
	end
	for _, tween in ipairs(state.tweens) do
		tween:Cancel()
	end
	for index = #state.instances, 1, -1 do
		local instance = state.instances[index]
		if instance.Parent then
			instance:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function buildPortalVFX(trigger: BasePart, surface: BasePart)
	cleanupPortal(trigger)

	local state: PortalState = {
		surface = surface,
		instances = {},
		tweens = {},
		connections = {},
	}
	portalStates[trigger] = state

	local normalAxis, horizontalAxis, verticalAxis = getSurfaceAxes(surface)
	local horizontalSize = axisSize(surface.Size, horizontalAxis)
	local verticalSize = axisSize(surface.Size, verticalAxis)
	local smallerPlaneSize = math.min(horizontalSize, verticalSize)
	local area = horizontalSize * verticalSize
	local intensity = getIntensity(trigger)
	local color = getColorAttribute(trigger, "PortalVFXColor", DEFAULT_COLOR)
	local accent = getColorAttribute(trigger, "PortalVFXAccentColor", DEFAULT_ACCENT)
	local frontFace = faceForAxis(normalAxis)
	local backFace = oppositeFace(frontFace)
	local surfaceOffset = math.max(axisSize(surface.Size, normalAxis) * 0.5 + 0.1, 0.14)

	local center = makeAttachment(state, surface, "PortalVFXCenter", Vector3.zero, normalAxis)
	local pointLight = Instance.new("PointLight")
	pointLight.Name = "PortalVFXGlow"
	pointLight.Color = color
	pointLight.Brightness = 1.05 * intensity
	pointLight.Range = math.clamp(math.max(horizontalSize, verticalSize) * 0.72, 12, 30)
	pointLight.Shadows = false
	pointLight.Parent = center
	remember(state, pointLight)

	local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
	highlight.Name = "PortalVFXOutline"
	highlight.Adornee = surface
	highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.Occluded
	highlight.FillTransparency = 1
	highlight.OutlineColor = accent
	highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0.28
	highlight.Parent = surface
	remember(state, highlight)

	for index, face in ipairs({ frontFace, backFace }) do
		local light = Instance.new("SurfaceLight")
		light.Name = index == 1 and "PortalVFXFrontGlow" or "PortalVFXBackGlow"
		light.Face = face
		light.Color = color
		light.Angle = 120
		light.Brightness = 0.62 * intensity
		light.Range = math.clamp(smallerPlaneSize * 0.7, 8, 22)
		light.Shadows = false
		light.Parent = surface
		remember(state, light)

		local tween = TweenService:Create(
			light,
			TweenInfo.new(1.45 + index * 0.18, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, -1, true),
			{ Brightness = 1.02 * intensity }
		)
		table.insert(state.tweens, tween)
		tween:Play()
	end

	local glowTween = TweenService:Create(
		pointLight,
		TweenInfo.new(1.7, Enum.EasingStyle.Sine, Enum.EasingDirection.InOut, -1, true),
		{ Brightness = 1.72 * intensity }
	)
	table.insert(state.tweens, glowTween)
	glowTween:Play()

	local surfaceRate = math.clamp(area / 18, 12, 46) * intensity
	makeEnergyEmitter(
		state,
		surface,
		"PortalEnergyWispsFront",
		frontFace,
		color,
		accent,
		surfaceRate * 0.62,
		NumberRange.new(0.35, 1.15)
	)
	makeEnergyEmitter(
		state,
		surface,
		"PortalEnergyWispsBack",
		backFace,
		color,
		accent,
		surfaceRate * 0.38,
		NumberRange.new(0.2, 0.8)
	)

	local horizontalHalf = horizontalSize * 0.47
	local verticalHalf = verticalSize * 0.47
	local edgePositions = {
		axisVector(horizontalAxis, -horizontalHalf) + axisVector(verticalAxis, -verticalHalf),
		axisVector(horizontalAxis, horizontalHalf) + axisVector(verticalAxis, -verticalHalf),
		axisVector(horizontalAxis, -horizontalHalf) + axisVector(verticalAxis, verticalHalf),
		axisVector(horizontalAxis, horizontalHalf) + axisVector(verticalAxis, verticalHalf),
		axisVector(horizontalAxis, -horizontalHalf),
		axisVector(horizontalAxis, horizontalHalf),
		axisVector(verticalAxis, -verticalHalf),
		axisVector(verticalAxis, verticalHalf),
	}
	local edgeRate = math.clamp(area / 340, 1.8, 5.2) * intensity
	for index, position in ipairs(edgePositions) do
		local direction = index % 2 == 0 and -1 or 1
		local attachment = makeAttachment(
			state,
			surface,
			"PortalVFXEdge" .. tostring(index),
			position + axisVector(normalAxis, surfaceOffset * direction),
			normalAxis,
			direction
		)
		makeEdgeSparkEmitter(state, attachment, Enum.NormalId.Right, color, accent, edgeRate)
	end

	local beamPlans = {
		{ -0.44, -0.24, 0.42, 0.31, 0.24, 0.42 },
		{ -0.38, 0.36, 0.38, -0.34, -0.2, -0.34 },
		{ -0.46, 0.06, 0.46, -0.04, 0.13, 0.28 },
	}
	local beamWidth = math.clamp(smallerPlaneSize * 0.016, 0.12, 0.38) * intensity
	for index, plan in ipairs(beamPlans) do
		for sideIndex, direction in ipairs({ 1, -1 }) do
			local sideName = sideIndex == 1 and "Front" or "Back"
			local normalOffset = axisVector(normalAxis, surfaceOffset * direction)
			local startPosition = axisVector(horizontalAxis, horizontalSize * plan[1])
				+ axisVector(verticalAxis, verticalSize * plan[2])
				+ normalOffset
			local endPosition = axisVector(horizontalAxis, horizontalSize * plan[3])
				+ axisVector(verticalAxis, verticalSize * plan[4])
				+ normalOffset
			local startAttachment = makeAttachment(
				state,
				surface,
				"PortalVFXArc" .. tostring(index) .. sideName .. "Start",
				startPosition,
				normalAxis,
				direction
			)
			local endAttachment = makeAttachment(
				state,
				surface,
				"PortalVFXArc" .. tostring(index) .. sideName .. "End",
				endPosition,
				normalAxis,
				-direction
			)
			makeArcBeam(
				state,
				surface,
				"PortalVFXArc" .. tostring(index) .. sideName,
				startAttachment,
				endAttachment,
				color,
				accent,
				beamWidth * (1 - (index - 1) * 0.14) * (sideIndex == 1 and 1 or 0.8),
				smallerPlaneSize * plan[5],
				plan[6] * direction
			)
		end
	end

	table.insert(state.connections, surface.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
		if not surface:IsDescendantOf(Workspace) then
			cleanupPortal(trigger)
		end
	end))

	print(string.format(
		"[PortalVFXService] Applied %s -> %s (%.1f x %.1f)",
		tostring(trigger:GetAttribute("PortalName") or trigger.Name),
		surface:GetFullName(),
		horizontalSize,
		verticalSize
	))
end

local function refreshPortal(trigger: BasePart)
	if not trigger:IsDescendantOf(Workspace)
		or not CollectionService:HasTag(trigger, PORTAL_TAG)
		or trigger:GetAttribute("PortalVFXDisabled") == true then
		cleanupPortal(trigger)
		return
	end

	local surface = findVisualSurface(trigger)
	if not surface then
		cleanupPortal(trigger)
		warn("[PortalVFXService] No visual surface found for", trigger:GetFullName())
		return
	end

	local current = portalStates[trigger]
	if current and current.surface == surface and surface:IsDescendantOf(Workspace) then
		return
	end
	buildPortalVFX(trigger, surface)
end

local function disconnectTrigger(trigger: BasePart)
	cleanupPortal(trigger)
	local connections = triggerConnections[trigger]
	if connections then
		for _, connection in ipairs(connections) do
			connection:Disconnect()
		end
	end
	triggerConnections[trigger] = nil
end

local function connectTrigger(instance: Instance)
	if not instance:IsA("BasePart") then
		return
	end
	local trigger = instance
	if triggerConnections[trigger] then
		refreshPortal(trigger)
		return
	end

	triggerConnections[trigger] = {
		trigger:GetAttributeChangedSignal("PortalVFXDisabled"):Connect(function()
			refreshPortal(trigger)
		end),
		trigger:GetAttributeChangedSignal("PortalVFXIntensity"):Connect(function()
			cleanupPortal(trigger)
			refreshPortal(trigger)
		end),
		trigger:GetAttributeChangedSignal("PortalVFXColor"):Connect(function()
			cleanupPortal(trigger)
			refreshPortal(trigger)
		end),
		trigger:GetAttributeChangedSignal("PortalVFXAccentColor"):Connect(function()
			cleanupPortal(trigger)
			refreshPortal(trigger)
		end),
		trigger.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
			if not trigger:IsDescendantOf(Workspace) then
				disconnectTrigger(trigger)
			end
		end),
	}

	task.defer(refreshPortal, trigger)
end

-- Remove only top-level remnants generated by an older copy of this controller.
local generatedRoots = {}
for _, descendant in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
	if descendant:GetAttribute(GENERATED_ATTRIBUTE) == true then
		local parent = descendant.Parent
		if not parent or parent:GetAttribute(GENERATED_ATTRIBUTE) ~= true then
			table.insert(generatedRoots, descendant)
		end
	end
end
for _, generatedRoot in ipairs(generatedRoots) do
	generatedRoot:Destroy()
end

for _, portal in ipairs(CollectionService:GetTagged(PORTAL_TAG)) do
	connectTrigger(portal)
end

CollectionService:GetInstanceAddedSignal(PORTAL_TAG):Connect(connectTrigger)
CollectionService:GetInstanceRemovedSignal(PORTAL_TAG):Connect(function(instance)
	if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
		disconnectTrigger(instance)
	end
end)
