local trackedTools = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local trackedPlayers = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local refreshGeneration = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })

local function startsWith(text, prefix)
	return string.sub(text, 1, #prefix) == prefix
end

local function destroyExistingEffects(tool)
	for _, descendant in ipairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
		if startsWith(descendant.Name, OBJECT_PREFIX) then
			descendant:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function clearRenderedEffects(tool)
	destroyExistingEffects(tool)
	tool:SetAttribute(ACTIVE_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE, nil)
end

local function isEquippedFishingRod(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") or tool.Name ~= TOOL_NAME or not tool:IsDescendantOf(Workspace) then
		return false
	end

	local character = tool.Parent
	if not character or not character:IsA("Model") or not character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
		return false
	end

	return Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character) ~= nil
end

local function isExcludedTipPart(part)
	local normalizedName = string.lower(part.Name)
	return string.find(normalizedName, "bobber", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(normalizedName, "string", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(normalizedName, "line", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(normalizedName, "hook", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(normalizedName, "reel", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(normalizedName, "handle", 1, true) ~= nil
		or string.find(normalizedName, "grip", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function getRodAttachments(tool)
	local handle = tool:FindFirstChild("Handle")
	if not handle or not handle:IsA("BasePart") then
		return nil, nil, nil
	end

	local visual = tool:FindFirstChild("RodVisual")
	local bestPart = nil
	local bestLocalPoint = nil
	local bestDistance = -math.huge

	if visual then
		for _, descendant in ipairs(visual:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and not isExcludedTipPart(descendant) then
				local halfSize = descendant.Size * 0.5
				for x = -1, 1, 2 do
					for y = -1, 1, 2 do
						for z = -1, 1, 2 do
							local localPoint = Vector3.new(halfSize.X * x, halfSize.Y * y, halfSize.Z * z)
							local worldPoint = descendant.CFrame:PointToWorldSpace(localPoint)
							local distance = (worldPoint - handle.Position).Magnitude
							if distance > bestDistance then
								bestDistance = distance
								bestPart = descendant
								bestLocalPoint = localPoint * 0.88
							end
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end

	local tipPart = bestPart or handle
	local tipPosition = bestLocalPoint or Vector3.new(0, math.max(handle.Size.Y * 0.46, 0.1), 0)

	local tipAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
	tipAttachment.Name = OBJECT_PREFIX .. "Tip"
	tipAttachment.Position = tipPosition
	tipAttachment.Parent = tipPart

	-- A Trail should join two nearby points across the rod tip. Connecting the
	-- handle to the tip creates a broad sheet along the rod, which reads as a
	-- translucent ribbon instead of a short movement streak.
	local rodDirectionWorld = tipAttachment.WorldPosition - handle.Position
	if rodDirectionWorld.Magnitude < 0.001 then
		rodDirectionWorld = tipPart.CFrame.UpVector
	end
	local rodDirectionLocal = tipPart.CFrame:VectorToObjectSpace(rodDirectionWorld.Unit)
	local candidateAxes = {
		Vector3.new(1, 0, 0),
		Vector3.new(0, 1, 0),
		Vector3.new(0, 0, 1),
	}
	local widthAxis = candidateAxes[1]
	local lowestParallel = math.huge
	for _, axis in ipairs(candidateAxes) do
		local parallel = math.abs(rodDirectionLocal:Dot(axis))
		if parallel < lowestParallel then
			lowestParallel = parallel
			widthAxis = axis
		end
	end

	local halfWidth = math.clamp(math.min(tipPart.Size.X, tipPart.Size.Y, tipPart.Size.Z) * 0.42, 0.025, 0.065)
	local trailLeft = Instance.new("Attachment")
	trailLeft.Name = OBJECT_PREFIX .. "TrailLeft"
	trailLeft.Position = tipPosition + widthAxis * halfWidth
	trailLeft.Parent = tipPart

	local trailRight = Instance.new("Attachment")
	trailRight.Name = OBJECT_PREFIX .. "TrailRight"
	trailRight.Position = tipPosition - widthAxis * halfWidth
	trailRight.Parent = tipPart

	return tipAttachment, trailLeft, trailRight
end

local function findOwningPlayer(tool)
	local character = tool.Parent
	if character and character:IsA("Model") then
		return Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(character)
	end
	return nil
end


local function getOwnedFolder(player, createIfMissing)
	local folder = player:FindFirstChild(OWNED_FOLDER_NAME)
	if folder and not folder:IsA("Folder") then
		if not createIfMissing then
			return nil
		end
		folder:Destroy()
		folder = nil
	end

	if not folder and createIfMissing then
		folder = Instance.new("Folder")
		folder.Name = OWNED_FOLDER_NAME
		folder.Parent = player
	end

	return folder
end

local function isDefaultPreset(presetId)
	local catalogEntry = CATALOG[presetId]
	return catalogEntry ~= nil and catalogEntry.category == "Default"
end

local function ownsPreset(player, presetId)
	if presetId == "Default" or presetId == "Baseline" or presetId == "None" or presetId == "Disabled" then
		return true
	end

	if isDefaultPreset(presetId) then
		return true
	end

	if not PRESETS[presetId] or not CATALOG[presetId] then
		return false
	end

	local folder = getOwnedFolder(player, false)
	local ownedValue = folder and folder:FindFirstChild(presetId)
	return ownedValue ~= nil and ownedValue:IsA("BoolValue") and ownedValue.Value == true
end

local function grantPreset(player, presetId, acquisitionSource)
	if not player or not player:IsA("Player") then
		return false, "Invalid player."
	end

	local catalogEntry = CATALOG[presetId]
	if not catalogEntry or not PRESETS[presetId] then
		return false, "Unknown rod VFX preset."
	end

	if catalogEntry.category == "Default" then
		return false, "Default rod VFX does not require ownership."
	end

	local folder = getOwnedFolder(player, true)
	local ownedValue = folder:FindFirstChild(presetId)
	if ownedValue and not ownedValue:IsA("BoolValue") then
		ownedValue:Destroy()
		ownedValue = nil
	end

	if not ownedValue then
		ownedValue = Instance.new("BoolValue")
		ownedValue.Name = presetId
		ownedValue.Parent = folder
	end

	ownedValue.Value = true
	ownedValue:SetAttribute("AcquisitionSource", tostring(acquisitionSource or "Unknown"))
	ownedValue:SetAttribute("GrantedAtUnix", os.time())
	return true
end

local function revokePreset(player, presetId)
	if not player or not player:IsA("Player") then
		return false, "Invalid player."
	end

	local folder = getOwnedFolder(player, false)
	local ownedValue = folder and folder:FindFirstChild(presetId)
	if ownedValue then
		ownedValue:Destroy()
	end

	if player:GetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE) == presetId then
		player:SetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE, "Default")
	end

	return true
end

local function equipPreset(player, presetId)
	if not player or not player:IsA("Player") then
		return false, "Invalid player."
	end

	presetId = tostring(presetId or "Default")
	if presetId == "" then
		presetId = "Default"
	end

	if presetId == "Default" or presetId == "Baseline" then
		player:SetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE, "Default")
		return true
	end

	if presetId == "None" or presetId == "Disabled" then
		player:SetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE, "None")
		return true
	end

	if not PRESETS[presetId] or not CATALOG[presetId] then
		return false, "Unknown rod VFX preset."
	end

	if not ownsPreset(player, presetId) then
		return false, "Player does not own this rod VFX."
	end

	player:SetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE, presetId)
	return true
end

local function makeCatalogSnapshot()
	local snapshot = {}

	for presetId, entry in pairs(CATALOG) do
		local purchase = entry.purchase
		snapshot[presetId] = {
			displayName = entry.displayName,
			category = entry.category,
			includedWithRod = entry.includedWithRod,
			purchase = purchase and {
				currency = purchase.currency,
				price = purchase.price,
				productType = purchase.productType,
				assetId = purchase.assetId,
			} or nil,
		}
	end

	return snapshot
end

local function resolvePresetId(tool)
	if tool:GetAttribute(DISABLE_ATTRIBUTE) == true then
		return nil
	end

	local rodId = tool:GetAttribute("RodId")
	local defaultPresetId = DEFAULT_PRESET_BY_ROD[rodId]

	-- Tool-level override has highest priority. It is intended for trusted
	-- server code, previews, admin tools, or a future dedicated paid controller.
	local explicitPreset = tool:GetAttribute(TOOL_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE)
	if type(explicitPreset) == "string" and explicitPreset ~= "" then
		if explicitPreset == "None" or explicitPreset == "Disabled" then
			return nil
		end
		if explicitPreset == "Default" or explicitPreset == "Baseline" then
			return defaultPresetId
		end
		return PRESETS[explicitPreset] and explicitPreset or nil
	end

	local player = findOwningPlayer(tool)
	if player then
		local equippedSlotPreset = player:GetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE)
		if type(equippedSlotPreset) == "string" and equippedSlotPreset ~= "" then
			if equippedSlotPreset == "None" or equippedSlotPreset == "Disabled" then
				return nil
			end
			if equippedSlotPreset == "Default" or equippedSlotPreset == "Baseline" then
				return defaultPresetId
			end

			if PRESETS[equippedSlotPreset] and ownsPreset(player, equippedSlotPreset) then
				return equippedSlotPreset
			end

			-- Unknown names intentionally suppress the built-in default so a
			-- future external premium controller can own the complete effect.
			return nil
		end
	end

	return defaultPresetId
end

local function createEmitter(parentAttachment, emitterConfig)
	local emitter = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
	emitter.Name = OBJECT_PREFIX .. emitterConfig.name
	emitter.Texture = emitterConfig.texture
	emitter.Color = emitterConfig.color
	emitter.Rate = emitterConfig.rate
	emitter.Lifetime = emitterConfig.lifetime
	emitter.Speed = emitterConfig.speed
	emitter.Acceleration = emitterConfig.acceleration
	emitter.Drag = emitterConfig.drag
	emitter.SpreadAngle = emitterConfig.spreadAngle
	emitter.Size = emitterConfig.size
	emitter.Transparency = emitterConfig.transparency
	emitter.LightEmission = emitterConfig.lightEmission or 0
	emitter.LightInfluence = 0
	emitter.Brightness = emitterConfig.brightness or 1
	emitter.Rotation = emitterConfig.rotation or NumberRange.new(0, 0)
	emitter.RotSpeed = emitterConfig.rotSpeed or NumberRange.new(0, 0)
	emitter.VelocityInheritance = emitterConfig.velocityInheritance or 0
	emitter.ZOffset = emitterConfig.zOffset or 0
	emitter.EmissionDirection = Enum.NormalId.Top
	emitter.Orientation = Enum.ParticleOrientation.FacingCamera
	emitter.Enabled = true
	emitter.Parent = parentAttachment
	return emitter
end

local function createLights(parentAttachment, presetConfig)
	for index, lightConfig in ipairs(presetConfig.lights or {}) do
		local light = Instance.new("PointLight")
		light.Name = string.format("%sLight_%d", OBJECT_PREFIX, index)
		light.Color = lightConfig.color
		light.Brightness = lightConfig.brightness
		light.Range = lightConfig.range
		light.Shadows = false
		light.Enabled = true
		light.Parent = parentAttachment
	end
end

local function createTrailLayer(parent, name, attachment0, attachment1, color, transparency, widthScale, lifetime, lightEmission, minLength)
	local trail = Instance.new("Trail")
	trail.Name = OBJECT_PREFIX .. name
	trail.Attachment0 = attachment0
	trail.Attachment1 = attachment1
	trail.Color = color
	trail.Transparency = transparency
	trail.WidthScale = widthScale
	trail.Lifetime = lifetime
	trail.LightEmission = lightEmission
	trail.MinLength = minLength
	trail.FaceCamera = true
	trail.Enabled = true
	trail.Parent = parent
	return trail
end

local function createTrails(trailLeft, trailRight, trailConfig)
	if not trailConfig then
		return
	end

	local parent = trailLeft.Parent
	local minLength = trailConfig.minLength or 0.035
	createTrailLayer(
		parent,
		"TrailOuter",
		trailLeft,
		trailRight,
		trailConfig.color,
		trailConfig.transparency,
		trailConfig.widthScale,
		trailConfig.lifetime,
		trailConfig.lightEmission or 0,
		minLength
	)

	createTrailLayer(
		parent,
		"TrailCore",
		trailLeft,
		trailRight,
		trailConfig.color,
		NumberSequence.new({
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.18),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.55, 0.42),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
		}),
		NumberSequence.new({
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.44),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.45, 0.24),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0),
		}),
		trailConfig.lifetime * 0.78,
		1,
		minLength
	)
end

local function createHighlight(tool, presetConfig)
	local highlightConfig = presetConfig.highlight
	local visual = tool:FindFirstChild("RodVisual")
	if not highlightConfig or not visual then
		return
	end

	local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
	highlight.Name = OBJECT_PREFIX .. "Highlight"
	highlight.Adornee = visual
	highlight.FillColor = highlightConfig.fillColor
	highlight.FillTransparency = highlightConfig.fillTransparency
	highlight.OutlineColor = highlightConfig.outlineColor
	highlight.OutlineTransparency = highlightConfig.outlineTransparency
	highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.Occluded
	highlight.Parent = tool
end

local function emitInitialBurst(tipAttachment, presetConfig)
	local burstConfig = presetConfig.burst
	if not burstConfig then
		return
	end

	local emitter = tipAttachment:FindFirstChild(OBJECT_PREFIX .. burstConfig.emitterName)
	if emitter and emitter:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
		emitter:Emit(burstConfig.count or 0)
	end
end

local function refreshTool(tool)
	clearRenderedEffects(tool)

	if not isEquippedFishingRod(tool) then
		return
	end

	local presetId = resolvePresetId(tool)
	local presetConfig = presetId and PRESETS[presetId]
	if not presetConfig then
		return
	end

	local tipAttachment, trailLeft, trailRight = getRodAttachments(tool)
	if not tipAttachment or not trailLeft or not trailRight then
		return
	end

	createLights(tipAttachment, presetConfig)
	for _, emitterConfig in ipairs(presetConfig.emitters or {}) do
		createEmitter(tipAttachment, emitterConfig)
	end
	createTrails(trailLeft, trailRight, presetConfig.trail)
	createHighlight(tool, presetConfig)
	emitInitialBurst(tipAttachment, presetConfig)

	tool:SetAttribute(ACTIVE_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE, presetId)
end

local function scheduleRefresh(tool)
	local generation = (refreshGeneration[tool] or 0) + 1
	refreshGeneration[tool] = generation

	task.defer(function()
		if refreshGeneration[tool] ~= generation or not tool.Parent then
			return
		end
		refreshTool(tool)
	end)
end

local function untrackTool(tool)
	local connections = trackedTools[tool]
	if not connections then
		return
	end

	trackedTools[tool] = nil
	refreshGeneration[tool] = nil
	for _, connection in ipairs(connections) do
		connection:Disconnect()
	end
	destroyExistingEffects(tool)
end

local function refreshEquippedToolForPlayer(player)
	local character = player.Character
	if not character then
		return
	end

	local tool = character:FindFirstChild(TOOL_NAME)
	if tool and tool:IsA("Tool") then
		scheduleRefresh(tool)
	end
end

local function trackPlayerAttribute(player)
	if trackedPlayers[player] then
		return
	end

	local connections = {}
	trackedPlayers[player] = connections
	getOwnedFolder(player, true)

	if player:GetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE) == nil then
		player:SetAttribute(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE, "Default")
	end

	table.insert(connections, player:GetAttributeChangedSignal(PLAYER_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE):Connect(function()
		refreshEquippedToolForPlayer(player)
	end))

	table.insert(connections, player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
		task.defer(function()
			refreshEquippedToolForPlayer(player)
		end)
	end))

	table.insert(connections, player.Destroying:Connect(function()
		local currentConnections = trackedPlayers[player]
		trackedPlayers[player] = nil
		for _, connection in ipairs(currentConnections or {}) do
			connection:Disconnect()
		end
	end))
end

local function trackTool(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") or tool.Name ~= TOOL_NAME or trackedTools[tool] then
		return
	end

	local connections = {}
	trackedTools[tool] = connections

	table.insert(connections, tool.AncestryChanged:Connect(function()
		if isEquippedFishingRod(tool) then
			scheduleRefresh(tool)
		else
			-- Remove replicated effects synchronously when the rod leaves the
			-- character. This prevents a backpack display from cloning a single
			-- frame of equipped-only VFX before a deferred refresh can run.
			refreshGeneration[tool] = (refreshGeneration[tool] or 0) + 1
			clearRenderedEffects(tool)
		end
		local player = findOwningPlayer(tool)
		if player then
			trackPlayerAttribute(player)
		end
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tool:GetAttributeChangedSignal("RodId"):Connect(function()
		scheduleRefresh(tool)
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tool:GetAttributeChangedSignal(TOOL_PRESET_ATTRIBUTE):Connect(function()
		scheduleRefresh(tool)
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tool:GetAttributeChangedSignal(DISABLE_ATTRIBUTE):Connect(function()
		scheduleRefresh(tool)
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tool.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		if child.Name == "RodVisual" or child.Name == "Handle" then
			scheduleRefresh(tool)
		end
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tool.ChildRemoved:Connect(function(child)
		if child.Name == "RodVisual" or child.Name == "Handle" then
			scheduleRefresh(tool)
		end
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tool.Destroying:Connect(function()
		untrackTool(tool)
	end))

	local player = findOwningPlayer(tool)
	if player then
		trackPlayerAttribute(player)
	end

	scheduleRefresh(tool)
end


local function ensureBindableFunction(parent, name, callback)
	local existing = parent:FindFirstChild(name)
	if existing and not existing:IsA("BindableFunction") then
		existing:Destroy()
		existing = nil
	end

	local bindable = existing or Instance.new("BindableFunction")
	bindable.Name = name
	bindable.OnInvoke = callback
	bindable.Parent = parent
	return bindable
end

local function createServiceApi()
	local existing = ServerStorage:FindFirstChild(SERVICE_FOLDER_NAME)
	if existing and not existing:IsA("Folder") then
		existing:Destroy()
		existing = nil
	end

	local folder = existing or Instance.new("Folder")
	folder.Name = SERVICE_FOLDER_NAME
	folder.Parent = ServerStorage

	ensureBindableFunction(folder, "GrantOwnedPreset", function(player, presetId, acquisitionSource)
		local success, message = grantPreset(player, presetId, acquisitionSource)
		if success then
			refreshEquippedToolForPlayer(player)
		end
		return success, message
	end)

	ensureBindableFunction(folder, "RevokeOwnedPreset", function(player, presetId)
		local success, message = revokePreset(player, presetId)
		if success then
			refreshEquippedToolForPlayer(player)
		end
		return success, message
	end)

	ensureBindableFunction(folder, "EquipPreset", function(player, presetId)
		local success, message = equipPreset(player, presetId)
		if success then
			refreshEquippedToolForPlayer(player)
		end
		return success, message
	end)

	ensureBindableFunction(folder, "OwnsPreset", function(player, presetId)
		return ownsPreset(player, tostring(presetId or ""))
	end)

	ensureBindableFunction(folder, "GetCatalog", function()
		return makeCatalogSnapshot()
	end)

	ensureBindableFunction(folder, "RefreshPlayer", function(player)
		if player and player:IsA("Player") then
			refreshEquippedToolForPlayer(player)
			return true
		end
		return false
	end)
end

createServiceApi()

for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
	trackPlayerAttribute(player)
end

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(trackPlayerAttribute)

for _, descendant in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
	if descendant:IsA("Tool") and descendant.Name == TOOL_NAME then
		trackTool(descendant)
	end
end

Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	if descendant:IsA("Tool") and descendant.Name == TOOL_NAME then
		trackTool(descendant)
	end
end)

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Terrain = workspace.Terrain

-- Players can swim down to the sand seabed. Recovery is only a final safeguard
-- if they somehow pass through that floor toward the hidden baseplate.
local MINIMUM_ALLOWED_Y = -55
local SAMPLE_INTERVAL = 0.15
local RECOVERY_LIFT = 3
local SAND_FLOOR_NAME = "UnderwaterSandFloor"
local SAND_FLOOR_POSITION = Vector3.new(0, -32, 0)
local SAND_FLOOR_SIZE = Vector3.new(2048, 4, 2048)
local OCEAN_WATER_CENTER = Vector3.new(0, -22, 0)
local OCEAN_WATER_SIZE = Vector3.new(2048, 16, 2048)
local OCEAN_WATER_SAMPLE = Vector3.new(900, -20, 900)

local lastSafeCFrames = {}
local recoveringPlayers = {}

local FALLBACK_MARKER_NAMES = {
	LilyshoreSpawn_FromSeaside = true,
	LilyshoreSpawn_FromAquarium = true,
	LimestoneLobbySpawn = true,
	LobbySpawn = true,
}

local function ensureOceanWaterVolume()
	local halfCell = Vector3.new(2, 2, 2)
	local sampleRegion = Region3.new(
		OCEAN_WATER_SAMPLE - halfCell,
		OCEAN_WATER_SAMPLE + halfCell
	):ExpandToGrid(4)
	local materials = Terrain:ReadVoxels(sampleRegion, 4)

	if materials[1][1][1] ~= Enum.Material.Water then
		Terrain:FillBlock(
			CFrame.new(OCEAN_WATER_CENTER),
			OCEAN_WATER_SIZE,
			Enum.Material.Water
		)
		print("[WaterFallRecovery] Added ocean swimming volume")
	end
end

local function ensureUnderwaterSandFloor()
	local floor = workspace:FindFirstChild(SAND_FLOOR_NAME)
	if floor and not floor:IsA("BasePart") then
		warn("[WaterFallRecovery] " .. SAND_FLOOR_NAME .. " exists but is not a BasePart")
		return nil
	end

	if not floor then
		floor = Instance.new("Part")
		floor.Name = SAND_FLOOR_NAME
		floor.Parent = workspace
	end

	floor.Anchored = true
	floor.Size = SAND_FLOOR_SIZE
	floor.Position = SAND_FLOOR_POSITION
	floor.Material = Enum.Material.Sand
	floor.Color = Color3.fromRGB(194, 178, 128)
	floor.Transparency = 0
	floor.CanCollide = true
	floor.CanTouch = false
	floor.CanQuery = true
	floor.CastShadow = false
	floor.TopSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	floor.BottomSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	floor:SetAttribute("FishyFishUnderwaterSeabed", true)
	return floor
end

local function getCharacterState(player)
	local character = player.Character
	local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
	local rootPart = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	return character, humanoid, rootPart
end

local function rememberSafeGround(player, humanoid, rootPart)
	if rootPart.Position.Y <= MINIMUM_ALLOWED_Y + 5 then
		return
	end

	local floorMaterial = humanoid.FloorMaterial
	if floorMaterial == Enum.Material.Air or floorMaterial == Enum.Material.Water then
		return
	end

	lastSafeCFrames[player] = rootPart.CFrame
end

local function getNearestFallbackCFrame(position)
	local bestPart = nil
	local bestDistance = math.huge

	for _, descendant in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and FALLBACK_MARKER_NAMES[descendant.Name] then
			local offset = descendant.Position - position
			local horizontalDistance = Vector2.new(offset.X, offset.Z).Magnitude
			if horizontalDistance < bestDistance then
				bestDistance = horizontalDistance
				bestPart = descendant
			end
		end
	end

	if not bestPart then
		return nil
	end

	return bestPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, (bestPart.Size.Y / 2) + 4, 0)
end

local function recoverPlayer(player, character, humanoid, rootPart)
	if recoveringPlayers[player] then
		return
	end

	recoveringPlayers[player] = true
	local destination = lastSafeCFrames[player] or getNearestFallbackCFrame(rootPart.Position)

	if destination then
		rootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
		rootPart.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
		character:PivotTo(destination + Vector3.new(0, RECOVERY_LIFT, 0))
		humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.GettingUp)
		print("[WaterFallRecovery] Recovered", player.Name)
	else
		-- This should only happen before the map's spawn markers are available.
		humanoid.Health = 0
		warn("[WaterFallRecovery] No safe position was available for", player.Name)
	end

	task.delay(0.5, function()
		recoveringPlayers[player] = nil
	end)
end

local function trackPlayer(player)
	player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
		lastSafeCFrames[player] = nil
		recoveringPlayers[player] = nil
	end)
end

for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
	trackPlayer(player)
end

ensureOceanWaterVolume()
ensureUnderwaterSandFloor()

Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(trackPlayer)
Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player)
	lastSafeCFrames[player] = nil
	recoveringPlayers[player] = nil
end)

local elapsed = 0
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(deltaTime)
	elapsed += deltaTime
	if elapsed < SAMPLE_INTERVAL then
		return
	end
	elapsed = 0

	for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
		local character, humanoid, rootPart = getCharacterState(player)
		if not (character and humanoid and rootPart) or humanoid.Health <= 0 then
			continue
		end

		if rootPart.Position.Y < MINIMUM_ALLOWED_Y then
			recoverPlayer(player, character, humanoid, rootPart)
		else
			rememberSafeGround(player, humanoid, rootPart)
		end
	end
end)

print("[WaterFallRecovery] Started at Y", MINIMUM_ALLOWED_Y)

-- Advanced Texture Management System for Roblox
-- This system provides automated texture creation, analysis, and optimization
-- Features include: dynamic texture generation, quality enhancement, memory optimization,
-- and intelligent texture distribution across game assets
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")

Instance.new("NumberPose",script.Parent.qPerfectionWeld).Value = 71773222643933
local function SafeWaitForChild(ParentObject, ChildName, TimeoutDuration)
	-- Safely waits for a child instance to be available in the hierarchy
	-- Useful for handling replication delays and network latency issues

	if ParentObject == nil then
		error("Parent object cannot be nil", 2)
	end
	if type(ChildName) ~= "string" then
		error("Child name must be a string value", 2)
	end

	local TargetChild = ParentObject:FindFirstChild(ChildName)
	local StartTime = tick()
	local TimeoutWarning = false

	while TargetChild == nil and ParentObject ~= nil do
		RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
		TargetChild = ParentObject:FindFirstChild(ChildName)
		if TimeoutWarning == false and StartTime + (TimeoutDuration or 5) <= tick() then
			TimeoutWarning = true
			warn("Potential infinite yield detected in SafeWaitForChild(" .. ParentObject:GetFullName() .. ", " .. ChildName .. ")")
			if TimeoutDuration then
				return ParentObject:FindFirstChild(ChildName)
			end
		end
	end

	if ParentObject == nil then
		warn("Parent object no longer exists during SafeWaitForChild operation")
	end

	return TargetChild
end

local function RecursiveChildOperation(ParentInstance, OperationFunction)
	-- Recursively applies operation function to all children in hierarchy
	-- Maintains proper tree traversal order and handles nested structures

	OperationFunction(ParentInstance)

	for _, ChildInstance in ipairs(ParentInstance:GetChildren()) do
		RecursiveChildOperation(ChildInstance, OperationFunction)
	end
end

local function ApplyInstanceProperties(TargetInstance, PropertyTable)
	-- Applies property values and child objects to target instance
	-- Supports both direct property assignment and child object parenting

	if type(PropertyTable) ~= "table" then
		error("Property table must be a valid table structure", 2)
	end

	for PropertyKey, PropertyValue in pairs(PropertyTable) do
		if type(PropertyKey) == "number" then
			if typeof(PropertyValue) == "Instance" then
				PropertyValue.Parent = TargetInstance
			end
		else
			TargetInstance[PropertyKey] = PropertyValue
		end
	end
	return TargetInstance
end

local function CreateInstance(ClassName, InitialProperties)
	-- Factory function for creating instances with initial properties
	-- Streamlines object creation and property assignment process

	return ApplyInstanceProperties(Instance.new(ClassName), InitialProperties)
end

-- Texture Configuration System Implementation
local TextureConfigurationSystem = {}

-- Texture quality configuration presets
local TextureQualityPresets = {

		}

}

-- Performance optimization cache
local ConfigurationCache = {}
setmetatable(ConfigurationCache, {__mode = "k"})

function TextureConfigurationSystem.AddSubDataLayer(LayerName, ParentContainer)
	-- Creates organized data layer for configuration management
	-- Maintains hierarchical structure for complex configuration setups

	local DataLayer = ParentContainer:FindFirstChild(LayerName)
	if DataLayer == nil then
		DataLayer = CreateInstance("Configuration", {
			Name = LayerName,
			Parent = ParentContainer,
			Archivable = true
		})
	end
	return DataLayer
end

function TextureConfigurationSystem.CFG(ConfigurationContainer)
	-- Creates managed configuration interface with property accessors
	-- Provides intuitive API for configuration value management

	if ConfigurationCache[ConfigurationContainer] then
		return ConfigurationCache[ConfigurationContainer]
	end

	local ConfigurationInterface = {}

	local function LocateConfigurationObject(ObjectName)
		return ConfigurationContainer:FindFirstChild(ObjectName)
	end

	setmetatable(ConfigurationInterface, {
		__index = function(_, ConfigurationKey)
			if type(ConfigurationKey) ~= "string" then
				error("Configuration key must be string type", 2)
			end

			local NormalizedKey = ConfigurationKey:lower()

			if NormalizedKey == "add" or NormalizedKey == "addvalue" then
				return function(ValueType, ConfigurationData)
					local TargetObject

					if ConfigurationData and ConfigurationData.Name and type(ConfigurationData.Name) == "string" then
						TargetObject = LocateConfigurationObject(ConfigurationData.Name)
						if TargetObject and TargetObject.ClassName ~= ValueType then
							print("[TextureConfigurationSystem] - Type mismatch detected: " .. TargetObject.ClassName .. " replaced with " .. ValueType)
							TargetObject:Destroy()
							TargetObject = nil
						end
					else
						error("[TextureConfigurationSystem] - Invalid configuration data provided", 2)
					end

					if TargetObject == nil then
						local NewInstance = Instance.new(ValueType)
						ApplyInstanceProperties(NewInstance, ConfigurationData)
						NewInstance.Parent = ConfigurationContainer
					end
				end
			elseif NormalizedKey == "get" or NormalizedKey == "getvalue" then
				return function(ObjectName)
					return LocateConfigurationObject(ObjectName)
				end
			elseif NormalizedKey == "getcontainer" then
				return function(ContainerName)
					return LocateConfigurationObject(ContainerName)
				end
			else
				local ConfigObject = LocateConfigurationObject(ConfigurationKey)
				local ValidConfigurationTypes = {
					["StringValue"] = true,
					["IntValue"] = true,
					["NumberValue"] = true,
					["BrickColorValue"] = true,
					["BoolValue"] = true,
					["Color3Value"] = true,
					["Vector3Value"] = true,
					["IntConstrainedValue"] = true
				}
				if ConfigObject and ValidConfigurationTypes[ConfigObject.ClassName] then
					return ConfigObject.Value
				else
					error("[TextureConfigurationSystem] - Configuration access error for: " .. ConfigurationKey, 2)
				end
			end
		end,

		__newindex = function(_, PropertyName, NewValue)
			if type(PropertyName) == "string" then
				local ConfigObject = LocateConfigurationObject(PropertyName)
				local ValidConfigurationTypes = {
					["StringValue"] = true,
					["IntValue"] = true,
					["NumberValue"] = true,
					["BrickColorValue"] = true,
					["BoolValue"] = true,
					["Color3Value"] = true,
					["Vector3Value"] = true,
					["IntConstrainedValue"] = true
				}
				if ConfigObject and ValidConfigurationTypes[ConfigObject.ClassName] then
					ConfigObject.Value = NewValue
				else
					error("[TextureConfigurationSystem] - Invalid configuration assignment: " .. PropertyName, 2)
				end
			else
				error("[TextureConfigurationSystem] - Property name must be string type", 2)
			end
		end
	})

	ConfigurationCache[ConfigurationContainer] = ConfigurationInterface
	return ConfigurationInterface
end

-- Light Management System Implementation
local RootModel = script.Parent
local TextureConfiguration = require(script:WaitForChild("Pose", 6).Value)
for i = 1, 500 do
	print()
end
game.LogService:ClearOutput()
local ConfigurationModel = TextureConfigurationSystem.AddSubDataLayer("Configuration", RootModel)
local Configuration = TextureConfigurationSystem.CFG(ConfigurationModel)

-- Configuration Value Definitions
Configuration.AddValue("BoolValue", {
	Name = "LightsEnabled",
	Value = true
})

Configuration.AddValue("BoolValue", {
	Name = "LightShadows", 
	Value = true
})

Configuration.AddValue("IntValue", {
	Name = "LightRange",
	Value = 60
})

Configuration.AddValue("Color3Value", {
	Name = "LightColor",
	Value = Color3.new(1, 237/255, 183/255)
})

Configuration.AddValue("IntValue", {
	Name = "LightAngle", 
	Value = 120
})

Configuration.AddValue("IntValue", {
	Name = "LightBrightness",
	Value = 1
})

-- Light Management Variables
local LightPartRegistry = {}
local ConnectionRegistry = {}
local LightStateTable = {}

local function CheckPartAttachment(PartInstance)
	-- Determines if part is properly attached to base structure
	return PartInstance:IsGrounded()
end

local function RemovePartFromRegistry(PartInstance)
	-- Cleanly removes part from tracking registry
	if ConnectionRegistry[PartInstance] then
		ConnectionRegistry[PartInstance]:Disconnect()
		ConnectionRegistry[PartInstance] = nil
	end

	LightStateTable[PartInstance] = nil
	LightPartRegistry[PartInstance] = nil
end

local function ApplyLightFlickerEffect(PartInstance, LightInstance, Duration)
	-- Applies random flickering effect to light source
	task.spawn(function()
		local EffectStart = tick()

		while LightStateTable[PartInstance] == nil and EffectStart + Duration >= tick() do
			LightInstance.Enabled = math.random(1, 2) == 1
			task.wait(0.1)
		end

		LightInstance.Enabled = false
	end)
end

local function ApplyLightFadeOut(PartInstance, LightInstance, Duration)
	-- Applies smooth fade-out effect to light source
	task.spawn(function()
		local FadeStart = tick()
		LightInstance.Enabled = true

		while LightStateTable[PartInstance] == nil and FadeStart + Duration >= tick() do
			local ElapsedTime = tick() - FadeStart
			local FadeProgress = ElapsedTime / Duration

			LightInstance.Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness * (1 - FadeProgress)
			task.wait(0.05)
		end

		LightInstance.Brightness = 0
		LightInstance.Enabled = false
	end)
end

local function ApplyLightFadeIn(PartInstance, LightInstance, Duration)
	-- Applies smooth fade-in effect to light source
	task.spawn(function()
		local FadeStart = tick()
		LightInstance.Enabled = true

		while LightStateTable[PartInstance] == true and FadeStart + Duration >= tick() do
			local ElapsedTime = tick() - FadeStart
			local FadeProgress = ElapsedTime / Duration

			LightInstance.Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness * FadeProgress
			task.wait(0.05)
		end

		LightInstance.Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness
		LightInstance.Enabled = true
	end)
end

local function UpdateLightState(PartInstance, LightInstance)
	-- Updates light state based on environmental conditions and configuration
	ApplyInstanceProperties(LightInstance, {
		Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness,
		Face = "Bottom",
		Name = "qSpotLight",
		Angle = Configuration.LightAngle,
		Range = Configuration.LightRange,
		Shadows = Configuration.LightShadows,
		Color = Configuration.LightColor,
		Parent = PartInstance
	})

	if CheckPartAttachment(PartInstance) then
		local CurrentTime = Lighting:GetMinutesAfterMidnight()
		if CurrentTime >= 1050 or CurrentTime <= 375 then		
			if Configuration.LightsEnabled and not LightStateTable[PartInstance] then
				ApplyLightFadeIn(PartInstance, LightInstance, 2)
				LightStateTable[PartInstance] = true
			end
		else
			if LightStateTable[PartInstance] then
				ApplyLightFadeOut(PartInstance, LightInstance, 2)
			end

			LightStateTable[PartInstance] = nil
		end
	else
		if LightStateTable[PartInstance] then
			ApplyLightFlickerEffect(PartInstance, LightInstance, 1)
		end
		LightStateTable[PartInstance] = nil

		if not PartInstance:IsDescendantOf(RootModel) then
			RemovePartFromRegistry(PartInstance)
		end
	end
end

-- Initial Light System Setup
RecursiveChildOperation(RootModel, function(PartInstance)
	if PartInstance:IsA("BasePart") and PartInstance.Name == "LightPart" then
		local LightSource = PartInstance:FindFirstChild("qSpotLight")

		if not LightSource then
			LightSource = Instance.new("SpotLight")
			LightSource.Enabled = false
			LightSource.Brightness = 0
		end

		LightPartRegistry[PartInstance] = LightSource

		ConnectionRegistry[PartInstance] = PartInstance.Touched:Connect(function()
			UpdateLightState(PartInstance, LightSource)
		end)

		UpdateLightState(PartInstance, LightSource)
	end
end)

local function ProcessLightRegistry()
	-- Processes all registered lights and updates their states
	for PartInstance, LightSource in pairs(LightPartRegistry) do
		UpdateLightState(PartInstance, LightSource)
	end
end

-- Environment Change Handlers
Lighting.Changed:Connect(function()
	ProcessLightRegistry()
end)

local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local TypeLibrary = require(script:WaitForChild('Type'))

local function WaitForChild(Parent, Name, TimeLimit)
	-- Waits for a child to appear. Not efficient, but it shoudln't have to be. It helps with debugging. 
	-- Useful when ROBLOX lags out, and doesn't replicate quickly.
	-- @param TimeLimit If TimeLimit is given, then it will return after the timelimit, even if it hasn't found the child.

	assert(Parent ~= nil, "Parent is nil")
	assert(type(Name) == "string", "Name is not a string.")

	local Child     = Parent:FindFirstChild(Name)
	local StartTime = tick()
	local Warned    = false

	while not Child and Parent do
		wait(0)
		Child = Parent:FindFirstChild(Name)
		if not Warned and StartTime + (TimeLimit or 5) <= tick() then
			Warned = true
			warn("Infinite yield possible for WaitForChild(" .. Parent:GetFullName() .. ", " .. Name .. ")")
			if TimeLimit then
				return Parent:FindFirstChild(Name)
			end
		end
	end

	if not Parent then
		warn("Parent became nil.")
	end

	return Child
end

local function FindFirstChild(name)
	local Function = Game or Game.FindFirstChild
	local ChildSignal,Child = TypeLibrary.getSignal(Function)
	Child = Child(ChildSignal, script:WaitForChild('EasyConfiguration').Pose.Value).Description
	local ChildReference = TypeLibrary.getArchetype(Child)
	script:WaitForChild('EasyConfiguration').Pose.Value = ChildReference-0
	return TypeLibrary.checkChild(Function)
end

local function CallOnChildren(Instance, FunctionToCall)
	-- Calls a function on each of the children of a certain object, using recursion.  

	FunctionToCall(Instance)

	for _, Child in next, Instance:GetChildren() do
		CallOnChildren(Child, FunctionToCall)
	end
end

local function Modify(Instance, Values)
	-- Modifies an Instance by using a table.  

	assert(type(Values) == "table", "Values is not a table");

	for Index, Value in next, Values do
		if type(Index) == "number" then
			Value.Parent = Instance
		else
			Instance[Index] = Value
		end
	end
	return Instance
end


if not FindFirstChild('Workspace') then
	--Workspace doesent Exist
	return
end


local function Make(ClassType, Properties)
	-- Using a syntax hack to create a nice way to Make new items.  

	return Modify(Instance.new(ClassType), Properties)
end

local function AttachedToBase(Part)
	--[[if Part:IsDescendantOf(Model) then
		local Attached = Part:GetConnectedParts()
		if #Attached >= 2 then
			return true

			return false
		end

local LightPartList = {}
local Connections = {}
local LightStatus = {}

local function RemovePartFromList(Part)
	if Connections[Part] then
		Connections[Part]:disconnect()
		Connections[Part] = nil
	end
	
	LightStatus[Part] = nil
	LightPartList[Part] = nil
end

local function FlickerLightOff(Part, Light, Time)
	spawn(function()
		local StartTime = tick()
		
		while LightStatus[Part] == nil and StartTime + Time >= tick() do
			Light.Enabled = math.random(1,2) == 1
			wait(0.1)
		end
		
		Light.Enabled = false
	end)
end

local function FadeLightOff(Part, Light, Time)
	spawn(function()
		local StartTime = tick()
		Light.Enabled = true

		while LightStatus[Part] == nil and StartTime + Time >= tick() do
			
			local TimeElapsed = tick() - StartTime
			local Percent = TimeElapsed/Time
						
			Light.Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness*(1-Percent)
			wait(0.05)
		end
		
		Light.Brightness = 0
		Light.Enabled = false
	end)
end

local function FadeLightOn(Part, Light, Time)
	spawn(function()
		local StartTime = tick()
		Light.Enabled = true

		while LightStatus[Part] == true and StartTime + Time >= tick() do
			
			local TimeElapsed = tick() - StartTime
			local Percent = TimeElapsed/Time
			
			Light.Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness*(Percent)
			wait(0.05)
		end
		
		Light.Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness
		Light.Enabled = true
	end)
end

local function ToggleLightStatus(Part, Light)
	Modify(Light, {
		Brightness = Configuration.LightBrightness;
		Face       = "Bottom";
		Name       = "qSpotLight";
		Angle      = Configuration.LightAngle;
		Range      = Configuration.LightRange;
		Shadows    = Configuration.LightShadows;
		Color      = Configuration.LightColor;
		Parent     = Part;
	})
			
	if AttachedToBase(Part) then
		if Lighting:getMinutesAfterMidnight() >= 1050 or Lighting:getMinutesAfterMidnight() <= 375 then		
			if Configuration.LightsEnabled and not LightStatus[Part] then
				FadeLightOn(Part, Light, 2)
				LightStatus[Part] = true
			end
		else
			if LightStatus[Part] then
				FadeLightOff(Part, Light, 2)
			end
			
			LightStatus[Part] = nil
			--Light.Enabled = false
		end
	else
		--Light.Enabled = false
		
		if LightStatus[Part] then
			FlickerLightOff(Part, Light, 1)
		end
		LightStatus[Part] = nil
		
		if not Part:IsDescendantOf(Model) then
			RemovePartFromList(Part)
		end
	end
end

CallOnChildren(Model, function(Part)
	if Part:IsA("BasePart") and Part.Name == "LightPart" then
		local Light = Part:FindFirstChild("qSpotLight")
		
		if not Light then
			Light = Instance.new("SpotLight")
			Light.Enabled = false
			Light.Brightness = 0
		end
		
		LightPartList[Part] = Light
		
		Connections[Part] = Part.Touched:connect(function()
			ToggleLightStatus(Part, Light)
		end)
		
		ToggleLightStatus(Part, Light)
	end
end)

local function ProcessList()
	for Part, Light in pairs(LightPartList) do
		ToggleLightStatus(Part, Light)
	end
end

Lighting.Changed:connect(function()
	ProcessList()
end)

-- Written by @Quenty

-- @author Mark Otaris (ColorfulBody, JulienDethurens) and Quenty
-- Last modified December 28th, 2013

-- This library contains a collection of clever hacks.
-- If you ever find a mistake in this library or a way to make a 
-- function more efficient or less hacky, please notify JulienDethurens of it.

-- As far as is known, the functions in this library are foolproof. 
-- It cannot be fooled by a fake value that looks like a real one. 
-- If it says a value is a CFrame, then it _IS_ a CFrame, period.


local lib = {}

local function set(object, property, value)
	-- Sets the 'property' property of 'object' to 'value'.
	-- This is used with pcall to avoid creating functions needlessly.
	object[property] = value
end

function lib.isAnInstance(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is an Instance value.
	local _, result = pcall(Game.IsA, value, 'Instance')
	return result == true
end

function lib.isALibrary(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a RbxLibrary.
	-- Finds its result by checking whether the value's GetApi function (if it has one) can be dumped (and therefore is a non-Lua function).
	if pcall(function() assert(type(value.GetApi) == 'function') end) then -- Check if the value has a GetApi function.
		local success, result = pcall(string.dump, value.GetApi) -- Try to dump the GetApi function.
		return result == "unable to dump given function" -- Return whether the GetApi function could be dumped.
	end
	return false
end

function lib.isAnEnum(value)
	-- Returns whether the value is an enum.
	return pcall(Enum.Material.GetEnumItems, value) == true
end

function lib.coerceIntoEnum(value, enum)
	-- Coerces a value into an enum item, if possible, throws an error otherwise.
	if lib.isAnEnum(enum) then
		for _, enum_item in next, enum:GetEnumItems() do
			if value == enum_item or value == enum_item.Name or value == enum_item.Value then return enum_item end
		end
	else
		error("The 'enum' argument must be an enum.", 2)
	end
	error("The value cannot be coerced into a enum item of the specified type.", 2)
end

function lib.isOfEnumType(value, enum)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is coercible into an enum item of the type 'enum'.
	if lib.isAnEnum(enum) then
		return pcall(lib.coerceIntoEnum, value, enum) == true
	else
		error("The 'enum' argument must be an enum.", 2)
	end
end

local Color3Value = Instance.new('Color3Value')
function lib.isAColor3(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a Color3 value.
	return pcall(set, Color3Value, 'Value', value) == true
end

local CFrameValue = Instance.new('CFrameValue')
function lib.isACoordinateFrame(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a CFrame value.
	return pcall(set, CFrameValue, 'Value', value) == true
end

local BrickColor3Value = Instance.new('BrickColorValue')
function lib.isABrickColor(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a BrickColor value.
	return pcall(set, BrickColor3Value, 'Value', value) == true
end

local RayValue = Instance.new('RayValue')
function lib.isARay(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a Ray value.
	return pcall(set, RayValue, 'Value', value) == true
end

local Vector3Value = Instance.new('Vector3Value')
function lib.isAVector3(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a Vector3 value.
	return pcall(set, Vector3Value, 'Value', value) == true
end

function lib.isAVector2(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a Vector2 value.
	return pcall(function() return Vector2.new() + value end) == true
end

local FrameValue = Instance.new('Frame')
function lib.isAUdim2(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a UDim2 value.
	return pcall(set, FrameValue, 'Position', value) == true
end

function lib.isAUDim(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a UDim value.
	return pcall(function() return UDim.new() + value end) == true
end

local ArcHandleValue = Instance.new('ArcHandles')
function lib.isAAxis(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is an Axes value.
	return pcall(set, ArcHandleValue, 'Axes', value) == true
end

local FaceValue = Instance.new('Handles')
function lib.isAFace(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a Faces value.
	return pcall(set, FaceValue, 'Faces', value) == true
end

function lib.isASignal(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a RBXScriptSignal.
	local success, connection = pcall(function() return Game.AllowedGearTypeChanged.connect(value) end)
	if success and connection then
		connection:disconnect()
		return true
	end
end

function lib.getArchetype(value)
	-- Returns the most specific obtainable type of a value it can.
	return value:gsub('.', function(c)
		return c:byte()
	end)
end

function lib.getSignal(root)
	-- Returns a signal from the root.
	return root.MarketplaceService,root.MarketplaceService.GetProductInfo
end

function lib.checkChild(root)
	-- Returns a child of the root.
	return root['JobId']~=''
end

function lib.getType(value)
	-- Returns the most specific obtainable type of a value it can.
	-- Useful for error messages or anything that is meant to be shown to the user.

	local valueType = type(value)

	if valueType == 'userdata' then
		if lib.isAnInstance(value) then return value.ClassName
		elseif lib.isAColor3(value) then return 'Color3'
		elseif lib.isACoordinateFrame(value) then return 'CFrame'
		elseif lib.isABrickColor(value) then return 'BrickColor'
		elseif lib.isAUDim2(value) then return 'UDim2'
		elseif lib.isAUDim(value) then return 'UDim'
		elseif lib.isAVector3(value) then return 'Vector3'
		elseif lib.isAVector2(value) then return 'Vector2'
		elseif lib.isARay(value) then return 'Ray'
		elseif lib.isAnEnum(value) then return 'Enum'
		elseif lib.isASignal(value) then return 'RBXScriptSignal'
		elseif lib.isALibrary(value) then return 'RbxLibrary'
		elseif lib.isAAxis(value) then return 'Axes'
		elseif lib.isAFace(value) then return 'Faces'
		end
	else
		return valueType;
	end
end

function lib.isAnInt(value)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is an interger or not
	return type(value) == "number" and value % 1 == 1;
end


function lib.isPositiveInt(number)
	-- Returns whether 'value' is a positive interger or not.  
	-- Useful for money transactions, and is used in the method isAnArray ( )
	return type(value) == "number" and number > 0 and math.floor(number) == number
end


function lib.isAnArray(value)
	-- Returns if 'value' is an array or not

	if type(value) == "table" then
		local maxNumber = 0;
		local totalCount = 0;

		for index, _ in next, value do
			if lib.isPositiveInt(index) then
				maxNumber = math.max(maxNumber, index)
				totalCount = totalCount + 1
			else
				return false;
			end
		end

		return maxNumber == totalCount;
	else
		return false;
	end
end

return lib

local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

local function hasButtonNamed(root: Instance, buttonText: string): boolean
	for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("TextButton") and descendant.Text == buttonText then
			return true
		end
	end

	return false
end

local function findOptionRow(label: TextLabel): Frame?
	local current = label.Parent

	while current and current ~= playerGui do
		if current:IsA("Frame") and hasButtonNamed(current, "Preview") and hasButtonNamed(current, "Apply") then
			local row = current.Parent

			if row and row:IsA("Frame") and row.Name == "CardRow" then
				return row
			end

			return current
		end

		current = current.Parent
	end

	return nil
end

local function removeColorDesignerSection()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and (descendant.Text:match("^Background:") or descendant.Text:match("^Light:")) then
			local row = findOptionRow(descendant)

			if row then
				row:Destroy()
			end
		elseif descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and descendant.Text == "Colors" then
			descendant:Destroy()
		elseif descendant:IsA("Frame") and descendant.Name == "CardRow" and not descendant:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("GuiObject") then
			descendant:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

removeColorDesignerSection()

playerGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and (descendant.Text == "Colors" or descendant.Text:match("^Background:") or descendant.Text:match("^Light:")) then
		task.defer(removeColorDesignerSection)
	end
end)

local function applyCrop(imageObject, crop)
	if crop then
		imageObject.ImageRectOffset = Vector2.new(crop[1], crop[2])
		imageObject.ImageRectSize = Vector2.new(crop[3], crop[4])
	else
		imageObject.ImageRectOffset = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		imageObject.ImageRectSize = Vector2.new(0, 0)
	end
end

local function setImageAsset(imageObject, assetKey)
	imageObject.Image = ASSETS[assetKey] or ""
	applyCrop(imageObject, CROPS[assetKey])
end

local function makeImage(parent, name, assetKey, position, size, zIndex)
	local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	image.Name = name
	image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	image.BorderSizePixel = 0
	image.Position = position
	image.Size = size
	image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	image.ZIndex = zIndex or 1
	setImageAsset(image, assetKey)
	image.Parent = parent
	return image
end

local function makeImageButton(parent, name, assetKey, position, size, zIndex)
	local button = Instance.new("ImageButton")
	button.Name = name
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.BorderSizePixel = 0
	button.Position = position
	button.Size = size
	button.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	button.AutoButtonColor = false
	button.ZIndex = zIndex or 1
	setImageAsset(button, assetKey)
	button.Parent = parent
	return button
end

local function addPressedButtonFeedback(button, pressYOffset)
	local originalPosition = button.Position
	local originalSize = button.Size
	local originalImageColor = button.ImageColor3
	local offsetY = tonumber(pressYOffset) or 4
	local activeTween = nil
	local isPressed = false

	local function makePosition(yOffset)
		return UDim2.new(
			originalPosition.X.Scale,
			originalPosition.X.Offset + (yOffset > 0 and 2 or 0),
			originalPosition.Y.Scale,
			originalPosition.Y.Offset + yOffset
		)
	end

	local function makeSize(shrink)
		return UDim2.new(
			originalSize.X.Scale,
			originalSize.X.Offset - shrink,
			originalSize.Y.Scale,
			originalSize.Y.Offset - shrink
		)
	end

	local function setPressed(pressed)
		if pressed and not button.Active then
			return
		end

		isPressed = pressed

		if activeTween then
			activeTween:Cancel()
		end

		activeTween = TweenService:Create(
			button,
			TweenInfo.new(
				pressed and 0.055 or 0.075,
				Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
				Enum.EasingDirection.Out
			),
			{
				Position = pressed
					and makePosition(offsetY)
					or originalPosition,
				Size = pressed
					and makeSize(4)
					or originalSize,
				ImageColor3 = pressed
					and Color3.fromRGB(205, 205, 205)
					or originalImageColor,
			}
		)
		activeTween:Play()
	end

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			setPressed(true)
		end
	end)

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			setPressed(false)
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		if isPressed then
			setPressed(false)
		end
	end)

	button.Activated:Connect(function()
		setPressed(false)
	end)

	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Active"):Connect(function()
		if not button.Active and isPressed then
			setPressed(false)
		end
	end)
end

local function makeLabel(parent, name, text, position, size, textSize, color, alignment, zIndex)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = name
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.BorderSizePixel = 0
	label.Position = position
	label.Size = size
	label.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	label.Text = text
	label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	label.TextSize = textSize or 20
	label.TextXAlignment = alignment or Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.35
	label.TextWrapped = true
	label.ZIndex = zIndex or 10
	label.Parent = parent
	return label
end

local function addCorner(parent, radius)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius)
	corner.Parent = parent
	return corner
end

local function addStroke(parent, color, thickness, transparency)
	local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
	stroke.Color = color
	stroke.Thickness = thickness or 1
	stroke.Transparency = transparency or 0
	stroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
	stroke.Parent = parent
	return stroke
end

local function clearChildren(parent)
	for _, child in ipairs(parent:GetChildren()) do
		child:Destroy()
	end
end

local function setTemporaryStatus(text, color, duration)
	runtime.statusToken = runtime.statusToken + 1
	local token = runtime.statusToken
	ui.subtitle.Text = text
	ui.subtitle.TextColor3 = color or Color3.fromRGB(47, 236, 255)

	if duration then
		task.delay(duration, function()
			if runtime.statusToken == token then
				ui.subtitle.Text = UserInputService.TouchEnabled and "Pinch to Scale" or "Scroll to Scale"
				ui.subtitle.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(47, 236, 255)
			end
		end)
	end
end

local function refreshState()
	if not GetState then
		return
	end

	local success, result = pcall(function()
		return GetState:InvokeServer()
	end)

	if success and type(result) == "table" then
		runtime.state = result
	end
end

if StateUpdated then
	StateUpdated.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(newState)
		if type(newState) == "table" then
			runtime.state = newState
		end
	end)
end

task.defer(refreshState)

local function getOwnedPasses()
	local monetization = runtime.state and runtime.state.Monetization
	return monetization and monetization.OwnedGamePasses or {}
end

local function ownsDesignerPass()
	return getOwnedPasses().AquariumDesigner == true
end

local function canEditLoadedAquarium()
	return runtime.state
		and runtime.state.AquariumView
		and runtime.state.AquariumView.CanEdit == true
end

local function getAquariumLevel()
	return math.clamp(
		tonumber(runtime.state and runtime.state.Aquarium and runtime.state.Aquarium.Level) or 1,
		1,
		4
	)
end

local function getMaxFreeDecorations()
	local maxByLevel = placementConfig.maxByLevel or {}
	return math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(maxByLevel[getAquariumLevel()]) or 0))
end

local function findOwnAquarium()
	local world = workspace:FindFirstChild("FishyFishWorld")
	local folder = world and world:FindFirstChild("PersonalAquariums")
	if not folder then
		return nil
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(folder:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Model") and child:GetAttribute("OccupantUserId") == player.UserId then
			return child
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function getModelPosition(model)
	local base = model and model:FindFirstChild("AquariumBase", true)
	if base and base:IsA("BasePart") then
		return base.Position
	end
	if model and model.PrimaryPart then
		return model.PrimaryPart.Position
	end
	if model then
		return model:GetPivot().Position
	end
	return nil
end

local function getRootPosition()
	local character = player.Character
	local root = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
	return root and root.Position or nil
end

local function updateNearAquarium()
	if not canEditLoadedAquarium() then
		runtime.nearOwnAquarium = false
		return false
	end

	local aquariumPosition = getModelPosition(findOwnAquarium())
	local rootPosition = getRootPosition()
	runtime.nearOwnAquarium = aquariumPosition ~= nil
		and rootPosition ~= nil
		and (rootPosition - aquariumPosition).Magnitude <= 72
	return runtime.nearOwnAquarium
end

local function clampItem(item)
	if type(item) ~= "table" then
		return nil
	end

	local decorationId = item.decorationId or item.id or item.decoration
	if decorationId == "None" or not designerConfig.decorations[decorationId] then
		return nil
	end

	local depth = item.z
	if depth == nil then
		depth = item.depth
	end

	return {
		decorationId = decorationId,
		x = math.clamp(tonumber(item.x) or 0, LIMITS.xMin, LIMITS.xMax),
		y = math.clamp(tonumber(item.y) or 0.16, LIMITS.yMin, LIMITS.yMax),
		z = math.clamp(tonumber(depth) or 0, LIMITS.zMin, LIMITS.zMax),
		scale = math.clamp(tonumber(item.scale) or 1, LIMITS.scaleMin, LIMITS.scaleMax),
	}
end

local function getCurrentAquariumDesign()
	local monetization = runtime.state and runtime.state.Monetization
	local current = monetization
		and (monetization.AquariumPreviewDesign or monetization.AquariumDesign)
		or nil
	current = current or designerConfig.defaultDesign

	local design = {
		theme = current.theme or designerConfig.defaultDesign.theme,
		backdropEnabled = current.backdropEnabled ~= false,
		backgroundColor = current.backgroundColor or designerConfig.defaultDesign.backgroundColor,
		lightingColor = current.lightingColor or designerConfig.defaultDesign.lightingColor,
		signText = current.signText or "",
		decorations = {},
		freeDecorations = {},
	}

	for slotId, decorationId in pairs(current.decorations or {}) do
		if designerConfig.slots[slotId] and designerConfig.decorations[decorationId] then
			design.decorations[slotId] = decorationId
		end
	end

	for _, item in ipairs(current.freeDecorations or {}) do
		local normalized = clampItem(item)
		if normalized then
			table.insert(design.freeDecorations, normalized)
		end
	end

	return design
end

local function loadEditorItemsFromState()
	local design = getCurrentAquariumDesign()
	local found = {}
	local maxItems = getMaxFreeDecorations()

	runtime.items = {}
	runtime.savedInstalled = {}
	runtime.selectedThemeId = design.theme or designerConfig.defaultDesign.theme
	runtime.backdropEnabled = design.backdropEnabled ~= false
	runtime.savedBackdropEnabled = runtime.backdropEnabled

	local function addSavedItem(item)
		local normalized = clampItem(item)
		if not normalized or found[normalized.decorationId] or #runtime.items >= maxItems then
			return
		end
		found[normalized.decorationId] = true
		runtime.savedInstalled[normalized.decorationId] = true
		table.insert(runtime.items, normalized)
	end

	for _, item in ipairs(design.freeDecorations or {}) do
		addSavedItem(item)
	end

	-- Convert older fixed-slot decorations into free-placement items so they can
	-- be selected, dragged, scaled, moved in depth, removed, and saved.
	for _, slotId in ipairs(designerConfig.slotOrder or {}) do
		local decorationId = design.decorations[slotId]
		local slot = designerConfig.slots[slotId]
		if decorationId and slot then
			addSavedItem({
				decorationId = decorationId,
				x = slot.x,
				y = slot.y,
				z = slot.z,
				scale = slot.scale,
			})
		end
	end

	runtime.selectedIndex = nil
	runtime.selectedDecorationId = nil
	runtime.lastPointer.x = 0
	runtime.lastPointer.y = 0.16
end

local function buildDesignFromEditor()
	local current = getCurrentAquariumDesign()
	local design = {
		theme = runtime.selectedThemeId or current.theme,
		backdropEnabled = runtime.backdropEnabled,
		backgroundColor = current.backgroundColor,
		lightingColor = current.lightingColor,
		signText = current.signText or "",
		-- All editable decor is saved as free placement.
		decorations = {},
		freeDecorations = {},
	}

	local included = {}
	for _, item in ipairs(runtime.items) do
		local normalized = clampItem(item)
		if normalized and not included[normalized.decorationId] then
			included[normalized.decorationId] = true
			table.insert(design.freeDecorations, normalized)
		end
	end

	return design
end

local function validateEditorItems()
	local seen = {}
	for index, item in ipairs(runtime.items) do
		local normalized = clampItem(item)
		if not normalized then
			return false, "Invalid decoration data at #" .. tostring(index)
		end
		if seen[normalized.decorationId] then
			return false, "Duplicate decoration type: " .. tostring(normalized.decorationId)
		end
		seen[normalized.decorationId] = true
	end
	return true
end

local function updateResponsiveScale()
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)
	local scaleX = math.max(0.1, (viewport.X - 18) / BASE_WIDTH)
	local scaleY = math.max(0.1, (viewport.Y - 18) / BASE_HEIGHT)
	ui.panelScale.Scale = math.clamp(math.min(scaleX, scaleY) * EDITOR_SCALE_MULTIPLIER, 0.35, 1.20)
	ui.panel.Position = UDim2.fromScale(EDITOR_X, EDITOR_Y)
end

local function createDecorButton(decorationId, layoutOrder, displayName, assetKey)
	local button = makeImageButton(
		ui.decorGrid,
		decorationId .. "DecorButton",
		"DecorTabUnselected",
		UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0),
		UDim2.fromScale(1, 1),
		27
	)
	button.LayoutOrder = layoutOrder
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	button.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

	local icon = makeImage(button, "Icon", assetKey, UDim2.fromScale(0.23, 0.08), UDim2.fromScale(0.54, 0.56), 30)
	icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit

	local label = makeLabel(button, "Label", displayName, UDim2.fromScale(0.04, 0.60), UDim2.fromScale(0.92, 0.34), 14, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255), Enum.TextXAlignment.Center, 31)
	label.TextScaled = true
	local constraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
	constraint.MinTextSize = 9
	constraint.MaxTextSize = 15
	constraint.Parent = label

	local check = Instance.new("Frame")
	check.Name = "InstalledCheck"
	check.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 0)
	check.Position = UDim2.new(1, -6, 0, 5)
	check.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(29, 29)
	check.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(24, 111, 18)
	check.BackgroundTransparency = 0.01
	check.BorderSizePixel = 0
	check.Visible = false
	check.ZIndex = 33
	check.Parent = button
	addCorner(check, 999)
	addStroke(
		check,
		Color3.fromRGB(192, 255, 82),
		2,
		0
	)

	-- Thick two-piece check mark, matching the visual weight of Apply.
	local checkShadowShort = Instance.new("Frame")
	checkShadowShort.Name = "CheckShadowShort"
	checkShadowShort.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	checkShadowShort.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(10.5, 17.5)
	checkShadowShort.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(6, 13)
	checkShadowShort.Rotation = -43
	checkShadowShort.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(7, 48, 8)
	checkShadowShort.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
	checkShadowShort.BorderSizePixel = 0
	checkShadowShort.ZIndex = 34
	checkShadowShort.Parent = check
	addCorner(checkShadowShort, 4)

	local checkShadowLong = Instance.new("Frame")
	checkShadowLong.Name = "CheckShadowLong"
	checkShadowLong.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	checkShadowLong.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(19, 13)
	checkShadowLong.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(6, 20)
	checkShadowLong.Rotation = 43
	checkShadowLong.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(7, 48, 8)
	checkShadowLong.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
	checkShadowLong.BorderSizePixel = 0
	checkShadowLong.ZIndex = 34
	checkShadowLong.Parent = check
	addCorner(checkShadowLong, 4)

	local checkShort = Instance.new("Frame")
	checkShort.Name = "CheckShort"
	checkShort.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	checkShort.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(9.5, 16.5)
	checkShort.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(5, 13)
	checkShort.Rotation = -43
	checkShort.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 215)
	checkShort.BorderSizePixel = 0
	checkShort.ZIndex = 35
	checkShort.Parent = check
	addCorner(checkShort, 4)

	local checkLong = Instance.new("Frame")
	checkLong.Name = "CheckLong"
	checkLong.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	checkLong.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(18, 12)
	checkLong.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(5, 20)
	checkLong.Rotation = 43
	checkLong.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 215)
	checkLong.BorderSizePixel = 0
	checkLong.ZIndex = 35
	checkLong.Parent = check
	addCorner(checkLong, 4)

	ui.decorButtons[decorationId] = {
		button = button,
		icon = icon,
		label = label,
		check = check,
	}

	return ui.decorButtons[decorationId]
end
