-- =============================================================
-- SELECTION / PREVIEW RENDERING
-- =============================================================
local function findEditorItemIndex(decorationId)
	for index, item in ipairs(runtime.items) do
		if item.decorationId == decorationId then
			return index
		end
	end
	return nil
end

local function getSelectedItem()
	if runtime.selectedIndex then
		return runtime.items[runtime.selectedIndex]
	end
	return nil
end

local function getDecorationPixelSize(item)
	local base = DECOR_BASE_SIZE[item and item.decorationId]
		or Vector2.new(160, 130)
	local scale = math.clamp(
		tonumber(item and item.scale) or 1,
		LIMITS.scaleMin,
		LIMITS.scaleMax
	)

	return Vector2.new(
		base.X * scale,
		base.Y * scale
	)
end

local function getScaleMarginsForItem(item)
	local stageWidth = math.max(
		1,
		tonumber(ui.decorStage.Size.X.Offset) or 814
	)
	local stageHeight = math.max(
		1,
		tonumber(ui.decorStage.Size.Y.Offset) or 665
	)
	local markerSize = getDecorationPixelSize(item)

	-- These margins keep the complete decoration image inside the blue picture.
	local halfX = math.clamp(
		(markerSize.X * 0.5 + 4) / stageWidth,
		0,
		0.47
	)
	local halfY = math.clamp(
		(markerSize.Y * 0.5 + 4) / stageHeight,
		0,
		0.47
	)

	return halfX, halfY
end

local function clampScalePositionForItem(px, py, item)
	local halfX, halfY = getScaleMarginsForItem(item)

	return math.clamp(px, halfX, 1 - halfX),
	math.clamp(py, halfY, 1 - halfY)
end

local function scalePositionToRelative(px, py, item)
	local halfX, halfY = getScaleMarginsForItem(item)

	-- Important: the visual center only moves between halfX and 1-halfX,
	-- but that entire visual range must map to the server's full X/Y range.
	-- Therefore, when the decoration image touches the left edge, x becomes
	-- exactly xMin; when it touches the right edge, x becomes exactly xMax.
	local usableWidth = math.max(0.001, 1 - (halfX * 2))
	local usableHeight = math.max(0.001, 1 - (halfY * 2))

	local xAlpha = math.clamp(
		(px - halfX) / usableWidth,
		0,
		1
	)
	local yAlpha = math.clamp(
		(py - halfY) / usableHeight,
		0,
		1
	)

	return LIMITS.xMin
		+ xAlpha * (LIMITS.xMax - LIMITS.xMin),
	LIMITS.yMax
	- yAlpha * (LIMITS.yMax - LIMITS.yMin)
end

local function relativeToScalePosition(x, y, item)
	local halfX, halfY = getScaleMarginsForItem(item)
	local usableWidth = math.max(0.001, 1 - (halfX * 2))
	local usableHeight = math.max(0.001, 1 - (halfY * 2))

	local xAlpha = (
		math.clamp(x, LIMITS.xMin, LIMITS.xMax)
		- LIMITS.xMin
	) / math.max(
		0.001,
		LIMITS.xMax - LIMITS.xMin
	)
	local yAlpha = (
		LIMITS.yMax
		- math.clamp(y, LIMITS.yMin, LIMITS.yMax)
	) / math.max(
		0.001,
		LIMITS.yMax - LIMITS.yMin
	)

	local px = halfX + (xAlpha * usableWidth)
	local py = halfY + (yAlpha * usableHeight)

	return clampScalePositionForItem(px, py, item)
end

local function pointerToRelative(position)
	local absolutePosition = ui.decorStage.AbsolutePosition
	local absoluteSize = ui.decorStage.AbsoluteSize
	if absoluteSize.X <= 0 or absoluteSize.Y <= 0 then
		return runtime.lastPointer.x, runtime.lastPointer.y
	end

	local px = (
		position.X - absolutePosition.X
	) / absoluteSize.X
	local py = (
		position.Y - absolutePosition.Y
	) / absoluteSize.Y

	px, py = clampScalePositionForItem(
		px,
		py,
		getSelectedItem()
	)

	return scalePositionToRelative(
		px,
		py,
		getSelectedItem()
	)
end

local function depthLevelToZ(level)
	-- Leftmost is FRONT (zMin), rightmost is BACK (zMax).
	local alpha = (math.clamp(level, 1, DEPTH_LEVEL_COUNT) - 1) / (DEPTH_LEVEL_COUNT - 1)
	return LIMITS.zMin + ((LIMITS.zMax - LIMITS.zMin) * alpha)
end

local function zToDepthLevel(z)
	local alpha = (math.clamp(tonumber(z) or 0, LIMITS.zMin, LIMITS.zMax) - LIMITS.zMin)
		/ math.max(0.001, LIMITS.zMax - LIMITS.zMin)
	return math.clamp(
		math.floor(alpha * (DEPTH_LEVEL_COUNT - 1) + 0.5) + 1,
		1,
		DEPTH_LEVEL_COUNT
	)
end

local refreshDecorButtons
local refreshDepthGauge
local refreshPreviewMarkers

local function refreshThemeButtons()
	for themeId, entry in pairs(ui.themeButtons) do
		local isSelected = (themeId == runtime.selectedThemeId)
		setImageAsset(
			entry.button,
			isSelected and "ThemeTabSelected" or "ThemeTabUnselected"
		)
		entry.button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		entry.label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		entry.label.TextStrokeTransparency = isSelected and 0.05 or 0.28
	end
end

refreshDecorButtons = function()
	local backdrop = ui.decorButtons.Backdrop
	setImageAsset(
		backdrop.button,
		runtime.backdropEnabled and "DecorTabSelected" or "DecorTabUnselected"
	)
	backdrop.button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	backdrop.label.Text = runtime.backdropEnabled and "Backdrop On" or "Backdrop Off"
	backdrop.label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	backdrop.check.Visible = false

	for decorationId, entry in pairs(ui.decorButtons) do
		if decorationId ~= "Backdrop" then
			local workingIndex = findEditorItemIndex(decorationId)
			local workingPlaced = workingIndex ~= nil
			local selected = workingPlaced
				and runtime.selectedIndex == workingIndex
				and runtime.selectedDecorationId == decorationId

			setImageAsset(
				entry.button,
				workingPlaced and "DecorTabSelected" or "DecorTabUnselected"
			)
			entry.button.BackgroundTransparency = 1

			-- Saved/installed decorations show a check unless that decoration
			-- is currently selected for editing.
			entry.check.Visible = workingPlaced
				and runtime.savedInstalled[decorationId] == true
				and not selected
		end
	end
end

refreshDepthGauge = function()
	local item = getSelectedItem()
	local selectedLevel = item and zToDepthLevel(item.z) or nil

	for level, dot in ipairs(ui.depthButtons) do
		local isSelected = selectedLevel == level
		setImageAsset(
			dot,
			isSelected and "CircleSelected" or "CircleUnselected"
		)
		dot.Size = isSelected
			and UDim2.fromOffset(23, 23)
			or UDim2.fromOffset(16, 16)
		dot.Position = UDim2.new(
			(level - 1) / (DEPTH_LEVEL_COUNT - 1),
			isSelected and -11 or -8,
			0,
			isSelected and 5 or 8
		)
		dot.Active = item ~= nil
		dot.ImageTransparency = item and 0 or 0.45
	end

	ui.depthLeftButton.Active = item ~= nil
	ui.depthRightButton.Active = item ~= nil
	ui.depthLeftButton.ImageTransparency = item and 0 or 0.55
	ui.depthRightButton.ImageTransparency = item and 0 or 0.55
	ui.depthLabel.TextColor3 = item
		and Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		or Color3.fromRGB(130, 150, 180)

	ui.removeButton.Active = item ~= nil
	ui.removeButton.ImageTransparency = item and 0 or 0.55
end

refreshPreviewMarkers = function()
	clearChildren(ui.decorStage)

	if runtime.selectedIndex and not runtime.items[runtime.selectedIndex] then
		runtime.selectedIndex = nil
		runtime.selectedDecorationId = nil
	end

	for index, item in ipairs(runtime.items) do
		local base = DECOR_BASE_SIZE[item.decorationId] or Vector2.new(160, 130)
		local scale = math.clamp(tonumber(item.scale) or 1, LIMITS.scaleMin, LIMITS.scaleMax)
		local px, py = relativeToScalePosition(
			item.x,
			item.y,
			item
		)

		-- Keep the saved X/Y values synchronized with the visual boundary.
		item.x, item.y = scalePositionToRelative(
			px,
			py,
			item
		)

		local frontAmount = 1 - ((math.clamp(item.z, LIMITS.zMin, LIMITS.zMax) - LIMITS.zMin)
			/ math.max(0.001, LIMITS.zMax - LIMITS.zMin))
		local zIndex = 40 + math.floor(frontAmount * 40 + 0.5)

		local marker = makeImageButton(
			ui.decorStage,
			"Placed_" .. item.decorationId,
			item.decorationId,
			UDim2.fromScale(px, py),
			UDim2.fromOffset(base.X * scale, base.Y * scale),
			zIndex
		)
		marker.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		marker.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		marker.ClipsDescendants = false

		local selected = index == runtime.selectedIndex
		local selectionStroke = addStroke(
			marker,
			Color3.fromRGB(75, 255, 125),
			selected and 3 or 1,
			selected and 0 or 1
		)
		selectionStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
		addCorner(marker, 12)

		marker.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
			if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
			then
				runtime.selectedIndex = index
				runtime.selectedDecorationId = item.decorationId
				runtime.lastPointer.x = item.x
				runtime.lastPointer.y = item.y
				runtime.dragging = true
				refreshPreviewMarkers()
				refreshDecorButtons()
			end
		end)
	end

	refreshDecorButtons()
	refreshDepthGauge()
end

local function setSelectedItemPosition(position)
	local item = getSelectedItem()
	if not item then
		return
	end

	local x, y = pointerToRelative(position)
	item.x = x
	item.y = y
	runtime.lastPointer.x = x
	runtime.lastPointer.y = y
	refreshPreviewMarkers()
end

local function scaleSelectedDecoration(newScale)
	local item = getSelectedItem()
	if not item then
		return
	end
	item.scale = math.clamp(newScale, LIMITS.scaleMin, LIMITS.scaleMax)
	refreshPreviewMarkers()
end

local function setSelectedDepthLevel(level)
	local item = getSelectedItem()
	if not item then
		return
	end
	item.z = depthLevelToZ(level)
	refreshPreviewMarkers()
end

-- =============================================================
-- BUTTON EVENTS
-- =============================================================
for themeId, entry in pairs(ui.themeButtons) do
	entry.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		runtime.selectedThemeId = themeId
		refreshThemeButtons()
		setTemporaryStatus("Theme selected: " .. designerConfig.themes[themeId].name, Color3.fromRGB(47, 236, 255), 1.2)
	end)
end

ui.decorButtons.Backdrop.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	runtime.backdropEnabled = not runtime.backdropEnabled
	refreshDecorButtons()
	setTemporaryStatus(
		runtime.backdropEnabled and "Backdrop ON" or "Backdrop OFF",
		runtime.backdropEnabled and Color3.fromRGB(90, 255, 110) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 85, 85),
		1.2
	)
end)

for decorationId, entry in pairs(ui.decorButtons) do
	if decorationId ~= "Backdrop" then
		entry.button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			local existingIndex = findEditorItemIndex(decorationId)
			if existingIndex then
				runtime.selectedIndex = existingIndex
			else
				if #runtime.items >= getMaxFreeDecorations() then
					setTemporaryStatus(
						"No free decoration slots at this aquarium level.",
						Color3.fromRGB(255, 90, 90),
						2.2
					)
					return
				end

				table.insert(runtime.items, {
					decorationId = decorationId,
					x = runtime.lastPointer.x,
					y = runtime.lastPointer.y,
					z = 0,
					scale = 1,
				})
				runtime.selectedIndex = #runtime.items
			end

			runtime.selectedDecorationId = decorationId
			local selected = getSelectedItem()
			if selected then
				runtime.lastPointer.x = selected.x
				runtime.lastPointer.y = selected.y
			end
			refreshPreviewMarkers()
		end)
	end
end

ui.removeButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	if runtime.selectedIndex and runtime.items[runtime.selectedIndex] then
		local removed = runtime.items[runtime.selectedIndex].decorationId
		table.remove(runtime.items, runtime.selectedIndex)
		runtime.selectedIndex = nil
		runtime.selectedDecorationId = nil
		setTemporaryStatus("Removed: " .. tostring(removed), Color3.fromRGB(255, 120, 100), 1.4)
		refreshPreviewMarkers()
	end
end)

ui.depthLeftButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	local item = getSelectedItem()
	if item then
		setSelectedDepthLevel(zToDepthLevel(item.z) - 1)
	end
end)

ui.depthRightButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	local item = getSelectedItem()
	if item then
		setSelectedDepthLevel(zToDepthLevel(item.z) + 1)
	end
end)

for level, dot in ipairs(ui.depthButtons) do
	dot.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		setSelectedDepthLevel(level)
	end)
end

-- =============================================================
-- DRAG / WHEEL / PINCH
-- =============================================================
local function isPointInsideStage(position)
	local absolutePosition = ui.decorStage.AbsolutePosition
	local absoluteSize = ui.decorStage.AbsoluteSize
	return position.X >= absolutePosition.X
		and position.X <= absolutePosition.X + absoluteSize.X
		and position.Y >= absolutePosition.Y
		and position.Y <= absolutePosition.Y + absoluteSize.Y
end

local function sinkInput()
	return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
end

local function captureWheelInsideStage()
	if ui.panel.Visible and isPointInsideStage(UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()) then
		return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
	end
	return Enum.ContextActionResult.Pass
end

local function setWheelCapture(enabled)
	ContextActionService:UnbindAction(WHEEL_CAPTURE_ACTION)
	if enabled and ui.panel.Visible then
		ContextActionService:BindActionAtPriority(
			WHEEL_CAPTURE_ACTION,
			captureWheelInsideStage,
			false,
			Enum.ContextActionPriority.High.Value + 100,
			Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel
		)
	end
end

local function setPinchCapture(enabled)
	ContextActionService:UnbindAction(PINCH_CAPTURE_ACTION)
	if enabled and ui.panel.Visible then
		ContextActionService:BindActionAtPriority(
			PINCH_CAPTURE_ACTION,
			sinkInput,
			false,
			Enum.ContextActionPriority.High.Value + 100,
			Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		)
	end
end

local function releaseInputCapture()
	setWheelCapture(false)
	setPinchCapture(false)
	runtime.pinchActive = false
	runtime.dragging = false
end

ui.decorStage.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if runtime.pinchActive or not getSelectedItem() then
		return
	end
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
	then
		runtime.dragging = true
		setSelectedItemPosition(input.Position)
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel then
		if not ui.panel.Visible or not getSelectedItem() then
			return
		end
		if not isPointInsideStage(UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()) then
			return
		end
		local direction = math.sign(input.Position.Z)
		if direction ~= 0 then
			local item = getSelectedItem()
			scaleSelectedDecoration((tonumber(item.scale) or 1) + direction * 0.06)
		end
		return
	end

	if runtime.dragging and not runtime.pinchActive then
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			setSelectedItemPosition(input.Position)
		end
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
	then
		runtime.dragging = false
	end
end)

UserInputService.TouchPinch:Connect(function(touchPositions, pinchScale, _velocity, inputState)
	if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
		if not ui.panel.Visible or not getSelectedItem() or type(touchPositions) ~= "table" or #touchPositions < 2 then
			return
		end
		local center = (touchPositions[1] + touchPositions[2]) / 2
		if not isPointInsideStage(center) then
			return
		end
		runtime.pinchActive = true
		runtime.dragging = false
		runtime.pinchStartScale = tonumber(getSelectedItem().scale) or 1
		setPinchCapture(true)
	elseif inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Change then
		if runtime.pinchActive and ui.panel.Visible and getSelectedItem() then
			scaleSelectedDecoration(runtime.pinchStartScale * math.max(0.01, tonumber(pinchScale) or 1))
		end
	elseif inputState == Enum.UserInputState.End or inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Cancel then
		if runtime.pinchActive then
			runtime.pinchActive = false
			setPinchCapture(false)
			refreshPreviewMarkers()
		end
	end
end)

UserInputService.LastInputTypeChanged:Connect(function(inputType)
	runtime.lastInputType = inputType
	if ui.panel.Visible then
		setTemporaryStatus(
			inputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch and "Pinch to Scale" or "Scroll to Scale",
			Color3.fromRGB(47, 236, 255)
		)
	end
end)

-- =============================================================
-- SERVER PREVIEW / APPLY / CANCEL
-- =============================================================
local function sendAquariumDesign(actionName)
	if not canEditLoadedAquarium() then
		setTemporaryStatus("This aquarium is view-only.", Color3.fromRGB(255, 90, 90), 2)
		return false
	end

	if not ShopAction or not ShopAction.Parent then
		ShopAction = Remotes:FindFirstChild("ShopAction")
	end
	if not ShopAction then
		setTemporaryStatus("ShopAction remote is missing.", Color3.fromRGB(255, 90, 90), 2)
		return false
	end
	if not findOwnAquarium() then
		setTemporaryStatus("No personal aquarium found.", Color3.fromRGB(255, 90, 90), 2)
		return false
	end

	local valid, reason = validateEditorItems()
	if not valid then
		setTemporaryStatus(tostring(reason), Color3.fromRGB(255, 90, 90), 2)
		return false
	end

	ShopAction:FireServer(actionName, "Aquarium", "freeDecorations", buildDesignFromEditor())
	return true
end

local function showEditorWithoutReload()
	ui.panel.Visible = true
	ui.dimmer.Visible = true
	ui.openButton.Visible = false
	ui.backButton.Visible = false
	setWheelCapture(true)
	refreshThemeButtons()
	refreshPreviewMarkers()
	setTemporaryStatus(UserInputService.TouchEnabled and "Pinch to Scale" or "Scroll to Scale", Color3.fromRGB(47, 236, 255))
end

local function openEditor()
	refreshState()
	updateNearAquarium()
	if not runtime.nearOwnAquarium then
		warn("Aquarium decor editor cannot open: no editable personal aquarium nearby.")
		return
	end

	runtime.previewMode = false
	loadEditorItemsFromState()
	showEditorWithoutReload()
end

local function cancelPreviewIfNeeded()
	if runtime.previewMode and ShopAction then
		ShopAction:FireServer("CancelAquariumPreview", "Aquarium", "freeDecorations")
	end
	runtime.previewMode = false
end

local function closeEditor()
	releaseInputCapture()
	cancelPreviewIfNeeded()
	ui.panel.Visible = false
	ui.dimmer.Visible = false
	ui.backButton.Visible = false
	runtime.selectedIndex = nil
	runtime.selectedDecorationId = nil
	refreshPreviewMarkers()
end

ui.previewButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	if sendAquariumDesign("PreviewAquariumDesign") then
		runtime.previewMode = true
		releaseInputCapture()
		ui.panel.Visible = false
		ui.dimmer.Visible = false
		ui.openButton.Visible = false
		ui.backButton.Visible = runtime.nearOwnAquarium
	end
end)

ui.applyButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	if sendAquariumDesign("ApplyAquariumDesign") then
		runtime.previewMode = false
		runtime.savedInstalled = {}
		for _, item in ipairs(runtime.items) do
			runtime.savedInstalled[item.decorationId] = true
		end
		runtime.savedBackdropEnabled = runtime.backdropEnabled
		refreshDecorButtons()
		setTemporaryStatus("Aquarium design applied.", Color3.fromRGB(90, 255, 120), 2)
		task.delay(0.5, refreshState)
	end
end)

ui.openButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(openEditor)
ui.backButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(showEditorWithoutReload)
ui.closeButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(closeEditor)

-- Initial render.
updateResponsiveScale()
refreshThemeButtons()
refreshDecorButtons()
refreshPreviewMarkers()

local visibilityAccumulator = 0
RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
	visibilityAccumulator = visibilityAccumulator + deltaTime
	if visibilityAccumulator < 0.20 then
		return
	end
	visibilityAccumulator = 0

	updateResponsiveScale()
	updateNearAquarium()

	if not runtime.nearOwnAquarium then
		if ui.panel.Visible or runtime.previewMode then
			closeEditor()
		end
		ui.openButton.Visible = false
		ui.backButton.Visible = false
		return
	end

	ui.backButton.Visible = runtime.previewMode and not ui.panel.Visible
	ui.openButton.Visible = not ui.panel.Visible and not ui.backButton.Visible
end)

print("[AquariumFreePlacementEditor] Modern image UI v13 UI-coordinate match loaded.")

-- AutoFishButtonVisualPatch_V5_CodeVisual
-- LocalScript로 사용하세요.
--
-- 위치:
-- StarterGui > FishingGui > AutoFishButtonVisualPatch
--
-- 기존 AutoFishButtonVisualPatch는 삭제하거나 비활성화하세요.
-- 이 버전은 이미지 Asset ID를 사용하지 않습니다.

task.spawn(function()
	local Players = game:GetService("Players")
	local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

	local player = Players.LocalPlayer
	local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

	local fishingGui =
		script:FindFirstAncestorWhichIsA("ScreenGui")
		or playerGui:WaitForChild("FishingGui")

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- 버튼 크기 설정
	--------------------------------------------------

	local VISUAL_SIZE = 104
	local PRESSED_SCALE = 0.90

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- TAP 버튼 기준 AUTO 버튼 위치
	--------------------------------------------------

	-- 숫자가 커지면 AUTO 버튼이 오른쪽으로 이동
	local TAP_RIGHT_SHIFT_RATIO = 0.38

	-- 숫자가 커지면 TAP 버튼과 AUTO 버튼 사이가 멀어짐
	local TAP_VERTICAL_GAP_RATIO = 0.08

	local MIN_VERTICAL_GAP = 8
	local MAX_VERTICAL_GAP = 20

	local RESIZE_BUTTON_HITBOX = true

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- 반투명도
	--
	-- Roblox에서는:
	-- 0 = 불투명
	-- 1 = 완전 투명
	--------------------------------------------------

	-- 원 내부 반투명도
	local CIRCLE_TRANSPARENCY = 0.28

	-- 버튼이 비활성화됐을 때 추가 투명도
	local DISABLED_TRANSPARENCY = 0.55

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- OFF 디자인
	--------------------------------------------------

	local OFF_BACKGROUND = Color3.fromRGB(226, 65, 72)
	local OFF_OUTER_STROKE = Color3.fromRGB(255, 104, 108)
	local OFF_INNER_STROKE = Color3.fromRGB(135, 17, 25)

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- ON 디자인
	--------------------------------------------------

	local ON_BACKGROUND = Color3.fromRGB(101, 205, 74)
	local ON_OUTER_STROKE = Color3.fromRGB(151, 255, 105)
	local ON_INNER_STROKE = Color3.fromRGB(35, 112, 22)

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- 내부 설정
	--------------------------------------------------

	local patchedButtons = {}
	local cachedTapButton = nil

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- 공통 함수
	--------------------------------------------------

	local function normalize(value)
		return string.lower(tostring(value or ""))
	end

	local function readButtonStateText(button)
		local combined = ""

		if button:IsA("TextButton") then
			combined ..= " " .. normalize(button.Text)
		end

		for _, descendant in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("TextLabel")
				or descendant:IsA("TextButton")
			then
				combined ..= " " .. normalize(descendant.Text)
			end
		end

		return combined
	end

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- AutoFish 버튼 검색
	--------------------------------------------------

	local function isAutoFishButton(instance)
		if not instance:IsA("GuiButton") then
			return false
		end

		local name = normalize(instance.Name)
		local stateText = readButtonStateText(instance)

		return name:find("autofish", 1, true) ~= nil
			or name:find("centerauto", 1, true) ~= nil
			or stateText:find("autofish", 1, true) ~= nil
	end

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- TAP 버튼 검색
	--------------------------------------------------

	local function isTapButton(instance)
		if not instance:IsA("GuiButton") then
			return false
		end

		local name = normalize(instance.Name)
		local text = readButtonStateText(instance)
		local compactText = text:gsub("%s+", "")

		if name == "tap"
			or name == "tapbutton"
			or name:find("tapbutton", 1, true) ~= nil
			or name:find("mobiletap", 1, true) ~= nil
		then
			return true
		end

		return compactText == "tap"
	end

	local function findTapButton()
		if cachedTapButton
			and cachedTapButton.Parent
			and cachedTapButton:IsDescendantOf(fishingGui)
		then
			return cachedTapButton
		end

		cachedTapButton = nil

		local hiddenCandidate = nil

		for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
			if isTapButton(descendant) then
				if descendant.Visible
					and descendant.AbsoluteSize.X > 0
					and descendant.AbsoluteSize.Y > 0
				then
					cachedTapButton = descendant
					return descendant
				end

				hiddenCandidate = hiddenCandidate or descendant
			end
		end

		cachedTapButton = hiddenCandidate
		return hiddenCandidate
	end

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- AUTO 버튼 위치 조정
	--------------------------------------------------

	local function positionAutoButton(button)
		if not button.Parent then
			return
		end

		local tapButton = findTapButton()

		if not tapButton
			or not tapButton.Parent
			or tapButton == button
		then
			return
		end

		local tapSize = tapButton.AbsoluteSize
		local tapPosition = tapButton.AbsolutePosition

		if tapSize.X <= 0 or tapSize.Y <= 0 then
			return
		end

		if RESIZE_BUTTON_HITBOX then
			button.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
				VISUAL_SIZE,
				VISUAL_SIZE
			)
		end

		local autoSize = button.AbsoluteSize

		if autoSize.X <= 0 or autoSize.Y <= 0 then
			autoSize = Vector2.new(
				VISUAL_SIZE,
				VISUAL_SIZE
			)
		end

		local verticalGap = math.clamp(
			tapSize.Y * TAP_VERTICAL_GAP_RATIO,
			MIN_VERTICAL_GAP,
			MAX_VERTICAL_GAP
		)

		local targetCenterX =
			tapPosition.X
			+ tapSize.X * 0.5
			+ tapSize.X * TAP_RIGHT_SHIFT_RATIO

		local targetBottomY =
			tapPosition.Y
		- verticalGap

		local targetTopLeft = Vector2.new(
			targetCenterX - autoSize.X * 0.5,
			targetBottomY - autoSize.Y
		)

		local currentTopLeft = button.AbsolutePosition
		local difference = targetTopLeft - currentTopLeft

		if math.abs(difference.X) < 0.5
			and math.abs(difference.Y) < 0.5
		then
			return
		end

		local currentPosition = button.Position

		button.Position = UDim2.new(
			currentPosition.X.Scale,
			currentPosition.X.Offset + math.round(difference.X),
			currentPosition.Y.Scale,
			currentPosition.Y.Offset + math.round(difference.Y)
		)

		button.ZIndex = math.max(
			button.ZIndex,
			tapButton.ZIndex + 10
		)
	end

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- AutoFish ON/OFF 상태 확인
	--------------------------------------------------

	local function isAutoFishEnabled(button)
		local stateText = readButtonStateText(button)

		if button:GetAttribute("AutoFishEnabled") == true then
			return true
		end

		if button:GetAttribute("Enabled") == true then
			return true
		end

		if stateText:find("autofish on", 1, true) ~= nil then
			return true
		end

		if stateText:match("%f[%a]on%f[%A]") ~= nil then
			return true
		end

		return false
	end

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- AutoFish 디자인 적용
	--------------------------------------------------

	local function patchButton(button)
		if patchedButtons[button] or not button.Parent then
			return
		end

		patchedButtons[button] = true

		local existing =
			button:FindFirstChild("ModernAutoFishVisual")

		if existing then
			existing:Destroy()
		end

		if RESIZE_BUTTON_HITBOX then
			button.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
				VISUAL_SIZE,
				VISUAL_SIZE
			)
		end

		local visual
		local circle
		local outerStroke
		local innerRing
		local innerStroke
		local autoText
		local pressScale
		local activeTween

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 기존 AutoFish 디자인 숨기기
		--------------------------------------------------

		local function hideOriginal()
			if not button.Parent then
				return
			end

			button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			button.BorderSizePixel = 0
			button.ClipsDescendants = false

			if button:IsA("TextButton") then
				button.TextTransparency = 1
				button.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
			end

			if button:IsA("ImageButton") then
				button.ImageTransparency = 1
			end

			for _, child in ipairs(button:GetChildren()) do
				if child ~= visual
					and child.Name ~= "ModernAutoFishVisual"
				then
					if child:IsA("UIStroke")
						or child:IsA("UIGradient")
					then
						child.Enabled = false
					elseif child:IsA("GuiObject") then
						child.Visible = false
					end
				end
			end
		end

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 전체 비주얼 컨테이너
		--------------------------------------------------

		visual = Instance.new("Frame")
		visual.Name = "ModernAutoFishVisual"
		visual.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		visual.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		visual.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
			VISUAL_SIZE,
			VISUAL_SIZE
		)
		visual.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		visual.BorderSizePixel = 0
		visual.Active = false
		visual.ZIndex = button.ZIndex + 50
		visual.Parent = button

		local aspect = Instance.new("UIAspectRatioConstraint")
		aspect.AspectRatio = 1
		aspect.Parent = visual

		pressScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
		pressScale.Name = "PressScale"
		pressScale.Scale = 1
		pressScale.Parent = visual

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 원형 배경
		--------------------------------------------------

		circle = Instance.new("Frame")
		circle.Name = "Circle"
		circle.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		circle.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		circle.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.94, 0.94)
		circle.BackgroundColor3 = OFF_BACKGROUND
		circle.BackgroundTransparency = CIRCLE_TRANSPARENCY
		circle.BorderSizePixel = 0
		circle.ZIndex = visual.ZIndex
		circle.Parent = visual

		local circleCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		circleCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
		circleCorner.Parent = circle

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 바깥쪽 두꺼운 테두리
		--------------------------------------------------

		outerStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		outerStroke.Name = "OuterStroke"
		outerStroke.ApplyStrokeMode =
			Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
		outerStroke.Color = OFF_OUTER_STROKE
		outerStroke.Thickness = 6
		outerStroke.Transparency = 0.05
		outerStroke.LineJoinMode = Enum.LineJoinMode.Round
		outerStroke.Parent = circle

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 안쪽 원형 테두리
		--------------------------------------------------

		innerRing = Instance.new("Frame")
		innerRing.Name = "InnerRing"
		innerRing.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		innerRing.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		innerRing.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.84, 0.84)
		innerRing.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		innerRing.BorderSizePixel = 0
		innerRing.ZIndex = circle.ZIndex + 1
		innerRing.Parent = circle

		local innerCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		innerCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
		innerCorner.Parent = innerRing

		innerStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		innerStroke.Name = "InnerStroke"
		innerStroke.ApplyStrokeMode =
			Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
		innerStroke.Color = OFF_INNER_STROKE
		innerStroke.Thickness = 3
		innerStroke.Transparency = 0.05
		innerStroke.LineJoinMode = Enum.LineJoinMode.Round
		innerStroke.Parent = innerRing

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- AUTO 텍스트
		--------------------------------------------------

		autoText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		autoText.Name = "AutoText"
		autoText.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		autoText.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		autoText.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.38)
		autoText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		autoText.BorderSizePixel = 0
		autoText.Text = "AUTO"
		autoText.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		autoText.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(20, 20, 20)
		autoText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
		autoText.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
		autoText.TextScaled = true
		autoText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		autoText.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		autoText.ZIndex = circle.ZIndex + 3
		autoText.Parent = circle

		local textConstraint =
			Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")

		textConstraint.MinTextSize = 18
		textConstraint.MaxTextSize = 24
		textConstraint.Parent = autoText

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 눌림 애니메이션
		--------------------------------------------------

		local function setPressed(pressed)
			if activeTween then
				activeTween:Cancel()
			end

			activeTween = TweenService:Create(
				pressScale,
				TweenInfo.new(
					0.08,
					Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
					Enum.EasingDirection.Out
				),
				{
					Scale =
						pressed and PRESSED_SCALE or 1,
				}
			)

			activeTween:Play()
		end

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- ON/OFF 디자인 변경
		--------------------------------------------------

		local function updateVisual()
			if not button.Parent
				or not visual.Parent
			then
				return
			end

			local enabled = isAutoFishEnabled(button)

			if enabled then
				circle.BackgroundColor3 = ON_BACKGROUND
				outerStroke.Color = ON_OUTER_STROKE
				innerStroke.Color = ON_INNER_STROKE
			else
				circle.BackgroundColor3 = OFF_BACKGROUND
				outerStroke.Color = OFF_OUTER_STROKE
				innerStroke.Color = OFF_INNER_STROKE
			end

			local available =
				button.Visible and button.Active

			if available then
				circle.BackgroundTransparency =
					CIRCLE_TRANSPARENCY

				outerStroke.Transparency = 0.05
				innerStroke.Transparency = 0.05
				autoText.TextTransparency = 0
				autoText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
			else
				circle.BackgroundTransparency =
					DISABLED_TRANSPARENCY

				outerStroke.Transparency = 0.40
				innerStroke.Transparency = 0.40
				autoText.TextTransparency = 0.30
				autoText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.45
			end
		end

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 클릭 및 터치 입력
		--------------------------------------------------

		button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
			if input.UserInputType
				== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				or input.UserInputType
				== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
			then
				setPressed(true)
			end
		end)

		button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
			if input.UserInputType
				== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				or input.UserInputType
				== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
			then
				setPressed(false)
			end
		end)

		button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			setPressed(false)
		end)

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 상태 변화 감지
		--------------------------------------------------

		if button:IsA("TextButton") then
			button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text")
				:Connect(updateVisual)
		end

		button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible")
			:Connect(function()
				updateVisual()
				task.defer(positionAutoButton, button)
			end)

		button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Active")
			:Connect(updateVisual)

		button:GetAttributeChangedSignal(
			"AutoFishEnabled"
		):Connect(updateVisual)

		button:GetAttributeChangedSignal(
			"Enabled"
		):Connect(updateVisual)

		for _, descendant in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("TextLabel")
				or descendant:IsA("TextButton")
			then
				descendant:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text")
					:Connect(updateVisual)
			end
		end

		button.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
			if descendant == visual
				or descendant:IsDescendantOf(visual)
			then
				return
			end

			if descendant:IsA("TextLabel")
				or descendant:IsA("TextButton")
			then
				descendant:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text")
					:Connect(updateVisual)
			end

			task.defer(hideOriginal)
			task.defer(updateVisual)
			task.defer(positionAutoButton, button)
		end)

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 최초 실행
		--------------------------------------------------

		hideOriginal()
		updateVisual()
		task.defer(positionAutoButton, button)

		--------------------------------------------------
		-- 다른 코드가 디자인을 복원하는 것을 방지
		--------------------------------------------------

		task.spawn(function()
			while button.Parent do
				hideOriginal()
				updateVisual()
				positionAutoButton(button)

				task.wait(0.15)
			end

			patchedButtons[button] = nil
		end)
	end

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- AutoFish 버튼 검색
	--------------------------------------------------

	local function scanForButtons()
		for _, descendant in ipairs(
			fishingGui:GetDescendants()
			) do
			if isAutoFishButton(descendant) then
				patchButton(descendant)
			end
		end
	end

	fishingGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
		if isTapButton(descendant) then
			cachedTapButton = descendant

			for button in pairs(patchedButtons) do
				task.defer(positionAutoButton, button)
			end
		end

		if isAutoFishButton(descendant) then
			task.defer(patchButton, descendant)
		end
	end)

	fishingGui.DescendantRemoving:Connect(function(descendant)
		if descendant == cachedTapButton then
			cachedTapButton = nil
		end
	end)

	scanForButtons()

	--------------------------------------------------
	-- 버튼이 늦게 생성되는 경우 재검색
	--------------------------------------------------

	task.spawn(function()
		local warnedAuto = false
		local warnedTap = false

		while fishingGui.Parent do
			scanForButtons()

			if not warnedAuto
				and next(patchedButtons) == nil
			then
				warn(
					"[AutoFishButtonVisualPatch] "
						.. "AutoFish button was not found. "
						.. "Place this LocalScript under "
						.. "StarterGui > FishingGui."
				)

				warnedAuto = true
			end

			if not warnedTap
				and not findTapButton()
			then
				warn(
					"[AutoFishButtonVisualPatch] "
						.. "TAP button was not found. "
						.. "Its name should include TapButton "
						.. "or its text should be TAP."
				)

				warnedTap = true
			end

			task.wait(1)
		end
	end)
end)

-- FishdexVisualPatch_REDESIGN_v22_ShortTrackThumbFit
-- Replace your current FishdexVisualPatch.luau with this whole file.
-- StarterGui > FishingGui > FishdexVisualPatch

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local fishingGui = playerGui:WaitForChild("FishingGui")

local ASSETS = {
	FishdexIcon = "rbxassetid://126888363962311",
	AllTabSelected = "rbxassetid://74193356060798",
	AllTabUnselected = "rbxassetid://122642765846638",
	IslandTabSelected = "rbxassetid://119120751789446",
	IslandTabUnselected = "rbxassetid://74423157457349",
	AllIcon = "rbxassetid://104401098200678",

-- X 증가 = 오른쪽 / Y 증가 = 아래
-- Custom Fishdex scrollbar layout.
-- The shortened 520px track stops above the Collection panel.
-- The 18px thumb stays centered inside the 30px track with equal side gaps.
local CUSTOM_SCROLL_X = 1390
local CUSTOM_SCROLL_Y = 310

local function findModernFishdex()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") and descendant.Name == "ModernFishdex" then
			return descendant
		end
	end
	return nil
end

local function getOrCreate(parent, className, name)
	local child = parent:FindFirstChild(name)
	if child and child.ClassName == className then
		return child
	end
	if child then
		child:Destroy()
	end
	child = Instance.new(className)
	child.Name = name
	child.Parent = parent
	return child
end

local function removeTextConstraint(label)
	local c = label:FindFirstChildOfClass("UITextSizeConstraint")
	if c then
		c:Destroy()
	end
end

local function setTextConstraint(label, minSize, maxSize)
	local c = label:FindFirstChildOfClass("UITextSizeConstraint")
	if not c then
		c = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
		c.Parent = label
	end
	c.MinTextSize = minSize
	c.MaxTextSize = maxSize
end

local function isTabSelected(button)
	if selectedTabName and button.Name == selectedTabName then
		return true
	end

	local stroke = button:FindFirstChild("SelectedStroke")
	if stroke and stroke:IsA("UIStroke") then
		return stroke.Transparency < 0.5
	end

	return button.Name == "AllTab"
end

local function isUnknownFishCard(card, fishImage, fishName)
	if fishName and fishName:IsA("TextLabel") then
		local text = string.lower((fishName.Text or ""):gsub("%s+", ""))
		if text == "" or text == "?" or text == "??" or text == "???" or text == "unknown" or text == "locked" then
			return true
		end
	end

	if fishImage and fishImage:IsA("ImageLabel") then
		local c = fishImage.ImageColor3
		if c.R <= 0.08 and c.G <= 0.08 and c.B <= 0.08 then
			return true
		end
	end

	return false
end

local function syncSelectedTabFromState(modernRoot)
	for _, child in ipairs(modernRoot:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("ImageButton") and TAB_CONFIG[child.Name] then
			local stroke = child:FindFirstChild("SelectedStroke")
			if stroke and stroke:IsA("UIStroke") and stroke.Transparency < 0.5 then
				selectedTabName = child.Name
				return
			end
		end
	end
end

	modernRoot.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.43)

	modernRoot.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	modernRoot.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	modernRoot.Image = ASSETS.FishdexRealBackGround
	modernRoot.ZIndex = 200
end

local function patchHeader(modernRoot)
	local title = modernRoot:FindFirstChild("FishdexTitle")
	if title and title:IsA("TextLabel") then
		title.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
		title.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(790, 25)
		title.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(650, 112)
		title.Text = "FISHDEX"
		title.TextScaled = false
		removeTextConstraint(title)
		title.TextSize = 132
		title.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
		-- 기본 TextStroke는 끄기
		title.TextStrokeTransparency = 1

		-- 두께를 조절할 수 있는 외곽선
		local titleOutline = title:FindFirstChild("FishdexTitleOutline")
		if not titleOutline then
			titleOutline = Instance.new("UIStroke")
			titleOutline.Name = "FishdexTitleOutline"
			titleOutline.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Contextual
			titleOutline.Parent = title
		end

		titleOutline.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
		titleOutline.Thickness = 4
		titleOutline.Transparency = 0
		title.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
		setTextConstraint(title, 38, 88)
		title.ZIndex = 210
	end

	local book = getOrCreate(modernRoot, "ImageLabel", "FishdexHeaderIcon")
	book.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	book.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
	book.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(540, 10)
	book.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(114, 114)
	book.Image = ASSETS.FishdexIcon
	book.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	book.ZIndex = 210

	local leftBadge = getOrCreate(modernRoot, "ImageLabel", "HeaderYellowBadge")
	leftBadge.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	leftBadge.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(48, 43)
	leftBadge.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(60, 60)
	leftBadge.Image = ASSETS.YellowButton
	leftBadge.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	leftBadge.ZIndex = 210

	local closeButton = modernRoot:FindFirstChild("CloseButton")
	if closeButton and closeButton:IsA("ImageButton") then
		local fixedPosition = UDim2.fromOffset(1290, -20)
		local fixedSize = UDim2.fromOffset(250, 250)

		-- Keep the original button functional, but make its moving image invisible.
		-- FishingClient still runs its old press tween, but the player cannot see it.
		closeButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		closeButton.Position = fixedPosition
		closeButton.Size = fixedSize
		closeButton.Image = ASSETS.XButton
		closeButton.ImageTransparency = 1
		closeButton.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		closeButton.AutoButtonColor = false
		closeButton.ZIndex = 211

		local xIcon = closeButton:FindFirstChild("CloseIcon")
		if xIcon then
			xIcon:Destroy()
		end

		-- This separate, non-interactive image stays completely fixed.
		-- Clicks pass through to the invisible original CloseButton underneath.
		local staticVisual = getOrCreate(modernRoot, "ImageLabel", "CloseButtonStaticVisual")
		staticVisual.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		staticVisual.Position = fixedPosition
		staticVisual.Size = fixedSize
		staticVisual.Image = ASSETS.XButton
		staticVisual.ImageTransparency = 0
		staticVisual.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		staticVisual.Active = false
		staticVisual.Selectable = false
		staticVisual.ZIndex = 212
		staticVisual.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)

		-- Press feedback without moving the X button.
		-- The visual shrinks slightly and darkens while pressed, then springs back.
		local pressScale = staticVisual:FindFirstChild("ClosePressScale")
		if not pressScale then
			pressScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
			pressScale.Name = "ClosePressScale"
			pressScale.Scale = 1
			pressScale.Parent = staticVisual
		end

		if not closeButton:GetAttribute("FishdexClosePressFeedbackConnected") then
			closeButton:SetAttribute("FishdexClosePressFeedbackConnected", true)

			local pressTween = nil
			local isPressed = false

			local function tweenPressState(pressed)
				isPressed = pressed
				if pressTween then
					pressTween:Cancel()
				end

				pressTween = TweenService:Create(
					pressScale,
					TweenInfo.new(
						pressed and 0.055 or 0.11,
						pressed and Enum.EasingStyle.Quad or Enum.EasingStyle.Back,
						Enum.EasingDirection.Out
					),
					{ Scale = pressed and 0.88 or 1 }
				)
				pressTween:Play()

				TweenService:Create(
					staticVisual,
					TweenInfo.new(pressed and 0.055 or 0.10, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
					{ ImageColor3 = pressed and Color3.fromRGB(205, 205, 205) or Color3.new(1, 1, 1) }
				):Play()
			end

			closeButton.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
				if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
					or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
					tweenPressState(true)
				end
			end)

			closeButton.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
				if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
					or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
					tweenPressState(false)
				end
			end)

			closeButton.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
				if isPressed then
					tweenPressState(false)
				end
			end)

			closeButton.Activated:Connect(function()
				tweenPressState(false)
			end)
		end

		-- Keep the invisible click area fixed after the old tween tries to move it.
		if not closeButton:GetAttribute("FishdexCloseInvisiblePositionLocked") then
			closeButton:SetAttribute("FishdexCloseInvisiblePositionLocked", true)
			local correcting = false
			closeButton:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Position"):Connect(function()
				if correcting or closeButton.Position == fixedPosition then
					return
				end

				correcting = true
				closeButton.Position = fixedPosition
				correcting = false
			end)
		end
	end

	local divider = getOrCreate(modernRoot, "Frame", "TabsDivider")
	divider.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
	divider.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(770, 262)
	divider.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(1368, 2)
	divider.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(68, 164, 255)
	divider.BackgroundTransparency = 0.35
	divider.BorderSizePixel = 0
	divider.ZIndex = 206
end

local function patchTab(button)
	if not button:IsA("ImageButton") then
		return
	end
	local cfg = TAB_CONFIG[button.Name]
	if not cfg then
		return
	end

	button.AutoButtonColor = false
	button.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	button.Image = isTabSelected(button) and cfg.selectedImage or cfg.unselectedImage
	button.ZIndex = 207

	local stroke = button:FindFirstChild("SelectedStroke")
	if stroke then
		stroke.Transparency = 1
	end

	local title = button:FindFirstChild("TabTitle")
	if title and title:IsA("TextLabel") then
		title.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		title.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		title.Position = UDim2.fromScale(cfg.textX, 0.50)
		title.Size = UDim2.fromScale(cfg.textWidth, 0.68)
		title.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
		title.Text = cfg.label
		title.TextScaled = true
		removeTextConstraint(title)
		title.TextSize = cfg.textSize
		title.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255)
		title.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0,0,0)
		title.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
		setTextConstraint(title, 14, cfg.textSize)
		title.ZIndex = 208
	end

	local icon = getOrCreate(button, "ImageLabel", "TabIcon")
	icon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	icon.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	icon.Position = UDim2.fromScale(cfg.iconX, 0.5)
	icon.Size = cfg.iconSize
	icon.Image = cfg.icon
	icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	icon.ZIndex = 208
	icon.Active = false
end

local function refreshTabs(modernRoot)
	syncSelectedTabFromState(modernRoot)
	for _, child in ipairs(modernRoot:GetChildren()) do
		patchTab(child)
	end
end

local function patchFishCard(card)
	if not card:IsA("ImageLabel") or not string.match(card.Name, "Card$") then
		return
	end

	card.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	card.Image = ASSETS.FishyBackGround
	card.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	card.ZIndex = 206

	local fishImage = card:FindFirstChild("FishImage")
	if fishImage and fishImage:IsA("ImageLabel") then
		fishImage.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		fishImage.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		fishImage.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.33, 0)
		fishImage.Size = UDim2.new(0.92, 0, 0.58, 0)
		fishImage.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		fishImage.ZIndex = 207
	end

	local fishName = card:FindFirstChild("FishName")
	if fishName and fishName:IsA("TextLabel") then
		fishName.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		fishName.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.67, 0)
		fishName.Size = UDim2.new(0.92, 0, 0.16, 0)
		fishName.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		fishName.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
		fishName.TextScaled = true
		removeTextConstraint(fishName)
		setTextConstraint(fishName, 12, 25)
		fishName.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255)
		fishName.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0,0,0)
		fishName.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
		fishName.ZIndex = 207
	end

	local badge = card:FindFirstChild("RarityBadge")
	if badge and badge:IsA("ImageLabel") then
		badge.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		badge.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.84, 0)

		-- 원본 배지 이미지에는 투명 여백이 있어서 ImageLabel 자체를 크게 잡아야
		-- 실제로 보이는 색상 탭이 참고 이미지와 비슷한 크기가 된다.
		badge.Size = UDim2.new(0.84, 0, 0.28, 0)
		badge.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
		badge.ZIndex = 207

		local rarityText = badge:FindFirstChild("RarityText")
		if rarityText and rarityText:IsA("TextLabel") then
			local rarityName = string.upper(rarityText.Text or "")
			local rarityTextWidth = 0.30
			local rarityTextMaxSize = 17

			if rarityName == "UNCOMMON" then
				-- UNCOMMON은 글자가 길고 원본 배지 이미지에 투명 여백이 많아서
				-- 배지 자체를 별도로 더 크게 잡아 글자 주변 여백을 확보한다.
				badge.Size = UDim2.new(1.02, 0, 0.34, 0)
				rarityTextWidth = 0.38
				rarityTextMaxSize = 15
			elseif rarityName == "LEGENDARY" then
				rarityTextWidth = 0.45
			elseif rarityName == "COMMON" then
				rarityTextWidth = 0.34
			elseif rarityName == "MYTHIC" then
				rarityTextWidth = 0.32
			elseif rarityName == "RARE" or rarityName == "EPIC" then
				rarityTextWidth = 0.25
			end

			rarityText.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
			rarityText.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
			rarityText.Size = UDim2.new(rarityTextWidth, 0, 0.34, 0)
			rarityText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			rarityText.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
			rarityText.TextScaled = true
			removeTextConstraint(rarityText)
			setTextConstraint(rarityText, 8, rarityTextMaxSize)
			rarityText.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
			rarityText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
			rarityText.ZIndex = 208
		end
	end

	local unknown = isUnknownFishCard(card, fishImage, fishName)
	if unknown then
		if fishImage and fishImage:IsA("ImageLabel") then
			fishImage.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
			fishImage.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.42)
			fishImage.Size = UDim2.new(0.80, 0, 0.50, 0)
			fishImage.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
			fishImage.ImageTransparency = 0
		end
		if fishName and fishName:IsA("TextLabel") then
			fishName.Visible = true
			fishName.Text = "???"
		end
		if badge and badge:IsA("ImageLabel") then
			badge.Visible = false
		end
	else
		if fishName and fishName:IsA("TextLabel") then
			fishName.Visible = true
		end
		if badge and badge:IsA("ImageLabel") then
			badge.Visible = true
		end
	end
end

local function patchCustomScrollbar(modernRoot, cardsScroll)
	-- Hide Roblox's native scrollbar completely.
	local function hideNativeScrollbar()
		cardsScroll.ScrollBarThickness = 0
		cardsScroll.ScrollBarImageTransparency = 1

		pcall(function()
			cardsScroll.TopImage = ""
			cardsScroll.MidImage = ""
			cardsScroll.BottomImage = ""
			cardsScroll.VerticalScrollBarInset = Enum.ScrollBarInset.None
		end)
	end

	hideNativeScrollbar()
	cardsScroll.ScrollingDirection = Enum.ScrollingDirection.Y
	cardsScroll.AutomaticCanvasSize = Enum.AutomaticSize.Y
	cardsScroll.ScrollingEnabled = true

	if not cardsScroll:GetAttribute("FishdexNativeScrollbarLockedV7") then
		cardsScroll:SetAttribute("FishdexNativeScrollbarLockedV7", true)
		cardsScroll:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ScrollBarThickness"):Connect(hideNativeScrollbar)
		cardsScroll:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ScrollBarImageTransparency"):Connect(hideNativeScrollbar)
	end

	-- One single dark track. There is no inner slot/frame.
	local track = getOrCreate(modernRoot, "Frame", "FishdexCustomScrollTrack")
	track.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(3, 22, 62)
	track.BackgroundTransparency = 0
	track.BorderSizePixel = 0
	track.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(CUSTOM_SCROLL_X, CUSTOM_SCROLL_Y)
	track.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(CUSTOM_SCROLL_WIDTH, CUSTOM_SCROLL_HEIGHT)
	track.Active = true
	track.ClipsDescendants = true
	track.Visible = true
	track.ZIndex = 214

	local trackCorner = track:FindFirstChild("TrackCorner")
	if not trackCorner then
		trackCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		trackCorner.Name = "TrackCorner"
		trackCorner.Parent = track
	end
	trackCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

	local trackStroke = track:FindFirstChild("TrackStroke")
	if not trackStroke then
		trackStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		trackStroke.Name = "TrackStroke"
		trackStroke.Parent = track
	end
	trackStroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(18, 93, 245)
	trackStroke.Thickness = 2
	trackStroke.Transparency = 0.08

	local trackGradient = track:FindFirstChild("TrackGradient")
	if not trackGradient then
		trackGradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
		trackGradient.Name = "TrackGradient"
		trackGradient.Parent = track
	end
	trackGradient.Rotation = 0
	trackGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, Color3.fromRGB(8, 39, 101)),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.5, Color3.fromRGB(2, 18, 53)),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Color3.fromRGB(8, 39, 101)),
	})

	-- Remove every older nested/art element from previous versions.
	for _, oldName in ipairs({"TrackArt", "ScrollSlot", "TrackFillCover", "TrackOverlay", "Slot"}) do
		local old = track:FindFirstChild(oldName)
		if old then
			old:Destroy()
		end
	end

	-- The glowing thumb is a direct child of the track, centered horizontally.
	local thumb = getOrCreate(track, "ImageButton", "FishdexCustomScrollThumb")
	thumb.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
	thumb.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 118, 255)
	thumb.BackgroundTransparency = 0
	thumb.BorderSizePixel = 0
	thumb.Image = ""
	thumb.AutoButtonColor = false
	thumb.Active = true
	thumb.Selectable = false
	thumb.ZIndex = 216

	local thumbCorner = thumb:FindFirstChild("ThumbCorner")
	if not thumbCorner then
		thumbCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		thumbCorner.Name = "ThumbCorner"
		thumbCorner.Parent = thumb
	end
	thumbCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

	local thumbGradient = thumb:FindFirstChild("ThumbGradient")
	if not thumbGradient then
		thumbGradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
		thumbGradient.Name = "ThumbGradient"
		thumbGradient.Parent = thumb
	end
	thumbGradient.Rotation = 90
	thumbGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, Color3.fromRGB(0, 239, 255)),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0.34, Color3.fromRGB(0, 167, 255)),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Color3.fromRGB(15, 72, 235)),
	})

	local thumbStroke = thumb:FindFirstChild("ThumbGlowStroke")
	if not thumbStroke then
		thumbStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		thumbStroke.Name = "ThumbGlowStroke"
		thumbStroke.Parent = thumb
	end
	thumbStroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0, 235, 255)
	thumbStroke.Thickness = 2
	thumbStroke.Transparency = 0

	local thumbHighlight = getOrCreate(thumb, "Frame", "ThumbHighlight")
	thumbHighlight.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(188, 252, 255)
	thumbHighlight.BackgroundTransparency = 0.43
	thumbHighlight.BorderSizePixel = 0
	thumbHighlight.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.18, 0.04)
	thumbHighlight.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.18, 0.92)
	thumbHighlight.Active = false
	thumbHighlight.ZIndex = 217

	local highlightCorner = thumbHighlight:FindFirstChild("HighlightCorner")
	if not highlightCorner then
		highlightCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		highlightCorner.Name = "HighlightCorner"
		highlightCorner.Parent = thumbHighlight
	end
	highlightCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)

	local function getScrollMetrics()
		local usableHeight = math.max(0, track.AbsoluteSize.Y - CUSTOM_SCROLL_TRACK_PADDING * 2)
		local viewportHeight = cardsScroll.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y
		if viewportHeight <= 0 then
			viewportHeight = cardsScroll.AbsoluteSize.Y
		end

		local canvasHeight = math.max(cardsScroll.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y, viewportHeight)
		local scrollRange = math.max(0, canvasHeight - viewportHeight)
		local visibleRatio = canvasHeight > 0
			and math.clamp(viewportHeight / canvasHeight, 0, 1)
			or 1

		local minimumHeight = math.min(CUSTOM_SCROLL_MIN_THUMB_HEIGHT, usableHeight)
		local thumbHeight = math.clamp(usableHeight * visibleRatio, minimumHeight, usableHeight)
		local thumbTravel = math.max(0, usableHeight - thumbHeight)
		return usableHeight, thumbHeight, thumbTravel, scrollRange
	end

	local updating = false
	local function updateThumbFromCanvas()
		if updating then
			return
		end

		local usableHeight, thumbHeight, thumbTravel, scrollRange = getScrollMetrics()
		if usableHeight <= 0 then
			task.defer(updateThumbFromCanvas)
			return
		end

		local progress = scrollRange > 0
			and math.clamp(cardsScroll.CanvasPosition.Y / scrollRange, 0, 1)
			or 0

		updating = true
		thumb.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(CUSTOM_SCROLL_THUMB_WIDTH, thumbHeight)
		thumb.Position = UDim2.new(
			0.5,
			0,
			0,
			CUSTOM_SCROLL_TRACK_PADDING + thumbTravel * progress
		)
		thumb.Active = scrollRange > 0
		track.Visible = true
		updating = false
	end

	local function setCanvasFromThumbTop(thumbTopInsideUsableArea)
		local _, _, thumbTravel, scrollRange = getScrollMetrics()
		if thumbTravel <= 0 or scrollRange <= 0 then
			cardsScroll.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(cardsScroll.CanvasPosition.X, 0)
			return
		end

		local progress = math.clamp(thumbTopInsideUsableArea / thumbTravel, 0, 1)
		cardsScroll.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(
			cardsScroll.CanvasPosition.X,
			progress * scrollRange
		)
	end

	if not track:GetAttribute("FishdexCustomScrollbarConnectedV7") then
		track:SetAttribute("FishdexCustomScrollbarConnectedV7", true)

		local dragging = false
		local dragOffsetY = 0

		thumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
			if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
				dragging = true
				dragOffsetY = input.Position.Y - thumb.AbsolutePosition.Y
				TweenService:Create(
					thumb,
					TweenInfo.new(0.06, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
					{ BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 205, 255) }
				):Play()
			end
		end)

		UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
			if not dragging then
				return
			end
			if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement
				or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
				local thumbTop = input.Position.Y
				- track.AbsolutePosition.Y
				- CUSTOM_SCROLL_TRACK_PADDING
				- dragOffsetY
				setCanvasFromThumbTop(thumbTop)
			end
		end)

		UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
			if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
				if dragging then
					dragging = false
					TweenService:Create(
						thumb,
						TweenInfo.new(0.09, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
						{ BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 118, 255) }
					):Play()
				end
			end
		end)

		track.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
			if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
				return
			end

			local pointerY = input.Position.Y
			if pointerY >= thumb.AbsolutePosition.Y
				and pointerY <= thumb.AbsolutePosition.Y + thumb.AbsoluteSize.Y then
				return
			end

			local _, thumbHeight = getScrollMetrics()
			local top = pointerY
			- track.AbsolutePosition.Y
			- CUSTOM_SCROLL_TRACK_PADDING
			- thumbHeight * 0.5
			setCanvasFromThumbTop(top)
		end)

		cardsScroll:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(updateThumbFromCanvas)
		cardsScroll:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteCanvasSize"):Connect(updateThumbFromCanvas)
		cardsScroll:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteWindowSize"):Connect(updateThumbFromCanvas)
		track:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateThumbFromCanvas)

		local cardsHolder = cardsScroll:FindFirstChild("CardsHolder")
		if cardsHolder then
			local grid = cardsHolder:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIGridLayout")
			if grid then
				grid:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(updateThumbFromCanvas)
			end
		end
	end

	updateThumbFromCanvas()
	task.defer(function()
		hideNativeScrollbar()
		updateThumbFromCanvas()
	end)
	task.delay(0.25, function()
		hideNativeScrollbar()
		updateThumbFromCanvas()
	end)
end

local function patchCards(modernRoot)
	local cardsScroll = modernRoot:FindFirstChild("FishCardsScroll")
	if not (cardsScroll and cardsScroll:IsA("ScrollingFrame")) then
		return
	end

	cardsScroll.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(125, 300)
	cardsScroll.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(1275, 610)
	cardsScroll.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	cardsScroll.ZIndex = 205
	cardsScroll.ScrollBarThickness = 0
	cardsScroll.ScrollBarImageTransparency = 1

	local cardsHolder = cardsScroll:FindFirstChild("CardsHolder")
	if not cardsHolder then
		return
	end

	local grid = cardsHolder:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIGridLayout")
	if grid then
		grid.CellSize = UDim2.fromOffset(CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT)
		grid.CellPadding = UDim2.fromOffset(CARD_GAP_X, CARD_GAP_Y)
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(cardsHolder:GetChildren()) do
		patchFishCard(child)
	end

	if not cardsHolder:GetAttribute("PatchedV5") then
		cardsHolder:SetAttribute("PatchedV5", true)
		cardsHolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
			task.defer(function()
				patchFishCard(child)
				patchCustomScrollbar(modernRoot, cardsScroll)
			end)
		end)
	end

	patchCustomScrollbar(modernRoot, cardsScroll)
end

local function hookTabs(modernRoot)
	for _, child in ipairs(modernRoot:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("ImageButton") and TAB_CONFIG[child.Name] and not child:GetAttribute("HookedV5") then
			child:SetAttribute("HookedV5", true)
			local stroke = child:FindFirstChild("SelectedStroke")
			if stroke and stroke:IsA("UIStroke") then
				stroke:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Transparency"):Connect(function()
					refreshTabs(modernRoot)
				end)
			end
			child.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
				selectedTabName = child.Name
				task.defer(function()
					refreshTabs(modernRoot)
				end)
			end)
		end
	end
end

local function patchModernFishdex(modernRoot)
	patchBase(modernRoot)
	patchHeader(modernRoot)
	patchCards(modernRoot)
	patchCollection(modernRoot)
	syncSelectedTabFromState(modernRoot)
	refreshTabs(modernRoot)
	hookTabs(modernRoot)

	if not modernRoot:GetAttribute("RootPatchedV5") then
		modernRoot:SetAttribute("RootPatchedV5", true)
		modernRoot.ChildAdded:Connect(function()
			task.defer(function()
				patchHeader(modernRoot)
				patchCards(modernRoot)
				patchCollection(modernRoot)
				syncSelectedTabFromState(modernRoot)
				refreshTabs(modernRoot)
				hookTabs(modernRoot)
			end)
		end)
	end
end

local modernRoot = findModernFishdex()
if modernRoot then
	patchModernFishdex(modernRoot)
else
	fishingGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
		if descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") and descendant.Name == "ModernFishdex" then
			task.defer(patchModernFishdex, descendant)
		end
	end)
end

local function findModernFishdex()

	end
	return nil

local function getOrCreate(parent, className, name)
	local child = parent:FindFirstChild(name)
	if child and child.ClassName == className then
		return child
	end
	if child then
		child:Destroy()
	end
	child = Instance.new(className)
	child.Name = name
	child.Parent = parent
	return child
end

local function removeTextConstraint(label)
	local c = label:FindFirstChildOfClass("UITextSizeConstraint")
	if c then
		c:Destroy()
	end
end

local function setTextConstraint(label, minSize, maxSize)
	local c = label:FindFirstChildOfClass("UITextSizeConstraint")
	if not c then
		c = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
		c.Parent = label
	end
	c.MinTextSize = minSize
	c.MaxTextSize = maxSize
end

local function isTabSelected(button)
	local stroke = button:FindFirstChild("SelectedStroke")
	if stroke and stroke:IsA("UIStroke") then
		return stroke.Transparency < 0.5
	end
	return false
end

end

local function hookTabs(modernRoot)
	for _, child in ipairs(modernRoot:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("ImageButton") and TAB_CONFIG[child.Name] and not child:GetAttribute("HookedV2") then
			child:SetAttribute("HookedV2", true)
			local stroke = child:FindFirstChild("SelectedStroke")
			if stroke and stroke:IsA("UIStroke") then
				stroke:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Transparency"):Connect(function()
					refreshTabs(modernRoot)
				end)
			end
			child.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
				task.defer(function()
					refreshTabs(modernRoot)
				end)
			end)
		end
	end
end

local function patchModernFishdex(modernRoot)
	patchBase(modernRoot)
	patchHeader(modernRoot)
	patchCards(modernRoot)
	patchCollection(modernRoot)
	refreshTabs(modernRoot)
	hookTabs(modernRoot)

	if not modernRoot:GetAttribute("RootPatchedV2") then
		modernRoot:SetAttribute("RootPatchedV2", true)
		modernRoot.ChildAdded:Connect(function()
			task.defer(function()
				patchHeader(modernRoot)
				patchCards(modernRoot)
				patchCollection(modernRoot)
				refreshTabs(modernRoot)
				hookTabs(modernRoot)
			end)
		end)
	end
end

local modernRoot = findModernFishdex()
if modernRoot then
	patchModernFishdex(modernRoot)
else
	fishingGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
		if descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") and descendant.Name == "ModernFishdex" then
			task.defer(patchModernFishdex, descendant)
		end
	end)
end

function toolSwitchLock.set(locked)
	locked = locked == true
	if toolSwitchLock.active == locked then
		return
	end

	toolSwitchLock.active = locked
	player:SetAttribute("FishingToolSwitchLocked", locked)
	if locked then
		Services.ContextActionService:BindActionAtPriority(
			toolSwitchLock.actionName,
			function()
				return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
			end,
			false,
			Enum.ContextActionPriority.High.Value + 100,
			Enum.KeyCode.One,
			Enum.KeyCode.Two,
			Enum.KeyCode.Three
		)
	else
		Services.ContextActionService:UnbindAction(toolSwitchLock.actionName)
	end
end

local function renderBiomeWarpOptions()
	guiPrimitives.clearChildren(biomeWarpUI.biomeWarpList)

	if not state then
		return
	end

	for _, biomeId in ipairs(GameConfig.BiomeOrder) do
		local biome = GameConfig.Biomes[biomeId]
		local unlocked = islandState.getUnlockedIslands()[biomeId] == true
		local current = islandState.normalizeIslandId(biomeWarpActualBiome) == biomeId
		local card = Instance.new("Frame")
		card.Name = biomeId .. "WarpOption"
		card.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(24, 32, 44)
		card.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 92)
		card.ZIndex = 92
		card.Parent = biomeWarpUI.biomeWarpList
		guiPrimitives.addCorner(card, 8)
		guiPrimitives.addStroke(card, unlocked and biome.color or Color3.fromRGB(82, 92, 106), 1).Transparency = 0.25

		local nameColor = unlocked and biome.color or Color3.fromRGB(130, 140, 155)
		local name = guiPrimitives.makeText(card, biome.displayName, 16, nameColor, true)
		name.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 8)
		name.Size = UDim2.new(1, -128, 0, 22)
		name.ZIndex = 93

		local requirement = guiPrimitives.makeText(card, "Requirement: " .. GameConfig.getBiomeUnlockText(biomeId), 13, Color3.fromRGB(190, 204, 220), false)
		requirement.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 34)
		requirement.Size = UDim2.new(1, -128, 0, 18)
		requirement.ZIndex = 93

		local detail = guiPrimitives.makeText(card, "Species: " .. #biome.fish, 12, Color3.fromRGB(143, 160, 180), false)
		detail.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 56)
		detail.Size = UDim2.new(1, -128, 0, 18)
		detail.ZIndex = 93

		local label = current and "Selected" or (unlocked and "Go" or "Unlock")
		local buttonColor = current and Color3.fromRGB(91, 104, 124) or (unlocked and Color3.fromRGB(53, 130, 246) or Color3.fromRGB(28, 160, 92))
		local button = guiPrimitives.makeButton(card, label, buttonColor)
		button.Position = UDim2.new(1, -106, 0, 28)
		button.Size = UDim2.new(0, 90, 0, 36)
		button.ZIndex = 93
		button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if current then
				setBiomeWarpVisible(false)
			elseif unlocked then
				setBiomeWarpVisible(false)
				Remote.TeleportTo:FireServer(biomeId)
			else
				Remote.UnlockBiome:FireServer(biomeId)
			end
		end)
	end
end

local function openBiomeWarp(actualBiome)
	biomeWarpActualBiome = actualBiome
	renderBiomeWarpOptions()
	setBiomeWarpVisible(true)
end

biomeWarpUI.biomeWarpClose.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()

local function makePopupListCard(parent, name, height, strokeColor, strokeTransparency)
	local wrapper = Instance.new("Frame")
	wrapper.Name = name .. "Row"
	wrapper.Size = UDim2.new(1, -POPUP_SCROLL_GUTTER, 0, height)
	wrapper.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	wrapper.ZIndex = 97
	wrapper.Parent = parent

	local card = Instance.new("Frame")
	card.Name = name
	card.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(24, 32, 44)
	card.Position = UDim2.new(0, 6, 0, 1)
	card.Size = UDim2.new(1, -12, 1, -2)
	card.ZIndex = 97
	card.Parent = wrapper
	guiPrimitives.addCorner(card, 8)
	local stroke = guiPrimitives.addStroke(card, strokeColor or Color3.fromRGB(83, 104, 134), 1)
	stroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
	if strokeTransparency ~= nil then
		stroke.Transparency = strokeTransparency
	end
	return card
end

local function getFishmongerRarityRank(rarity)
	local ranks = {
		Common = 1,
		Uncommon = 2,
		Rare = 3,
		Epic = 4,
		Legendary = 5,
		Mythic = 6,
	}

	return ranks[rarity] or 0
end

local function renderFishmongerSortButtons()
	guiPrimitives.clearChildren(fishmongerUI.fishmongerSortBar)

	local sortOptions = {
		{ mode = "Rarity", label = "Rarity" },
		{ mode = "Value", label = "Value" },
	}

	for _, option in ipairs(sortOptions) do
		local descendingId = option.mode .. "Desc"
		local ascendingId = option.mode .. "Asc"
		local selected = activeFishmongerSort == descendingId or activeFishmongerSort == ascendingId
		local label = option.label
		if selected then
			label = option.label .. (activeFishmongerSort == descendingId and ": High" or ": Low")
		end

		local button = guiPrimitives.makeButton(fishmongerUI.fishmongerSortBar, label, selected and Color3.fromRGB(230, 126, 48) or Color3.fromRGB(38, 45, 57))
		button.Size = UDim2.new(0, 132, 1, 0)
		button.TextSize = 13
		button.ZIndex = 98
		button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			if activeFishmongerSort == descendingId then
				activeFishmongerSort = ascendingId
			else
				activeFishmongerSort = descendingId
			end
			fishmongerUI.fishmongerList.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
			renderFishmongerSellOptions()
		end)
	end
end

function renderFishmongerSellOptions()
	renderFishmongerSortButtons()
	guiPrimitives.clearChildren(fishmongerUI.fishmongerList)

	if not state then
		fishmongerUI.fishmongerSellAll.Visible = false
		return
	end

	fishmongerUI.fishmongerSellAll.Visible = #state.Inventory > 0

	if #state.Inventory == 0 then
		local empty = guiPrimitives.makeText(fishmongerUI.fishmongerList, "No fish in your bag.", 16, Color3.fromRGB(190, 204, 220), true)
		empty.Size = UDim2.new(1, -8, 0, 54)
		empty.ZIndex = 98
		return
	end

	local fishEntries = {}
	for index, fish in ipairs(state.Inventory) do
		table.insert(fishEntries, {
			fish = fish,
			index = index,
		})
	end

	table.sort(fishEntries, function(left, right)
		local leftFish = left.fish
		local rightFish = right.fish

		if activeFishmongerSort == "RarityAsc" or activeFishmongerSort == "RarityDesc" then
			local leftRank = getFishmongerRarityRank(leftFish.rarity)
			local rightRank = getFishmongerRarityRank(rightFish.rarity)
			if leftRank ~= rightRank then
				if activeFishmongerSort == "RarityAsc" then
					return leftRank < rightRank
				end
				return leftRank > rightRank
			end
		elseif activeFishmongerSort == "ValueAsc" or activeFishmongerSort == "ValueDesc" then
			local leftValue = tonumber(leftFish.value) or 0
			local rightValue = tonumber(rightFish.value) or 0
			if leftValue ~= rightValue then
				if activeFishmongerSort == "ValueAsc" then
					return leftValue < rightValue
				end
				return leftValue > rightValue
			end
		end

		return left.index > right.index
	end)

	for _, entry in ipairs(fishEntries) do
		local fish = entry.fish
		local index = entry.index
		local color = GameConfig.RarityColors[fish.rarity] or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)

		local card = makePopupListCard(fishmongerUI.fishmongerList, "SellOption_" .. tostring(fish.serial or index), 82, color, 0.25)

		local icon = guiPrimitives.makeFishIcon(card, fish.id, fish.rarity, true)
		icon.Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, 12)
		icon.Size = UDim2.new(0, 58, 0, 58)
		icon.ZIndex = 98

		local name = guiPrimitives.makeText(card, fish.name .. " [" .. fish.rarity .. "]", 15, color, true)
		name.Position = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 10)
		name.Size = UDim2.new(1, -182, 0, 24)
		name.ZIndex = 98

		local info = guiPrimitives.makeText(card, "Sell value: " .. tostring(fish.value or 0) .. " coins", 13, Color3.fromRGB(190, 204, 220), false)
		info.Position = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 40)
		info.Size = UDim2.new(1, -182, 0, 20)
		info.ZIndex = 98

		local sell = guiPrimitives.makeButton(card, "Sell", Color3.fromRGB(230, 126, 48))
		sell.Position = UDim2.new(1, -92, 0, 23)
		sell.Size = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 34)
		sell.TextSize = 13
		sell.ZIndex = 98
		sell.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			Remote.SellFish:FireServer("Single", fish.serial, index)
		end)
	end
end

local function openFishmongerSell()
	renderFishmongerSellOptions()
	setFishmongerSellVisible(true)
end

fishmongerUI.fishmongerClose.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	setFishmongerSellVisible(false)
end)

fishmongerUI.fishmongerSellAll.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	if state and #state.Inventory > 0 then
		Remote.SellFish:FireServer()
	end
end)

if Remote.OpenSellFish then
	Remote.OpenSellFish.OnClientEvent:Connect(openFishmongerSell)
else
	warn("OpenSellFish remote was not available; fishmonger sell popup is disabled until remotes resync.")
end

local function renderSupplyShopTabs()
	guiPrimitives.clearChildren(rodShopUI.tabs)

	for _, tabName in ipairs({ "Rods", "Bait" }) do
		local selected = activeSupplyShopTab == tabName
		local button = guiPrimitives.makeButton(rodShopUI.tabs, tabName, selected and Color3.fromRGB(53, 130, 246) or Color3.fromRGB(38, 45, 57))
