			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.45, 0.6),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
		})
		gradient.Rotation = 18
		gradient.Parent = gloss

		return gloss
	end

	function primitives.makeText(parent, text, size, color, bold)
		local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		label.Font = bold and Enum.Font.GothamBold or Enum.Font.Gotham
		label.Text = text
		label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.fromRGB(240, 244, 248)
		label.TextSize = size
		label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
		label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		label.Parent = parent
		return label
	end

	function primitives.makeButton(parent, text, color)
		local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
		button.AutoButtonColor = true
		button.BackgroundColor3 = color or Color3.fromRGB(48, 126, 230)
		button.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
		button.Text = text
		button.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		button.TextSize = 14
		button.Parent = parent
		primitives.addCorner(button, 7)
		primitives.addStroke(button, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255), 1).Transparency = 0.85
		return button
	end

	function primitives.makeFishIcon(parent, fishId, rarity, discovered)
		local color = GameConfig.RarityColors[rarity] or Color3.fromRGB(130, 146, 166)
		local frame = Instance.new("Frame")
		frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(21, 28, 38)
		frame.Parent = parent
		primitives.addCorner(frame, 6)
		primitives.addStroke(frame, color, 1).Transparency = discovered == false and 0.55 or 0.2

		local imageId = discovered == false and nil or GameConfig.getFishImage(fishId)
		if imageId then
			local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
			image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			image.Image = imageId
			image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
			image.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
			image.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
			image.Parent = frame
		else
			local label = primitives.makeText(frame, discovered == false and "?" or "FISH", 12, color, true)
			label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
			label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		end

		return frame
	end

	function primitives.makeRodIcon(parent, rodId)
		local frame = Instance.new("Frame")
		frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(21, 28, 38)
		frame.Parent = parent
		primitives.addCorner(frame, 6)
		primitives.addStroke(frame, Color3.fromRGB(130, 146, 166), 1).Transparency = 0.2

		local imageId = GameConfig.getRodImage(rodId)
		if imageId then
			local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
			image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			image.Image = imageId
			image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
			image.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
			image.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
			image.Parent = frame
		else
			local label = primitives.makeText(frame, "NO IMAGE", 10, Color3.fromRGB(160, 174, 192), true)
			label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
			label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		end

		return frame
	end

	return primitives
end

return GuiPrimitives

local HudControls = {}

local modulesFolder = script.Parent:WaitForChild("HudControlsModules")

local CoinsHud = require(modulesFolder:WaitForChild("CoinsHud"))
local XPBarHud = require(modulesFolder:WaitForChild("XPBarHud"))
local TopButtonsHud = require(modulesFolder:WaitForChild("TopButtonsHud"))
local SettingsPanelHud = require(modulesFolder:WaitForChild("SettingsPanelHud"))
local BottomControlsHud = require(modulesFolder:WaitForChild("BottomControlsHud"))

local function formatNumber(value)
	local number = math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0)
	local sign = number < 0 and "-" or ""
	local digits = tostring(math.abs(number))
	local formatted = digits:reverse():gsub("(%d%d%d)", "%1,"):reverse():gsub("^,", "")
	return sign .. formatted
end

function HudControls.create(deps)
	print("HudControls creating HUD")

	local refs = {}
	local maxLevel = tonumber(deps.maxLevel) or 30

	CoinsHud.create(deps, refs, formatNumber)
	XPBarHud.create(deps, refs, formatNumber, maxLevel)
	TopButtonsHud.create(deps, refs)
	SettingsPanelHud.create(deps, refs)
	BottomControlsHud.create(deps, refs)

	print("New HUD loaded:", deps.scriptFullName)

	if refs.updateQuestBadgeCount then
		refs.updateQuestBadgeCount(0)
	end

	if refs.updateCoins then
		refs.updateCoins(0)
	end

	if refs.updateXP then
		refs.updateXP(nil)
	end

	return refs
end

return HudControls

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local BottomControlsHud = {}

function BottomControlsHud.create(deps, refs)
	local screenGui = deps.screenGui
	local makeText = deps.makeText
	local limitTextSize = deps.limitTextSize

	-- Asset Manager에 업로드한 '글자 없는 버튼 배경(Backbone.png)'의 ID만 넣으면 됩니다.
	-- Tap과 AutoFish는 같은 배경 이미지를 사용하고, 글자는 코드로 표시됩니다.
	local BUTTON_BACKBONE_IMAGE = "rbxassetid://97792879182918"

	-- Backbone.png 전체를 사용하되, 원본의 투명 여백만큼 ImageLabel을 확대합니다.
	-- 이렇게 하면 실제 버튼의 보이는 크기는 유지하면서 위/아래 테두리가 잘리지 않습니다.
	local BUTTON_CANVAS_WIDTH = 1447
	local BUTTON_CANVAS_HEIGHT = 1087
	local BUTTON_VISIBLE_WIDTH = 1267
	local BUTTON_VISIBLE_HEIGHT = 661
	local BUTTON_IMAGE_SCALE_X = BUTTON_CANVAS_WIDTH / BUTTON_VISIBLE_WIDTH
	local BUTTON_IMAGE_SCALE_Y = BUTTON_CANVAS_HEIGHT / BUTTON_VISIBLE_HEIGHT
	local BUTTON_ASPECT_RATIO = BUTTON_VISIBLE_WIDTH / BUTTON_VISIBLE_HEIGHT

	-- AutoFish 상태 글자 색
	local AUTOFISH_ON_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(99, 255, 24)
	local AUTOFISH_ON_STROKE = Color3.fromRGB(20, 91, 0)
	local AUTOFISH_OFF_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 70, 70)
	local AUTOFISH_OFF_STROKE = Color3.fromRGB(115, 0, 0)

	-- 글자 크기 비율은 제공된 AutoFish/Tap 참고 이미지에 맞춰 크게 조정되어 있습니다.
	-- 버튼 크기와 위치는 유지하고, 글자 레이아웃만 변경합니다.

	-- 버튼 공통 글자 색
	local MAIN_TEXT_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	local MAIN_TEXT_STROKE = Color3.fromRGB(6, 39, 111)

	-- AutoFish / Tap 전체 묶음 위치와 크기
	local CENTER_CONTROLS_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.6, 0.68)
	local CENTER_CONTROLS_SIZE = UDim2.fromScale(1, 0.28)

	-- AutoFish / Tap 버튼은 같은 크기로 맞춥니다.
	local AUTO_BUTTON_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.15, 0.5)
	local AUTO_BUTTON_SIZE = UDim2.new(0.17, 0, 0, 145)
	local AUTO_BUTTON_MIN_SIZE = Vector2.new(220, 115)
	local AUTO_BUTTON_MAX_SIZE = Vector2.new(300, 157)

	local TAP_BUTTON_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.65, 0.5)
	local TAP_BUTTON_SIZE = UDim2.new(0.17, 0, 0, 145)
	local TAP_BUTTON_MIN_SIZE = Vector2.new(220, 115)
	local TAP_BUTTON_MAX_SIZE = Vector2.new(300, 157)

	local PRESS_SCALE = 0.93
	local PRESS_TIME = 0.07
	local RELEASE_TIME = 0.11

	-- 글자 외곽선 두께. 더 두껍게 하려면 2.8~3.2 정도로 올리면 됩니다.
	local TEXT_OUTLINE_THICKNESS = 2.4

	local function addTextLimit(label, minSize, maxSize)
		local constraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
		constraint.MinTextSize = minSize
		constraint.MaxTextSize = maxSize
		constraint.Parent = label
		return constraint
	end

	local function tweenScale(scaleObject, target, duration)
		TweenService:Create(
			scaleObject,
			TweenInfo.new(duration, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
			{ Scale = target }
		):Play()
	end

	local function makeImageButton(parent, name, position, size, minSize, maxSize)
		local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
		button.Name = name
		button.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		button.Position = position
		button.Size = size
		button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		button.BorderSizePixel = 0
		button.Text = ""
		button.TextTransparency = 1
		button.AutoButtonColor = false
		button.ClipsDescendants = false
		button.Visible = true
		button.ZIndex = 1001
		button.Parent = parent

		local scale = Instance.new("UIScale")
		scale.Name = "PressScale"
		scale.Scale = 1
		scale.Parent = button

		local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		image.Name = "ButtonImage"
		image.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		image.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		image.Size = UDim2.fromScale(BUTTON_IMAGE_SCALE_X, BUTTON_IMAGE_SCALE_Y)
		image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		image.Image = BUTTON_BACKBONE_IMAGE
		image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		image.ImageRectOffset = Vector2.zero
		image.ImageRectSize = Vector2.zero
		image.ZIndex = 1002
		image.Parent = button

		local sizeConstraint = Instance.new("UISizeConstraint")
		sizeConstraint.MinSize = minSize
		sizeConstraint.MaxSize = maxSize
		sizeConstraint.Parent = button

		local aspectConstraint = Instance.new("UIAspectRatioConstraint")
		aspectConstraint.AspectRatio = BUTTON_ASPECT_RATIO
		aspectConstraint.DominantAxis = Enum.DominantAxis.Width
		aspectConstraint.Parent = button

		button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			tweenScale(scale, PRESS_SCALE, PRESS_TIME)
		end)

		local function release()
			tweenScale(scale, 1, RELEASE_TIME)
		end

		button.MouseButton1Up:Connect(release)
		button.MouseLeave:Connect(release)

		-- FishingClient가 Text를 상태 저장용으로 바꿔도 실제 기본 글자는 보이지 않게 유지합니다.
		button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("TextTransparency"):Connect(function()
			if button.TextTransparency ~= 1 then
				button.TextTransparency = 1
			end
		end)

		button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("BackgroundTransparency"):Connect(function()
			if button.BackgroundTransparency ~= 1 then
				button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			end
		end)

		return button, image, scale
	end

	local function makeOutlinedText(parent, name, position, size, text, color, strokeColor, minTextSize, maxTextSize)
		local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		label.Name = name
		label.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		label.Position = position
		label.Size = size
		label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		label.Text = text
		label.TextColor3 = color
		label.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
		label.TextScaled = true
		label.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
		label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		label.ZIndex = 1003
		label.Parent = parent
		addTextLimit(label, minTextSize, maxTextSize)

		local outline = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		outline.Name = "TextOutline"
		outline.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Contextual
		outline.Color = strokeColor
		outline.Thickness = TEXT_OUTLINE_THICKNESS
		outline.Transparency = 0
		outline.LineJoinMode = Enum.LineJoinMode.Round
		outline.Parent = label

		return label
	end

	refs.centerControls = Instance.new("Frame")
	refs.centerControls.Name = "BottomButtonsFrame"
	refs.centerControls.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	refs.centerControls.Position = CENTER_CONTROLS_POSITION
	refs.centerControls.Size = CENTER_CONTROLS_SIZE
	refs.centerControls.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	refs.centerControls.ClipsDescendants = false
	refs.centerControls.Visible = false
	refs.centerControls.ZIndex = 1000
	refs.centerControls.Parent = screenGui

	local centerControlsScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	centerControlsScale.Scale = 1
	centerControlsScale.Parent = refs.centerControls

	refs.centerTitle = makeText(refs.centerControls, "Lilyshore Island", 15, Color3.fromRGB(230, 238, 248), true)
	refs.centerTitle.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	refs.centerTitle.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.55, 0.10)
	refs.centerTitle.Size = UDim2.new(0.28, 0, 0, 22)
	refs.centerTitle.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	refs.centerTitle.ZIndex = 1001
	refs.centerTitle.Visible = false
	refs.centerTitle.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	limitTextSize(refs.centerTitle, 12, 16)

	-- AutoFish 버튼
	refs.centerAutoButton, refs.centerAutoImage, refs.centerAutoPressScale = makeImageButton(
		refs.centerControls,
		"AutoFishButton",
		AUTO_BUTTON_POSITION,
		AUTO_BUTTON_SIZE,
		AUTO_BUTTON_MIN_SIZE,
		AUTO_BUTTON_MAX_SIZE
	)

	-- 실제 기능 상태는 기존 FishingClient가 이 Text를 "AutoFish ON/OFF"로 변경하며 관리합니다.
	refs.centerAutoButton.Text = "AutoFish OFF"

	refs.centerAutoTitleText = makeOutlinedText(
		refs.centerAutoButton,
		"AutoFishTitleText",
		UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.35),
		UDim2.fromScale(0.84, 0.27),
		"AutoFish",
		MAIN_TEXT_COLOR,
		MAIN_TEXT_STROKE,
		18,
		42
	)

	refs.centerAutoStateText = makeOutlinedText(
		refs.centerAutoButton,
		"AutoFishStateText",
		UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.64),
		UDim2.fromScale(0.58, 0.32),
		"OFF",
		AUTOFISH_OFF_COLOR,
		AUTOFISH_OFF_STROKE,
		28,
		58
	)

	-- FishingClient에서 centerAutoGradient를 변경하는 기존 코드와 호환되도록 남겨둡니다.
	refs.centerAutoGradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
	refs.centerAutoGradient.Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255))
	refs.centerAutoGradient.Transparency = NumberSequence.new(1)
	refs.centerAutoGradient.Parent = refs.centerAutoButton

	local function setAutoFishVisual(isOn)
		if isOn then
			refs.centerAutoStateText.Text = "ON"
			refs.centerAutoStateText.TextColor3 = AUTOFISH_ON_COLOR
			refs.centerAutoStateText.TextStrokeColor3 = AUTOFISH_ON_STROKE
			local outline = refs.centerAutoStateText:FindFirstChild("TextOutline")
			if outline and outline:IsA("UIStroke") then
				outline.Color = AUTOFISH_ON_STROKE
			end
		else
			refs.centerAutoStateText.Text = "OFF"
			refs.centerAutoStateText.TextColor3 = AUTOFISH_OFF_COLOR
			refs.centerAutoStateText.TextStrokeColor3 = AUTOFISH_OFF_STROKE
			local outline = refs.centerAutoStateText:FindFirstChild("TextOutline")
			if outline and outline:IsA("UIStroke") then
				outline.Color = AUTOFISH_OFF_STROKE
			end
		end

		refs.centerAutoButton.TextTransparency = 1
		refs.centerAutoButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	end

	local function updateAutoFishVisualFromButtonText()
		local text = string.lower(tostring(refs.centerAutoButton.Text or ""))
		local containsOff = string.find(text, "off", 1, true) ~= nil
		local containsOn = string.find(text, "on", 1, true) ~= nil
		setAutoFishVisual(containsOn and not containsOff)
	end

	-- 외부 코드에서 직접 호출할 수도 있도록 제공
	refs.setAutoFishVisual = setAutoFishVisual

	-- 기존 AutoFish 기능이 Text를 바꾸면 시각 상태도 자동으로 ON/OFF 변경됩니다.
	refs.centerAutoButton:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(updateAutoFishVisualFromButtonText)
	updateAutoFishVisualFromButtonText()

	-- Tap 버튼
	refs.centerCastButton, refs.centerCastImage, refs.centerCastPressScale = makeImageButton(
		refs.centerControls,
		"TapButton",
		TAP_BUTTON_POSITION,
		TAP_BUTTON_SIZE,
		TAP_BUTTON_MIN_SIZE,
		TAP_BUTTON_MAX_SIZE
	)
	local function keepTapImageSlightlyTransparent(image)
		if not image:IsA("ImageLabel") and not image:IsA("ImageButton") then
			return
		end

		image.ImageTransparency = 0.2
		image:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ImageTransparency"):Connect(function()
			if image.ImageTransparency ~= 0.2 then
				image.ImageTransparency = 0.2
			end
		end)
	end

	keepTapImageSlightlyTransparent(refs.centerCastImage)
	refs.centerCastButton.DescendantAdded:Connect(keepTapImageSlightlyTransparent)
	refs.centerCastButton.Text = "Tap"

	refs.centerCastStateText = makeOutlinedText(
		refs.centerCastButton,
		"TapText",
		UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.47),
		UDim2.fromScale(0.78, 0.54),
		"Tap",
		MAIN_TEXT_COLOR,
		MAIN_TEXT_STROKE,
		42,
		88
	)

	local function updateTapVisualFromButtonText()
		local text = tostring(refs.centerCastButton.Text or "")
		if text == "" then
			text = "Tap"
		end

		refs.centerCastStateText.Text = text
		refs.centerCastButton.TextTransparency = 1
		refs.centerCastButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	end

	refs.centerCastButton:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(updateTapVisualFromButtonText)
	updateTapVisualFromButtonText()

	refs.centerBaitText = makeText(refs.centerControls, "Bait: Basic Bait (Unlimited)", 13, Color3.fromRGB(210, 230, 255), true)
	refs.centerBaitText.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	refs.centerBaitText.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.55, 0.10)
	refs.centerBaitText.Size = UDim2.new(0.34, 0, 0, 20)
	refs.centerBaitText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	refs.centerBaitText.ZIndex = 1001
	refs.centerBaitText.Visible = false
end

return BottomControlsHud

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local CoinsHud = {}

function CoinsHud.create(deps, refs, formatNumber)
	local screenGui = deps.screenGui

	-- ============================================================
	-- EDIT THESE VALUES
	-- ============================================================

	-- Upload the transparent coin-stack image to Asset Manager,
	-- then paste the asset ID here.
	local COIN_ICON_IMAGE = "rbxassetid://99615681502772"

	-- Whole HUD position.
	-- Smaller X = left, larger X = right
	-- Smaller Y = up,   larger Y = down
	local COINS_HUD_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.01, 0.10)

	-- Overall dimensions.
	local COINS_HUD_SIZE = UDim2.fromOffset(430, 96)

	-- Coin image.
	local ICON_SIZE = 75
	local ICON_POSITION = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 4)

	-- Number area.
	local NUMBER_AREA_POSITION = UDim2.fromOffset(80, 10)
	local NUMBER_AREA_SIZE = Vector2.new(320, 76)

	-- Per-character dimensions.
	local DIGIT_WIDTH = 20
	local COMMA_WIDTH = 9
	local DIGIT_HEIGHT = 72

	-- Number appearance.
	local NUMBER_MIN_TEXT_SIZE = 28
	local NUMBER_MAX_TEXT_SIZE = 68
	local NUMBER_OUTLINE_THICKNESS = 3.3
	local NUMBER_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	local NUMBER_OUTLINE_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(0, 10, 21)

	-- Slower than the previous rolling animation.
	local ROLL_TIME = 0.65

	-- ============================================================

	local coinsHud = Instance.new("Frame")
	coinsHud.Name = "CoinsHud"
	coinsHud.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0)
	coinsHud.Position = COINS_HUD_POSITION
	coinsHud.Size = COINS_HUD_SIZE
	coinsHud.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	coinsHud.BorderSizePixel = 0
	coinsHud.Visible = true
	coinsHud.ZIndex = 1000
	coinsHud.ClipsDescendants = false
	coinsHud.Parent = screenGui

	local icon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	icon.Name = "CoinIcon"
	icon.Position = ICON_POSITION
	icon.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(ICON_SIZE, ICON_SIZE)
	icon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	icon.BorderSizePixel = 0
	icon.Image = COIN_ICON_IMAGE
	icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	icon.ZIndex = 1001
	icon.Parent = coinsHud

	local numberArea = Instance.new("Frame")
	numberArea.Name = "NumberArea"
	numberArea.Position = NUMBER_AREA_POSITION
	numberArea.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X, NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.Y)
	numberArea.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	numberArea.BorderSizePixel = 0
	numberArea.ClipsDescendants = false
	numberArea.ZIndex = 1001
	numberArea.Parent = coinsHud

	local digitsHolder = Instance.new("Frame")
	digitsHolder.Name = "DigitsHolder"
	digitsHolder.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
	digitsHolder.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0.5)
	digitsHolder.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
	digitsHolder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	digitsHolder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	digitsHolder.ClipsDescendants = false
	digitsHolder.ZIndex = 1002
	digitsHolder.Parent = numberArea

	local digitsScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	digitsScale.Name = "DigitsScale"
	digitsScale.Scale = 1
	digitsScale.Parent = digitsHolder

	local function createCharacterLabel(parent, name, character)
		local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		label.Name = name
		label.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		label.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		label.BorderSizePixel = 0
		label.Text = character
		label.TextColor3 = NUMBER_COLOR
		label.TextTransparency = 0
		label.TextScaled = true
		label.TextWrapped = false
		label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
		label.ZIndex = 1004
		label.Parent = parent

		local textSizeConstraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
		textSizeConstraint.MinTextSize = NUMBER_MIN_TEXT_SIZE
		textSizeConstraint.MaxTextSize = NUMBER_MAX_TEXT_SIZE
		textSizeConstraint.Parent = label

		local outline = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		outline.Name = "NumberOutline"
		outline.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Contextual
		outline.Color = NUMBER_OUTLINE_COLOR
		outline.Thickness = NUMBER_OUTLINE_THICKNESS
		outline.Transparency = 0
		outline.LineJoinMode = Enum.LineJoinMode.Round
		outline.Parent = label

		return label
	end

	local function getCharacterWidth(character)
		if character == "," then
			return COMMA_WIDTH
		end
		return DIGIT_WIDTH
	end

	local function getTotalWidth(text)
		local total = 0
		for index = 1, #text do
			total += getCharacterWidth(string.sub(text, index, index))
		end
		return total
	end

	local activeTweens = {}
	local animationSerial = 0
	local currentValue = 0
	local hasInitialized = false

	local function cancelActiveTweens()
		for _, tween in ipairs(activeTweens) do
			tween:Cancel()
		end
		table.clear(activeTweens)
	end

	local function clearDigitSlots()
		for _, child in ipairs(digitsHolder:GetChildren()) do
			if child ~= digitsScale then
				child:Destroy()
			end
		end
	end

	local function configureHolderWidth(formatted)
		local totalWidth = getTotalWidth(formatted)
		digitsHolder.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(totalWidth, DIGIT_HEIGHT)

		if totalWidth > NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X then
			digitsScale.Scale = NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X / totalWidth
		else
			digitsScale.Scale = 1
		end
	end

	local function createSlot(xOffset, width)
		local slot = Instance.new("Frame")
		slot.Name = "DigitSlot"
		slot.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(xOffset, 0)
		slot.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(width, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
		slot.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		slot.BorderSizePixel = 0
		slot.ClipsDescendants = true
		slot.ZIndex = 1003
		slot.Parent = digitsHolder
		return slot
	end

	local function renderImmediate(value)
		cancelActiveTweens()
		clearDigitSlots()

		currentValue = math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0)
		local formatted = formatNumber(currentValue)
		configureHolderWidth(formatted)

		local xOffset = 0
		for index = 1, #formatted do
			local character = string.sub(formatted, index, index)
			local width = getCharacterWidth(character)
			local slot = createSlot(xOffset, width)
			createCharacterLabel(slot, "Character", character)
			xOffset += width
		end

		refs.coinsText.Text = formatted
	end

	local function getOldCharacterForNewPosition(oldText, newText, newIndex)
		-- Compare characters from the right side so unchanged place values
		-- stay still even when commas or digit counts change.
		local distanceFromRight = #newText - newIndex
		local oldIndex = #oldText - distanceFromRight

		if oldIndex < 1 or oldIndex > #oldText then
			return ""
		end

		return string.sub(oldText, oldIndex, oldIndex)
	end

	local function animateTo(value)
		value = math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0)

		if not hasInitialized then
			hasInitialized = true
			renderImmediate(value)
			return
		end

		if value == currentValue then
			refs.coinsText.Text = formatNumber(value)
			return
		end

		cancelActiveTweens()
		clearDigitSlots()

		animationSerial += 1
		local thisAnimation = animationSerial

		local oldValue = currentValue
		local oldFormatted = formatNumber(oldValue)
		local newFormatted = formatNumber(value)
		local increasing = value > oldValue

		currentValue = value
		refs.coinsText.Text = newFormatted
		configureHolderWidth(newFormatted)

		local xOffset = 0
		local changedDigitCount = 0

		for newIndex = 1, #newFormatted do
			local newCharacter = string.sub(newFormatted, newIndex, newIndex)
			local oldCharacter = getOldCharacterForNewPosition(oldFormatted, newFormatted, newIndex)
			local width = getCharacterWidth(newCharacter)
			local slot = createSlot(xOffset, width)

			local isDigit = string.match(newCharacter, "%d") ~= nil
			local changed = oldCharacter ~= newCharacter

			if not isDigit or not changed then
				-- Commas and unchanged digits remain still.
				createCharacterLabel(slot, "StaticCharacter", newCharacter)
			else
				changedDigitCount += 1

				local outgoing = createCharacterLabel(slot, "OutgoingCharacter", oldCharacter)
				if oldCharacter == "" or string.match(oldCharacter, "%d") == nil then
					outgoing.TextTransparency = 1
				end

				local incoming = createCharacterLabel(slot, "IncomingCharacter", newCharacter)
				incoming.Position = increasing
					and UDim2.fromScale(0, 1)
					or UDim2.fromScale(0, -1)
				incoming.TextTransparency = 0.08

				local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
					ROLL_TIME,
					Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
					Enum.EasingDirection.Out
				)

				local outgoingTween = TweenService:Create(outgoing, tweenInfo, {
					Position = increasing
						and UDim2.fromScale(0, -1)
						or UDim2.fromScale(0, 1),
					TextTransparency = 0.35,
				})

				local incomingTween = TweenService:Create(incoming, tweenInfo, {
					Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0),
					TextTransparency = 0,
				})

				table.insert(activeTweens, outgoingTween)
				table.insert(activeTweens, incomingTween)

				outgoingTween:Play()
				incomingTween:Play()
			end

			xOffset += width
		end

		if changedDigitCount == 0 then
			renderImmediate(value)
			return
		end

		task.delay(ROLL_TIME + 0.06, function()
			if thisAnimation ~= animationSerial then
				return
			end
			renderImmediate(value)
		end)
	end

	-- Compatibility label retained for the existing FishingClient.
	refs.coinsText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	refs.coinsText.Name = "CoinsText"
	refs.coinsText.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
	refs.coinsText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	refs.coinsText.TextTransparency = 1
	refs.coinsText.Visible = false
	refs.coinsText.Text = "0"
	refs.coinsText.Parent = screenGui

	refs.coinsHud = coinsHud
	refs.coinIcon = icon
	refs.coinNumberArea = numberArea

	function refs.updateCoins(coins)
		animateTo(coins)
	end

	-- Legacy hidden labels retained so older FishingClient code stays compatible.
	refs.statsText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	refs.statsText.Name = "LegacyStatsText"
	refs.statsText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	refs.statsText.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
	refs.statsText.Visible = false
	refs.statsText.Parent = screenGui

	refs.statusText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	refs.statusText.Name = "LegacyStatusText"
	refs.statusText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	refs.statusText.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
	refs.statusText.Visible = false
	refs.statusText.Parent = screenGui
end

return CoinsHud

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local SettingsPanelHud = {}

local ASSETS = {
	Backbone = "rbxassetid://81766141914014",
	CloseButton = "rbxassetid://74437026548245",
	SettingsIcon = "rbxassetid://94678436497650",
	RowBackground = "rbxassetid://130386889052542",
	MusicIcon = "rbxassetid://70574718515061",
	SfxIcon = "rbxassetid://92653426073517",
	FishBowl = "rbxassetid://81878984079270",
	TeleportButton = "rbxassetid://107462888144853",
	ToggleOff = "rbxassetid://131550730293382",
	ToggleOn = "rbxassetid://110978225407848",
	SliderTrack = "rbxassetid://79604035889224",
	SliderFill = "rbxassetid://107077598572207",
	SliderKnob = "rbxassetid://75219052415065",
}

local BASE_WIDTH = 1448
local BASE_HEIGHT = 1086
local PANEL_HEIGHT = BASE_HEIGHT

local function makeImage(parent, name, image, position, size, zIndex, button)
	local obj = Instance.new(button and "ImageButton" or "ImageLabel")
	obj.Name = name
	obj.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	obj.Position = position
	obj.Size = size
	obj.Image = image
	obj.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	obj.ZIndex = zIndex
	if button then
		obj.AutoButtonColor = false
	end
	obj.Parent = parent
	return obj
end

local function makeLabel(parent, name, text, position, size, textSize, color, align, zIndex)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = name
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.Position = position
	label.Size = size
	label.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	label.Text = text
	label.TextColor3 = color
	label.TextSize = textSize
	label.TextXAlignment = align or Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.25
	label.TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
	label.ZIndex = zIndex
	label.Parent = parent
	return label
end

function SettingsPanelHud.create(deps, refs)
	local root = deps.root
	local player = Players.LocalPlayer
	local remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Remotes")
	local fishingRemotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("FishingRemotes")

	local moveSpeedRemote = remotes:WaitForChild("SetMoveSpeed")
	local teleportRemote = fishingRemotes:WaitForChild("TeleportTo")

	local MIN_SPEED, MAX_SPEED, DEFAULT_SPEED = 8, 24, 16
	local musicEnabled, sfxEnabled = true, true

	local TOGGLE_MOVE_TWEEN = TweenInfo.new(
		0.22,
		Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
		Enum.EasingDirection.Out
	)
	local TOGGLE_FADE_TWEEN = TweenInfo.new(
		0.14,
		Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
		Enum.EasingDirection.Out
	)
	local PRESS_TWEEN = TweenInfo.new(
		0.07,
		Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
		Enum.EasingDirection.Out
	)
	local RELEASE_TWEEN = TweenInfo.new(
		0.16,
		Enum.EasingStyle.Back,
		Enum.EasingDirection.Out
	)

	local activeTweens = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })

	local function playTween(instance, tweenInfo, goal)
		local currentTween = activeTweens[instance]
		if currentTween then
			currentTween:Cancel()
		end

		local tween = TweenService:Create(instance, tweenInfo, goal)
		activeTweens[instance] = tween

		tween.Completed:Connect(function()
			if activeTweens[instance] == tween then
				activeTweens[instance] = nil
			end
		end)

		tween:Play()
		return tween
	end

	local overlay = Instance.new("Frame")
	overlay.Name = "SettingsOverlay"
	overlay.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	overlay.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
	overlay.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	overlay.Visible = false
	overlay.Active = true
	overlay.ZIndex = 200
	overlay.Parent = root

	local canvas = Instance.new("Frame")
	canvas.Name = "SettingsCanvas"
	canvas.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	canvas.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0.5, -60)
	canvas.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(BASE_WIDTH, PANEL_HEIGHT)
	canvas.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	canvas.ZIndex = 201
	canvas.Parent = overlay

	local scale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	scale.Parent = canvas

	local SETTINGS_SIZE_MULTIPLIER = 0.85

	local function updateScale()
		local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
		local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)

		local responsiveScale = math.min(
			viewport.X * 0.74 / BASE_WIDTH,
			viewport.Y * 0.74 / BASE_HEIGHT
		)

		scale.Scale = math.clamp(
			responsiveScale * SETTINGS_SIZE_MULTIPLIER,
			0.25,
			0.75
		)
	end

	if workspace.CurrentCamera then
		workspace.CurrentCamera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ViewportSize"):Connect(updateScale)
	end
	updateScale()

	-- Build the full-height Backbone from three mapped sections.
	-- With PANEL_HEIGHT equal to BASE_HEIGHT, every source section keeps
	-- its original proportions while still preserving the clean corner art.
	local function createBackboneSection(
		name,
		targetY,
		targetHeight,
		sourceY,
		sourceHeight
	)
		local clip = Instance.new("Frame")
		clip.Name = name
		clip.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(0, targetY)
		clip.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(BASE_WIDTH, targetHeight)
		clip.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		clip.BorderSizePixel = 0
		clip.ClipsDescendants = true
		clip.ZIndex = 201
		clip.Parent = canvas

		local fullImageHeight =
			targetHeight * BASE_HEIGHT / sourceHeight
		local imageY =
			-(sourceY / BASE_HEIGHT) * fullImageHeight

		local image = makeImage(
			clip,
			"Image",
			ASSETS.Backbone,
			UDim2.fromOffset(0, imageY),
			UDim2.fromOffset(BASE_WIDTH, fullImageHeight),
			201,
			false
		)
		image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	end

	local TOP_SECTION_HEIGHT = 160
	local BOTTOM_SECTION_HEIGHT = 160
	local MIDDLE_TARGET_HEIGHT =
		PANEL_HEIGHT - TOP_SECTION_HEIGHT - BOTTOM_SECTION_HEIGHT

	-- Original source image is 1448 x 1086.
	-- Preserve y=0..160 and y=926..1086 exactly.
	-- Compress only y=160..926 into the remaining middle height.
	createBackboneSection(
		"BackboneTop",
		0,
		TOP_SECTION_HEIGHT,
		0,
		160
	)

	createBackboneSection(
		"BackboneMiddle",
		TOP_SECTION_HEIGHT,
		MIDDLE_TARGET_HEIGHT,
		160,
		766
	)

	createBackboneSection(
		"BackboneBottom",
		PANEL_HEIGHT - BOTTOM_SECTION_HEIGHT,
		BOTTOM_SECTION_HEIGHT,
		926,
		160
	)

	canvas.ClipsDescendants = false

	makeImage(canvas, "SettingsIcon", ASSETS.SettingsIcon, UDim2.fromOffset(72, 56), UDim2.fromOffset(120, 120), 204, false)
	makeLabel(canvas, "Title", "Settings", UDim2.fromOffset(205, 48), UDim2.fromOffset(510, 120), 72, Color3.new(1,1,1), Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, 205)

	local CLOSE_POSITION = UDim2.fromOffset(1270, 60)
	local CLOSE_SIZE = UDim2.fromOffset(100, 100)

	local closeButton = makeImage(
		canvas,
		"CloseButton",
		ASSETS.CloseButton,
		CLOSE_POSITION,
		CLOSE_SIZE,
		210,
		true
	)

	local closeBusy = false

	local function resetCloseButton(animated)
		if not animated then
			local currentTween = activeTweens[closeButton]
			if currentTween then
				currentTween:Cancel()
				activeTweens[closeButton] = nil
			end

			closeButton.Position = CLOSE_POSITION
			closeButton.Size = CLOSE_SIZE
			closeButton.Rotation = 0
			closeButton.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
			return
		end

		playTween(closeButton, RELEASE_TWEEN, {
			Position = CLOSE_POSITION,
			Size = CLOSE_SIZE,
			Rotation = 0,
			ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
		})
	end

	closeButton.MouseEnter:Connect(function()
		if closeBusy then
			return
		end

		playTween(closeButton, TOGGLE_FADE_TWEEN, {
			Position = UDim2.fromOffset(1257, 49),
			Size = UDim2.fromOffset(106, 106),
			ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 244, 190),
		})
	end)

	closeButton.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		if closeBusy then
			return
		end

		resetCloseButton(true)
	end)

	local musicStatus, sfxStatus
	local musicToggle, sfxToggle
	local musicKnob, sfxKnob
	local musicToggleText, sfxToggleText

	local function isMusic(sound)
		local n = string.lower(sound.Name)
		return string.find(n, "music") or string.find(n, "theme") or string.find(n, "bgm")
	end

	local function originalVolume(sound)
		local saved = sound:GetAttribute("FishyFishOriginalVolume")
		if type(saved) ~= "number" then
			saved = sound.Volume
			sound:SetAttribute("FishyFishOriginalVolume", saved)
		end
		return saved
	end

	local function applyAudio()
		SoundService:SetAttribute("FishyFishMusicEnabled", musicEnabled)
		SoundService:SetAttribute("FishyFishSFXEnabled", sfxEnabled)
		for _, obj in ipairs(SoundService:GetDescendants()) do
			if obj:IsA("Sound") then
				local volume = originalVolume(obj)
				if isMusic(obj) then
					obj.Volume = musicEnabled and volume or 0
				else
					obj.Volume = sfxEnabled and volume or 0
				end
			end
		end
	end

	local function setLabelState(label, textValue, colorValue, animate)
		local serial = (label:GetAttribute("SettingsAnimationSerial") or 0) + 1
		label:SetAttribute("SettingsAnimationSerial", serial)

		if not animate then
			label.Text = textValue
			label.TextColor3 = colorValue
			label.TextTransparency = 0
			label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.25
			return
		end

		playTween(label, TweenInfo.new(
			0.07,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
			Enum.EasingDirection.Out
			), {
				TextTransparency = 1,
				TextStrokeTransparency = 1,
			})

		task.delay(0.065, function()
			if label:GetAttribute("SettingsAnimationSerial") ~= serial then
				return
			end

			label.Text = textValue
			label.TextColor3 = colorValue

			playTween(label, TOGGLE_FADE_TWEEN, {
				TextTransparency = 0,
				TextStrokeTransparency = 0.25,
			})
		end)
	end

	local function refreshSingleToggle(toggle, knob, toggleText, enabled, animate)
		local onBackground = toggle:FindFirstChild("OnBackground")
		local offBackground = toggle:FindFirstChild("OffBackground")

		if not onBackground or not offBackground then
			return
		end

		local knobPosition

		-- Keep the text label fully inside the 230x96 switch.
		-- OFF uses the full switch width with right alignment, so it cannot
		-- disappear due to AnchorPoint or a narrow text box.
		toggleText.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		toggleText.TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.None

		if enabled then
			knobPosition = UDim2.new(1, -78, 0.5, -39)
			toggleText.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(22, 0)
			toggleText.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(108, 96)
			toggleText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
		else
			knobPosition = UDim2.new(0, 2, 0.5, -39)
			toggleText.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
			toggleText.Size = UDim2.new(1, -12, 1, 0)
			toggleText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Right
		end

		if animate then
			playTween(onBackground, TOGGLE_FADE_TWEEN, {
				ImageTransparency = enabled and 0 or 1,
			})
			playTween(offBackground, TOGGLE_FADE_TWEEN, {
				ImageTransparency = enabled and 1 or 0,
			})
			playTween(knob, TOGGLE_MOVE_TWEEN, {
				Position = knobPosition,
			})
		else
			onBackground.ImageTransparency = enabled and 0 or 1
			offBackground.ImageTransparency = enabled and 1 or 0
			knob.Position = knobPosition
		end

		setLabelState(
			toggleText,
			enabled and "ON" or "OFF",
			Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
			animate
		)
	end

	local function refreshToggleRow(isMusicRow, animate)
		local toggle
		local knob
		local toggleText
		local statusLabel
		local enabled

		if isMusicRow then
			toggle = musicToggle
			knob = musicKnob
			toggleText = musicToggleText
			statusLabel = musicStatus
			enabled = musicEnabled
		else
			toggle = sfxToggle
			knob = sfxKnob
			toggleText = sfxToggleText
			statusLabel = sfxStatus
			enabled = sfxEnabled
		end

		refreshSingleToggle(
			toggle,
			knob,
			toggleText,
			enabled,
			animate
		)

		setLabelState(
			statusLabel,
			enabled and "ON" or "OFF",
			enabled
				and Color3.fromRGB(65, 215, 255)
				or Color3.fromRGB(255, 75, 75),
			animate
		)
	end

	local function refreshToggles(animate)
		-- Used only when opening/initializing the Settings window.
		refreshToggleRow(true, animate)
		refreshToggleRow(false, animate)
	end

	local function createToggle(parent, name, isMusicRow)
		local toggle = Instance.new("TextButton")
		toggle.Name = name .. "Toggle"
		toggle.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		toggle.AutoButtonColor = false
		toggle.Text = ""
		toggle.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(955, 64)
		toggle.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(230, 96)
		toggle.ClipsDescendants = true
		toggle.ZIndex = 207
		toggle.Parent = parent

		local toggleScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
		toggleScale.Name = "PressScale"
		toggleScale.Scale = 1
		toggleScale.Parent = toggle

		local onBackground = makeImage(
			toggle,
			"OnBackground",
			ASSETS.ToggleOn,
			UDim2.fromOffset(-83, -82),
			UDim2.fromOffset(396, 264),
			207,
			false
		)
		onBackground.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

		local offBackground = makeImage(
			toggle,
			"OffBackground",
			ASSETS.ToggleOff,
			UDim2.fromOffset(-39, -55),
			UDim2.fromOffset(307, 213),
			207,
			false
		)
		offBackground.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
		offBackground.ImageTransparency = 1

		local toggleText = makeLabel(
			toggle,
			name .. "ToggleText",
			"ON",
			UDim2.fromOffset(22, 0),
			UDim2.fromOffset(108, 96),
			38,
			Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
			Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
			209
		)
		toggleText.TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.None

		local knob = Instance.new("Frame")
		knob.Name = name .. "Knob"
		knob.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		knob.Position = UDim2.new(1, -78, 0.5, -39)
		knob.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(78, 78)
		knob.ClipsDescendants = true
		knob.ZIndex = 210
		knob.Parent = toggle

		local knobImage = makeImage(
			knob,
			"Image",
			ASSETS.SliderKnob,
			UDim2.fromOffset(-44, -41),
			UDim2.fromOffset(165, 164),
			211,
			false
		)
		knobImage.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

		if isMusicRow then
			musicToggle, musicKnob, musicToggleText = toggle, knob, toggleText
		else
			sfxToggle, sfxKnob, sfxToggleText = toggle, knob, toggleText
		end

		toggle.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			playTween(toggleScale, PRESS_TWEEN, {
				Scale = 0.96,
			})
		end)

		toggle.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
			playTween(toggleScale, RELEASE_TWEEN, {
				Scale = 1,
			})
		end)

		toggle.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			playTween(toggleScale, RELEASE_TWEEN, {
				Scale = 1,
			})
		end)

		toggle.Activated:Connect(function()
			if isMusicRow then
				musicEnabled = not musicEnabled
			else
				sfxEnabled = not sfxEnabled
			end

			playTween(toggleScale, PRESS_TWEEN, {
				Scale = 0.94,
			})
			task.delay(0.07, function()
				playTween(toggleScale, RELEASE_TWEEN, {
					Scale = 1,
				})
			end)

			applyAudio()

			-- Only animate the row that was clicked.
			-- This prevents the untouched Music/SFX switch from blinking.
			refreshToggleRow(isMusicRow, true)
		end)
	end

	local function makeAudioRow(name, y, icon, prefix, isMusicRow)
		local row = makeImage(
			canvas,
			name .. "Row",
			ASSETS.RowBackground,
			UDim2.fromOffset(86, y),
			UDim2.fromOffset(1278, 226),
			203,
			false
		)
		row.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

		makeImage(
			row,
			name .. "Icon",
			icon,
			UDim2.fromOffset(60, 30),
			UDim2.fromOffset(160, 160),
			205,
			false
		)

		makeLabel(
			row,
			name .. "Prefix",
			prefix .. ":",
			UDim2.fromOffset(460, 55),
			UDim2.fromOffset(230, 110),
			52,
			Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
			Enum.TextXAlignment.Right,
			206
		)

		local status = makeLabel(
			row,
			name .. "Status",
			"ON",
			UDim2.fromOffset(700, 55),
			UDim2.fromOffset(180, 110),
			52,
			Color3.fromRGB(65, 215, 255),
			Enum.TextXAlignment.Left,
			206
		)

		if isMusicRow then
			musicStatus = status
		else
			sfxStatus = status
		end

		createToggle(row, name, isMusicRow)
	end

	makeAudioRow("Music", 160, ASSETS.MusicIcon, "Music", true)
	makeAudioRow("Sfx", 360, ASSETS.SfxIcon, "SFX", false)

	local speedRow = makeImage(canvas, "MoveSpeedRow", ASSETS.RowBackground, UDim2.fromOffset(86,560), UDim2.fromOffset(1278,226), 203, false)
	speedRow.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	makeLabel(speedRow, "MoveSpeedPrefix", "Move Speed:", UDim2.fromOffset(400,35), UDim2.fromOffset(360,80), 46, Color3.new(1,1,1), Enum.TextXAlignment.Right, 206)
	local speedValue = makeLabel(speedRow, "MoveSpeedValue", "16", UDim2.fromOffset(770,35), UDim2.fromOffset(120,80), 46, Color3.fromRGB(65,215,255), Enum.TextXAlignment.Left, 206)

	local sliderArea = Instance.new("Frame")
	sliderArea.Name = "SliderArea"
	sliderArea.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	sliderArea.Active = true
	sliderArea.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(95,108)
	sliderArea.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(1088,82)
	sliderArea.ZIndex = 205
	sliderArea.Parent = speedRow

	-- The existing SliderTrack and SliderFill assets are reused as-is.
	-- Each rounded end is rendered separately from the stretchable middle,
	-- so the left cap can never be squashed.

	local TRACK_X = 0
	local TRACK_Y = 22
	local TRACK_WIDTH = 1088
	local TRACK_HEIGHT = 38

	local TRACK_CAP_WIDTH = 19
	local TRACK_MIDDLE_WIDTH = TRACK_WIDTH - (TRACK_CAP_WIDTH * 2)

	local FILL_X = 4
	local FILL_Y = 26
	local FILL_HEIGHT = 30
	local FILL_CAP_WIDTH = 15

	local KNOB_SIZE = 76
	local KNOB_HALF = KNOB_SIZE / 2

	-- Maps a normalized region of a source image into a clipping frame.
	-- This avoids ImageRect coordinates, which can break when Roblox resizes
	-- an uploaded image internally.
	local function createMappedPiece(
		parent,
		name,
		image,
		clipPosition,
		clipSize,
		sourceImageSize,
		sourceRegion,
		zIndex
	)
		local clip = Instance.new("Frame")
		clip.Name = name
		clip.Position = clipPosition
		clip.Size = clipSize
		clip.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		clip.BorderSizePixel = 0
		clip.ClipsDescendants = true
		clip.ZIndex = zIndex
		clip.Parent = parent

		local clipWidth = clipSize.X.Offset
		local clipHeight = clipSize.Y.Offset

		local fullImageWidth =
			clipWidth * sourceImageSize.X / sourceRegion.Width
		local fullImageHeight =
			clipHeight * sourceImageSize.Y / sourceRegion.Height

		local imagePositionX =
			-(sourceRegion.X / sourceImageSize.X) * fullImageWidth
		local imagePositionY =
			-(sourceRegion.Y / sourceImageSize.Y) * fullImageHeight

		local imageObject = makeImage(
			clip,
			"Image",
			image,
			UDim2.fromOffset(imagePositionX, imagePositionY),
			UDim2.fromOffset(fullImageWidth, fullImageHeight),
			zIndex,
			false
		)
		imageObject.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

		return clip, imageObject
	end

	-- SliderTrack source PNG:
	-- canvas 1536x1024, visible bar approximately x=103..1477, y=432..554.
	local trackSourceSize = Vector2.new(1536, 1024)

	local trackLeftClip = createMappedPiece(
		sliderArea,
		"TrackLeftCap",
		ASSETS.SliderTrack,
		UDim2.fromOffset(TRACK_X, TRACK_Y),
		UDim2.fromOffset(TRACK_CAP_WIDTH, TRACK_HEIGHT),
		trackSourceSize,
		{
			X = 103,
			Y = 432,
			Width = 61,
			Height = 122,
		},
		206
	)

	local trackMiddleClip = createMappedPiece(
		sliderArea,
		"TrackMiddle",
		ASSETS.SliderTrack,
		UDim2.fromOffset(TRACK_X + TRACK_CAP_WIDTH, TRACK_Y),
		UDim2.fromOffset(TRACK_MIDDLE_WIDTH, TRACK_HEIGHT),
		trackSourceSize,
		{
			X = 164,
			Y = 432,
			Width = 1252,
			Height = 122,
		},
		206
	)

	local trackRightClip = createMappedPiece(
		sliderArea,
		"TrackRightCap",
		ASSETS.SliderTrack,
		UDim2.fromOffset(
			TRACK_X + TRACK_WIDTH - TRACK_CAP_WIDTH,
			TRACK_Y
		),
		UDim2.fromOffset(TRACK_CAP_WIDTH, TRACK_HEIGHT),
		trackSourceSize,
		{
			X = 1416,
			Y = 432,
			Width = 61,
			Height = 122,
		},
		206
	)

	-- SliderFill source PNG:
	-- canvas 1274x155, visible fill approximately x=10..1264, y=10..145.
	local fillSourceSize = Vector2.new(1274, 155)

	local fillLeftClip = createMappedPiece(
		sliderArea,
		"FillLeftCap",
		ASSETS.SliderFill,
		UDim2.fromOffset(FILL_X, FILL_Y),
		UDim2.fromOffset(FILL_CAP_WIDTH, FILL_HEIGHT),
		fillSourceSize,
		{
			X = 10,
			Y = 10,
			Width = 68,
			Height = 135,
		},
		207
	)

	-- The middle is the only piece whose width changes.
	-- It excludes both rounded ends from the source image.
	local fillMiddleClip = Instance.new("Frame")
	fillMiddleClip.Name = "FillMiddle"
	fillMiddleClip.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
		FILL_X + FILL_CAP_WIDTH,
		FILL_Y
	)
	fillMiddleClip.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(1, FILL_HEIGHT)
	fillMiddleClip.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	fillMiddleClip.BorderSizePixel = 0
	fillMiddleClip.ClipsDescendants = true
	fillMiddleClip.ZIndex = 207
	fillMiddleClip.Parent = sliderArea

	local fillMiddleImage = makeImage(
		fillMiddleClip,
		"Image",
		ASSETS.SliderFill,
		UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0),
		UDim2.fromOffset(1, FILL_HEIGHT),
		207,
		false
	)
	fillMiddleImage.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

	-- Crop the transparent padding around Circle.png using a clipping frame.
	local knob = Instance.new("TextButton")
	knob.Name = "SliderKnob"
	knob.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	knob.AutoButtonColor = false
	knob.Text = ""
	knob.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
		math.floor((TRACK_WIDTH - KNOB_SIZE) * 0.5),
		TRACK_Y + math.floor(TRACK_HEIGHT / 2) - KNOB_HALF
	)
	knob.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(KNOB_SIZE, KNOB_SIZE)
	knob.ClipsDescendants = true
	knob.ZIndex = 209
	knob.Parent = sliderArea

	local knobImage = makeImage(
		knob,
		"Image",
		ASSETS.SliderKnob,
		UDim2.fromOffset(-42, -40),
		UDim2.fromOffset(160, 160),
		210,
		false
	)
	knobImage.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

	local currentSpeed, dragging, activeTouch = DEFAULT_SPEED, false, nil

	local function renderSpeed(speed)
		currentSpeed = math.clamp(
			math.round(tonumber(speed) or DEFAULT_SPEED),
			MIN_SPEED,
			MAX_SPEED
		)

		local alpha =
			(currentSpeed - MIN_SPEED) / (MAX_SPEED - MIN_SPEED)

		local usableKnobWidth = TRACK_WIDTH - KNOB_SIZE
		local knobX = TRACK_X
			+ math.floor(usableKnobWidth * alpha + 0.5)
		local knobCenterX = knobX + KNOB_HALF

		-- Fill reaches the center of the knob.
		local visibleFillWidth = math.max(
			0,
			math.floor(knobCenterX - FILL_X + 0.5)
		)
		local middleWidth = math.max(
			0,
			visibleFillWidth - FILL_CAP_WIDTH
		)

		fillLeftClip.Visible = visibleFillWidth > 0
		fillMiddleClip.Visible = middleWidth > 0
		fillMiddleClip.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
			middleWidth,
			FILL_HEIGHT
		)

		if middleWidth > 0 then
			-- Middle source region:
			-- x=78..1196, y=10..145 in the 1274x155 PNG.
			local fullImageWidth =
				middleWidth * fillSourceSize.X / 1118
			local fullImageHeight =
				FILL_HEIGHT * fillSourceSize.Y / 135

			fillMiddleImage.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
				-(78 / fillSourceSize.X) * fullImageWidth,
				-(10 / fillSourceSize.Y) * fullImageHeight
			)
			fillMiddleImage.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
				fullImageWidth,
				fullImageHeight
			)
		end

		knob.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
			knobX,
			TRACK_Y + math.floor(TRACK_HEIGHT / 2) - KNOB_HALF
		)

		speedValue.Text = tostring(currentSpeed)
	end

	local function updateFromX(x)
		local absoluteScale = scale.Scale
		local absoluteTrackStart = sliderArea.AbsolutePosition.X
			+ ((TRACK_X + KNOB_HALF) * absoluteScale)
		local absoluteUsableWidth =
			(TRACK_WIDTH - KNOB_SIZE) * absoluteScale

		if absoluteUsableWidth <= 0 then
			return
		end

		local alpha = math.clamp(
			(x - absoluteTrackStart) / absoluteUsableWidth,
			0,
			1
		)

		renderSpeed(
			MIN_SPEED + ((MAX_SPEED - MIN_SPEED) * alpha)
		)
	end

	local function begin(input)
		if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then return end
		dragging = true
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then activeTouch = input end
		updateFromX(input.Position.X)
	end

	sliderArea.InputBegan:Connect(begin)
	knob.InputBegan:Connect(begin)

	UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
		if not dragging then return end
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
			updateFromX(input.Position.X)
		elseif input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch and input == activeTouch then
			updateFromX(input.Position.X)
		end
	end)

	UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if not dragging then return end
		local mouseEnd = input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		local touchEnd = input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch and input == activeTouch
		if not mouseEnd and not touchEnd then return end
		dragging, activeTouch = false, nil
		moveSpeedRemote:FireServer(currentSpeed)
	end)

	-- Fourth row: teleport directly to the local player's aquarium.
	local aquariumRow = makeImage(
		canvas,
		"AquariumTeleportRow",
		ASSETS.RowBackground,
		UDim2.fromOffset(86, 760),
		UDim2.fromOffset(1278, 226),
		203,
		false
	)
	aquariumRow.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

	makeImage(
		aquariumRow,
		"FishBowlIcon",
		ASSETS.FishBowl,
		UDim2.fromOffset(60, 30),
		UDim2.fromOffset(160, 160),
		205,
		false
	)

	makeLabel(
		aquariumRow,
		"AquariumTitle",
		"My Aquarium",
		UDim2.fromOffset(220, 55),
		UDim2.fromOffset(830, 110),
		46,
		Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
		Enum.TextXAlignment.Center,
		206
	)

	local teleportButton = makeImage(
		aquariumRow,
		"TeleportButton",
		ASSETS.TeleportButton,
		UDim2.fromOffset(930, 64),
		UDim2.fromOffset(270, 96),
		208,
		true
	)
	teleportButton.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit

	local teleportScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	teleportScale.Name = "PressScale"
	teleportScale.Scale = 1
	teleportScale.Parent = teleportButton

	local teleportBusy = false

	local function releaseTeleportButton()
		playTween(teleportScale, RELEASE_TWEEN, {
			Scale = 1,
		})
	end

	teleportButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
		if teleportBusy then
			return
		end

		playTween(teleportScale, PRESS_TWEEN, {
			Scale = 0.94,
		})
	end)

	teleportButton.MouseButton1Up:Connect(releaseTeleportButton)
	teleportButton.MouseLeave:Connect(releaseTeleportButton)

	teleportButton.Activated:Connect(function()
		if teleportBusy then
			return
		end

		teleportBusy = true

		playTween(teleportScale, PRESS_TWEEN, {
			Scale = 0.91,
		})

		teleportRemote:FireServer({
			kind = "PlayerAquarium",
			userId = player.UserId,
		})

		task.delay(0.075, function()
			releaseTeleportButton()

			task.delay(0.08, function()
				refs.setSettingsVisible(false)
			end)
		end)

		-- A short lock prevents accidental double teleports on touch devices.
		task.delay(0.8, function()
			teleportBusy = false
		end)
	end)

	refs.setSettingsVisible = function(visible)
		overlay.Visible = visible
		if visible then
			closeBusy = false
			teleportBusy = false
			teleportScale.Scale = 1
			resetCloseButton(false)
			renderSpeed(player:GetAttribute("MoveSpeed") or DEFAULT_SPEED)
			refreshToggles(false)
		end
	end

	closeButton.Activated:Connect(function()
		if closeBusy then
			return
		end

		closeBusy = true

		playTween(closeButton, PRESS_TWEEN, {
			Position = UDim2.fromOffset(1268, 60),
			Size = UDim2.fromOffset(84, 84),
			Rotation = -7,
			ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 223, 100),
		})

		task.delay(0.075, function()
			playTween(closeButton, RELEASE_TWEEN, {
				Position = UDim2.fromOffset(1257, 49),
				Size = UDim2.fromOffset(106, 106),
				Rotation = 3,
				ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1),
			})

			task.delay(0.12, function()
				resetCloseButton(true)

				task.delay(0.055, function()
					refs.setSettingsVisible(false)
					closeBusy = false
				end)
			end)
		end)
	end)

	SoundService.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(obj)
		if obj:IsA("Sound") then task.defer(applyAudio) end
	end)

	player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("MoveSpeed"):Connect(function()
		local value = player:GetAttribute("MoveSpeed")
		if value ~= nil then renderSpeed(value) end
	end)

	refreshToggles(false)
	renderSpeed(player:GetAttribute("MoveSpeed") or DEFAULT_SPEED)
end

return SettingsPanelHud

local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local TopButtonsHud = {}

-- Top HUD icon asset IDs
local SETTINGS_ICON = "rbxassetid://124685242228377"
local QUESTS_ICON = "rbxassetid://102051949478203"
local SHOP_ICON = "rbxassetid://140502313228532"

-- ============================================================
-- TOP BUTTONS LAYOUT
-- 4 buttons: 58 * 4 + 14 * 3 = 274 pixels
-- ============================================================

local TOP_BUTTONS_Y_OFFSET = 12
local TOP_BUTTON_SIZE = UDim2.fromOffset(58, 58)
local TOP_BUTTON_PADDING = 14
local TOP_BUTTON_COUNT = 4

local TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_WIDTH =
	(58 * TOP_BUTTON_COUNT)
	+ (TOP_BUTTON_PADDING * (TOP_BUTTON_COUNT - 1))

local TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_SIZE = UDim2.fromOffset(
	TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_WIDTH,
	64
)

local ICON_NORMAL_SIZE = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82)
local ICON_PRESSED_SIZE = UDim2.fromScale(0.74, 0.74)
local SHADOW_NORMAL_SIZE = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82)
local SHADOW_PRESSED_SIZE = UDim2.fromScale(0.76, 0.76)
local SHADOW_TRANSPARENCY = 0.55
local SHADOW_PRESSED_TRANSPARENCY = 0.43

function TopButtonsHud.create(deps, refs)
	local screenGui = deps.screenGui

	local topHudButtons = Instance.new("Frame")
	topHudButtons.Name = "TopButtonsFrame"
	topHudButtons.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	topHudButtons.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	topHudButtons.BorderSizePixel = 0
	topHudButtons.ClipsDescendants = false
	topHudButtons.Visible = true
	topHudButtons.ZIndex = 1000
	topHudButtons.Parent = screenGui

	local targetAnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
	local targetPosition = UDim2.new(
		0.5,
		0,
		0,
		TOP_BUTTONS_Y_OFFSET
	)

	local applyingLayout = false

	local function forceTopButtonsLayout()
		if applyingLayout or not topHudButtons.Parent then
			return
		end

		applyingLayout = true

		if topHudButtons.AnchorPoint ~= targetAnchorPoint then
			topHudButtons.AnchorPoint = targetAnchorPoint
		end

		if topHudButtons.Position ~= targetPosition then
			topHudButtons.Position = targetPosition
		end

		if topHudButtons.Size ~= TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_SIZE then
			topHudButtons.Size = TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_SIZE
		end

		local layout = topHudButtons:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIListLayout")
		if layout then
			layout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
			layout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
			layout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
			layout.Padding = UDim.new(0, TOP_BUTTON_PADDING)
			layout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
		end

		applyingLayout = false
	end

	forceTopButtonsLayout()

	topHudButtons:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Position"):Connect(
		forceTopButtonsLayout
	)
	topHudButtons:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Size"):Connect(
		forceTopButtonsLayout
	)
	topHudButtons:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AnchorPoint"):Connect(
		forceTopButtonsLayout
	)

	local topHudScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	topHudScale.Name = "TopHudScale"
	topHudScale.Scale = 1
	topHudScale.Parent = topHudButtons

	local topHudConstraint = Instance.new("UISizeConstraint")
	topHudConstraint.MinSize = Vector2.new(
		TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_WIDTH,
		64
	)
	topHudConstraint.MaxSize = Vector2.new(
		TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_WIDTH,
		64
	)
	topHudConstraint.Parent = topHudButtons

	local topHudLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
	topHudLayout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
	topHudLayout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center
	topHudLayout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
	topHudLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, TOP_BUTTON_PADDING)
	topHudLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
	topHudLayout.Parent = topHudButtons

	topHudLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
		"HorizontalAlignment"
	):Connect(forceTopButtonsLayout)
	topHudLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
		"VerticalAlignment"
	):Connect(forceTopButtonsLayout)
	topHudLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
		"Padding"
	):Connect(forceTopButtonsLayout)

	-- Other scripts can reposition the frame shortly after it is created.
	-- Reapply the intended four-button centered layout during startup.
	task.spawn(function()
		for _ = 1, 60 do
			if not topHudButtons.Parent then
				return
			end

			forceTopButtonsLayout()
			task.wait(0.1)
		end
	end)

	print(
		"[HudControls] TopButtonsFrame centered for 4 buttons:",
		topHudButtons:GetFullName(),
		"width:",
		TOP_BUTTONS_FRAME_WIDTH
	)

	local function makeTopHudButton(name, iconId)
		local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
		button.Name = name
		button.Size = TOP_BUTTON_SIZE
		button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		button.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		button.BorderSizePixel = 0
		button.Text = ""
		button.TextTransparency = 1
		button.AutoButtonColor = true
		button.Visible = true
		button.ZIndex = 1001
		button.ClipsDescendants = false
		button.Parent = topHudButtons

		local pressScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
		pressScale.Name = "PressScale"
		pressScale.Scale = 1
		pressScale.Parent = button

		local shadow = Instance.new("Frame")
		shadow.Name = "IconShadow"
		shadow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		shadow.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		shadow.Size = SHADOW_NORMAL_SIZE
		shadow.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
		shadow.BackgroundTransparency = SHADOW_TRANSPARENCY
		shadow.BorderSizePixel = 0
		shadow.ZIndex = 1001
		shadow.Parent = button

		local shadowCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		shadowCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
		shadowCorner.Parent = shadow

		local icon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		icon.Name = "Icon"
		icon.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		icon.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		icon.Size = ICON_NORMAL_SIZE
		icon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		icon.Image = iconId
		icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		icon.ZIndex = 1002
		icon.Parent = button

		local pressTweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
			0.07,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
			Enum.EasingDirection.Out
		)

		local releaseTweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
			0.16,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Back,
			Enum.EasingDirection.Out
		)

		local isPressed = false

		local function tweenPressed(pressed)
			if isPressed == pressed then
				return
			end

			isPressed = pressed
			local tweenInfo = pressed
				and pressTweenInfo
				or releaseTweenInfo

			TweenService:Create(pressScale, tweenInfo, {
				Scale = pressed and 0.88 or 1,
			}):Play()

			TweenService:Create(icon, tweenInfo, {
				Position = pressed
					and UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.56)
					or UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5),

				Size = pressed
					and ICON_PRESSED_SIZE
					or ICON_NORMAL_SIZE,
			}):Play()

			TweenService:Create(shadow, tweenInfo, {
				Size = pressed
					and SHADOW_PRESSED_SIZE
					or SHADOW_NORMAL_SIZE,

				BackgroundTransparency = pressed
					and SHADOW_PRESSED_TRANSPARENCY
					or SHADOW_TRANSPARENCY,
			}):Play()
		end

		button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
			tweenPressed(true)
		end)

		button.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
			tweenPressed(false)
		end)

		button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
			tweenPressed(false)
		end)

		button.Activated:Connect(function()
			tweenPressed(false)
		end)

		return button
	end

	local function makeNotificationBadge(parent)
		local badge = Instance.new("Frame")
		badge.Name = "NotificationBadge"
		badge.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 0)
		badge.Position = UDim2.new(1, 5, 0, -7)
		badge.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(26, 26)
		badge.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(220, 20, 38)
		badge.BackgroundTransparency = 0
		badge.BorderSizePixel = 0
		badge.Visible = false
		badge.ZIndex = 1010
		badge.Parent = parent

		local badgeScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
		badgeScale.Name = "BadgeScale"
		badgeScale.Scale = 1
		badgeScale.Parent = badge

		local badgeCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		badgeCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
		badgeCorner.Parent = badge

		local badgeStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		badgeStroke.ApplyStrokeMode =
			Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
		badgeStroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		badgeStroke.Thickness = 3
		badgeStroke.Transparency = 0
		badgeStroke.Parent = badge

		local badgeText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		badgeText.Name = "CountText"
		badgeText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		badgeText.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		badgeText.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, -0.02)
		badgeText.Text = "1"
		badgeText.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		badgeText.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(35, 0, 0)
		badgeText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.15
		badgeText.TextScaled = true
		badgeText.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
		badgeText.ZIndex = 1011
		badgeText.Parent = badge

		local textConstraint = Instance.new(
			"UITextSizeConstraint"
		)
		textConstraint.MinTextSize = 12
		textConstraint.MaxTextSize = 22
		textConstraint.Parent = badgeText

		return badge, badgeText, badgeScale
	end

	refs.settingsButton = makeTopHudButton(
		"SettingsButton",
		SETTINGS_ICON
	)
	refs.settingsButton.LayoutOrder = 1

	refs.questsButton = makeTopHudButton(
		"QuestsButton",
		QUESTS_ICON
	)
	refs.questsButton.LayoutOrder = 2

	refs.questBadge,
	refs.questBadgeText,
	refs.questBadgeScale =
		makeNotificationBadge(refs.questsButton)

	refs.shopButton = makeTopHudButton(
		"ShopButton",
		SHOP_ICON
	)
	refs.shopButton.LayoutOrder = 3

	function refs.updateQuestBadgeCount(count)
		count = math.max(
			0,
			math.floor(tonumber(count) or 0)
		)

		if not refs.questBadge or not refs.questBadgeText then
			return
		end

		refs.questBadge.Visible = count > 0
		refs.questBadgeText.Text =
			count > 99 and "99+" or tostring(count)

		refs.questBadge.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
			count >= 10 and 32 or 26,
			26
		)

		if count > 0 and refs.questBadgeScale then
			refs.questBadgeScale.Scale = 1.18

			TweenService:Create(
				refs.questBadgeScale,
				TweenInfo.new(
					0.18,
					Enum.EasingStyle.Back,
					Enum.EasingDirection.Out
				),
				{ Scale = 1 }
			):Play()
		end
	end

	function refs.clearQuestBadge()
		refs.updateQuestBadgeCount(0)
	end

	-- Run once more after all three original buttons exist.
	-- The fourth Daily Reward button is added later by the other script.
	task.defer(forceTopButtonsLayout)
end

return TopButtonsHud

local XPBarHud = {}

-- 텍스트 전체 위치와 크기
-- X가 작아지면 왼쪽, 커지면 오른쪽
-- Y가 작아지면 위, 커지면 아래
local XP_TEXT_POSITION = UDim2.fromScale(0.1, 0.9)
local XP_TEXT_SIZE = UDim2.new(0, 380, 0, 54)

-- 텍스트 스타일
local TEXT_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
local OUTLINE_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
local OUTLINE_THICKNESS = 3
local MIN_TEXT_SIZE = 18
local MAX_TEXT_SIZE = 30

function XPBarHud.create(deps, refs, formatNumber, maxLevel)
	local screenGui = deps.screenGui

	-- 배경 없는 투명 컨테이너
	local xpContainer = Instance.new("Frame")
	xpContainer.Name = "FishingXPText"
	xpContainer.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	xpContainer.Position = XP_TEXT_POSITION
	xpContainer.Size = XP_TEXT_SIZE
	xpContainer.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	xpContainer.BorderSizePixel = 0
	xpContainer.Visible = true
	xpContainer.ZIndex = 1000
	xpContainer.Parent = screenGui

	-- 실제로 보이는 단일 텍스트
	local combinedText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	combinedText.Name = "XPCombinedText"
	combinedText.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	combinedText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	combinedText.BorderSizePixel = 0
	combinedText.Text = "Level: 1 [0/40]"
	combinedText.TextColor3 = TEXT_COLOR
	combinedText.TextScaled = true
	combinedText.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
	combinedText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	combinedText.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	combinedText.TextStrokeColor3 = OUTLINE_COLOR
	combinedText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	combinedText.ZIndex = 1001
	combinedText.Parent = xpContainer

	local textStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
	textStroke.Name = "XPTextOutline"
	textStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Contextual
	textStroke.Color = OUTLINE_COLOR
	textStroke.Thickness = OUTLINE_THICKNESS
	textStroke.Transparency = 0
	textStroke.Parent = combinedText

	local textConstraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
	textConstraint.MinTextSize = MIN_TEXT_SIZE
	textConstraint.MaxTextSize = MAX_TEXT_SIZE
	textConstraint.Parent = combinedText

	-- 기존 코드와의 호환성을 위한 refs
	refs.xpLevelText = combinedText

	refs.xpProgressText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	refs.xpProgressText.Name = "LegacyXPProgressText"
	refs.xpProgressText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	refs.xpProgressText.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
	refs.xpProgressText.Visible = false
	refs.xpProgressText.Parent = xpContainer

	refs.xpFill = Instance.new("Frame")
	refs.xpFill.Name = "LegacyXPFill"
	refs.xpFill.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	refs.xpFill.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
	refs.xpFill.Visible = false
	refs.xpFill.Parent = xpContainer

	function refs.updateXP(data)
		if not data then
			combinedText.Text = "Level: 1 [0/40]"
			refs.xpProgressText.Text = "0 / 40 XP"
			return
		end

		local level = math.clamp(
			math.floor(tonumber(data.Level) or 1),
			1,
			maxLevel
		)

		local progressXP = math.max(
			0,
			math.floor(tonumber(data.LevelProgressXP) or 0)
		)

		local nextXP = math.max(
			0,
			math.floor(tonumber(data.NextLevelXP) or 0)
		)

		local isMax = level >= maxLevel or nextXP <= 0

		if isMax then
			combinedText.Text = string.format("Level: %d [MAX]", level)
			refs.xpProgressText.Text = "MAX"
		else
			combinedText.Text = string.format(
				"Level: %d [%s/%s]",
				level,
				formatNumber(progressXP),
				formatNumber(nextXP)
			)

			refs.xpProgressText.Text = string.format(
				"%s / %s XP",
				formatNumber(progressXP),
				formatNumber(nextXP)
			)
		end
	end

	-- 외부에서 위치/크기를 조정할 때 사용할 수 있는 ref
	refs.xpBarFrame = xpContainer
	refs.xpText = combinedText
end

return XPBarHud

local IslandState = {}

function IslandState.create(deps)
	local GameConfig = deps.GameConfig
	local getState = deps.getState
	local helpers = {}

	function helpers.normalizeIslandId(areaId)
		if areaId == "Home" or areaId == "AquariumArea" then
			return "AquariumHub"
		elseif areaId == "Lobby" or areaId == "SeasideIsland" then
			return areaId
		end

		local legacyMap = GameConfig.LegacyBiomeIdToIslandId or {}
		if legacyMap[areaId] then
			return legacyMap[areaId]
		elseif GameConfig.normalizeIslandId then
			return GameConfig.normalizeIslandId(areaId) or areaId
		end

		if areaId == "BeginnerPond" then
			return "LilyshoreIsland"
		elseif areaId == "River" then
			return "RiverbendIsland"
		elseif areaId == "Ocean" then
			return "CoralCoastIsland"
		end

		return areaId
	end

	function helpers.getUnlockedIslands()
		local state = getState()
		return (state and (state.UnlockedIslands or state.UnlockedBiomes)) or {}
	end

	function helpers.getCurrentIslandId()
		local state = getState()
		return helpers.normalizeIslandId(state and (state.CurrentIsland or state.CurrentBiome))
	end

	function helpers.getActualIslandId()
		local state = getState()
		return helpers.normalizeIslandId(state and (state.ActualIsland or state.ActualBiome))
	end

	return helpers
end

return IslandState

local LegacyRightUiCleanup = {}

local LEGACY_RIGHT_UI_NAMES = {
	RightSideUI = true,
	RightPanel = true,
	Sidebar = true,
	MainMenu = true,
	MenuPanel = true,
}

function LegacyRightUiCleanup.create(deps)
	local scriptFullName = deps.scriptFullName
	local oldRightUiDisabledPrinted = false
	local cleanup = {}

	function cleanup.printOldRightUiDisabled()
		if not oldRightUiDisabledPrinted then
			print("Old right UI disabled")
			oldRightUiDisabledPrinted = true
		end
	end

	function cleanup.findLegacyRightUiContainer(gui)
		local oldMainPanel = gui:FindFirstChild("MainPanel", true)
		if oldMainPanel and oldMainPanel:FindFirstChild("Tabs", true) then
			return oldMainPanel
		end

		for _, descendant in ipairs(gui:GetDescendants()) do
			if LEGACY_RIGHT_UI_NAMES[descendant.Name] and descendant:IsA("GuiObject") then
				return descendant
			end
		end

		return nil
	end

	function cleanup.isLegacyRightUi(gui)
		return gui:IsA("ScreenGui") and cleanup.findLegacyRightUiContainer(gui) ~= nil
	end

	function cleanup.disableLegacyRightUi(gui)
		if not cleanup.isLegacyRightUi(gui) then
			return
		end

		local legacyRightUi = cleanup.findLegacyRightUiContainer(gui)
		if not legacyRightUi then
			return
		end

		print("ACTIVE OLD RIGHT UI SCRIPT FOUND:", scriptFullName)
		pcall(function()
			legacyRightUi.Visible = false
		end)
		legacyRightUi:Destroy()
		cleanup.printOldRightUiDisabled()
	end

	function cleanup.removeLegacyAquariumViewerTool(instance)
		if instance:IsA("Tool") and instance.Name == "Aquarium Viewer" then
			instance:Destroy()
		end
	end

	function cleanup.watchLegacyAquariumViewerTools(container)
		if not container then
			return
		end

		for _, child in ipairs(container:GetChildren()) do
			cleanup.removeLegacyAquariumViewerTool(child)
		end

		container.ChildAdded:Connect(cleanup.removeLegacyAquariumViewerTool)
	end

	return cleanup
end

return LegacyRightUiCleanup

local PanelMarkers = {}

function PanelMarkers.setup(screenGui)
	local openPanelEvent = screenGui:FindFirstChild("OpenFishingPanel")
	if not openPanelEvent then
		openPanelEvent = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
		openPanelEvent.Name = "OpenFishingPanel"
		openPanelEvent.Parent = screenGui
	end

	local panelsFolder = screenGui:FindFirstChild("Panels")
	if not panelsFolder then
		panelsFolder = Instance.new("Folder")
		panelsFolder.Name = "Panels"
		panelsFolder.Parent = screenGui
	end

	local function ensurePanelMarker(panelName)
		local panel = panelsFolder:FindFirstChild(panelName)
		if not panel then
			panel = Instance.new("Frame")
			panel.Name = panelName
			panel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			panel.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
			panel.Visible = false
			panel.Parent = panelsFolder
		end

		return panel
	end

	ensurePanelMarker("BagPanel")
	ensurePanelMarker("FishdexPanel")

	return {
		openPanelEvent = openPanelEvent,
		panelsFolder = panelsFolder,
		ensurePanelMarker = ensurePanelMarker,
	}
end

return PanelMarkers

local PlayerGuiDebug = {}

local function getGuiVisibleState(instance)
	if instance:IsA("ScreenGui") then
		return instance.Enabled
	elseif instance:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return instance.Visible
	end

	return "n/a"
end

function PlayerGuiDebug.create(deps)
	local playerGui = deps.playerGui
	local screenGui = deps.screenGui

	local debugTools = {}

	function debugTools.printPlayerGuiChildren()
		for _, child in ipairs(playerGui:GetChildren()) do
			print("PlayerGui child:", child.Name, child.ClassName, getGuiVisibleState(child))
		end
	end

	function debugTools.printFishingGuiChildren()
		for _, child in ipairs(screenGui:GetChildren()) do
			print("FishingGui child:", child.Name, child.ClassName, getGuiVisibleState(child))
		end

		for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant.Name == "CoinsHud"
				or descendant.Name == "FishingXPBar"
				or descendant.Name == "TopButtonsFrame"
				or descendant.Name == "SettingsButton"
				or descendant.Name == "QuestsButton"
				or descendant.Name == "ShopButton"
				or descendant.Name == "AutoFishButton"
				or descendant.Name == "TapButton"
			then
				print("FishingGui HUD descendant:", descendant.Name, descendant.ClassName, getGuiVisibleState(descendant))
			end
		end
	end

	function debugTools.printPlayerGuiScreenGuis(context)
		local names = {}
		for _, child in ipairs(playerGui:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("ScreenGui") then
				table.insert(names, child.Name .. " [" .. child:GetFullName() .. "]")
			end
		end
		table.sort(names)
		print("PlayerGui ScreenGui children after spawn:", context, #names > 0 and table.concat(names, ", ") or "(none)")
	end

	return debugTools
end

return PlayerGuiDebug

local QuestHelpers = {}

function QuestHelpers.create(deps)
	local GameConfig = deps.GameConfig
	local getState = deps.getState
	local helpers = {}

	function helpers.formatQuestReward(reward)
		local parts = {}
		reward = type(reward) == "table" and reward or {}

		if (tonumber(reward.coins) or 0) > 0 then
			table.insert(parts, tostring(reward.coins) .. " Coins")
		end
		if (tonumber(reward.xp) or 0) > 0 then
			table.insert(parts, tostring(reward.xp) .. " Fishing XP")
		end
		if type(reward.bait) == "table" then
			for _, baitId in ipairs(GameConfig.BaitOrder) do
				local amount = tonumber(reward.bait[baitId]) or 0
				if amount > 0 then
					local bait = GameConfig.Baits[baitId]
					table.insert(parts, tostring(amount) .. " " .. (bait and bait.displayName or baitId))
				end
			end
		end
		if type(reward.decorations) == "table" then
			for _, amount in pairs(reward.decorations) do
				amount = tonumber(amount) or 0
				if amount > 0 then
					table.insert(parts, amount > 1 and (tostring(amount) .. " Aquarium Decorations") or "Aquarium Decoration")
				end
			end
		end

		if #parts == 0 then
			return "Reward ready"
		end

		return table.concat(parts, " | ")
	end

	function helpers.getQuestPeriod(periodName)
		local state = getState()
		local quests = state and state.Quests
		return quests and quests[periodName] or nil
	end

	return helpers
end

return QuestHelpers

local function makeText(parent, name, text, textSize, color, font)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = name
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.BorderSizePixel = 0
	label.Font = font or Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	label.Text = text or ""
	label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	label.TextSize = textSize or 24
	label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.25
	label.ZIndex = 205
	label.Parent = parent
	return label
end

local function addCorner(guiObject, radius)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius)
	corner.Parent = guiObject
	return corner
end

local function makeArtwork(parent, imageId, zIndex, crop)
	local artwork = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	artwork.Name = "Artwork"
	artwork.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	artwork.BorderSizePixel = 0
	artwork.Image = imageId
	artwork.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	artwork.ZIndex = zIndex or 200
	artwork.Parent = parent

	if crop then
		-- Crop by normalized layout. Each asset can provide its real source
		-- canvas size, so tab/scrollbar images are not clipped with the old
		-- 1187 x 1326 coordinates.
		local canvas = crop.canvas or DEFAULT_SOURCE_CANVAS_SIZE
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(
			-crop.offset.X / crop.size.X,
			-crop.offset.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(
			canvas.X / crop.size.X,
			canvas.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
	else
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	end

	return artwork
end

local function applyArtworkCrop(artwork, imageId, crop)
	if not artwork then
		return
	end

	artwork.Image = imageId
	artwork.ImageColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	artwork.ImageTransparency = 0
	artwork.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

	if crop then
		local canvas = crop.canvas or DEFAULT_SOURCE_CANVAS_SIZE
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(
			-crop.offset.X / crop.size.X,
			-crop.offset.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(
			canvas.X / crop.size.X,
			canvas.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
	else
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	end
end

local function getArtwork(guiObject)
	if not guiObject then
		return nil
	end

	if guiObject:IsA("ImageLabel") or guiObject:IsA("ImageButton") then
		return guiObject
	end

	return guiObject:FindFirstChild("Artwork")
end

local function setArtworkColor(guiObject, color)
	local artwork = getArtwork(guiObject)
	if artwork then
		artwork.ImageColor3 = color
	end
end

local function setArtworkTransparency(guiObject, transparency)
	local artwork = getArtwork(guiObject)
	if artwork then
		artwork.ImageTransparency = transparency
	end
end

local function makeImage(parent, name, imageId, position, size, zIndex, crop)
	local holder = Instance.new("Frame")
	holder.Name = name
	holder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	holder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	holder.Position = position
	holder.Size = size
	holder.ClipsDescendants = crop ~= nil
	holder.ZIndex = zIndex or 200
	holder.Parent = parent

	makeArtwork(holder, imageId, zIndex or 200, crop)
	return holder
end

	button.Position = position
	button.Size = size
	button.Image = ""
	button.AutoButtonColor = false

	return button
end
