local function addPressFeedback(button)
	local originalSize = button.Size
	local originalPosition = button.Position
	local artwork = getArtwork(button)

	local pressedSize = UDim2.new(
		originalSize.X.Scale,
		originalSize.X.Offset - 6,
		originalSize.Y.Scale,
		originalSize.Y.Offset - 6
	)

	local pressedPosition = UDim2.new(
		originalPosition.X.Scale,
		originalPosition.X.Offset + 3,
		originalPosition.Y.Scale,
		originalPosition.Y.Offset + 3
	)

	local currentButtonTween
	local currentArtworkTween

	local function tweenTo(pressed)
		if currentButtonTween then
			currentButtonTween:Cancel()
		end
		if currentArtworkTween then
			currentArtworkTween:Cancel()
		end

		currentButtonTween = TweenService:Create(
			button,
			TweenInfo.new(0.07, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
			{
				Size = pressed and pressedSize or originalSize,
				Position = pressed and pressedPosition or originalPosition,
			}
		)
		currentButtonTween:Play()

		if artwork then
			currentArtworkTween = TweenService:Create(
				artwork,
				TweenInfo.new(0.07, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
				{
					ImageTransparency = pressed and 0.16 or 0,
				}
			)
			currentArtworkTween:Play()
		end
	end

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			tweenTo(true)
		end
	end)

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			tweenTo(false)
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		tweenTo(false)
	end)
end

local function getUtcNowTable(now)
	return os.date("!*t", now or DateTime.now().UnixTimestamp)
end

local function getNextResetTimestamp(periodName, now)
	now = now or DateTime.now().UnixTimestamp
	local utc = getUtcNowTable(now)

	if periodName == "Daily" then
		local startOfToday = DateTime.fromUniversalTime(
			utc.year,
			utc.month,
			utc.day,
			0,
			0,
			0
		).UnixTimestamp

		return startOfToday + 86400
	end

	if periodName == "Weekly" then
		local startOfToday = DateTime.fromUniversalTime(
			utc.year,
			utc.month,
			utc.day,
			0,
			0,
			0
		).UnixTimestamp

		-- os.date wday: Sunday = 1, Monday = 2.
		local daysUntilMonday = (9 - utc.wday) % 7
		if daysUntilMonday == 0 then
			daysUntilMonday = 7
		end

		return startOfToday + (daysUntilMonday * 86400)
	end

	local nextYear = utc.year
	local nextMonth = utc.month + 1
	if nextMonth > 12 then
		nextMonth = 1
		nextYear += 1
	end

	return DateTime.fromUniversalTime(
		nextYear,
		nextMonth,
		1,
		0,
		0,
		0
	).UnixTimestamp
end

local function formatRemainingTime(totalSeconds)
	totalSeconds = math.max(0, math.floor(totalSeconds))

	local days = math.floor(totalSeconds / 86400)
	local hours = math.floor((totalSeconds % 86400) / 3600)
	local minutes = math.floor((totalSeconds % 3600) / 60)
	local seconds = totalSeconds % 60

	if days > 0 then
		return string.format("%dd %02dh %02dm %02ds", days, hours, minutes, seconds)
	end

	return string.format("%02dh %02dm %02ds", hours, minutes, seconds)
end

local function getObjectiveIconKey(quest, index)
	-- Keep the first four quest-card icons in the exact visual order:
	-- 1 = blue fish, 2 = red fish, 3 = fishing rod, 4 = treasure chest.
	if index == 1 then
		return "QuestIcon1"
	elseif index == 2 then
		return "QuestIcon2"
	elseif index == 3 then
		return "QuestIcon3"
	elseif index == 4 then
		return "QuestIcon4"
	end

	-- For any additional quests, fall back to objective-based icons.
	local objectiveType = quest and quest.objectiveType

	if objectiveType == "catch_any"
		or objectiveType == "discover_biome_species" then
		return "QuestIcon1"
	end

	if objectiveType == "catch_specific_fish"
		or objectiveType == "catch_rarity" then
		return "QuestIcon2"
	end

	if objectiveType == "perfect_cast" then
		return "QuestIcon3"
	end

	if objectiveType == "login"
		or objectiveType == "daily_login"
		or objectiveType == "play_session" then
		return "QuestIcon4"
	end

	local fallback = ((index - 1) % 4) + 1
	return "QuestIcon" .. tostring(fallback)
end

local function getQuestTable(state)
	if type(state) ~= "table" then
		return nil
	end

	return state.Quests or state.QuestState
end

local function textLooksQuestRelated(text)
	if type(text) ~= "string" then
		return false
	end

	local lower = string.lower(text)
	return lower:find("daily quests", 1, true) ~= nil
		or lower == "daily"
		or lower == "weekly"
		or lower == "monthly"
		or lower:find("resets automatically", 1, true) ~= nil
		or lower:find("complete", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function looksLikeLegacyQuestUi(guiObject, modernRoot)
	if not guiObject or guiObject == modernRoot then
		return false
	end

	if guiObject:IsDescendantOf(modernRoot) then
		return false
	end

	local lowerName = string.lower(guiObject.Name or "")
	if lowerName:find("quest", 1, true) then
		return true
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(guiObject:GetDescendants()) do
		local descendantName = string.lower(descendant.Name or "")
		if descendantName:find("quest", 1, true) then
			return true
		end

		if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") or descendant:IsA("TextButton") then
			if textLooksQuestRelated(descendant.Text) then
				return true
			end
		end
	end

	return false
end

local function hideLegacyQuestUi(parentGui, modernRoot, store)
	for _, child in ipairs(parentGui:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("GuiObject") and looksLikeLegacyQuestUi(child, modernRoot) then
			-- Save the original visibility only once.
			-- The old quest panel can be rebuilt after the modern UI opens,
			-- so this function may run repeatedly while the modern UI is visible.
			if store[child] == nil then
				store[child] = child.Visible
			end

			child.Visible = false
		end
	end
end

local function restoreLegacyQuestUi(store)
	for guiObject in pairs(store) do
		if guiObject and guiObject.Parent and guiObject:IsA("GuiObject") then
			guiObject.Visible = false
		end
		store[guiObject] = nil
	end
end

function QuestModernUI.create(config)
	assert(type(config) == "table", "QuestModernUI.create requires a config table")
	assert(config.parent, "QuestModernUI.create requires config.parent")

	local player = Players.LocalPlayer
	local remotes = config.remotes
		or ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("FishingRemotes")

	local stateUpdated = remotes:WaitForChild("StateUpdated")
	local getState = remotes:WaitForChild("GetState")
	local questAction = remotes:WaitForChild("QuestAction")

	local controller = {
		activePeriod = "Daily",
		state = nil,
		claimRequests = {},
		lastResetRefreshAt = 0,
		backpackWasEnabled = false,
		hiddenLegacyQuestGuis = {},
		blurTween = nil,
		legacySuppressConnection = nil,
		legacySuppressElapsed = 0,
	}

	-- Keep the old Roblox Backpack / inventory hotbar hidden permanently.
	pcall(function()
		StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.Backpack, false)
	end)

	local questBlur = Lighting:FindFirstChild("FishyFishQuestUiBlur")
	if not questBlur then
		questBlur = Instance.new("BlurEffect")
		questBlur.Name = "FishyFishQuestUiBlur"
		questBlur.Parent = Lighting
	end

	questBlur.Enabled = false
	questBlur.Size = 0
	controller.questBlur = questBlur

	local function setQuestBlurVisible(visible)
		-- Blur is disabled for this Quest UI. Keep the BlurEffect fully off
		-- even when another part of this module calls setQuestBlurVisible(true).
		if not QUEST_BLUR_ENABLED then
			if controller.blurTween then
				controller.blurTween:Cancel()
				controller.blurTween = nil
			end

			questBlur.Size = 0
			questBlur.Enabled = false
			return
		end

		if controller.blurTween then
			controller.blurTween:Cancel()
			controller.blurTween = nil
		end

		if visible then
			questBlur.Enabled = true
			controller.blurTween = TweenService:Create(
				questBlur,
				TweenInfo.new(
					QUEST_BLUR_TWEEN_TIME,
					Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
					Enum.EasingDirection.Out
				),
				{ Size = QUEST_BLUR_SIZE }
			)
			controller.blurTween:Play()
		else
			local closingTween = TweenService:Create(
				questBlur,
				TweenInfo.new(
					QUEST_BLUR_TWEEN_TIME,
					Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
					Enum.EasingDirection.Out
				),
				{ Size = 0 }
			)

			controller.blurTween = closingTween
			closingTween.Completed:Connect(function()
				if controller.blurTween == closingTween
					and not controller.root.Visible then
					questBlur.Enabled = false
				end
			end)
			closingTween:Play()
		end
	end

	controller.setQuestBlurVisible = setQuestBlurVisible

	local overlay = Instance.new("Frame")
	overlay.Name = "ModernQuestUI"
	overlay.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	overlay.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.4)
	overlay.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(BASE_WIDTH, BASE_HEIGHT)
	overlay.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	overlay.BorderSizePixel = 0
	overlay.Visible = false
	overlay.ZIndex = 180
	overlay.Parent = config.parent
	controller.root = overlay

	local function stopLegacyQuestSuppression()
		if controller.legacySuppressConnection then
			controller.legacySuppressConnection:Disconnect()
			controller.legacySuppressConnection = nil
		end
		controller.legacySuppressElapsed = 0
	end

	local function startLegacyQuestSuppression()
		stopLegacyQuestSuppression()

		-- Hide once immediately.
		hideLegacyQuestUi(
			config.parent,
			controller.root,
			controller.hiddenLegacyQuestGuis
		)

		-- FishingClient can rebuild the old quest panel after the modern UI
		-- has already opened. Keep suppressing it while this UI is visible.
		controller.legacySuppressConnection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
			controller.legacySuppressElapsed += deltaTime
			if controller.legacySuppressElapsed < 0.08 then
				return
			end
			controller.legacySuppressElapsed = 0

			hideLegacyQuestUi(
				config.parent,
				controller.root,
				controller.hiddenLegacyQuestGuis
			)
		end)
	end

	controller.startLegacyQuestSuppression = startLegacyQuestSuppression
	controller.stopLegacyQuestSuppression = stopLegacyQuestSuppression
	startLegacyQuestSuppression()

	local scale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	scale.Name = "ResponsiveScale"
	scale.Parent = overlay
	controller.scale = scale

	local function updateResponsiveScale()
		local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
		local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)

		local fit = math.min(
			(viewport.X * 0.97) / BASE_WIDTH,
			(viewport.Y * 0.94) / BASE_HEIGHT
		)

		scale.Scale = math.clamp(
			fit * QUEST_UI_SIZE_MULTIPLIER,
			0.26,
			1
		)
	end

	updateResponsiveScale()

	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	if camera then
		controller.viewportConnection = camera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ViewportSize"):Connect(updateResponsiveScale)
	end

	local background = makeImage(
		overlay,
		"MainWindow",
		ASSETS.MainWindow,
		UDim2.fromOffset(WINDOW_X, WINDOW_Y),
		UDim2.fromOffset(BASE_WIDTH, BASE_HEIGHT),
		181
	)
	controller.background = background

	-- Tabs
	-- The actual selected/unselected images are created here in QuestModernUI.
	-- QuestModernClient no longer paints any rectangles over these buttons.
	local function assetTabIcon(parent, periodName)

	local function updateScrollbar()
		local contentHeight = math.max(
			listLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y,
			list.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y
		)
		local viewportHeight = math.max(1, list.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y)

		if contentHeight <= viewportHeight + 1 then
			scrollbarThumb.Visible = false
			setArtworkTransparency(scrollbarTrack, 0.45)
			return
		end

		scrollbarThumb.Visible = true
		setArtworkTransparency(scrollbarTrack, 0)

		local trackHeight = scrollbarTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y
		if trackHeight <= 0 then
			return
		end

		local ratio = math.clamp(viewportHeight / contentHeight, 0.08, 1)
		local thumbHeight = math.max(48, math.floor(trackHeight * ratio))
		local maxThumbTravel = math.max(0, trackHeight - thumbHeight)

		local maxCanvasY = math.max(1, contentHeight - viewportHeight)
		local scrollRatio = math.clamp(list.CanvasPosition.Y / maxCanvasY, 0, 1)
		local thumbY = math.floor(maxThumbTravel * scrollRatio)

		scrollbarThumb.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
			1146,
			LIST_Y + thumbY
		)
		scrollbarThumb.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(14, thumbHeight)
	end

	controller.updateScrollbar = updateScrollbar

	local function getMaxCanvasY()
		return math.max(
			0,
			list.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y - list.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y
		)
	end

	local function setCanvasY(newY)
		list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(
			0,
			math.clamp(newY, 0, getMaxCanvasY())
		)
	end

	local function updateCanvasForQuestCount(questCount)
		questCount = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(questCount) or 0))

		local contentHeight = 0
		if questCount > 0 then
			contentHeight = (questCount * CARD_HEIGHT)
				+ ((questCount - 1) * CARD_GAP)
				+ QUEST_SCROLL_BOTTOM_PADDING
		end

		list.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(0, contentHeight)
		task.defer(updateScrollbar)
	end

	controller.updateCanvasForQuestCount = updateCanvasForQuestCount

	listLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(function()
		task.defer(updateScrollbar)
	end)

	list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(updateScrollbar)
	list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteWindowSize"):Connect(updateScrollbar)

	-- Mouse wheel: the transparent catcher guarantees the event is received
	-- even when the cursor is over a quest card.
	local wheelDirectionMultiplier = nil

	scrollInputCatcher.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel then
			return
		end

		local delta = tonumber(input.Position.Z) or 0
		if delta == 0 then
			return
		end

		-- macOS natural scrolling can reverse the wheel sign.
		-- On the first wheel event at the top, assume the player is trying
		-- to move down and remember the correct direction for this session.
		if wheelDirectionMultiplier == nil then
			if list.CanvasPosition.Y <= 1 then
				wheelDirectionMultiplier = delta > 0 and 1 or -1
			else
				wheelDirectionMultiplier = -1
			end
		end

		setCanvasY(
			list.CanvasPosition.Y
				+ (delta * wheelDirectionMultiplier * QUEST_SCROLL_WHEEL_STEP)
		)
	end)

	-- Click/touch and drag anywhere inside the quest list.
	local activeListInput = nil
	local listDragStartY = 0
	local listDragStartCanvasY = 0

	scrollInputCatcher.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			activeListInput = input
			listDragStartY = input.Position.Y
			listDragStartCanvasY = list.CanvasPosition.Y
		end
	end)

	controller.listDragChangedConnection = UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
		if not activeListInput then
			return
		end

		local currentY = nil

		if activeListInput.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			if input ~= activeListInput then
				return
			end
			currentY = input.Position.Y
		elseif input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
			currentY = input.Position.Y
		end

		if currentY == nil then
			return
		end

		setCanvasY(
			listDragStartCanvasY
			- (currentY - listDragStartY)
		)
	end)

	controller.listDragEndedConnection = UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input == activeListInput
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
			activeListInput = nil
		end
	end)

	-- Drag the blue scrollbar thumb.
	local activeThumbInput = nil
	local thumbDragStartY = 0
	local thumbDragStartCanvasY = 0

	scrollbarThumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			activeThumbInput = input
			thumbDragStartY = input.Position.Y
			thumbDragStartCanvasY = list.CanvasPosition.Y
		end
	end)

	controller.thumbDragChangedConnection = UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
		if not activeThumbInput then
			return
		end

		local currentY = nil

		if activeThumbInput.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			if input ~= activeThumbInput then
				return
			end
			currentY = input.Position.Y
		elseif input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
			currentY = input.Position.Y
		end

		if currentY == nil then
			return
		end

		local trackHeight = math.max(1, scrollbarTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y)
		local thumbHeight = math.max(1, scrollbarThumb.AbsoluteSize.Y)
		local maxThumbTravel = math.max(1, trackHeight - thumbHeight)

		setCanvasY(
			thumbDragStartCanvasY
				+ (
					(currentY - thumbDragStartY)
					/ maxThumbTravel
					* getMaxCanvasY()
				)
		)
	end)

	controller.thumbDragEndedConnection = UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input == activeThumbInput
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
			activeThumbInput = nil
		end
	end)

	-- Clicking the scrollbar track jumps directly to that part of the list.
	scrollbarTrack.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			return
		end

		local localY = input.Position.Y - scrollbarTrack.AbsolutePosition.Y
		local ratio = math.clamp(
			localY / math.max(1, scrollbarTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y),
			0,
			1
		)

		setCanvasY(getMaxCanvasY() * ratio)
	end)

	local function refreshStateFromServer()
		local success, result = pcall(function()
			return getState:InvokeServer()
		end)

		if success and type(result) == "table" then
			controller.state = result
			controller:Render()
		end
	end

	controller.refreshStateFromServer = refreshStateFromServer

	function controller:SetState(newState)
		self.state = newState

		if self.root.Visible then
			self:Render()
		end
	end

	function controller:GetPeriod()
		local questTable = getQuestTable(self.state)
		return questTable and questTable[self.activePeriod] or nil
	end

	function controller:UpdateTabs()
		for _, periodName in ipairs(PERIODS) do
			local selected = periodName == self.activePeriod
			local artwork = self.tabArtworks[periodName]
			local visualHolder = self.tabVisualHolders[periodName]
			local label = self.tabLabels[periodName]

			visualHolder.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
			visualHolder.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
			applyArtworkCrop(
				artwork,
				selected and ASSETS.TabSelected or ASSETS.TabNormal,
				nil
			)
			artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
			artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
			artwork.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch

			label.TextColor3 = selected
				and Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
				or Color3.fromRGB(225, 225, 228)
			label.TextStrokeTransparency = selected and 0.08 or 0.28
		end
	end

	function controller:UpdateHeader()
		local period = self:GetPeriod()
		local quests = period and period.quests or {}

		local completedCount = 0
		for _, quest in ipairs(quests) do
			if quest.completed == true
				or (tonumber(quest.progress) or 0) >= math.max(1, tonumber(quest.target) or 1) then
				completedCount += 1
			end
		end

		self.headerTitle.Text = PERIOD_TITLES[self.activePeriod]
		self.completedText.Text = string.format(
			"%d/%d complete",
			completedCount,
			#quests
		)
	end

	function controller:UpdateTimer()
		local now = DateTime.now().UnixTimestamp
		local resetAt = getNextResetTimestamp(self.activePeriod, now)
		local remaining = resetAt - now

		self.timerText.Text = formatRemainingTime(remaining)

		if remaining <= 0 and os.clock() - self.lastResetRefreshAt > 2 then
			self.lastResetRefreshAt = os.clock()
			task.defer(refreshStateFromServer)
		end
	end

	function controller:ClearCards()
		for _, child in ipairs(self.list:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("GuiObject") then
				child:Destroy()
			end
		end
	end

	function controller:MakeQuestCard(quest, index, period)
		local card = makeImage(
			self.list,
			"QuestCard_" .. tostring(quest.id or index),
			ASSETS.QuestCard,
			UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0),
			UDim2.fromOffset(LIST_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT),
			200,
			CROPS.QuestCard
		)
		card.LayoutOrder = index

		local iconKey = getObjectiveIconKey(quest, index)
		local icon = makeImage(
			card,
			"QuestIcon",
			ASSETS[iconKey],
			UDim2.fromOffset(24, 26),
			UDim2.fromOffset(166, 166),
			203,
			CROPS[iconKey]
		)

		local title = makeText(
			card,
			"QuestTitle",
			quest.title or "Quest",
			38,
			Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		)
		title.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(220, 24)
		title.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(535, 52)
		title.TextTruncate = Enum.TextTruncate.AtEnd
		title.ZIndex = 204

		local description = makeText(
			card,
			"QuestDescription",
			quest.description or "",
			25,
			Color3.fromRGB(78, 205, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamBold
		)
		description.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(220, 74)
		description.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(535, 52)
		description.TextWrapped = true
		description.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.4
		description.ZIndex = 204

		local target = math.max(1, math.floor(tonumber(quest.target) or 1))
		local progress = math.clamp(
			math.floor(tonumber(quest.progress) or 0),
			0,
			target
		)
		local complete = quest.completed == true or progress >= target

		local track = makeImage(
			card,
			"ProgressTrack",
			ASSETS.ProgressTrack,
			UDim2.fromOffset(220, 145),
			UDim2.fromOffset(516, 52),
			203
		)
		track.ClipsDescendants = true

		local fillHolder = Instance.new("Frame")
		fillHolder.Name = "FillHolder"
		fillHolder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		fillHolder.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(4, 4)
		fillHolder.Size = UDim2.new(1, -8, 1, -8)
		fillHolder.ClipsDescendants = true
		fillHolder.ZIndex = 204
		fillHolder.Parent = track
		addCorner(fillHolder, 20)

		local ratio = math.clamp(progress / target, 0, 1)

		if complete then
			local greenFill = makeImage(
				fillHolder,
				"GreenFill",
				ASSETS.ProgressGreenFill,
				UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0),
				UDim2.fromScale(1, 1),
				204
			)
		else
			local blueFill = Instance.new("Frame")
			blueFill.Name = "BlueFill"
			blueFill.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 139, 255)
			blueFill.BorderSizePixel = 0
			blueFill.Size = UDim2.new(ratio, 0, 1, 0)
			blueFill.ZIndex = 204
			blueFill.Parent = fillHolder
			addCorner(blueFill, 20)

			local gradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
			gradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
				ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, Color3.fromRGB(0, 221, 255)),
				ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, Color3.fromRGB(0, 106, 255)),
			})
			gradient.Rotation = 90
			gradient.Parent = blueFill
		end

		local progressText = makeText(
			track,
			"ProgressText",
			string.format("%d/%d", progress, target),
			31,
			Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		)
		progressText.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		progressText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		progressText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
		progressText.ZIndex = 206

		local statusImage = complete and ASSETS.StatusGreen or ASSETS.StatusBlue
		local status = makeImage(
			card,
			"StatusBadge",
			statusImage,
			UDim2.fromOffset(785, 24),
			UDim2.fromOffset(261, 62),
			203
		)

		local statusLabel = makeText(
			status,
			"StatusText",
			complete and "✓  Completed" or "In Progress",
			28,
			complete
				and Color3.fromRGB(85, 255, 35)
				or Color3.fromRGB(0, 224, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamBold
		)
		statusLabel.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		statusLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		statusLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.15
		statusLabel.ZIndex = 205

		local rewardsLabel = makeText(
			card,
			"RewardsLabel",
			"Rewards",
			25,
			Color3.fromRGB(72, 210, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamBold
		)
		rewardsLabel.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(785, 96)
		rewardsLabel.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(250, 34)
		rewardsLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.35
		rewardsLabel.ZIndex = 204

		local reward = quest.reward or {}
		self:MakeRewardBox(
			card,
			785,
			"MoneyIcon",
			reward.coins or 0,
			nil
		)
		self:MakeRewardBox(
			card,
			925,
			"XPIcon",
			reward.xp or 0,
			"XP"
		)

		if complete
			and not quest.claimed
			and AUTO_CLAIM_COMPLETED_QUESTS then
			local periodKey = period and period.periodKey or "unknown"
			local claimKey = table.concat({
				self.activePeriod,
				tostring(periodKey),
				tostring(quest.id),
			}, ":")

			if not self.claimRequests[claimKey] then
				self.claimRequests[claimKey] = true

				task.delay(0.25, function()
					questAction:FireServer(
						"Claim",
						self.activePeriod,
						quest.id
					)
				end)

				task.delay(5, function()
					self.claimRequests[claimKey] = nil
				end)
			end
		end

		return card
	end

	function controller:RenderCards()
		self:ClearCards()

		local period = self:GetPeriod()
		local quests = period and period.quests or {}

		if #quests == 0 then
			local empty = makeText(
				self.list,
				"EmptyText",
				"Loading quests...",
				34,
				Color3.fromRGB(220, 235, 255)
			)
			empty.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(LIST_WIDTH, 100)
			empty.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
			empty.LayoutOrder = 1
			self.updateCanvasForQuestCount(1)
			return
		end

		for index, quest in ipairs(quests) do
			self:MakeQuestCard(quest, index, period)
		end

		self.updateCanvasForQuestCount(#quests)
	end

	function controller:Render()
		if not self.root.Parent then
			return
		end

		self:UpdateTabs()
		self:UpdateHeader()
		self:UpdateTimer()
		self:RenderCards()
	end

	function controller:SetVisible(visible)
		visible = visible == true
		self.root.Visible = visible
		self.setQuestBlurVisible(visible)

		-- The game's custom hotbar is used instead of Roblox's default Backpack UI.
		-- Keep CoreGui Backpack disabled both while opening and closing Quest UI.
		pcall(function()
			StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.Backpack, false)
		end)

		self.backpackWasEnabled = false

		if visible then
			self.startLegacyQuestSuppression()

			self:Render()
			task.defer(self.updateScrollbar)
		else
			restoreLegacyQuestUi(self.hiddenLegacyQuestGuis)
		end
	end

	function controller:IsVisible()
		return self.root.Visible
	end

	function controller:Destroy()
		self.stopLegacyQuestSuppression()

		if self.blurTween then
			self.blurTween:Cancel()
			self.blurTween = nil
		end

		if self.questBlur then
			self.questBlur.Size = 0
			self.questBlur.Enabled = false
		end

		-- Never restore Roblox's default Backpack UI.
		pcall(function()
			StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled(Enum.CoreGuiType.Backpack, false)
		end)
		self.backpackWasEnabled = false

		restoreLegacyQuestUi(self.hiddenLegacyQuestGuis)

		if self.stateConnection then
			self.stateConnection:Disconnect()
		end

		if self.timerConnection then
			self.timerConnection:Disconnect()
		end

		if self.viewportConnection then
			self.viewportConnection:Disconnect()
		end

		if self.listDragChangedConnection then
			self.listDragChangedConnection:Disconnect()
		end

		if self.listDragEndedConnection then
			self.listDragEndedConnection:Disconnect()
		end

		if self.thumbDragChangedConnection then
			self.thumbDragChangedConnection:Disconnect()
		end

		if self.thumbDragEndedConnection then
			self.thumbDragEndedConnection:Disconnect()
		end

		if self.root then
			self.root:Destroy()
		end
	end

	controller.stateConnection = stateUpdated.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(newState)
		controller.state = newState

		if controller.root.Visible then
			controller:Render()
		end
	end)

	controller.timerConnection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
		if not controller.root.Visible then
			return
		end

		controller.clockRotator.Rotation = (os.clock() * 120) % 360

		local second = math.floor(os.clock())
		if controller.lastTimerSecond ~= second then
			controller.lastTimerSecond = second
			controller:UpdateTimer()
		end
	end)

	task.spawn(refreshStateFromServer)

	print("[QuestModernUI] Header/card margins rebalanced and top tabs enlarged/lowered.")

	return controller
end

return QuestModernUI

local RarityCatchController = {}

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local FishingSFX = require(ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared"):WaitForChild("FishingSFX"))

local BLUE_GAUGE_ASSET = "rbxassetid://138976342109765"
local PURPLE_GAUGE_ASSET = "rbxassetid://139485689258376"
local ORANGE_GAUGE_ASSET = "rbxassetid://127598747171041"
local RED_GAUGE_ASSET = "rbxassetid://97502541593370"

local RAGE_WARNING_DURATION = 3
local INITIAL_DRAIN_DURATION = 0.65
local STAGE_DRAIN_DURATION = 0.55

local RAGE_STAGES = {
	{
		name = "Epic",
		goal = 30,
		asset = PURPLE_GAUGE_ASSET,
		topColor = Color3.fromRGB(222, 137, 255),
		bottomColor = Color3.fromRGB(119, 52, 226),
	},
	{
		name = "Legendary",
		goal = 50,
		asset = ORANGE_GAUGE_ASSET,
		topColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 207, 92),
		bottomColor = Color3.fromRGB(235, 102, 27),
	},
	{
		name = "Mythic",
		goal = 100,
		asset = RED_GAUGE_ASSET,
		topColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 126, 116),
		bottomColor = Color3.fromRGB(218, 34, 52),
	},
}

local RARITY_STAGE_COUNTS = {
	Epic = 1,
	Legendary = 2,
	Mythic = 3,
}

local function normalizeRarity(rarity)
	if rarity == "Mythical" then
		return "Mythic"
	end

	return rarity or "Common"
end

local function isRageRarity(rarity)
	return RARITY_STAGE_COUNTS[rarity] ~= nil
end

local function setGradient(guiObject, topColor, bottomColor)
	local gradient = guiObject:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIGradient")
	if not gradient then
		gradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
		gradient.Rotation = 90
		gradient.Parent = guiObject
	end

	gradient.Color = ColorSequence.new({
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(0, topColor),
		ColorSequenceKeypoint.new(1, bottomColor),
	})
end

local function isReelInput(input)
	return input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		or input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Space
end

local function isKeyboardTapInput(input)
	return input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Space
		or input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.ButtonA
end

function RarityCatchController.start(options)
	local prompt = options.prompt or {}
	local gameConfig = options.GameConfig
	local legacyUi = options.ui
	local modernUi = options.modernUi
	local ui = legacyUi
	if modernUi then
		ui = setmetatable({
			catchButton = legacyUi.catchButton,
			timingBar = legacyUi.timingBar,
			zone = legacyUi.zone,
			marker = legacyUi.marker,
			fishingGameContent = modernUi.panel,
			catchBar = modernUi.catchBar,
			fishMarker = modernUi.fishMarker,
			progressTrack = modernUi.progressTrack,
			progressFill = modernUi.progressFill,
			minigameText = modernUi.headerText,
			minigameFishInfo = modernUi.statusText,
			minigameProgressText = modernUi.progressText,
			minigameInstruction = modernUi.instructionText,
		}, { __index = legacyUi })
	end
	local runService = options.RunService
	local inputService = options.UserInputService
	local showToast = options.showToast
	local tapButton = options.tapButton
	assert(tapButton and tapButton:IsA("GuiButton"), "RarityCatchController requires the current Tap button")
	local tapButtonIsTextButton = tapButton:IsA("TextButton")
	local tapButtonOriginalText = tapButtonIsTextButton and tapButton.Text or nil
	local tapButtonOriginalAutoButtonColor = tapButton.AutoButtonColor
	local tapButtonOriginalActive = tapButton.Active
	local tapButtonOriginalVisible = tapButton.Visible
	local tapButtonParent = tapButton.Parent
	local tapButtonParentWasVisible = tapButtonParent
		and tapButtonParent:IsA("GuiObject")
		and tapButtonParent.Visible
		or nil
	local tapButtonParentForceVisible = tapButtonParent
		and tapButtonParent:GetAttribute("ForceFishingTapVisible")
		or nil
	local tapSiblingVisibility = {}
	if tapButtonParent then
		for _, sibling in ipairs(tapButtonParent:GetChildren()) do
			if sibling ~= tapButton and sibling:IsA("GuiObject") then
				tapSiblingVisibility[sibling] = sibling.Visible
			end
		end
	end
	local fish = prompt.fish or {}
	local rarity = normalizeRarity(fish.rarity)
	local isAutoFish = prompt.autoFish == true
	local minigameConfig = prompt.minigame
		or gameConfig.getFishingMinigameConfig(rarity, options.state and options.state.EquippedRod or "WoodenRod")
	local difficulty = minigameConfig.difficulty
		or gameConfig.FishingMinigame.RarityDifficulty.Common

	-- Uncommon deliberately uses Common movement and only fills more slowly.
	if rarity == "Uncommon" then
		difficulty = gameConfig.FishingMinigame.RarityDifficulty.Common
	end

	local promptBait = prompt.bait or {}
	local promptBaitId = promptBait.id
		or (options.state and options.state.EquippedBait)
		or gameConfig.BasicBaitId
	local promptBaitData = options.getBaitData(promptBaitId)
	local promptBaitName = promptBait.name or promptBaitData.displayName
	local promptBaitText = "Bait: "
		.. promptBaitName
		.. " ("
		.. options.getBaitCountText(promptBaitId, promptBait.remaining)
		.. ")"
	local castText = prompt.cast and prompt.cast.displayName
		and ("\nCast: " .. prompt.cast.displayName)
		or ""
	if modernUi then
		modernUi.baitText.Text = string.format(
			'<font color="#38D9FF">Bait:</font> %s (%s)',
			promptBaitName,
			options.getBaitCountText(promptBaitId, promptBait.remaining)
		)
		modernUi.castText.Text = prompt.cast and prompt.cast.displayName
			and string.format('<font color="#38D9FF">Cast:</font> %s', prompt.cast.displayName)
			or '<font color="#38D9FF">Cast:</font> --'
	end

	local random = Random.new(math.floor((os.clock() * 100000) % 2147483647))
	local standardProgressBackground = ui.progressFill.BackgroundColor3
	local standardProgressGradient = ui.progressFill:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIGradient")
	local standardProgressGradientColor = standardProgressGradient and standardProgressGradient.Color or nil
	local session = {
		cancelled = false,
		finished = false,
		phase = "WAITING",
		phaseNumber = 0,
		stageCount = RARITY_STAGE_COUNTS[rarity] or 0,
		progress = math.clamp(tonumber(minigameConfig.startProgress) or 0.34, 0.08, 0.86),
		phaseProgress = 0,
		tapCount = 0,
		tapGoal = 0,
		lastTapAt = 0,
		stageCompleting = false,
		rageSequenceStarted = false,
		rareReversalTriggered = false,
		forcedReverseUntil = 0,
		forcedReverseDirection = 0,
	}
	local connections = {}

	local function setTapButtonText(text)
		if tapButtonIsTextButton then
			tapButton.Text = text
		end
	end

	local function setCurrentTapEnabled(enabled)
		setTapButtonText(enabled and "Tap" or "Fishing...")
		tapButton.AutoButtonColor = enabled
		tapButton.Active = enabled
		tapButton.Visible = enabled

		if tapButtonParent then
			for sibling in pairs(tapSiblingVisibility) do
				if sibling.Parent == tapButtonParent then
					sibling.Visible = false
				end
			end
			tapButtonParent:SetAttribute("ForceFishingTapVisible", enabled)
			if tapButtonParent:IsA("GuiObject") then
				tapButtonParent.Visible = enabled
			end
		end
	end

	local function setModernGaugeAsset(assetId)
		if modernUi and modernUi.setGaugeAsset then
			modernUi.setGaugeAsset(assetId)
		end
	end

	local function setGaugeAmount(amount)
		amount = math.clamp(tonumber(amount) or 0, 0, 1)
		if modernUi and modernUi.setProgress then
			modernUi.setProgress(amount)
		else
			ui.progressFill.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 1)
			ui.progressFill.Position = UDim2.new(0, 0, 1, 0)
			ui.progressFill.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, amount, 0)
		end
	end

	local function useStandardGauge()
		setModernGaugeAsset(BLUE_GAUGE_ASSET)
		setGaugeAmount(session.progress)
		ui.progressFill.BackgroundColor3 = standardProgressBackground

		local gradient = ui.progressFill:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIGradient")
		if standardProgressGradientColor then
			if not gradient then
				gradient = Instance.new("UIGradient")
				gradient.Rotation = 90
				gradient.Parent = ui.progressFill
			end
			gradient.Color = standardProgressGradientColor
		elseif gradient then
			gradient:Destroy()
		end
	end

	local function getCurrentStage()
		return RAGE_STAGES[session.phaseNumber]
	end

	local function usePhaseGauge()
		local stage = getCurrentStage()
		if not stage then
			return
		end

		setModernGaugeAsset(stage.asset)
		setGaugeAmount(session.phaseProgress)
		ui.progressFill.BackgroundColor3 = stage.bottomColor
		setGradient(ui.progressFill, stage.topColor, stage.bottomColor)

	end

	local function disconnectAll()
		for _, connection in ipairs(connections) do
			connection:Disconnect()
		end
		table.clear(connections)
	end

	local function setInstruction(instruction, legacyInstruction)
		ui.minigameInstruction.Text = modernUi and instruction or legacyInstruction
	end

	local function resetFishingOnlyVisuals()
		if modernUi and modernUi.restoreRagePresentation then
			modernUi.restoreRagePresentation()
		end
		if modernUi and modernUi.setFishSilhouette then
			modernUi.setFishSilhouette(false)
		end

		if tapButtonIsTextButton and tapButtonOriginalText ~= nil then
			tapButton.Text = tapButtonOriginalText
		end
		tapButton.AutoButtonColor = tapButtonOriginalAutoButtonColor
		tapButton.Active = tapButtonOriginalActive
		tapButton.Visible = tapButtonOriginalVisible
		if tapButtonParent then
			for sibling, wasVisible in pairs(tapSiblingVisibility) do
				if sibling.Parent == tapButtonParent then
					sibling.Visible = wasVisible
				end
			end
			tapButtonParent:SetAttribute("ForceFishingTapVisible", tapButtonParentForceVisible)
			if tapButtonParentWasVisible ~= nil and tapButtonParent:IsA("GuiObject") then
				tapButtonParent.Visible = tapButtonParentWasVisible
			end
		end
		-- Hide the old floating header. The black top banner owns the waiting/reel messages.
		if ui.minigameText and ui.minigameText:IsA("GuiObject") then
			ui.minigameText.Visible = false
		end

		ui.catchButton.Visible = false
		ui.catchButton.Active = false
		ui.catchBar.Visible = true
		ui.fishMarker.Visible = true
		session.progress = math.clamp(session.progress, 0, 1)
		useStandardGauge()
	end

	local function cleanup()
		if session.cancelled or session.finished then
			return
		end

		session.cancelled = true
		FishingSFX.stopReeling()
		disconnectAll()
		resetFishingOnlyVisuals()
	end

	local function finish(success)
		if session.cancelled or session.finished then
			return
		end

		session.finished = true
		FishingSFX.stopReeling()
		if success == true then
			FishingSFX.playCatchReveal(rarity, isAutoFish)
		end
		disconnectAll()
		resetFishingOnlyVisuals()
		options.onFinish(success == true, isAutoFish)
	end

	local function isSessionAlive()
		return not session.cancelled and not session.finished
	end

	local function animateGauge(fromAmount, toAmount, duration, applyAmount)
		local startedAt = os.clock()
		duration = math.max(0.01, tonumber(duration) or 0.01)

		while isSessionAlive() do
			local alpha = math.clamp((os.clock() - startedAt) / duration, 0, 1)
			local eased = 1 - ((1 - alpha) * (1 - alpha))
			local amount = fromAmount + ((toAmount - fromAmount) * eased)
			applyAmount(amount)

			if alpha >= 1 then
				return true
			end
			runService.RenderStepped:Wait()
		end

		return false
	end

	local completeTapStage

	local function beginTapPhase(phaseNumber)
		local stage = RAGE_STAGES[phaseNumber]
		if not stage or not isSessionAlive() then
			return
		end

		FishingSFX.stopReeling()
		session.phase = "TAP"
		session.phaseNumber = phaseNumber
		session.phaseProgress = 0
		session.tapCount = 0
		session.tapGoal = stage.goal
		session.lastTapAt = 0
		session.stageCompleting = false

		ui.catchBar.Visible = false
		ui.fishMarker.Visible = false
		usePhaseGauge()
		setCurrentTapEnabled(true)

		ui.minigameText.Text = string.format("%s Stage - Tap!", stage.name)
		ui.minigameProgressText.Text = string.format("Taps 0 / %d", stage.goal)
		setInstruction(
			string.format("Tap %d times to fill the gauge.", stage.goal),
			promptBaitText .. castText .. string.format("\nTap %d times to fill the gauge.", stage.goal)
		)
	end

	completeTapStage = function()
		if session.stageCompleting or session.phase ~= "TAP" then
			return
		end

		session.stageCompleting = true
		setCurrentTapEnabled(false)

		if session.phaseNumber < session.stageCount then
			local currentPhase = session.phaseNumber
			session.phase = "STAGE_DRAIN"
			task.spawn(function()
				local completed = animateGauge(1, 0, STAGE_DRAIN_DURATION, function(amount)
					session.phaseProgress = amount
					usePhaseGauge()
				end)
				if completed and isSessionAlive() then
					beginTapPhase(currentPhase + 1)
				end
			end)
		else
			session.phase = "COMPLETE"
			ui.minigameText.Text = "Caught!"
			task.delay(0.18, function()
				if isSessionAlive() then
					finish(true)
				end
			end)
		end
	end

	local function registerTap()
		if session.phase ~= "TAP" or session.cancelled or session.finished then
			return
		end

		local now = os.clock()
		if now - session.lastTapAt < 0.06 then
			return
		end
		session.lastTapAt = now
		session.tapCount = math.min(session.tapGoal, session.tapCount + 1)
		session.phaseProgress = session.tapGoal > 0
			and (session.tapCount / session.tapGoal)
			or 0
		usePhaseGauge()
		ui.minigameProgressText.Text = string.format(
			"Taps %d / %d",
			session.tapCount,
			session.tapGoal
		)

		if session.tapCount >= session.tapGoal then
			completeTapStage()
		end
	end

	local function startRageSequence()
		if not isRageRarity(rarity)
			or session.rageSequenceStarted
			or not isSessionAlive()
		then
			return
		end

		session.rageSequenceStarted = true
		session.phase = "RAGE_WARNING"
		session.holding = false
		session.progress = 1
		useStandardGauge()
		setCurrentTapEnabled(false)
		ui.catchBar.Visible = false
		ui.fishMarker.Visible = false

		if modernUi and modernUi.beginRagePresentation then
			modernUi.beginRagePresentation()
		end

		task.spawn(function()
			local warningCompleted = true
			if modernUi and modernUi.showRageWarning then
				warningCompleted = modernUi.showRageWarning(
					RAGE_WARNING_DURATION,
					isSessionAlive
				)
			else
				local warningEnd = os.clock() + RAGE_WARNING_DURATION
				while isSessionAlive() and os.clock() < warningEnd do
					task.wait(0.05)
				end
				warningCompleted = isSessionAlive()
			end

			if not warningCompleted or not isSessionAlive() then
				return
			end

			session.phase = "INITIAL_DRAIN"
			local drained = animateGauge(1, 0, INITIAL_DRAIN_DURATION, function(amount)
				session.progress = amount
				useStandardGauge()
			end)
			if not drained or not isSessionAlive() then
				return
			end

			session.phase = "GAUGE_FOCUS"
			if modernUi and modernUi.focusGauge then
				local focused = modernUi.focusGauge(isSessionAlive)
				if not focused or not isSessionAlive() then
					return
				end
			end

			-- The gauge has finished moving, enlarging, and rotating into place.
			-- Reuse FishingClient's existing black banner for a short TAP prompt.
			if type(showToast) == "function" then
				showToast("Press the Tap button!", 2)
			end

			beginTapPhase(1)
		end)
	end

	ui.catchButton.Visible = false
	ui.catchButton.Active = false
	ui.timingBar.Visible = false
	ui.zone.Visible = false
	ui.marker.Visible = false
	ui.fishingGameContent.Visible = true
	ui.catchBar.Visible = true
	ui.fishMarker.Visible = true
	options.setFishIcon(fish)
	if modernUi and modernUi.setFishSilhouette then
		modernUi.setFishSilhouette(isRageRarity(rarity))
	elseif modernUi and modernUi.fishImage then
		modernUi.fishImage.ImageColor3 = isRageRarity(rarity)
			and Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
			or Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	end
	setCurrentTapEnabled(false)
	useStandardGauge()

	ui.minigameText.Text = isAutoFish and "AutoFish is waiting for a bite..." or "Waiting for a bite..."
	ui.minigameFishInfo.Text = "Something is biting..."
	ui.minigameProgressText.Text = "Progress --"
	setInstruction(
		isAutoFish and "AutoFish is handling this catch." or "The fish is biting...",
		promptBaitText .. castText
	)
	options.forcePureWhiteText(ui.minigameText)

	table.insert(connections, tapButton.Activated:Connect(registerTap))

	-- Explicit button press/release handling for phones and tablets.
	-- UserInputService below remains as the fallback for mouse, touch, and Space.
	table.insert(connections, tapButton.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if session.phase == "REEL" and isReelInput(input) then
			session.holding = true
			FishingSFX.setReelingHolding(true)
		end
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tapButton.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if session.phase == "REEL" and isReelInput(input) then
			session.holding = false
			FishingSFX.setReelingHolding(false)
		end
	end))
	table.insert(connections, tapButton.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		if session.phase == "REEL" then
			session.holding = false
			FishingSFX.setReelingHolding(false)
		end
	end))

	table.insert(connections, inputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessedEvent)
		if gameProcessedEvent and input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
			return
		end

		if session.phase == "REEL" and isReelInput(input) then
			session.holding = true
			FishingSFX.setReelingHolding(true)
		elseif session.phase == "TAP" and isKeyboardTapInput(input) then
			registerTap()
		end
	end))
	table.insert(connections, inputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if session.phase == "REEL" and isReelInput(input) then
			session.holding = false
			FishingSFX.setReelingHolding(false)
		end
	end))

	task.delay(tonumber(prompt.biteDelay) or 0, function()
		if session.cancelled or session.finished then
			return
		end

		local barSize = math.clamp(tonumber(minigameConfig.barSize) or 0.24, 0.16, 0.58)
		local maxBarTop = 1 - barSize
		local barTop = math.clamp(0.70, 0, maxBarTop)
		local barVelocity = 0
		local fishY = random:NextNumber(0.20, 0.80)
		local fishTarget = random:NextNumber(0.15, 0.85)
		local fishVelocity = 0
		local gameStartedAt = os.clock()
		local nextDecisionAt = gameStartedAt
			+ random:NextNumber(difficulty.turnIntervalMin or 1, difficulty.turnIntervalMax or 2)
		local pauseUntil = 0
		local burstUntil = 0
		local minSuccessDuration = tonumber(minigameConfig.minSuccessDuration) or 1.75
		local gainMultiplier = rarity == "Uncommon" and 0.88 or 1

		local function chooseFishTarget(fromY, preferFarTarget)
			if preferFarTarget then
				local jumpMin = tonumber(difficulty.jumpMin) or 0.12
				local jumpMax = math.max(jumpMin, tonumber(difficulty.jumpMax) or jumpMin)
				local direction = random:NextInteger(0, 1) == 0 and -1 or 1
				local distance = random:NextNumber(jumpMin, jumpMax)
				local target = fromY + (direction * distance)

				if target < 0.08 or target > 0.92 then
					target = fromY - (direction * distance)
				end

				return math.clamp(target, 0.08, 0.92)
			end

			return random:NextNumber(0.08, 0.92)
		end

		local function getRareMovementDirection()
			local currentDirection = fishVelocity > 0.01 and 1 or (fishVelocity < -0.01 and -1 or 0)
			if currentDirection == 0 then
				currentDirection = fishTarget >= fishY and 1 or -1
			end

			return currentDirection
		end

		local function hasRoomForRareReversal()
			local reverseDirection = -getRareMovementDirection()
			local availableDistance = reverseDirection < 0 and (fishY - 0.04) or (0.96 - fishY)
			return availableDistance >= 0.12
		end

		local function triggerRareReversal(now)
			if rarity ~= "Rare" or session.rareReversalTriggered then
				return
			end

			session.rareReversalTriggered = true
			session.forcedReverseDirection = -getRareMovementDirection()
			session.forcedReverseUntil = now + 0.32
			local reverseSpeed = math.max((tonumber(difficulty.moveSpeed) or 0.25) * 2.4, 0.72)
			fishVelocity = session.forcedReverseDirection * reverseSpeed
			fishTarget = math.clamp(fishY + (session.forcedReverseDirection * 0.42), 0.06, 0.94)
			pauseUntil = 0
			burstUntil = 0
			nextDecisionAt = session.forcedReverseUntil + 0.10
		end

		FishingSFX.playBiteAlert()
		FishingSFX.startReeling(isAutoFish)
		session.phase = "REEL"
		session.holding = false

		-- The fish has actually bitten. Replace the persistent waiting banner,
		-- then automatically hide the banner after two seconds.
		if not isAutoFish and type(showToast) == "function" then
			showToast("Keep the fish inside the green bar!", 2)
		end

		-- Show the circular TAP button during the normal reel minigame.
		-- Holding it raises the green catch bar; releasing it lets the bar fall.
		-- AutoFish keeps the button hidden because no manual input is needed.
		setCurrentTapEnabled(not isAutoFish)

		ui.catchBar.Size = modernUi and UDim2.fromScale(0.82, barSize) or UDim2.new(1, -32, barSize, 0)
		ui.catchBar.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, barTop, 0)
		ui.fishMarker.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, fishY, 0)
		useStandardGauge()
		ui.minigameText.Text = isAutoFish and "AutoFish is reeling..." or "Keep the fish inside the green bar!"
		ui.minigameFishInfo.Text = string.format(
			"%s [%s]\nValue: %d | XP: %d",
			fish.name or "Fish",
			rarity,
			fish.value or 0,
			fish.xp or 0
		)
		ui.minigameProgressText.Text = string.format("Progress %d%%", math.floor(session.progress * 100 + 0.5))
		local reelInstruction = isAutoFish
			and "AutoFish is handling this catch."
			or "Hold mouse, tap, or Space to lift the green bar. Release to let it fall."
		setInstruction(reelInstruction, promptBaitText .. castText .. "\n" .. reelInstruction)
		options.forcePureWhiteText(ui.minigameText)

		table.insert(connections, runService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
			if session.cancelled or session.finished then
				return
			end

			if session.phase ~= "REEL" then
				return
			end

			local now = os.clock()
			local elapsed = now - gameStartedAt

			if now >= nextDecisionAt then
				local pauseChance = difficulty.pauseChance or 0
				local jumpChance = difficulty.jumpChance or 0
				local burstChance = difficulty.burstChance or 0

				fishTarget = chooseFishTarget(fishY, jumpChance > 0 and random:NextNumber() < jumpChance)

				if pauseChance > 0 and random:NextNumber() < pauseChance then
					pauseUntil = now + random:NextNumber(difficulty.pauseMin or 0.12, difficulty.pauseMax or 0.45)
				end

				if burstChance > 0 and random:NextNumber() < burstChance then
					burstUntil = now + random:NextNumber(difficulty.burstMin or 0.18, difficulty.burstMax or 0.38)
				end

				nextDecisionAt = now
					+ random:NextNumber(difficulty.turnIntervalMin or 1, difficulty.turnIntervalMax or 2)
			end

			local targetVelocity = 0
			if now < session.forcedReverseUntil then
				targetVelocity = session.forcedReverseDirection
					* math.max((tonumber(difficulty.moveSpeed) or 0.25) * 2.4, 0.72)
			elseif now >= pauseUntil then
				local distance = fishTarget - fishY
				local targetSlack = tonumber(difficulty.targetSlack) or 0.025
				if math.abs(distance) < targetSlack then
					fishTarget = chooseFishTarget(fishY, false)
					distance = fishTarget - fishY
				end

				local direction = distance >= 0 and 1 or -1
				local jitter = random:NextNumber(-(difficulty.jitter or 0), difficulty.jitter or 0)
				local speed = tonumber(difficulty.moveSpeed) or 0.25
				if now < burstUntil then
					speed *= tonumber(difficulty.burstMultiplier) or 1.35
				end

				targetVelocity = (direction * speed) + jitter
			end

			local fishAcceleration = tonumber(difficulty.acceleration) or 6
			local velocityBlend = math.min(1, fishAcceleration * deltaTime)
			fishVelocity += (targetVelocity - fishVelocity) * velocityBlend
			fishY += fishVelocity * deltaTime

			if fishY <= 0.04 then
				fishY = 0.04
				fishVelocity = math.abs(fishVelocity) * 0.35
				fishTarget = math.max(fishTarget, 0.16)
			elseif fishY >= 0.96 then
				fishY = 0.96
				fishVelocity = -math.abs(fishVelocity) * 0.35
				fishTarget = math.min(fishTarget, 0.84)
			end

			if isAutoFish then
				local targetTop = math.clamp(fishY - (barSize / 2), 0, maxBarTop)
				barTop += (targetTop - barTop) * math.min(1, deltaTime * 5)
				session.progress = math.clamp(
					session.progress + (minigameConfig.progressGainPerSecond or 0.34) * deltaTime,
					0,
					1
				)
			else
				local barAcceleration = session.holding
					and -(minigameConfig.lift or 2.75)
					or (minigameConfig.gravity or 1.8)
				barVelocity += barAcceleration * deltaTime
				barVelocity = math.clamp(
					barVelocity,
					-(minigameConfig.maxBarVelocity or 1.65),
					minigameConfig.maxBarVelocity or 1.65
				)
				barVelocity *= math.pow(minigameConfig.damping or 0.90, deltaTime * 60)
				barTop += barVelocity * deltaTime

				if barTop <= 0 then
					barTop = 0
					barVelocity = math.abs(barVelocity) * (minigameConfig.bounceDamping or 0.36)
				elseif barTop >= maxBarTop then
					barTop = maxBarTop
					barVelocity = -math.abs(barVelocity) * (minigameConfig.bounceDamping or 0.36)
				end

				local fishInsideBar = fishY >= barTop and fishY <= barTop + barSize
				if fishInsideBar then
					session.progress += (minigameConfig.progressGainPerSecond or 0.34)
						* gainMultiplier
						* deltaTime
				else
					session.progress -= (minigameConfig.progressDrainPerSecond or 0.16) * deltaTime
				end
				session.progress = math.clamp(session.progress, 0, 1)
				-- Progress may reach 0, but the catch never fails and there is no time limit.
			end

			if rarity == "Rare" and not session.rareReversalTriggered and session.progress >= 0.85 then
				if hasRoomForRareReversal() then
					triggerRareReversal(now)
				else
					-- Hold just below the threshold until the opposite dash has room to be visible.
					session.progress = math.min(session.progress, 0.849)
				end
			end

			if rarity == "Rare" and now < session.forcedReverseUntil and session.progress >= 1 then
				session.progress = 0.995
			end

			ui.catchBar.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, barTop, 0)
			ui.fishMarker.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, fishY, 0)
			useStandardGauge()
			ui.minigameProgressText.Text = string.format(
				"Progress %d%%",
				math.floor(session.progress * 100 + 0.5)
			)

			if isRageRarity(rarity) and session.progress >= 1 then
				startRageSequence()
			elseif isAutoFish
				and not isRageRarity(rarity)
				and elapsed >= (prompt.visualTime or 3)
			then
				ui.minigameText.Text = "AutoFish caught it!"
				finish(true)
			elseif not isAutoFish and session.progress >= 1 and elapsed >= minSuccessDuration then
				ui.minigameText.Text = "Caught!"
				finish(true)
			end
		end))
	end)

	return cleanup
end

return RarityCatchController

local RemoteActions = {}

function RemoteActions.create(deps)
	local Remotes = deps.Remotes
	local BaitAction = deps.BaitAction
	local QuestAction = deps.QuestAction
	local ShopAction = deps.ShopAction

	local actions = {}

	function actions.fireBaitAction(action, baitId)
		if not BaitAction then
			BaitAction = Remotes:FindFirstChild("BaitAction")
		end

		if BaitAction then
			BaitAction:FireServer(action, baitId)
		else
			warn("BaitAction remote was not available; bait shop actions are disabled until remotes resync.")
		end
	end

	function actions.fireQuestAction(action, periodName, questId)
		if not QuestAction then
			QuestAction = Remotes:FindFirstChild("QuestAction")
		end

		if QuestAction then
			QuestAction:FireServer(action, periodName, questId)
		else
			warn("QuestAction remote was not available; quest claiming is disabled until remotes resync.")
		end
	end

	function actions.fireShopAction(action, category, itemKey, payload)
		if not ShopAction then
			ShopAction = Remotes:FindFirstChild("ShopAction")
		end

		if ShopAction then
			ShopAction:FireServer(action, category, itemKey, payload)
		else
			warn("ShopAction remote was not available; shop actions are disabled until remotes resync.")
		end
	end

	return actions
end

return RemoteActions

local function makeArtwork(parent, imageId, crop, zIndex)
	local artwork = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	artwork.Name = "Artwork"
	artwork.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	artwork.BorderSizePixel = 0
	artwork.Image = imageId or ""
	artwork.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	artwork.ZIndex = zIndex or 202
	artwork.Parent = parent

	if crop then
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(
			-crop.offset.X / crop.size.X,
			-crop.offset.Y / crop.size.Y
		)

		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(
			crop.source.X / crop.size.X,
			crop.source.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
	else
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	end

	return artwork
end

local function makeImageHolder(
	parent,
	name,
	imageId,
	crop,
	position,
	size,
	zIndex
)
	local holder = Instance.new("Frame")
	holder.Name = name
	holder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	holder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	holder.Position = position or UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
	holder.Size = size or UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	holder.ClipsDescendants = crop ~= nil
	holder.ZIndex = zIndex or 202
	holder.Parent = parent

	makeArtwork(holder, imageId, crop, zIndex)

	return holder
end

local function makePlainImage(
	parent,
	name,
	imageId,
	position,
	size,
	zIndex
)
	local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	image.Name = name
	image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	image.BorderSizePixel = 0
	image.Image = imageId or ""
	image.Position = position or UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
	image.Size = size or UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	image.ZIndex = zIndex or 210
	image.Parent = parent

	return image
end

local function makeImageButton(
	parent,
	name,
	imageId,
	crop,
	position,
	size,
	zIndex,
	active
)
	local button = Instance.new("ImageButton")
	button.Name = name
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.BorderSizePixel = 0
	button.Image = ""
	button.AutoButtonColor = false
	button.Active = active ~= false
	button.Selectable = active ~= false
	button.Position = position or UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
	button.Size = size or UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	button.ClipsDescendants = crop ~= nil
	button.ZIndex = zIndex or 210
	button.Parent = parent

	makeArtwork(button, imageId, crop, zIndex)

	return button
end

local function makeText(
	context,
	parent,
	text,
	size,
	color,
	bold
)
	local label = context.makeText(
		parent,
		text,
		size,
		color,
		bold
	)

	label.ZIndex = 216

	return label
end

local function addPressFeedback(button)
	local originalPosition = button.Position
	local originalSize = button.Size
	local artwork = button:FindFirstChild("Artwork")

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if not button.Active then
			return
		end

		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			TweenService:Create(
				button,
				TweenInfo.new(0.06),
				{
					Position = UDim2.new(
						originalPosition.X.Scale,
						originalPosition.X.Offset + 3,
						originalPosition.Y.Scale,
						originalPosition.Y.Offset + 3
					),
					Size = UDim2.new(
						originalSize.X.Scale,
						originalSize.X.Offset - 6,
						originalSize.Y.Scale,
						originalSize.Y.Offset - 6
					),
				}
			):Play()

			if artwork then
				artwork.ImageTransparency = 0.12
			end
		end
	end)

	local function release()
		TweenService:Create(
			button,
			TweenInfo.new(0.06),
			{
				Position = originalPosition,
				Size = originalSize,
			}
		):Play()

		if artwork then
			artwork.ImageTransparency = 0
		end
	end

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			release()
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(release)
end

local function clearRenderedChildren(parent)
	for _, child in ipairs(parent:GetChildren()) do
		if not child:IsA("UIListLayout")
			and not child:IsA("UIPadding")
		then
			child:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function captureOriginal(context)
	if ui.original then
		return
	end

	local panel = context.panel
	local content = context.parent

	local constraint = context.panelConstraint
		or panel:FindFirstChildOfClass("UISizeConstraint")

	ui.original = {
		panel = panel,
		content = content,
		constraint = constraint,

		panelAnchorPoint = panel.AnchorPoint,
		panelPosition = panel.Position,
		panelSize = panel.Size,
		panelBackgroundColor3 = panel.BackgroundColor3,
		panelBackgroundTransparency = panel.BackgroundTransparency,
		panelClipsDescendants = panel.ClipsDescendants,
		panelZIndex = panel.ZIndex,

		contentPosition = content.Position,
		contentSize = content.Size,
		contentZIndex = content.ZIndex,
		contentScrollBarThickness = content.ScrollBarThickness,
		contentScrollBarImageColor3 = content.ScrollBarImageColor3,
		contentScrollBarImageTransparency = content.ScrollBarImageTransparency,
		contentVerticalScrollBarInset = content.VerticalScrollBarInset,
		contentAutomaticCanvasSize = content.AutomaticCanvasSize,
		contentCanvasSize = content.CanvasSize,
		contentBackgroundTransparency = content.BackgroundTransparency,

		panelTitleVisible =
			context.panelTitle
			and context.panelTitle.Visible,

		panelCloseVisible =
			context.panelClose
			and context.panelClose.Visible,

		strokes = {},
	}

	if constraint then
		ui.original.constraintMinSize = constraint.MinSize
		ui.original.constraintMaxSize = constraint.MaxSize
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(panel:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("UIStroke") then
			ui.original.strokes[child] =
				child.Transparency
		end
	end
end

local function updateScale()
	if not ui.scale then
		return
	end

	local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera

	local viewport =
		camera
		and camera.ViewportSize
		or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)

	local fit = math.min(
		(viewport.X * 0.985) / BASE_WIDTH,
		(viewport.Y * 0.975) / BASE_HEIGHT
	)

	ui.scale.Scale = math.clamp(
		fit * SHOP_SIZE_MULTIPLIER,
		0.30,
		1.00
	)
end

local function restoreOriginal()
	if not ui.original then
		return
	end

	ui.active = false

	ui.itemsCleanupToken =
		(ui.itemsCleanupToken or 0) + 1

	disconnect(ui.viewportConnection)
	disconnect(ui.titleConnection)
	disconnect(ui.panelVisibleConnection)
	disconnect(ui.canvasConnection)
	disconnect(ui.canvasSizeConnection)
	disconnect(ui.windowSizeConnection)
	disconnect(ui.layoutConnection)
	disconnect(ui.thumbDragChangedConnection)
	disconnect(ui.thumbDragEndedConnection)
	disconnect(ui.contentChildConnection)
	disconnect(ui.legacyItemsConnection)

	ui.contentChildConnection = nil
	ui.legacyItemsConnection = nil

	if ui.skin then
		ui.skin:Destroy()
	end

	if ui.scale then
		ui.scale:Destroy()
	end

	local original = ui.original
	local panel = original.panel
	local content = original.content

	if panel and panel.Parent then
		panel.AnchorPoint = original.panelAnchorPoint
		panel.Position = original.panelPosition
		panel.Size = original.panelSize
		panel.BackgroundColor3 =
			original.panelBackgroundColor3
		panel.BackgroundTransparency =
			original.panelBackgroundTransparency
		panel.ClipsDescendants =
			original.panelClipsDescendants
		panel.ZIndex = original.panelZIndex
	end

	if content and content.Parent then
		content.Position = original.contentPosition
		content.Size = original.contentSize
		content.ZIndex = original.contentZIndex
		content.ScrollBarThickness =
			original.contentScrollBarThickness
		content.ScrollBarImageColor3 =
			original.contentScrollBarImageColor3
		content.ScrollBarImageTransparency =
			original.contentScrollBarImageTransparency
		content.VerticalScrollBarInset =
			original.contentVerticalScrollBarInset
		content.AutomaticCanvasSize =
			original.contentAutomaticCanvasSize
		content.CanvasSize =
			original.contentCanvasSize
		content.BackgroundTransparency =
			original.contentBackgroundTransparency
	end

	if original.constraint
		and original.constraint.Parent
	then
		original.constraint.MinSize =
			original.constraintMinSize

		original.constraint.MaxSize =
			original.constraintMaxSize
	end

	if ui.context
		and ui.context.panelTitle
	then
		ui.context.panelTitle.Visible =
			original.panelTitleVisible
	end

	if ui.context
		and ui.context.panelClose
	then
		ui.context.panelClose.Visible =
			original.panelCloseVisible
	end

	for stroke, transparency in pairs(
		original.strokes
		) do
		if stroke and stroke.Parent then
			stroke.Transparency = transparency
		end
	end

	ui.skin = nil
	ui.scale = nil
	ui.tabs = nil
	ui.scrollTrack = nil
	ui.scrollThumb = nil
	ui.layout = nil
	ui.padding = nil
	ui.context = nil
	ui.original = nil
	ui.draggingThumb = false
	ui.contentChildConnection = nil
	ui.legacyItemsConnection = nil
end

function ShopModernUI.hide()
	restoreOriginal()
end

local function getMaxCanvasY()
	if not ui.context then
		return 0
	end

	local content = ui.context.parent

	local layoutHeight =
		ui.layout
		and ui.layout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y
		or 0

	local canvasHeight = math.max(
		content.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y,
		layoutHeight + 28
	)

	return math.max(
		0,
		canvasHeight - content.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y
	)
end

local function setCanvasY(value)
	if not ui.context then
		return
	end

	local content = ui.context.parent

	content.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(
		0,
		math.clamp(
			value,
			0,
			getMaxCanvasY()
		)
	)
end

local function updateScrollbar()
	if not ui.context
		or not ui.scrollTrack
		or not ui.scrollThumb
	then
		return
	end

	local content = ui.context.parent
	local maxCanvasY = getMaxCanvasY()
	local trackHeight =
		ui.scrollTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y

	if maxCanvasY <= 1 then
		if ALWAYS_SHOW_SCROLLBAR then
			ui.scrollThumb.Visible = true
			ui.scrollThumb.Active = false
			ui.scrollThumb.Selectable = false

			local idleHeight = math.clamp(
				math.floor(
					trackHeight
						* IDLE_SCROLL_THUMB_RATIO
				),
				90,
				math.max(90, trackHeight)
			)

			ui.scrollThumb.Position =
				UDim2.fromOffset(1, 0)

			ui.scrollThumb.Size =
				UDim2.fromOffset(
					26,
					idleHeight
				)
		else
			ui.scrollThumb.Visible = false
		end

		return
	end

	ui.scrollThumb.Visible = true
	ui.scrollThumb.Active = true
	ui.scrollThumb.Selectable = true

	local contentHeight =
		maxCanvasY
		+ content.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y

	local ratio = math.clamp(
		content.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y
			/ math.max(1, contentHeight),
		0.12,
		1
	)

	local thumbHeight = math.max(
		90,
		math.floor(trackHeight * ratio)
	)

	local maxTravel = math.max(
		0,
		trackHeight - thumbHeight
	)

	local scrollRatio = math.clamp(
		content.CanvasPosition.Y / maxCanvasY,
		0,
		1
	)

	ui.scrollThumb.Position =
		UDim2.fromOffset(
			1,
			math.floor(
				maxTravel * scrollRatio
			)
		)

	ui.scrollThumb.Size =
		UDim2.fromOffset(
			26,
			thumbHeight
		)
end

local function setupScrollbarInteractions()
	local content = ui.context.parent

	ui.canvasConnection =
		content:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
			"CanvasPosition"
		):Connect(updateScrollbar)

	ui.canvasSizeConnection =
		content:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
			"AbsoluteCanvasSize"
		):Connect(updateScrollbar)

	ui.windowSizeConnection =
		content:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
			"AbsoluteWindowSize"
		):Connect(updateScrollbar)

	ui.layoutConnection =
		ui.layout:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
			"AbsoluteContentSize"
		):Connect(function()
		task.defer(updateScrollbar)
	end)

	ui.scrollThumb.InputBegan:Connect(
		function(input)
			if input.UserInputType
				== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				or input.UserInputType
				== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
			then
				ui.draggingThumb = true
				ui.dragInput = input
				ui.dragStartY = input.Position.Y

				ui.dragStartCanvasY =
					content.CanvasPosition.Y
			end
		end
	)

	ui.thumbDragChangedConnection =
		UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(
			function(input)
				if not ui.draggingThumb then
					return
				end

				local currentY

				if ui.dragInput
					and ui.dragInput.UserInputType
					== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
				then
					if input ~= ui.dragInput then
						return
					end

					currentY = input.Position.Y
				elseif input.UserInputType
					== Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement
				then
					currentY = input.Position.Y
				end

				if not currentY then
					return
				end

				local activeTrackHeight =
				math.max(
					1,
					ui.scrollTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y
				)

				local thumbHeight =
				math.max(
					1,
					ui.scrollThumb.AbsoluteSize.Y
				)

				local maxTravel =
				math.max(
					1,
					activeTrackHeight
					- thumbHeight
				)

				local deltaY =
				currentY - ui.dragStartY

				setCanvasY(
					ui.dragStartCanvasY
					+ (
						(deltaY / maxTravel)
						* getMaxCanvasY()
					)
				)
			end
		)

	ui.thumbDragEndedConnection =
		UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(
			function(input)
				if input == ui.dragInput
					or input.UserInputType
					== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				then
					ui.draggingThumb = false
					ui.dragInput = nil
				end
			end
		)

	ui.scrollTrack.InputBegan:Connect(
		function(input)
			if input.UserInputType
				~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
				and input.UserInputType
				~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch
			then
				return
			end

			if ui.draggingThumb then
				return
			end

			local localY =
				input.Position.Y
			- ui.scrollTrack.AbsolutePosition.Y

			local ratio = math.clamp(
				localY
					/ math.max(
						1,
						ui.scrollTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y
					),
				0,
				1
			)

			setCanvasY(
				getMaxCanvasY() * ratio
			)
		end
	)
end

local function buildShell(context)
	captureOriginal(context)

	ui.context = context
	ui.active = true

	local panel = context.panel
	local content = context.parent

	local constraint =
		context.panelConstraint
		or panel:FindFirstChildOfClass(
			"UISizeConstraint"
		)

	panel.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	panel.Position = UDim2.fromScale(
		SHOP_X,
		SHOP_Y
	)
	panel.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
		BASE_WIDTH,
		BASE_HEIGHT
	)
	panel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	panel.ClipsDescendants = false
	panel.ZIndex = 200

	if constraint then
		constraint.MinSize = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		constraint.MaxSize =
			Vector2.new(5000, 5000)
	end

	for stroke in pairs(
		ui.original.strokes
		) do
		if stroke and stroke.Parent then
			stroke.Transparency = 1
		end
	end

	if context.panelTitle then
		context.panelTitle.Text = "SHOP"
		context.panelTitle.Visible = false
	end

	if context.panelClose then
		context.panelClose.Visible = false
	end

	ui.scale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	ui.scale.Name = "ModernShopScale"
	ui.scale.Parent = panel

	updateScale()

	local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera

	if camera then
		ui.viewportConnection =
			camera:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
				"ViewportSize"
			):Connect(updateScale)
	end

	ui.skin = Instance.new("Frame")
	ui.skin.Name = "ModernShopSkin"
	ui.skin.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	ui.skin.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	ui.skin.ZIndex = 201
	ui.skin.Parent = panel

	makeImageHolder(
		ui.skin,
		"MainBackbone",
		ASSETS.MainBackbone,
		CROPS.MainBackbone,
		UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0),
		UDim2.fromOffset(
			BASE_WIDTH,
			BASE_HEIGHT
		),
		201
	)

	makeImageHolder(
		ui.skin,
		"SubMainBackbone",
		ASSETS.SubMainBackbone,
		CROPS.SubMainBackbone,
		UDim2.fromOffset(34, 148),
		UDim2.fromOffset(1380, 890),
		202
	)

	makeImageHolder(
		ui.skin,
		"DecorationCastle",
		ASSETS.DecorationCastle,
		CROPS.DecorationCastle,
		UDim2.fromOffset(50, 18),
		UDim2.fromOffset(184, 132),
		206
	)

	local title = makeText(
		context,
		ui.skin,
		"SHOP",
		72,
		Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
		true
	)

	title.Position =
		UDim2.fromOffset(252, 34)

	title.Size =
		UDim2.fromOffset(560, 100)

	title.ZIndex = 207

	local closeButton = makeImageButton(
		ui.skin,
		"ModernShopClose",
		ASSETS.CloseButton,
		CROPS.CloseButton,
		UDim2.fromOffset(1285, 35),
		UDim2.fromOffset(105, 105),
		212,
		true
	)

	addPressFeedback(closeButton)

	closeButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(
		function()
			local closeCallback =
				ui.context
				and ui.context.close

			restoreOriginal()

			if closeCallback then
				closeCallback()
			elseif panel and panel.Parent then
				panel.Visible = false
			end
		end
	)

	ui.tabs = Instance.new("Frame")
	ui.tabs.Name = "ModernShopTabs"
	ui.tabs.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	ui.tabs.Position =
		UDim2.fromOffset(63, 166)
	ui.tabs.Size =
		UDim2.fromOffset(1297, 82)
	ui.tabs.ZIndex = 208
	ui.tabs.Parent = ui.skin

	ui.scrollTrack = Instance.new("Frame")
	ui.scrollTrack.Name =
		"ModernShopScrollTrack"
	ui.scrollTrack.BackgroundColor3 =
		Color3.fromRGB(1, 19, 55)
	ui.scrollTrack.BackgroundTransparency =
		0.04
	ui.scrollTrack.BorderSizePixel = 0
	ui.scrollTrack.Position =
		UDim2.fromOffset(1333, 264)
	ui.scrollTrack.Size =
		UDim2.fromOffset(28, 738)
	ui.scrollTrack.Active = true
	ui.scrollTrack.ZIndex = 210
	ui.scrollTrack.Parent = ui.skin

	context.addCorner(
		ui.scrollTrack,
		14
	)

	local trackStroke = context.addStroke(
		ui.scrollTrack,
		Color3.fromRGB(0, 82, 190),
		2
	)

	if trackStroke then
		trackStroke.Transparency = 0.25
	end

	ui.scrollThumb = makeImageButton(
		ui.scrollTrack,
		"ModernShopScrollThumb",
		ASSETS.ScrollBar,
		CROPS.ScrollBar,
		UDim2.fromOffset(1, 0),
		UDim2.fromOffset(26, 210),
		213,
		true
	)

	content.Position =
		UDim2.fromOffset(58, 260)

	content.Size =
		UDim2.fromOffset(1260, 750)

	content.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	content.ZIndex = 205
	content.ScrollBarThickness = 0
	content.ScrollBarImageTransparency = 1
	content.VerticalScrollBarInset =
		Enum.ScrollBarInset.None
	content.AutomaticCanvasSize =
		Enum.AutomaticSize.Y
	content.CanvasSize =
		UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
	content.ScrollingDirection =
		Enum.ScrollingDirection.Y
	content.Active = true
	content.ScrollingEnabled = true
	content.ClipsDescendants = true

	ui.layout =
		content:FindFirstChildOfClass(
			"UIListLayout"
		)

	if not ui.layout then
		ui.layout =
			Instance.new("UIListLayout")

		ui.layout.Parent = content
	end

	ui.layout.FillDirection =
		Enum.FillDirection.Vertical

	ui.layout.HorizontalAlignment =
		Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center

	ui.layout.SortOrder =
		Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

	ui.layout.Padding =
		UDim.new(0, 10)

	ui.padding =
		content:FindFirstChildOfClass(
			"UIPadding"
		)

	if not ui.padding then
		ui.padding =
			Instance.new("UIPadding")

		ui.padding.Parent = content
	end

	ui.padding.PaddingTop =
		UDim.new(0, 2)

	ui.padding.PaddingBottom =
		UDim.new(0, 24)

	ui.padding.PaddingLeft =
		UDim.new(0, 0)

	ui.padding.PaddingRight =
		UDim.new(0, 4)

	setupScrollbarInteractions()

	if context.panelTitle then
		ui.titleConnection =
			context.panelTitle:
			GetPropertyChangedSignal(
				"Text"
			):Connect(function()
			local value = string.lower(
				context.panelTitle.Text
					or ""
			)

			if ui.active
				and value ~= "shop"
			then
				task.defer(
					restoreOriginal
				)
			end
		end)
	end

	ui.panelVisibleConnection =
		panel:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
			"Visible"
		):Connect(function()
		if ui.active
			and not panel.Visible
		then
			task.defer(
				restoreOriginal
			)
		end
	end)
end

local function renderTabs(context)
	for _, child in ipairs(
		ui.tabs:GetChildren()
		) do
		child:Destroy()
	end

	local layout =
		Instance.new("UIListLayout")

	layout.FillDirection =
		Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal

	layout.HorizontalAlignment =
		Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left

	layout.VerticalAlignment =
		Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center

	layout.Padding =
		UDim.new(0, 11)

	layout.SortOrder =
		Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

	layout.Parent = ui.tabs

	for order, tabName in ipairs({
		"Passes",
		"Items",
		"Coins",
		"Upgrades",
		}) do
		local selected =
			ui.selectedTab == tabName

		local imageKey =
			selected
			and "SectionTabSelected"
			or "SectionTab"

		local button = makeImageButton(
			ui.tabs,
			tabName .. "Tab",
			ASSETS[imageKey],
			CROPS[imageKey],
			UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0),
			UDim2.fromOffset(316, 78),
			210,
			true
		)

		button.LayoutOrder = order

		addPressFeedback(button)

		local label = makeText(
			context,
			button,
			tabName,
			34,
			Color3.fromRGB(
				255,
				255,
				255
			),
			true
		)

		label.AnchorPoint =
			Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)

		label.Position =
			UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)

		label.Size =
			UDim2.new(1, -28, 1, -20)

		label.TextXAlignment =
			Enum.TextXAlignment.Center

		label.ZIndex = 215

		button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(
			function()
				if ui.selectedTab
					== tabName
				then
					return
				end

				ui.selectedTab = tabName

				context.parent.CanvasPosition =
					Vector2.new(0, 0)

				ShopModernUI.render(context)
			end
		)
	end
end

local function makeActionButton(
	context,
	parent,
	action
)
	local imageKey =

		textSize = 27
	elseif action.text == "Claimed" then
		textSize = 31
	end

	local button = makeImageButton(
		parent,
		action.text .. "ActionButton",
		ASSETS[imageKey],
		CROPS[imageKey],
		UDim2.new(1, -258, 0.5, -43),
		UDim2.fromOffset(235, 86),
		214,
		action.enabled == true
	)

	button.AutoButtonColor = false

	local label = makeText(
		context,
		button,
		action.text,
		textSize,
		Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
		true
	)

	label.AnchorPoint =
		Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)

	label.Position =
		UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)

	label.Size =
		UDim2.new(1, -32, 1, -18)

	label.TextXAlignment =
		Enum.TextXAlignment.Center

	label.ZIndex = 218

	if action.enabled
		and action.onClick
	then
		addPressFeedback(button)

		button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(
			action.onClick
		)
	end

	return button
end
