local function ownsGamePass(
	state,
	passKey
)
	local monetization =
		state
		and state.Monetization
		or {}

	local owned =
		monetization.OwnedGamePasses
		or {}

	return owned[passKey] == true
end

local robuxPriceCache = {}

local function formatRobux(
	item,
	infoType
)
	local itemId =
		tonumber(item.id)
		or tonumber(item.Id)

	local fallbackPrice =
		tonumber(item.priceRobux)
		or tonumber(item.Price)

	if not itemId or itemId <= 0 then
		return tostring(
			fallbackPrice or "?"
		) .. " Robux"
	end

	infoType =
		infoType
		or Enum.InfoType.GamePass

	local cacheKey =
		tostring(infoType)
		.. ":"
		.. tostring(itemId)

	local cachedPrice =
		robuxPriceCache[cacheKey]

	if cachedPrice == nil then
		local success, productInfo =
			pcall(function()
				return MarketplaceService:
				GetProductInfo(
					itemId,
					infoType
				)
			end)

		cachedPrice =
			success
			and type(productInfo) == "table"
			and tonumber(
				productInfo.PriceInRobux
			)
			or fallbackPrice

		robuxPriceCache[cacheKey] =
			cachedPrice
	end

	return tostring(
		cachedPrice or "?"
	) .. " Robux"
end

local function gamePassAction(
	context,
	passKey
)
	if ownsGamePass(
		context.state,
		passKey
		) then
		return {
			text = "Owned",
			type = "BlueButton",
			enabled = false,
		}
	end

	return {
		text = "Buy",
		type = "GreenButton",
		enabled = true,

		onClick = function()
			context.fireShopAction(
				"PromptGamePass",
				"GamePass",
				passKey
			)
		end,
	}
end

local function vipRewardAction(context)
	local monetization =
		context.state
		and context.state.Monetization
		or {}

	if not ownsGamePass(
		context.state,
		"VipAngler"
		) then
		return {
			text = "Unavailable",
			type = "RedButton",
			enabled = false,
		}
	end

	if monetization.VipRewardAvailable
		== true
	then
		return {
			text = "Claim",
			type = "GreenButton",
			enabled = true,

			onClick = function()
				context.fireShopAction(
					"ClaimVipReward",
					"GamePass",
					"VipAngler"
				)
			end,
		}
	end

	return {
		text = "Claimed",
		type = "BlueButton",
		enabled = false,
	}
end

local function renderPasses(context)
	local order = 1

	createImageRow(context, {
		key = "VipDailyReward",
		layoutOrder = order,
		height = 172,
		title = "VIP Daily Reward",

		description =
			"5 Fresh Bait + 2 Lucky Bait once per day.",

		action = vipRewardAction(context),
	})

	order += 1

	local passImages = {
		VipAngler = "VipAnglerPass",

		AquariumDesigner =
			"AquariumDesignerPass",
	}

	for _, passKey in ipairs({
		"VipAngler",
		"AquariumDesigner",
		}) do
		local pass =
			context.MonetizationConfig
			.GamePasses[passKey]

		if pass then
			createImageRow(context, {
				key = passImages[passKey],
				layoutOrder = order,
				height = 190,
				title = pass.name,
				description = pass.description,
				descriptionLines = 2,

				priceText = formatRobux(
					pass,
					Enum.InfoType.GamePass
				),

				action =
					gamePassAction(
						context,
						passKey
					),
			})

			order += 1
		end
	end
end

local function getProductText(
	productKey,
	product
)
	return string.lower(
		tostring(productKey)
			.. " "
			.. tostring(
				product
				and (
					product.name
					or product.Name
				)
				or ""
			)
			.. " "
			.. tostring(
				product
				and (
					product.description
					or product.Description
				)
				or ""
			)
			.. " "
			.. tostring(
				product
				and (
					product.amount
					or product.Amount
					or product.rewardAmount
					or product.RewardAmount
					or product.seaStars
					or product.SeaStars
				)
				or ""
			)
	)
end

local function isSeaStarText(text)
	return string.find(
		text,
		"sea star",
		1,
		true
	) ~= nil
		or string.find(
			text,
			"seastar",
			1,
			true
		) ~= nil
		or string.find(
			text,
			"sea_star",
			1,
			true
		) ~= nil
end

local function getSeaStarTierIndex(
	productKey,
	product
)
	local text =
		getProductText(
			productKey,
			product
		)

	local compact =
		string.gsub(text, ",", "")

	local amount = tonumber(
		string.match(
			compact,
			"(%d+)%s*sea%s*stars"
		)
			or string.match(
				compact,
				"(%d+)%s*seastars"
			)
	)

	if string.find(
		text,
		"starter",
		1,
		true
		) or amount == 60 then
		return 1
	elseif string.find(
		text,
		"small",
		1,
		true
		) or amount == 130 then
		return 2
	elseif string.find(
		text,
		"medium",
		1,
		true
		) or amount == 300 then
		return 3
	elseif string.find(
		text,
		"large",
		1,
		true
		) or amount == 700 then
		return 4
	elseif string.find(
		text,
		"huge",
		1,
		true
		) or amount == 1500 then
		return 5
	end

	return nil
end

local function collectSeaStarProducts(
	context
)
	local config =
		context.MonetizationConfig or {}

	local candidates = {}
	local seenKeys = {}

	local function addCandidate(
		productKey,
		product,
		forceSeaStar
	)
		if productKey == nil
			or type(product) ~= "table"
		then
			return
		end

		local resolvedKey =
			product.productKey
			or product.ProductKey
			or product.key
			or product.Key
			or productKey

		local identity =
			tostring(resolvedKey)

		if seenKeys[identity] then
			return
		end

		local text =
			getProductText(
				resolvedKey,
				product
			)

		if not forceSeaStar
			and not isSeaStarText(text)
		then
			return
		end

		seenKeys[identity] = true

		table.insert(candidates, {
			key = resolvedKey,
			product = product,

			tier =
				getSeaStarTierIndex(
					resolvedKey,
					product
				),
		})
	end

	local productTables = {
		config.DeveloperProducts,
		config.SeaStarProducts,
		config.SeaStarPacks,
		config.ItemProducts,
	}

	local function findProduct(productKey)
		for _, productTable in ipairs(
			productTables
			) do
			if type(productTable) == "table"
				and type(
					productTable[productKey]
				) == "table"
			then
				return productTable[
				productKey
				]
			end
		end

		return nil
	end

	for _, orderName in ipairs({
		"SeaStarProductOrder",
		"SeaStarsProductOrder",
		"SeaStarPackOrder",
		"SeaStarsPackOrder",
		}) do
		local orderList =
			config[orderName]

		if type(orderList) == "table" then
			for _, productKey in ipairs(
				orderList
				) do
				addCandidate(
					productKey,
					findProduct(productKey),
					true
				)
			end
		end
	end

	for _, productKey in ipairs(
		config.DeveloperProductOrder
			or {}
		) do
		addCandidate(
			productKey,
			findProduct(productKey),
			false
		)
	end

	for _, productTable in ipairs(
		productTables
		) do
		if type(productTable) == "table" then
			for productKey, product in pairs(
				productTable
				) do
				addCandidate(
					productKey,
					product,
					false
				)
			end
		end
	end

	local visited = {}

	local function scanNested(
		value,
		depth
	)
		if type(value) ~= "table"
			or visited[value]
			or depth > 5
		then
			return
		end

		visited[value] = true

		for productKey, product in pairs(
			value
			) do
			if type(product) == "table" then
				local looksLikeProduct =
					product.id ~= nil
					or product.Id ~= nil
					or product.priceRobux ~= nil
					or product.Price ~= nil
					or product.productKey ~= nil
					or product.ProductKey ~= nil

				if looksLikeProduct then
					addCandidate(
						productKey,
						product,
						false
					)
				end

				scanNested(
					product,
					depth + 1
				)
			end
		end
	end

	scanNested(config, 0)
	scanNested(context, 0)

	local tierEntries = {}
	local unassigned = {}

	for _, candidate in ipairs(
		candidates
		) do
		if candidate.tier
			and not tierEntries[
			candidate.tier
			]
		then
			tierEntries[
			candidate.tier
			] = candidate
		else
			table.insert(
				unassigned,
				candidate
			)
		end
	end

	local unassignedIndex = 1

	for tierIndex = 1,
		#SEA_STAR_PACK_VISUALS
	do
		if not tierEntries[tierIndex]
			and unassigned[
			unassignedIndex
			]
		then
			tierEntries[tierIndex] =
				unassigned[
			unassignedIndex
			]

			unassignedIndex += 1
		end
	end

	return tierEntries
end

local function renderItems(context)
	local tierEntries =
		collectSeaStarProducts(context)

	for index, visual in ipairs(
		SEA_STAR_PACK_VISUALS
		) do
		local entry =
			tierEntries[index]

		local productKey =
			entry and entry.key or nil

		local product =
			entry and entry.product or nil

		local available =
			productKey ~= nil
			and product ~= nil

		createSeaStarRow(context, {
			assetKey = visual.assetKey,
			layoutOrder = index,
			title = visual.title,
			description = visual.description,
			iconSize = visual.iconSize,

			priceText =
				available
				and formatRobux(
					product,
					Enum.InfoType.Product
				)
				or "Product not configured",

			action = {
				text =
					available
					and "Buy"
					or "Unavailable",

				type =
					available
					and "GreenButton"
					or "RedButton",

				enabled = available,

				onClick =
					available
					and function()
						context.fireShopAction(
							"PromptProduct",
							"Product",
							productKey
						)
					end
					or nil,
			},
		})
	end
end

local function isAllowedItemsChild(
	child
)
	return child:IsA("UIListLayout")
		or child:IsA("UIPadding")
		or child:GetAttribute(
			"ModernShopOwned"
		) == true
end

-- 기존 FishingClient가 만드는 옛날 Sea Star UI 문구
local LEGACY_SEA_STAR_TEXT = {
	["sea star packs"] = true,
	["starter sea stars"] = true,
	["small sea stars"] = true,
	["medium sea stars"] = true,
	["large sea stars"] = true,
	["huge sea stars"] = true,
}

local function normalizeLegacyText(value)
	local text =
		string.lower(
			tostring(value or "")
		)

	text =
		string.gsub(
			text,
			"^%s+",
			""
		)

	text =
		string.gsub(
			text,
			"%s+$",
			""
		)

	return text
end

local function isLegacySeaStarTextObject(
	object
)
	if not object:IsA("TextLabel")
		and not object:IsA("TextButton")
		and not object:IsA("TextBox")
	then
		return false
	end

	return LEGACY_SEA_STAR_TEXT[
	normalizeLegacyText(
		object.Text
	)
	] == true
end

local function findLegacyRowRoot(
	object,
	context
)
	local current = object

	while current
		and current ~= context.panel
	do
		local parent = current.Parent

		if not parent then
			break
		end

		if parent == context.parent
			or parent:IsA("ScrollingFrame")
		then
			if current:IsA("GuiObject")
				and current ~= context.parent
			then
				return current
			end

			break
		end

		if parent == context.panel then
			if current:IsA("GuiObject")
				and current ~= ui.skin
			then
				return current
			end

			break
		end

		current = parent
	end

	return nil
end

local function restoreItemsListLayout(
	context
)
	local layout =
		context.parent:
		FindFirstChildOfClass(
			"UIListLayout"
		)

	if layout then
		layout.FillDirection =
			Enum.FillDirection.Vertical

		layout.HorizontalAlignment =
			Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Center

		layout.SortOrder =
			Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

		layout.Padding =
			UDim.new(0, 10)

		ui.layout = layout
	end

	local padding =
		context.parent:
		FindFirstChildOfClass(
			"UIPadding"
		)

	if padding then
		padding.PaddingTop =
			UDim.new(0, 2)

		padding.PaddingBottom =
			UDim.new(0, 24)

		padding.PaddingLeft =
			UDim.new(0, 0)

		padding.PaddingRight =
			UDim.new(0, 4)

		ui.padding = padding
	end
end

local function suppressLegacyGuiObject(
	object
)
	if not object
		or not object.Parent
		or not object:IsA("GuiObject")
		or object:GetAttribute(
			"ModernShopOwned"
		) == true
	then
		return
	end

	-- Destroy하지 않고 화면과 레이아웃에서만 제거한다.
	-- 기존 렌더러와 삭제/재생성 반복이 발생하지 않는다.
	object.Visible = false
	object.Active = false
	object.Selectable = false
	object.AutomaticSize =
		Enum.AutomaticSize.None
	object.Size =
		UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
	object.LayoutOrder = 1000000

	object:SetAttribute(
		"LegacySeaStarUISuppressed",
		true
	)
end

local function suppressLegacyItemsChild(
	child
)
	if not child
		or not child.Parent
		or isAllowedItemsChild(child)
	then
		return
	end

	suppressLegacyGuiObject(child)
end

local function suppressLegacyFromTextObject(
	object,
	context
)
	if not object
		or not object.Parent
		or not isLegacySeaStarTextObject(
			object
		)
	then
		return
	end

	local root =
		findLegacyRowRoot(
			object,
			context
		)

	if root then
		suppressLegacyGuiObject(root)
	else
		suppressLegacyGuiObject(object)
	end
end

local function purgeLegacyItemsContent(
	context
)
	if not ui.active
		or ui.selectedTab ~= "Items"
		or ui.context ~= context
		or not context.parent
	then
		return
	end

	-- 현재 Items ScrollingFrame에 들어온
	-- ModernShopOwned가 아닌 예전 자식들을 숨긴다.
	for _, child in ipairs(
		context.parent:GetChildren()
		) do
		suppressLegacyItemsChild(child)
	end

	-- 옛 UI가 다른 컨테이너나 중첩 Frame에 생성된 경우도
	-- 정확한 옛 문구를 기준으로 찾아 숨긴다.
	if context.panel
		and context.panel.Parent
	then
		for _, object in ipairs(
			context.panel:GetDescendants()
			) do
			if isLegacySeaStarTextObject(
				object
				) then
				suppressLegacyFromTextObject(
					object,
					context
				)
			end
		end
	end

	restoreItemsListLayout(context)
end

local function guardItemsContent(
	context
)
	disconnect(ui.contentChildConnection)
	disconnect(ui.legacyItemsConnection)

	ui.contentChildConnection = nil
	ui.legacyItemsConnection = nil

	ui.itemsCleanupToken =
		(ui.itemsCleanupToken or 0) + 1

	local cleanupToken =
		ui.itemsCleanupToken

	local function guardStillValid()
		return cleanupToken
			== ui.itemsCleanupToken
			and ui.active
			and ui.selectedTab == "Items"
			and ui.context == context
			and context.parent
			and context.parent.Parent
	end

	-- 이미 존재하는 옛 UI를 즉시 숨긴다.
	purgeLegacyItemsContent(context)

	-- 실제 목록의 직접 자식으로 늦게 추가되는
	-- 예전 Section/Row를 삭제하지 않고 숨긴다.
	ui.contentChildConnection =
		context.parent.ChildAdded:Connect(
			function(child)
				if not guardStillValid() then
					return
				end

				if isAllowedItemsChild(child) then
					return
				end

				suppressLegacyItemsChild(child)

				for _, delayTime in ipairs({
					0.03,
					0.10,
					0.30,
					0.75,
					1.50,
					3.00,
					}) do
					task.delay(
						delayTime,
						function()
							if not guardStillValid()
								or not child
								or not child.Parent
							then
								return
							end

							suppressLegacyItemsChild(
								child
							)

							restoreItemsListLayout(
								context
							)

							task.defer(
								updateScrollbar
							)
						end
					)
				end
			end
		)

	-- 옛 UI가 별도의 중첩 Frame이나 다른 컨테이너에
	-- 생성되는 경우, 정확한 옛 텍스트가 추가될 때만 처리한다.
	--
	-- 객체를 Destroy하지 않기 때문에 재생성 무한 반복이 없다.
	ui.legacyItemsConnection =
		context.panel.DescendantAdded:Connect(
			function(object)
				if not guardStillValid() then
					return
				end

				if not isLegacySeaStarTextObject(
					object
					) then
					return
				end

				suppressLegacyFromTextObject(
					object,
					context
				)

				for _, delayTime in ipairs({
					0.03,
					0.10,
					0.30,
					0.75,
					1.50,
					3.00,
					}) do
					task.delay(
						delayTime,
						function()
							if not guardStillValid()
								or not object
								or not object.Parent
							then
								return
							end

							suppressLegacyFromTextObject(
								object,
								context
							)

							task.defer(
								updateScrollbar
							)
						end
					)
				end
			end
		)

	-- 같은 프레임 경계에서 생성됐거나
	-- 외부 코드가 Visible/Size를 다시 설정하는 경우를
	-- 제한된 횟수로 다시 정리한다.
	for _, delayTime in ipairs({
		0,
		0.05,
		0.20,
		0.60,
		1.20,
		2.50,
		5.00,
		}) do
		task.delay(
			delayTime,
			function()
				if not guardStillValid() then
					return
				end

				purgeLegacyItemsContent(
					context
				)

				task.defer(
					updateScrollbar
				)
			end
		)
	end
end

local function renderCoins(context)
	local imageKeys = {
		StarterCoinPack =
			"StarterCoinPack",

		SmallCoinPack =
			"SmallCoinPack",

		MediumCoinPack =
			"MediumCoinPack",

		LargeCoinPack =
			"LargeCoinPack",

		HugeCoinPack =
			"HugeCoinPack",
	}

	local order = 1

	for _, productKey in ipairs(
		context.MonetizationConfig
			.CoinProductOrder
			or {}
		) do
		local product =
			context.MonetizationConfig
			.DeveloperProducts[
		productKey
		]

		if product then
			createImageRow(context, {
				key = imageKeys[
				productKey
				],

				layoutOrder = order,
				height = 158,
				title = product.name,

				description =
					product.description,

				priceText = formatRobux(
					product,
					Enum.InfoType.Product
				),

				action = {
					text = "Buy",
					type = "GreenButton",
					enabled = true,

					onClick = function()
						context.fireShopAction(
							"PromptProduct",
							"Product",
							productKey
						)
					end,
				},
			})

			order += 1
		end
	end
end

local function renderUpgrades(context)
	createSummaryRow(
		context,
		"Fish Bag Storage",
		string.format(
			"Current capacity: %d fish",
			context.state
				and context.state.BackpackSize
				or 0
		),
		1
	)

	local imageKeys = {
		SmallBag =
			"SmallBagUpgrade",

		MediumBag =
			"MediumBagUpgrade",

		LargeBag =
			"LargeBagUpgrade",
	}

	local order = 2

	for _, passKey in ipairs({
		"SmallBag",
		"MediumBag",
		"LargeBag",
		}) do
		local pass =
			context.MonetizationConfig
			.GamePasses[
		passKey
		]

		if pass then
			createImageRow(context, {
				key = imageKeys[passKey],
				layoutOrder = order,
				height = 178,
				title = pass.name,

				description =
					pass.description,

				priceText = formatRobux(
					pass,
					Enum.InfoType.GamePass
				),

				action =
					gamePassAction(
						context,
						passKey
					),
			})

			order += 1
		end
	end
end

function ShopModernUI.render(context)
	assert(
		type(context) == "table",
		"ShopModernUI.render needs context"
	)

	assert(
		context.parent,
		"ShopModernUI.render needs parent"
	)

	assert(
		context.panel,
		"ShopModernUI.render needs panel"
	)

	assert(
		context.MonetizationConfig,
		"ShopModernUI.render needs MonetizationConfig"
	)

	assert(
		context.fireShopAction,
		"ShopModernUI.render needs fireShopAction"
	)

	assert(
		context.makeText,
		"ShopModernUI.render needs makeText"
	)

	assert(
		context.addCorner,
		"ShopModernUI.render needs addCorner"
	)

	assert(
		context.addStroke,
		"ShopModernUI.render needs addStroke"
	)

	if not ui.active
		or ui.context ~= context
	then
		if ui.active then
			restoreOriginal()
		end

		buildShell(context)
	else
		ui.context = context
	end

	if context.panelTitle then
		context.panelTitle.Text = "SHOP"
	end

	disconnect(ui.contentChildConnection)
	disconnect(ui.legacyItemsConnection)

	ui.contentChildConnection = nil
	ui.legacyItemsConnection = nil

	ui.itemsCleanupToken =
		(ui.itemsCleanupToken or 0) + 1

	clearRenderedChildren(
		context.parent
	)

	ui.layout =
		context.parent:
		FindFirstChildOfClass(
			"UIListLayout"
		)

	ui.padding =
		context.parent:
		FindFirstChildOfClass(
			"UIPadding"
		)

	renderTabs(context)

	if ui.selectedTab == "Passes" then
		renderPasses(context)

	elseif ui.selectedTab == "Items" then
		renderItems(context)
		guardItemsContent(context)

	elseif ui.selectedTab == "Coins" then
		renderCoins(context)

	elseif ui.selectedTab == "Upgrades" then
		renderUpgrades(context)
	end

	task.defer(updateScrollbar)
	task.delay(0.05, updateScrollbar)
	task.delay(0.15, updateScrollbar)
end

return ShopModernUI

local ToolHotbarBinder = {}

local function bindContainerTools(container, connectTool)
	if not container then
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(container:GetChildren()) do
		connectTool(child)
	end
	container.ChildAdded:Connect(connectTool)
end

function ToolHotbarBinder.start(deps)
	local player = deps.player
	local setTab = deps.setTab
	local hasPanel = deps.hasPanel
	local isToolSwitchLocked = deps.isToolSwitchLocked
	local watchLegacyAquariumViewerTools = deps.watchLegacyAquariumViewerTools

	task.spawn(function()
		local connectedHudTools = {}

		local function unequipHudTool()
			local character = player.Character
			local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
			if humanoid then
				humanoid:UnequipTools()
			end
		end

		local function restoreFishingRod()
			local character = player.Character
			local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
			local backpack = player:FindFirstChild("Backpack")
			local rod = character and character:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
				or (backpack and backpack:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod"))
			if humanoid and rod and rod:IsA("Tool") then
				humanoid:EquipTool(rod)
			elseif humanoid then
				humanoid:UnequipTools()
			end
		end

		local function panelExists(tabName)
			if not hasPanel then
				return true
			end

			return hasPanel(tabName)
		end

		local function connectHudTool(tool)
			if not tool:IsA("Tool") then
				return
			end

			if connectedHudTools[tool] then
				return
			end

			if tool.Name == "Fishing Rod" then
				connectedHudTools[tool] = true
				tool.Unequipped:Connect(function()
					if isToolSwitchLocked and isToolSwitchLocked() then
						task.defer(restoreFishingRod)
					end
				end)
				tool.Destroying:Connect(function()
					connectedHudTools[tool] = nil
				end)
				return
			end

			local tabName = nil
			local foundMessage = nil
			local equippedMessage = nil
			local openingMessage = nil
			local missingMessage = nil
			local activatedMessage = nil
			local shouldUnequipAfterOpen = false
			if tool.Name == "Bag" or tool.Name == "Backpack" then
				tabName = "Bag"
				foundMessage = "Bag tool found"
				equippedMessage = "Bag tool equipped"
				openingMessage = "Opening Bag UI"
				missingMessage = "BagPanel not found"
				activatedMessage = "Bag tool activated"
				shouldUnequipAfterOpen = true
			elseif tool.Name == "Fishdex" then
				tabName = "Fishdex"
				foundMessage = "Fishdex tool found"
				equippedMessage = "Fishdex tool equipped"
				openingMessage = "Opening Fishdex UI"
				missingMessage = "FishdexPanel not found"
				activatedMessage = "Fishdex tool activated"
				shouldUnequipAfterOpen = true
			elseif tool.Name == "Aquarium Viewer" then
				tabName = "Aquarium"
			end

			if not tabName then
				return
			end

			connectedHudTools[tool] = true
			if shouldUnequipAfterOpen then
				tool.RequiresHandle = false
				tool.CanBeDropped = false
			end
			if foundMessage then
				print(foundMessage)
			end

			local lastActivatedAt = 0
			local function activateTool(source)
				local now = os.clock()
				if now - lastActivatedAt < 0.2 then
					return
				end
				lastActivatedAt = now

				if shouldUnequipAfterOpen
					and isToolSwitchLocked
					and isToolSwitchLocked()
				then
					task.defer(restoreFishingRod)
					return
				end

				if source == "Equipped" and equippedMessage then
					print(equippedMessage)
					if tabName == "Bag" then
						print("Bag tool equipped/opening Bag UI")
					elseif tabName == "Fishdex" then
						print("Fishdex tool equipped/opening Fishdex UI")
					end
				elseif source == "Activated" and activatedMessage then
					print(activatedMessage)
				end

				if not panelExists(tabName) then
					if missingMessage then
						warn(missingMessage)
					end
					if shouldUnequipAfterOpen then
						unequipHudTool()
					end
					return
				end

				if openingMessage then
					print(openingMessage)
				end
				setTab(tabName)

				if shouldUnequipAfterOpen then
					unequipHudTool()
				end
			end

			-- Bag/Fishdex are opened from the numbered Roblox hotbar.
			-- A single slot press can fire both Equipped and Activated.
			-- Calling setTab from both events toggles the same panel twice,
			-- which is why Fishdex required another press to close.
			if tabName == "Bag" or tabName == "Fishdex" then
				tool.Equipped:Connect(function()
					activateTool("Equipped")
				end)
			else
				-- Preserve the existing behavior for other tools.
				tool.Equipped:Connect(function()
					activateTool("Equipped")
				end)
				tool.Activated:Connect(function()
					activateTool("Activated")
				end)
			end

			tool.Destroying:Connect(function()
				connectedHudTools[tool] = nil
			end)
		end

		local function bindContainer(container)
			if watchLegacyAquariumViewerTools then
				watchLegacyAquariumViewerTools(container)
			end
			bindContainerTools(container, connectHudTool)
		end

		local backpack = player:WaitForChild("Backpack", 10)
		bindContainer(backpack)
		bindContainer(player.Character)

		player.CharacterAdded:Connect(bindContainer)
	end)
end

return ToolHotbarBinder

local function addCorner(guiObject, radius)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius)
	corner.Parent = guiObject
	return corner
end

local function makeText(parent, name, text, textSize, color, font)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = name
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.BorderSizePixel = 0
	label.Font = font or Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	label.Text = text or ""
	label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	label.TextSize = textSize or 24
	label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	label.ZIndex = 205
	label.Parent = parent
	return label
end

local function makeCroppedArtwork(parent, imageId, crop, zIndex)
	local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	image.Name = "Artwork"
	image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	image.BorderSizePixel = 0
	image.Image = imageId
	image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	image.ZIndex = zIndex or 200
	image.Parent = parent

	if crop then
		image.Position = UDim2.fromScale(
			-crop.offset.X / crop.size.X,
			-crop.offset.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
		image.Size = UDim2.fromScale(
			crop.source.X / crop.size.X,
			crop.source.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
	else
		image.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		image.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	end

	return image
end

local function makeImageHolder(parent, name, imageId, position, size, crop, zIndex)
	local holder = Instance.new("Frame")
	holder.Name = name
	holder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	holder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	holder.Position = position
	holder.Size = size
	holder.ClipsDescendants = crop ~= nil
	holder.ZIndex = zIndex or 200
	holder.Parent = parent

	makeCroppedArtwork(holder, imageId, crop, zIndex)
	return holder
end

local function makeImageButton(parent, name, imageId, position, size, crop, zIndex)
	local button = Instance.new("ImageButton")
	button.Name = name
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.BorderSizePixel = 0
	button.Position = position
	button.Size = size
	button.Image = ""
	button.AutoButtonColor = false
	button.ClipsDescendants = crop ~= nil
	button.ZIndex = zIndex or 205
	button.Parent = parent

	makeCroppedArtwork(button, imageId, crop, zIndex)
	return button
end

local function addPressFeedback(button)
	local artwork = button:FindFirstChild("Artwork")
	local originalPosition = button.Position
	local originalSize = button.Size

	local pressedPosition = UDim2.new(
		originalPosition.X.Scale,
		originalPosition.X.Offset + 4,
		originalPosition.Y.Scale,
		originalPosition.Y.Offset + 4
	)

	local pressedSize = UDim2.new(
		originalSize.X.Scale,
		originalSize.X.Offset - 8,
		originalSize.Y.Scale,
		originalSize.Y.Offset - 8
	)

	local currentButtonTween
	local currentArtworkTween

	local function setPressed(pressed)
		if currentButtonTween then
			currentButtonTween:Cancel()
		end
		if currentArtworkTween then
			currentArtworkTween:Cancel()
		end

		currentButtonTween = TweenService:Create(
			button,
			TweenInfo.new(0.07, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
			{
				Position = pressed and pressedPosition or originalPosition,
				Size = pressed and pressedSize or originalSize,
			}
		)
		currentButtonTween:Play()

		if artwork then
			currentArtworkTween = TweenService:Create(
				artwork,
				TweenInfo.new(0.07, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
				{
					ImageTransparency = pressed and 0.16 or 0,
				}
			)
			currentArtworkTween:Play()
		end
	end

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			setPressed(true)
		end
	end)

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			setPressed(false)
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		setPressed(false)
	end)
end

-- Permanently suppress the old Island Warp overlay.
local legacyConnections = {}

local function suppressLegacyOverlay(instance)
	if not instance or instance.Name ~= "BiomeWarpOverlay" then
		return
	end
	if not instance:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return
	end

	instance.Visible = false

	if not legacyConnections[instance] then
		legacyConnections[instance] = instance:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible"):Connect(function()
			if instance.Parent and instance.Visible then
				instance.Visible = false
			end
		end)
	end
end

for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
	suppressLegacyOverlay(descendant)
end

screenGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	task.defer(suppressLegacyOverlay, descendant)

local function updateResponsiveScale()
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)

	local fit = math.min(
		(viewport.X * 0.97) / BASE_WIDTH,
		(viewport.Y * 0.95) / BASE_HEIGHT
	)

	uiScale.Scale = math.clamp(
		fit * ISLAND_WARP_UI_SIZE_MULTIPLIER,
		0.28,
		1
	)
end

local function updateScrollCanvas()
	task.defer(function()
		-- Three real islands + one Coming Soon card.
		-- Use an explicit height so scrolling does not depend on
		-- UIListLayout resolving while the UI is still invisible.
		local cardCount = #ISLANDS + 1
		local contentHeight = (cardCount * CARD_HEIGHT)
			+ ((cardCount - 1) * CARD_GAP)
			+ 24

		listHolder.Size = UDim2.new(
			1,
			-16,
			0,
			contentHeight
		)

		scroll.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(
			0,
			contentHeight
		)
	end)
end

layout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(
	updateScrollCanvas
)

local function isPointInside(guiObject, point)
	local position = guiObject.AbsolutePosition
	local size = guiObject.AbsoluteSize

	return point.X >= position.X
		and point.X <= position.X + size.X
		and point.Y >= position.Y
		and point.Y <= position.Y + size.Y
end

local function setCanvasY(newY)
	local maxY = math.max(
		0,
		scroll.AbsoluteCanvasSize.Y - scroll.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y
	)

	scroll.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(
		0,
		math.clamp(newY, 0, maxY)
	)
end

-- Native ScrollingFrame input can be blocked by overlapping GUI elements.
-- This mouse-wheel handler guarantees scrolling whenever the cursor is
-- over the island list.
UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if not root.Visible then
		return
	end

	if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel then
		return
	end

	local mousePosition = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
	if not isPointInside(scroll, mousePosition) then
		return
	end

	setCanvasY(
		scroll.CanvasPosition.Y
		- (input.Position.Z * SCROLL_WHEEL_STEP)
	)
end)

-- Touch-drag backup for phones and tablets.
local activeTouch = nil
local previousTouchY = 0

scroll.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
		activeTouch = input
		previousTouchY = input.Position.Y
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if input ~= activeTouch then
		return
	end

	local deltaY = input.Position.Y - previousTouchY
	previousTouchY = input.Position.Y
	setCanvasY(scroll.CanvasPosition.Y - deltaY)
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input == activeTouch then
		activeTouch = nil
	end
end)

local function setVisible(visible)
	root.Visible = visible == true

	-- The old overlay must never remain visible behind the modern UI.
	for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
		suppressLegacyOverlay(descendant)
	end

	if visible then
		scroll.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		updateScrollCanvas()

		-- The legacy listener may run after this listener, so hide it again
		-- on the following frames.
		task.defer(function()
			for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
				suppressLegacyOverlay(descendant)
			end
		end)

		task.delay(0.08, function()
			for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
				suppressLegacyOverlay(descendant)
			end
		end)
	end
end

closeButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	setVisible(false)
end)

OpenBiomeWarp.OnClientEvent:Connect(function()
	setVisible(true)
end)

-- QuestModernClient_SAFE
-- Runs independently from FishingClient so a Quest UI error cannot stop
-- Bag, Fishdex, Shop, HUD, fishing controls, or the minigame from loading.

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local fishingGui = script.Parent

local fishingClient = fishingGui:WaitForChild("FishingClient", 20)
if not fishingClient then
	warn("[QuestModernClient] FishingClient was not found.")
	return
end

local root = fishingGui:WaitForChild("Root", 20)
if not root then
	warn("[QuestModernClient] FishingGui.Root was not created.")
	return
end

local questModule = fishingClient:FindFirstChild("QuestModernUI")
if not questModule or not questModule:IsA("ModuleScript") then
	warn("[QuestModernClient] QuestModernUI ModuleScript was not found under FishingClient.")
	return
end

local requireSucceeded, QuestModernUI = pcall(require, questModule)
if not requireSucceeded then
	warn("[QuestModernClient] QuestModernUI require failed:", QuestModernUI)
	return
end

if type(QuestModernUI) ~= "table" or type(QuestModernUI.create) ~= "function" then
	warn("[QuestModernClient] QuestModernUI must return a table containing create().")
	return
end

local controller
local mainPanel
local panelTitle

local function refreshLegacyRefs()
	mainPanel = root:FindFirstChild("MainPanel", true)
	panelTitle = mainPanel and mainPanel:FindFirstChild("PanelTitle", true)
end

local function hideLegacyQuestPanel()
	refreshLegacyRefs()
	if mainPanel then
		mainPanel.Visible = false
	end
end

local function hideModernQuest()
	if controller then
		controller:SetVisible(false)
	end
end

local createSucceeded, createdController = pcall(function()
	return QuestModernUI.create({
		parent = root,
		remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("FishingRemotes"),

		onClose = function()
			hideModernQuest()
			hideLegacyQuestPanel()
		end,
	})
end)

if not createSucceeded then
	warn("[QuestModernClient] QuestModernUI.create failed:", createdController)
	return
end

controller = createdController
controller:SetVisible(false)

local function showModernQuest()
	-- FishingClient's own Quest callback runs on the same click and first creates
	-- the old panel. Deferring this makes the modern UI win after that callback.
	task.defer(function()
		hideLegacyQuestPanel()
		controller:SetVisible(true)
	end)
end

local connectedButtons = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local connectedFishdexRoots = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local connectedPanelTitles = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local connectedOpenEvents = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })

local function connectButton(instance)
	if not instance:IsA("GuiButton") or connectedButtons[instance] then
		return
	end

	if instance.Name == "QuestsButton" then
		connectedButtons[instance] = true
		instance.Activated:Connect(showModernQuest)
	elseif instance.Name == "SettingsButton" or instance.Name == "ShopButton" then
		connectedButtons[instance] = true
		instance.Activated:Connect(hideModernQuest)
	end
end

local function connectFishdexRoot(instance)
	if not instance:IsA("GuiObject")
		or instance.Name ~= "ModernFishdex"
		or connectedFishdexRoots[instance] then
		return
	end

	connectedFishdexRoots[instance] = true
	instance:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible"):Connect(function()
		if instance.Visible then
			hideModernQuest()
		end
	end)
end

local function connectPanelTitle(instance)
	if not instance:IsA("TextLabel")
		or instance.Name ~= "PanelTitle"
		or connectedPanelTitles[instance] then
		return
	end

	connectedPanelTitles[instance] = true
	instance:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function()
		if instance.Text ~= "Quests" then
			hideModernQuest()
		end
	end)
end

local function connectOpenPanelEvent(instance)
	if not instance:IsA("BindableEvent")
		or instance.Name ~= "OpenFishingPanel"
		or connectedOpenEvents[instance] then
		return
	end

	connectedOpenEvents[instance] = true
	instance.Event:Connect(function()
		hideModernQuest()
	end)
end

local function scan(instance)
	connectButton(instance)
	connectFishdexRoot(instance)
	connectPanelTitle(instance)
	connectOpenPanelEvent(instance)
end

for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
	scan(descendant)
end

fishingGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	task.defer(scan, descendant)
end)

print("[QuestModernClient] Safe standalone Quest UI loaded.")

local RARITY_RANK = {
	Common = 1,
	Uncommon = 2,
	Rare = 3,
	Epic = 4,
	Legendary = 5,
	Mythic = 6,
}

local FALLBACK_RARITY_COLORS = {
	Common = Color3.fromRGB(236, 242, 255),
	Uncommon = Color3.fromRGB(56, 235, 92),
	Rare = Color3.fromRGB(49, 157, 255),
	Epic = Color3.fromRGB(215, 88, 255),
	Legendary = Color3.fromRGB(255, 197, 35),
	Mythic = Color3.fromRGB(255, 70, 70),
}

local function formatNumber(value)
	local text = tostring(math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0)))
	local result = text

	while true do
		local changed
		result, changed = result:gsub("^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)", "%1,%2")
		if changed == 0 then
			break
		end
	end

	return result
end

local function normalizeRarity(rarity)
	if rarity == "Mythical" then
		return "Mythic"
	end

	if RARITY_RANK[rarity] then
		return rarity
	end

	return "Common"
end

local function getRarityRank(rarity)
	return RARITY_RANK[normalizeRarity(rarity)] or 0
end

local function getRarityColor(rarity)
	rarity = normalizeRarity(rarity)

	local configured = GameConfig.RarityColors
		and GameConfig.RarityColors[rarity]

	return configured
		or FALLBACK_RARITY_COLORS[rarity]
		or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
end

local function getFishImage(fish)
	local imageKey = fish and (fish.imageKey or fish.id or fish.name)
	local imageId

	if imageKey and GameConfig.getFishImage then
		imageId = GameConfig.getFishImage(imageKey)
	end

	return type(imageId) == "string" and imageId or ""
end

local function makeImage(
	parent,
	name,
	image,
	position,
	size,
	zIndex
)
	local object = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	object.Name = name
	object.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	object.BorderSizePixel = 0
	object.Image = image
	object.Position = position
	object.Size = size
	object.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	object.ZIndex = zIndex
	object.Parent = parent
	return object
end

local function makeImageButton(
	parent,
	name,
	image,
	position,
	size,
	zIndex
)
	local button = Instance.new("ImageButton")
	button.Name = name
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.BorderSizePixel = 0
	button.Image = image
	button.Position = position
	button.Size = size
	button.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	button.AutoButtonColor = false
	button.ZIndex = zIndex
	button.Parent = parent
	return button
end

local function createMappedImageObject(
	parent,
	name,
	image,
	position,
	size,
	zIndex,
	crop,
	asButton
)
	local holder = Instance.new(asButton and "ImageButton" or "Frame")
	holder.Name = name
	holder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	holder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	holder.Position = position
	holder.Size = size
	holder.ClipsDescendants = true
	holder.ZIndex = zIndex
	holder.Parent = parent

	if asButton then
		holder.ImageTransparency = 1
		holder.AutoButtonColor = false
	end

	local source = crop.source
	local rect = crop.rect
	local rectWidth = rect.Max.X - rect.Min.X
	local rectHeight = rect.Max.Y - rect.Min.Y

	local targetWidth = size.X.Offset
	local targetHeight = size.Y.Offset

	local fullWidth = targetWidth * source.X / rectWidth
	local fullHeight = targetHeight * source.Y / rectHeight

	local imageObject = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	imageObject.Name = "MappedImage"
	imageObject.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	imageObject.BorderSizePixel = 0
	imageObject.Image = image
	imageObject.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
		-(rect.Min.X / source.X) * fullWidth,
		-(rect.Min.Y / source.Y) * fullHeight
	)
	imageObject.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(fullWidth, fullHeight)
	imageObject.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	imageObject.ZIndex = zIndex
	imageObject.Parent = holder

	return holder, imageObject
end

local function makeMappedImage(
	parent,
	name,
	image,
	position,
	size,
	zIndex,
	crop
)
	return createMappedImageObject(
		parent,
		name,
		image,
		position,
		size,
		zIndex,
		crop,
		false
	)
end

local function addCorner(guiObject, radius)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius)
	corner.Parent = guiObject
	return corner
end

local function addPressFeedback(button)
	local buttonScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	buttonScale.Name = "PressScale"
	buttonScale.Scale = 1
	buttonScale.Parent = button

	local currentTween

	local function tweenTo(value)
		if currentTween then
			currentTween:Cancel()
		end

		currentTween = TweenService:Create(
			buttonScale,
			TweenInfo.new(
				0.08,
				Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
				Enum.EasingDirection.Out
			),
			{ Scale = value }
		)
		currentTween:Play()
	end

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			tweenTo(0.95)
		end
	end)

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			tweenTo(1)
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		tweenTo(1)
	end)
end

local function pointInside(guiObject, point)
	if not guiObject or not guiObject.Visible then
		return false
	end

	local position = guiObject.AbsolutePosition
	local size = guiObject.AbsoluteSize

	return point.X >= position.X
		and point.X <= position.X + size.X
		and point.Y >= position.Y
		and point.Y <= position.Y + size.Y
end

local responsiveScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
responsiveScale.Name = "ResponsiveScale"
responsiveScale.Parent = root

local function updateResponsiveScale()
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize
		or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)

	local fit = math.min(
		(viewport.X * 0.98) / BASE_WIDTH,
		(viewport.Y * 0.98) / BASE_HEIGHT
	)

	responsiveScale.Scale = math.clamp(
		fit * UI_SIZE_MULTIPLIER,
		0.30,
		1
	)
end

updateResponsiveScale()

local currentCamera = workspace.CurrentCamera
if currentCamera then
	currentCamera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ViewportSize"):Connect(
		updateResponsiveScale
	)
end

local function clearList()
	for _, child in ipairs(list:GetChildren()) do
		if child ~= listLayout then
			child:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function getLogicalScale()
	return math.max(0.001, responsiveScale.Scale)
end

local function getViewportHeight()
	-- AbsoluteWindowSize is screen-scaled; CanvasSize and CanvasPosition use
	-- the unscaled UI coordinate system. Convert the viewport back to logical
	-- units before comparing them.
	return math.max(
		1,
		list.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y / getLogicalScale()
	)
end

local function getContentHeight()
	return math.max(
		list.CanvasSize.Y.Offset,
		listLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y
			/ getLogicalScale()
	)
end

local function getMaxCanvasY()
	return math.max(
		0,
		getContentHeight() - getViewportHeight()
	)
end

local function setCanvasY(value)
	list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(
		0,
		math.clamp(value, 0, getMaxCanvasY())
	)
end

local function updateScrollbar()
	forceNativeScrollbarHidden()

	local contentHeight = getContentHeight()
	local viewportHeight = getViewportHeight()
	local trackHeight = SCROLL_TRACK_HEIGHT
	local maxCanvas = math.max(
		0,
		contentHeight - viewportHeight
	)
	local isScrollable = maxCanvas > 1

	scrollTrack.Visible = isScrollable
	scrollThumb.Visible = isScrollable
	scrollThumb.Active = isScrollable

	if not isScrollable then
		scrollThumb.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(2, 0)
		scrollThumb.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
			SCROLL_TRACK_WIDTH - 4,
			trackHeight
		)
		return
	end

	local visibleRatio = math.clamp(
		viewportHeight / math.max(1, contentHeight),
		0.12,
		1
	)
	local thumbHeight = math.clamp(
		math.floor(trackHeight * visibleRatio + 0.5),
		92,
		trackHeight
	)
	local maxTravel = math.max(
		0,
		trackHeight - thumbHeight
	)
	local scrollRatio = math.clamp(
		list.CanvasPosition.Y / math.max(1, maxCanvas),
		0,
		1
	)

	scrollThumb.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
		SCROLL_TRACK_WIDTH - 4,
		thumbHeight
	)
	scrollThumb.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
		2,
		math.floor(maxTravel * scrollRatio + 0.5)
	)
end

local function scheduleScrollbarUpdate()
	task.defer(updateScrollbar)
	task.delay(0.05, updateScrollbar)
	task.delay(0.15, updateScrollbar)
end

list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(updateScrollbar)
list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteWindowSize"):Connect(
	scheduleScrollbarUpdate
)
listLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(
	scheduleScrollbarUpdate
)
responsiveScale:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Scale"):Connect(
	scheduleScrollbarUpdate
)

local thumbDragging = false
local thumbDragInput = nil
local thumbStartScreenY = 0
local thumbStartCanvasY = 0

scrollThumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
	then
		thumbDragging = true
		thumbDragInput = input
		thumbStartScreenY = input.Position.Y
		thumbStartCanvasY = list.CanvasPosition.Y
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if not thumbDragging then
		return
	end

	local currentY

	if thumbDragInput
		and thumbDragInput.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
	then
		if input ~= thumbDragInput then
			return
		end
		currentY = input.Position.Y
	elseif input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
		currentY = input.Position.Y
	end

	if not currentY then
		return
	end

	local logicalScale = getLogicalScale()
	local trackHeight = SCROLL_TRACK_HEIGHT
	local thumbHeight = scrollThumb.Size.Y.Offset
	local maxTravel = math.max(
		1,
		trackHeight - thumbHeight
	)
	local deltaLogical =
		(currentY - thumbStartScreenY) / logicalScale

	setCanvasY(
		thumbStartCanvasY
			+ (
				(deltaLogical / maxTravel)
				* getMaxCanvasY()
			)
	)
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input == thumbDragInput
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
	then
		thumbDragging = false
		thumbDragInput = nil
	end
end)

scrollTrack.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch
	then
		return
	end

	if pointInside(scrollThumb, input.Position) then
		return
	end

	local relativeY = math.clamp(
		(
			input.Position.Y
			- scrollTrack.AbsolutePosition.Y
		) / getLogicalScale(),
		0,
		SCROLL_TRACK_HEIGHT
	)
	local ratio =
		relativeY / math.max(1, SCROLL_TRACK_HEIGHT)

	setCanvasY(getMaxCanvasY() * ratio)
end)

local function createSortTab(mode, x)
	local selected = activeSortMode == mode
	local image = selected
		and ASSETS.SelectedTab
		or ASSETS.UnselectedTab

	local button = makeMappedButton(
		tabHolder,
		mode .. "Tab",
		image,
		UDim2.fromOffset(x, 0),
		UDim2.fromOffset(TAB_WIDTH, TAB_HEIGHT),
		615,
		selected and CROP.SelectedTab or CROP.UnselectedTab
	)
	addPressFeedback(button)

	local labelText = mode

	if selected then
		labelText = mode
			.. ": "
			.. (sortDescending and "High" or "Low")
	end

	local label = makeText(
		button,
		"Label",
		labelText,
		selected and 36 or 39,
		Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
		Enum.Font.FredokaOne,
		617
	)
	label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center

	button.Activated:Connect(function()
		if activeSortMode == mode then
			sortDescending = not sortDescending
		else
			activeSortMode = mode
			sortDescending = true
		end

		list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		render()
	end)
end

local function renderTabs()
	for _, child in ipairs(tabHolder:GetChildren()) do
		child:Destroy()
	end

	createSortTab("Rarity", 0)
	createSortTab("Value", TAB_WIDTH + TAB_GAP)
end

local function makeRow(entry, layoutOrder)
	local fish = entry.fish
	local rarity = normalizeRarity(fish.rarity)
	local rowAsset = ASSETS.Rows[rarity] or ASSETS.Rows.Common
	local rowCrop = CROP[rarity .. "Row"] or CROP.CommonRow

	local row = makeMappedImage(
		list,
		"FishRow_" .. tostring(fish.serial or entry.index),
		rowAsset,
		UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0),
		UDim2.fromOffset(ROW_WIDTH, ROW_HEIGHT),
		614,
		rowCrop
	)
	row.LayoutOrder = layoutOrder

	local fishImageId = getFishImage(fish)

	if fishImageId ~= "" then
		local icon = makeImage(
			row,
			"FishIcon",
			fishImageId,
			UDim2.fromOffset(FISH_ICON_X, FISH_ICON_Y),
			UDim2.fromOffset(FISH_ICON_WIDTH, FISH_ICON_HEIGHT),
			617
		)
		icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	else
		local fallback = makeText(
			row,
			"MissingFishIcon",
			"FISH",
			29,
			Color3.fromRGB(210, 230, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamBold,
			617
		)
		fallback.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
			FISH_ICON_X,
			FISH_ICON_Y
		)
		fallback.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
			FISH_ICON_WIDTH,
			FISH_ICON_HEIGHT
		)
		fallback.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	end

	local rarityColor = getRarityColor(rarity)
	local fishName = tostring(fish.name or fish.id or "Fish")

	local name = makeText(
		row,
		"FishName",
		fishName .. " [" .. rarity .. "]",
		42,
		rarityColor,
		Enum.Font.GothamBlack,
		618
	)
	name.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(FISH_NAME_X, FISH_NAME_Y)
	name.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
		FISH_NAME_WIDTH,
		FISH_NAME_HEIGHT
	)

	local value = makeText(
		row,
		"FishValue",
		"Sell value: "
			.. formatNumber(fish.value)
			.. " coins",
		31,
		Color3.fromRGB(167, 198, 255),
		Enum.Font.GothamMedium,
		618
	)
	value.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(FISH_VALUE_X, FISH_VALUE_Y)
	value.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
		FISH_VALUE_WIDTH,
		FISH_VALUE_HEIGHT
	)
	value.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.65

	local sellButton = makeMappedButton(
		row,
		"SellButton",
		ASSETS.SellButton,
		UDim2.fromOffset(SELL_BUTTON_X, SELL_BUTTON_Y),
		UDim2.fromOffset(
			SELL_BUTTON_WIDTH,
			SELL_BUTTON_HEIGHT
		),
		620,
		CROP.SellButton
	)
	addPressFeedback(sellButton)

	local sellText = makeText(
		sellButton,
		"Label",
		"Sell",
		43,
		Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
		Enum.Font.FredokaOne,
		621
	)
	sellText.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	sellText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center

	local pendingKey = tostring(fish.serial or entry.index)
	local pending = pendingSingleSales[pendingKey] == true
	sellButton.Active = not pending
	sellButton.Selectable = not pending
	sellButton.ImageTransparency = pending and 0.35 or 0
	sellText.Text = pending and "Selling..." or "Sell"
	sellText.TextTransparency = pending and 0.2 or 0

	sellButton.Activated:Connect(function()
		if pendingSingleSales[pendingKey] then
			return
		end

		pendingSingleSales[pendingKey] = true
		sellButton.Active = false
		sellButton.Selectable = false
		sellButton.ImageTransparency = 0.35
		sellText.Text = "Selling..."

		SellFish:FireServer(
			"Single",
			fish.serial,
			entry.index
		)

		task.delay(4, function()
			if pendingSingleSales[pendingKey] then
				pendingSingleSales[pendingKey] = nil
				if root.Visible then
					render()
				end
			end
		end)
	end)
end

local function getSortedEntries()
	local entries = {}

	if not state or type(state.Inventory) ~= "table" then
		return entries
	end

	for index, fish in ipairs(state.Inventory) do
		table.insert(entries, {
			fish = fish,
			index = index,
		})
	end

	table.sort(entries, function(left, right)
		local leftFish = left.fish
		local rightFish = right.fish
		local leftRank = getRarityRank(leftFish.rarity)
		local rightRank = getRarityRank(rightFish.rarity)
		local leftValue = tonumber(leftFish.value) or 0
		local rightValue = tonumber(rightFish.value) or 0

		if activeSortMode == "Rarity" then
			if leftRank ~= rightRank then
				if sortDescending then
					return leftRank > rightRank
				end
				return leftRank < rightRank
			end

			if leftValue ~= rightValue then
				if sortDescending then
					return leftValue > rightValue
				end
				return leftValue < rightValue
			end
		else
			if leftValue ~= rightValue then
				if sortDescending then
					return leftValue > rightValue
				end
				return leftValue < rightValue
			end

			if leftRank ~= rightRank then
				if sortDescending then
					return leftRank > rightRank
				end
				return leftRank < rightRank
			end
		end

		local leftSerial = tonumber(leftFish.serial) or left.index
		local rightSerial = tonumber(rightFish.serial) or right.index

		if sortDescending then
			return leftSerial > rightSerial
		end

		return leftSerial < rightSerial
	end)

	return entries
end

local function updateSellAllState()
	local hasFish = state
		and type(state.Inventory) == "table"
		and #state.Inventory > 0

	local enabled = hasFish and not sellAllPending

	sellAllButton.Active = enabled
	sellAllButton.Selectable = enabled
	sellAllButton.ImageTransparency = enabled and 0 or 0.38
	sellAllText.TextTransparency = enabled and 0 or 0.2
	sellAllText.Text = sellAllPending and "Selling..." or "Sell All"
end

render = function()
	local oldCanvasY = list.CanvasPosition.Y

	renderTabs()
	clearList()
	updateSellAllState()

	if not state then
		local loading = makeText(
			list,
			"Loading",
			"Loading fish...",
			42,
			Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamBlack,
			616
		)
		loading.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(ROW_WIDTH, 140)
		loading.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		loading.LayoutOrder = 1
		list.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 140)
		scheduleScrollbarUpdate()
		return
	end

	local entries = getSortedEntries()

	if #entries == 0 then
		local empty = makeText(
			list,
			"Empty",
			"No fish in your bag.",
			42,
			Color3.fromRGB(190, 210, 240),
			Enum.Font.GothamBlack,
			616
		)
		empty.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(ROW_WIDTH, 150)
		empty.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		empty.LayoutOrder = 1

		list.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 150)
		list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		scheduleScrollbarUpdate()
		return
	end

	for layoutOrder, entry in ipairs(entries) do
		makeRow(entry, layoutOrder)
	end

	local contentHeight = (#entries * ROW_HEIGHT)
		+ (math.max(0, #entries - 1) * ROW_GAP)
		+ 12

	list.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(0, contentHeight)

	task.defer(function()
		setCanvasY(oldCanvasY)
		scheduleScrollbarUpdate()
	end)
end

local function refreshState()
	local success, result = pcall(function()
		return GetState:InvokeServer()
	end)

	if success and type(result) == "table" then
		state = result
		table.clear(pendingSingleSales)
		sellAllPending = false
		render()
	elseif not success then
		warn(
			"[SeasideShopModernClient] GetState failed:",
			result
		)
	end
end

sellAllButton.Activated:Connect(function()
	if sellAllPending
		or not state
		or type(state.Inventory) ~= "table"
		or #state.Inventory == 0
	then
		return
	end

	sellAllPending = true
	updateSellAllState()
	SellFish:FireServer()

	task.delay(4, function()
		if sellAllPending then
			sellAllPending = false
			if root.Visible then
				refreshState()
			end
		end
	end)
end)

closeButton.Activated:Connect(function()
	setVisible(false)
end)

-- Permanently suppress only the old fishmonger popup.
local legacyConnections = {}
local legacyOpenDebounce = false

local function openModernFromLegacyAttempt()
	if legacyOpenDebounce then
		return
	end

	legacyOpenDebounce = true

	task.defer(function()
		if setVisible then
			setVisible(true)
		end

		task.delay(0.15, function()
			legacyOpenDebounce = false
		end)
	end)
end

local function suppressLegacyFishmonger(instance)
	if not instance
		or instance == root
		or not instance:IsA("GuiObject")
		or instance.Name ~= "FishmongerSellOverlay"
	then
		return
	end

	if instance.Visible then
		instance.Visible = false
	end

	if not legacyConnections[instance] then
		legacyConnections[instance] =
			instance:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible"):Connect(function()
				if not instance.Parent or not instance.Visible then
					return
				end

				instance.Visible = false
				openModernFromLegacyAttempt()
			end)
	end
end

local function suppressAllLegacyFishmongers()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
		suppressLegacyFishmonger(descendant)
	end
end

screenGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	task.defer(suppressLegacyFishmonger, descendant)
end)

suppressAllLegacyFishmongers()

setVisible = function(visible)
	root.Visible = visible == true

	if visible then
		list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		list.ClipsDescendants = true
		refreshState()
		render()
		scheduleScrollbarUpdate()

		task.defer(suppressAllLegacyFishmongers)
		task.delay(0.05, suppressAllLegacyFishmongers)
		task.delay(0.15, suppressAllLegacyFishmongers)
	else
		thumbDragging = false
		thumbDragInput = nil
	end
end

OpenSellFish.OnClientEvent:Connect(function()
	setVisible(true)
end)

StateUpdated.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(newState)
	state = newState
	table.clear(pendingSingleSales)
	sellAllPending = false

	if root.Visible then
		render()
	end
end)

-- Extra protection because the legacy listener may run after this script.
local legacySuppressElapsed = 0

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
	if not root.Visible then
		return
	end

	legacySuppressElapsed += deltaTime

	if legacySuppressElapsed >= 0.10 then
		legacySuppressElapsed = 0
		suppressAllLegacyFishmongers()
	end
end)

	"[SeasideShopModernClient] Loaded successfully. "
		.. "Modern Seaside Shop is ready."
)

local function formatNumber(value)
	local text = tostring(math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0)))
	local result = text

	while true do
		local changed
		result, changed = result:gsub("^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)", "%1,%2")
		if changed == 0 then
			break
		end
	end

	return result
end

local function normalizeAssetId(value)
	if value == nil then
		return ""
	end

	local text = tostring(value)
	if text == "" then
		return ""
	end

	if text:find("rbxassetid://", 1, true)
		or text:find("rbxasset://", 1, true)
	then
		return text
	end

	if tonumber(text) then
		return "rbxassetid://" .. text
	end

	return text
end

local function pointInside(guiObject, point)
	if not guiObject or not guiObject.Visible then
		return false
	end

	local position = guiObject.AbsolutePosition
	local size = guiObject.AbsoluteSize

	return point.X >= position.X
		and point.X <= position.X + size.X
		and point.Y >= position.Y
		and point.Y <= position.Y + size.Y
end

local function addCorner(guiObject, radius)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius)
	corner.Parent = guiObject
	return corner
end

local function makeText(
	parent,
	name,
	text,
	textSize,
	color,
	font
)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = name
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.BorderSizePixel = 0
	label.Font = font or Enum.Font.FredokaOne
	label.Text = text or ""
	label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	label.TextSize = textSize or 24
	label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.05
	label.ZIndex = 505
	label.Parent = parent
	return label
end

local function makeCropArtwork(parent, imageId, crop, zIndex)
	local artwork = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	artwork.Name = "Artwork"
	artwork.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	artwork.BorderSizePixel = 0
	artwork.Image = imageId
	artwork.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
	artwork.ZIndex = zIndex or 500
	artwork.Parent = parent

	if crop then
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(
			-crop.offset.X / crop.size.X,
			-crop.offset.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(
			crop.source.X / crop.size.X,
			crop.source.Y / crop.size.Y
		)
	else
		artwork.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	end

	return artwork
end

local function makeImageHolder(
	parent,
	name,
	imageId,
	position,
	size,
	crop,
	zIndex
)
	local holder = Instance.new("Frame")
	holder.Name = name
	holder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	holder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	holder.Position = position
	holder.Size = size
	holder.ClipsDescendants = crop ~= nil
	holder.ZIndex = zIndex or 500
	holder.Parent = parent

	makeCropArtwork(holder, imageId, crop, zIndex)
	return holder
end

local function makeImageButton(
	parent,
	name,
	imageId,
	position,
	size,
	crop,
	zIndex
)

	button.Name = name
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.BorderSizePixel = 0
	button.Position = position
	button.Size = size
	button.Image = ""
	button.AutoButtonColor = false
	button.ClipsDescendants = crop ~= nil
	button.ZIndex = zIndex or 505
	button.Parent = parent

	makeCropArtwork(button, imageId, crop, zIndex)
	return button
end

local function getArtwork(guiObject)
	return guiObject and guiObject:FindFirstChild("Artwork")
end

local function addPressFeedback(button)
	local originalPosition = button.Position
	local originalSize = button.Size
	local artwork = getArtwork(button)

	local activeTween
	local activeArtworkTween

	local function apply(pressed)
		if not button.Active then
			return
		end

		if activeTween then
			activeTween:Cancel()
		end
		if activeArtworkTween then
			activeArtworkTween:Cancel()
		end

		activeTween = TweenService:Create(
			button,
			TweenInfo.new(
				0.075,
				Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
				Enum.EasingDirection.Out
			),
			{
				Position = UDim2.new(
					originalPosition.X.Scale,
					originalPosition.X.Offset + (pressed and 3 or 0),
					originalPosition.Y.Scale,
					originalPosition.Y.Offset + (pressed and 3 or 0)
				),
				Size = UDim2.new(
					originalSize.X.Scale,
					originalSize.X.Offset - (pressed and 6 or 0),
					originalSize.Y.Scale,
					originalSize.Y.Offset - (pressed and 6 or 0)
				),
			}
		)
		activeTween:Play()

		if artwork then
			activeArtworkTween = TweenService:Create(
				artwork,
				TweenInfo.new(
					0.075,
					Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
					Enum.EasingDirection.Out
				),
				{
					ImageTransparency = pressed and 0.14 or 0,
				}
			)
			activeArtworkTween:Play()
		end
	end

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			apply(true)
		end
	end)

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
			apply(false)
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		apply(false)
	end)
end

local function clearList(list, layout)
	for _, child in ipairs(list:GetChildren()) do
		if child ~= layout then
			child:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function getOrderedIds(orderTable, dataTable)
	local result = {}

	if type(orderTable) == "table" then
		for _, itemId in ipairs(orderTable) do
			if dataTable[itemId] then
				table.insert(result, itemId)
			end
		end
	end

	for itemId in pairs(dataTable or {}) do
		if not table.find(result, itemId) then
			table.insert(result, itemId)
		end
	end

	table.sort(result, function(leftId, rightId)
		local left = dataTable[leftId] or {}
		local right = dataTable[rightId] or {}
		local leftOrder = tonumber(left.order) or math.huge
		local rightOrder = tonumber(right.order) or math.huge

		if leftOrder ~= rightOrder then
			return leftOrder < rightOrder
		end

		return tostring(left.displayName or leftId)
			< tostring(right.displayName or rightId)
	end)

	return result
end

local function getRodImage(rodId)
	local imageId = ASSETS.RodImages[rodId]

	if not imageId and GameConfig.getRodImage then
		imageId = GameConfig.getRodImage(rodId)
	end

	return normalizeAssetId(imageId)
end

local function getBaitImage(baitId)
	local imageId = ASSETS.BaitImages[baitId]

	if not imageId and GameConfig.getBaitImage then
		imageId = GameConfig.getBaitImage(baitId)
	end

	return normalizeAssetId(imageId)
end

local function getUnlockedMap()
	if not state then
		return {}
	end

	return state.UnlockedIslands
		or state.UnlockedBiomes
		or {}
end

local function requiredBiomeUnlocked(itemData)
	local requiredBiome = itemData and itemData.requiredBiome
	if not requiredBiome then
		return true
	end

	return getUnlockedMap()[requiredBiome] == true
end

-- Permanently suppress only the old Supply Shop overlay.
-- The current FishingClient creates this exact object and opens it after the
-- OpenRodShop event. Watching Visible makes the replacement reliable even if
-- event-listener order changes or this script starts slightly later.
local legacyConnections = {}
local legacyOpenDebounce = false

local function openModernFromLegacyAttempt()
	if legacyOpenDebounce then
		return
	end

	legacyOpenDebounce = true
	task.defer(function()
		if setVisible then
			print(
				"[SupplyShopModernClient] Old RodShopOverlay tried to open; "
					.. "opening ModernSupplyShop instead."
			)
			setVisible(true)
		end

		task.delay(0.15, function()
			legacyOpenDebounce = false
		end)
	end)
end

local function suppressLegacyRodShop(instance)
	if not instance
		or instance.Name ~= "RodShopOverlay"
		or not instance:IsA("GuiObject")
	then
		return
	end

	if instance.Visible then
		instance.Visible = false
	end

	if not legacyConnections[instance] then
		legacyConnections[instance] =
			instance:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible"):Connect(function()
				if not instance.Parent or not instance.Visible then
					return
				end

				instance.Visible = false
				openModernFromLegacyAttempt()
			end)

		print(
			"[SupplyShopModernClient] Watching legacy overlay:",
			instance:GetFullName()
		)
	end
end

local function suppressAllLegacyRodShops()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
		suppressLegacyRodShop(descendant)
	end
end

suppressAllLegacyRodShops()

screenGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	task.defer(suppressLegacyRodShop, descendant)
end)

task.delay(1, suppressAllLegacyRodShops)
task.delay(3, suppressAllLegacyRodShops)

local function getContentHeight()
	return math.max(
		list.CanvasSize.Y.Offset,
		listLayout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y
	)
end

local function getMaxCanvasY()
	return math.max(
		0,
		getContentHeight() - list.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y
	)
end

local function setCanvasY(newY)
	list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(
		0,
		math.clamp(newY, 0, getMaxCanvasY())
	)
end

local function updateScrollbar()
	local contentHeight = getContentHeight()
	local viewportHeight = math.max(1, list.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y)
	local trackHeight = math.max(1, scrollTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y)

	if contentHeight <= viewportHeight + 1 then
		scrollThumb.Visible = false
		return
	end

	scrollThumb.Visible = true

	local ratio = math.clamp(
		viewportHeight / contentHeight,
		0.10,
		1
	)
	local thumbHeight = math.max(
		82,
		math.floor(trackHeight * ratio)
	)
	local maxTravel = math.max(
		0,
		trackHeight - thumbHeight
	)
	local maxCanvasY = math.max(
		1,
		contentHeight - viewportHeight
	)
	local scrollRatio = math.clamp(
		list.CanvasPosition.Y / maxCanvasY,
		0,
		1
	)

	scrollThumb.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
		1,
		math.floor(maxTravel * scrollRatio)
	)
	scrollThumb.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
		SCROLL_TRACK_WIDTH - 2,
		thumbHeight
	)
end

list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(
	updateScrollbar
)
list:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteWindowSize"):Connect(
	updateScrollbar
)

local function setListCanvasForCount(itemCount)
	local contentHeight = 0

	if itemCount > 0 then
		contentHeight = (itemCount * CARD_HEIGHT)
			+ ((itemCount - 1) * CARD_GAP)
			+ 16
	end

	list.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(
		0,
		contentHeight
	)
	task.defer(updateScrollbar)
end

-- Guaranteed mouse wheel scrolling.
UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if not root.Visible then
		return
	end

	if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseWheel then
		return
	end

	local mousePosition = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
	if not pointInside(list, mousePosition)
		and not pointInside(scrollTrack, mousePosition)
	then
		return
	end

	setCanvasY(
		list.CanvasPosition.Y
		- (input.Position.Z * SCROLL_WHEEL_STEP)
	)
end)

-- Touch drag scrolling.
local activeTouch = nil
local touchStartY = 0
local touchStartCanvasY = 0

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if not root.Visible
		or input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		or not pointInside(list, input.Position)
	then
		return
	end

	activeTouch = input
	touchStartY = input.Position.Y
	touchStartCanvasY = list.CanvasPosition.Y
end)

UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if input ~= activeTouch then
		return
	end

	setCanvasY(
		touchStartCanvasY
		- (input.Position.Y - touchStartY)
	)
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input == activeTouch then
		activeTouch = nil
	end
end)

-- Drag the custom scrollbar thumb.
local activeThumbInput = nil
local thumbDragStartY = 0
local thumbDragStartCanvasY = 0

scrollThumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
	then
		activeThumbInput = input
		thumbDragStartY = input.Position.Y
		thumbDragStartCanvasY = list.CanvasPosition.Y
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if not activeThumbInput then
		return
	end

	local currentY

	if activeThumbInput.UserInputType
		== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
	then
		if input ~= activeThumbInput then
			return
		end
		currentY = input.Position.Y
	elseif input.UserInputType
		== Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement
	then
		currentY = input.Position.Y
	end

	if not currentY then
		return
	end

	local trackHeight = math.max(
		1,
		scrollTrack.AbsoluteSize.Y
	)
	local thumbHeight = math.max(
		1,
		scrollThumb.AbsoluteSize.Y
	)
	local maxTravel = math.max(
		1,
		trackHeight - thumbHeight
	)
	local deltaY = currentY - thumbDragStartY

	setCanvasY(
		thumbDragStartCanvasY
			+ (
				(deltaY / maxTravel)
				* getMaxCanvasY()
			)
	)
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input == activeThumbInput
		or input.UserInputType
		== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
	then
		activeThumbInput = nil
	end
end)

local function createTab(
	tabName,
	xPosition,
	iconKey
)
	local selected = activeTab == tabName
	local imageKey = selected
		and "SectionTabSelected"
		or "SectionTab"

	local button = makeImageButton(
		tabHolder,
		tabName .. "Tab",
		ASSETS[imageKey],
		UDim2.fromOffset(xPosition, 0),
		UDim2.fromOffset(TAB_WIDTH, TAB_HEIGHT),
		CROPS[imageKey],
		510
	)
	addPressFeedback(button)

	local iconCrop = CROPS[iconKey]
	local iconWidth = TAB_ICON_HEIGHT

	if iconCrop and iconCrop.size.Y > 0 then
		iconWidth = math.floor(
			(TAB_ICON_HEIGHT * iconCrop.size.X / iconCrop.size.Y)
				+ 0.5
		)
	end

	iconWidth = math.clamp(
		iconWidth,
		1,
		TAB_ICON_SLOT_WIDTH
	)

	local iconX = TAB_ICON_SLOT_X
		+ math.floor(
			(TAB_ICON_SLOT_WIDTH - iconWidth) / 2
		)

	makeImageHolder(
		button,
		"Icon",
		ASSETS[iconKey],
		UDim2.fromOffset(iconX, TAB_ICON_Y),
		UDim2.fromOffset(iconWidth, TAB_ICON_HEIGHT),
		iconCrop,
		513
	)

	local text = makeText(
		button,
		"Label",
		tabName,
		40,
		Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	)
	text.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(130, 8)
	text.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(185, 66)
	text.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	text.ZIndex = 514

	button.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		activeTab = tabName
		list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
	end)

	return button
end
