local function renderRods()
	local rodIds = getOrderedIds(
		GameConfig.RodOrder,
		GameConfig.Rods
	)

	for index, rodId in ipairs(rodIds) do
		local rod = GameConfig.Rods[rodId]
		local owned = state
			and state.OwnedRods
			and state.OwnedRods[rodId] == true
		local equipped = owned and state.EquippedRod == rodId
		local cost = tonumber(rod.cost) or 0
		local unlockLevel = tonumber(rod.unlockLevel) or 1
		local canAfford = state
			and (tonumber(state.Coins) or 0) >= cost
		local levelOkay = state
			and (tonumber(state.Level) or 1) >= unlockLevel
		local previousOkay = not rod.previousRod
			or (state and state.OwnedRods and state.OwnedRods[rod.previousRod] == true)

		local resourcesOkay = true
		local resourceText = "Resources: None (Met)"
		local resourceInventory = state and state.ResourceInventory or {}
		for _, resourceId in ipairs(ResourceConfig.ResourceOrder) do
			local required = tonumber(rod.resourceCosts and rod.resourceCosts[resourceId]) or 0
			if required > 0 then
				local current = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(resourceInventory[resourceId]) or 0))
				resourcesOkay = current >= required
				resourceText = string.format(
					"%s: %d/%d (%s)",
					ResourceConfig.Resources[resourceId].displayName,
					current,
					required,
					resourcesOkay and "Met" or "Unmet"
				)
				break
			end
		end

		local canBuy = not owned
			and previousOkay
			and levelOkay
			and resourcesOkay
			and canAfford
			and not pendingRodPurchases[rodId]

		local card = makeCard(rodId, index)
		makeItemIcon(card, getRodImage(rodId))

		local name = makeText(
			card,
			"ItemName",
			rod.displayName or rodId,
			39,
			Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		)
		name.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(240, 10)
		name.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(650, 46)
		name.ZIndex = 513

		local infoText = string.format(
			"Level %d (<font color='%s'>%s</font>)"
				.. "   |   <font color='#FFD51E'>%s Coins</font> (<font color='%s'>%s</font>)",
			unlockLevel,
			levelOkay and "#62FF53" or "#FF7575",
			levelOkay and "Met" or "Unmet",
			formatNumber(cost),
			canAfford and "#62FF53" or "#FF7575",
			canAfford and "Met" or "Unmet"
		)

		local info = makeText(
			card,
			"Info",
			infoText,
			23,
			Color3.fromRGB(160, 194, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamMedium
		)
		info.RichText = true
		info.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(240, 55)
		info.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(675, 28)
		info.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.65
		info.ZIndex = 513

		local previousName = rod.previousRod
			and GameConfig.Rods[rod.previousRod]
			and GameConfig.Rods[rod.previousRod].displayName
			or "None"
		local requirementText = string.format(
			"Previous: %s (%s)   |   %s",
			previousName,
			previousOkay and "Met" or "Unmet",
			resourceText
		)
		local requirements = makeText(
			card,
			"Requirements",
			requirementText,
			21,
			previousOkay and resourcesOkay and Color3.fromRGB(98, 255, 83) or Color3.fromRGB(255, 117, 117),
			Enum.Font.GothamMedium
		)
		requirements.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(240, 86)
		requirements.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(680, 28)
		requirements.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.7
		requirements.ZIndex = 513

		local statusText
		local statusColor
		if equipped then
			statusText = "Currently equipped."
			statusColor = Color3.fromRGB(98, 255, 83)
		elseif owned then
			statusText = "Owned."
			statusColor = Color3.fromRGB(136, 178, 255)
		elseif not previousOkay then
			statusText = "Previous rod required."
			statusColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 117, 117)
		elseif not levelOkay then
			statusText = "Reach level " .. tostring(unlockLevel) .. " to buy."
			statusColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 117, 117)
		elseif not resourcesOkay then
			statusText = "More crafting resources required."
			statusColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 117, 117)
		elseif not canAfford then
			statusText = "Need "
				.. formatNumber(cost - (tonumber(state.Coins) or 0))
				.. " more coins."
			statusColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 117, 117)
		else
			statusText = "Available for purchase."
			statusColor = Color3.fromRGB(136, 178, 255)
		end

		local status = makeText(
			card,
			"Status",
			statusText,
			21,
			statusColor,
			Enum.Font.GothamMedium
		)
		status.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(240, 119)
		status.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(680, 28)
		status.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.7
		status.ZIndex = 513

		if owned then
			makeStatusButton(card, equipped and "Equipped" or "Owned", nil)
		elseif canBuy then
			makeStatusButton(
				card,
				"Buy",
				function(button)
					if pendingRodPurchases[rodId] then
						return
					end

					pendingRodPurchases[rodId] = true
					button.Active = false
					BuyRod:FireServer(rodId)

					task.delay(4, function()
						pendingRodPurchases[rodId] = nil
					end)
				end
			)
		else
			makeStatusButton(card, "Not Enough", nil)
		end
	end

	setListCanvasForCount(#rodIds)
end
local function renderBaits()
	local allBaitIds = getOrderedIds(
		GameConfig.BaitOrder,
		GameConfig.Baits
	)
	local baitIds = {}

	for _, baitId in ipairs(allBaitIds) do
		if baitId ~= (GameConfig.BasicBaitId or "BasicBait") then
			table.insert(baitIds, baitId)
		end
	end

	for index, baitId in ipairs(baitIds) do
		local bait = GameConfig.Baits[baitId]
		local cost = tonumber(bait.cost) or 0
		local amount = math.max(
			1,
			math.floor(
				tonumber(bait.purchaseAmount) or 1
			)
		)
		local unlockLevel = tonumber(bait.unlockLevel) or 1
		local count = state
			and state.BaitInventory
			and math.max(
				0,
				math.floor(
					tonumber(
						state.BaitInventory[baitId]
					) or 0
				)
			)
			or 0

		local canAfford = state
			and (tonumber(state.Coins) or 0) >= cost
		local levelOkay = state
			and (tonumber(state.Level) or 1) >= unlockLevel
		local biomeOkay = requiredBiomeUnlocked(bait)
		local canBuy = canAfford
			and levelOkay
			and biomeOkay
			and not pendingBaitPurchases[baitId]

		local card = makeCard(baitId, index)
		makeItemIcon(card, getBaitImage(baitId))

		local name = makeText(
			card,
			"ItemName",
			bait.displayName or baitId,
			43,
			Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		)
		name.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(240, 18)
		name.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(650, 50)
		name.ZIndex = 513

		local description = makeText(
			card,
			"Description",
			bait.description or "",
			25,
			Color3.fromRGB(154, 190, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamMedium
		)
		description.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(240, 68)
		description.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(675, 34)
		description.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.72
		description.ZIndex = 513

		local detailText = string.format(
			"%s left"
				.. "   |   <font color='#FFD51E'>%s coins / %d</font>"
				.. "   |   Lv %d",
			formatNumber(count),
			formatNumber(cost),
			amount,
			unlockLevel
		)

		local detail = makeText(
			card,
			"Detail",
			detailText,
			25,
			Color3.fromRGB(160, 194, 255),
			Enum.Font.GothamMedium
		)
		detail.RichText = true
		detail.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(240, 106)
		detail.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(675, 36)
		detail.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.72
		detail.ZIndex = 513

		if canBuy then
			makeStatusButton(
				card,
				"Buy +" .. tostring(amount),
				function(button)
					if pendingBaitPurchases[baitId] then
						return
					end

					pendingBaitPurchases[baitId] = true
					button.Active = false
					BaitAction:FireServer("Buy", baitId)

					task.delay(4, function()
						pendingBaitPurchases[baitId] = nil
					end)
				end
			)
		else
			makeStatusButton(card, "Not Enough", nil)
		end
	end

	setListCanvasForCount(#baitIds)
end

local function render()
	renderTabs()
	clearList(list, listLayout)

	if not state then
		local loading = makeText(
			list,
			"Loading",
			"Loading supplies...",
			36,
			Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		)
		loading.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
			CARD_WIDTH,
			100
		)
		loading.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		loading.LayoutOrder = 1
		setListCanvasForCount(1)
		return
	end

	if activeTab == "Rods" then
		renderRods()
	else
		renderBaits()
	end

	task.defer(updateScrollbar)
end

-- Re-render after selecting a tab.
tabHolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
	if not child:IsA("GuiButton") then
		return
	end

	child.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		task.defer(render)
	end)
end)

local function refreshState()
	local success, result = pcall(function()
		return GetState:InvokeServer()
	end)

	if success and type(result) == "table" then
		state = result
		table.clear(pendingRodPurchases)
		table.clear(pendingBaitPurchases)
		render()
	elseif not success then
		warn(
			"[SupplyShopModernClient] GetState failed:",
			result
		)
	end
end

setVisible = function(visible)
	root.Visible = visible == true
	suppressAllLegacyRodShops()

	if visible then
		if backpackWasEnabled == nil then
			local success, enabled = pcall(function()
				return StarterGui:GetCoreGuiEnabled(
					Enum.CoreGuiType.Backpack
				)
			end)
			backpackWasEnabled = success and enabled or false
		end

		pcall(function()
			StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled(
				Enum.CoreGuiType.Backpack,
				false
			)
		end)

		-- Do not hide any custom FishingGui objects here.
		-- Bag and Fishdex may share the same parent container as the hotbar.
		list.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		refreshState()
		render()

		-- The old FishingClient listener may open its panel after this one.
		task.defer(suppressAllLegacyRodShops)
		task.delay(0.08, suppressAllLegacyRodShops)
	else
		activeTouch = nil
		activeThumbInput = nil

		if backpackWasEnabled ~= nil then
			pcall(function()
				StarterGui:SetCoreGuiEnabled(
					Enum.CoreGuiType.Backpack,
					backpackWasEnabled
				)
			end)
			backpackWasEnabled = nil
		end
	end
end

closeButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
	setVisible(false)
end)

OpenRodShop.OnClientEvent:Connect(function()
	print("[SupplyShopModernClient] OpenRodShop event received.")
	setVisible(true)
end)

StateUpdated.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(newState)
	state = newState
	table.clear(pendingRodPurchases)
	table.clear(pendingBaitPurchases)

	if root.Visible then
		render()
	end
end)

-- Additional protection in case the old overlay is rebuilt repeatedly.
local legacySuppressElapsed = 0
RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
	if not root.Visible then
		return
	end

	legacySuppressElapsed += deltaTime
	if legacySuppressElapsed >= 0.10 then
		legacySuppressElapsed = 0
		suppressAllLegacyRodShops()
	end
end)

print(
	"[SupplyShopModernClient] Loaded successfully. "
		.. "ModernSupplyShop is ready."
)

-- TapButton_CodeCircle_Replacement
-- Put this as a NEW LocalScript here:
-- StarterGui > FishingGui > TapButtonCodeCircle
--
-- This keeps the existing fishing button's click logic.
-- It only replaces the old visual with a code-drawn circular UI.
-- Do NOT paste this into FishingClient.

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local fishingGui = playerGui:WaitForChild("FishingGui")

-- =========================================================
-- EASY SETTINGS
-- =========================================================
local BUTTON_SIZE_DESKTOP = 118
local BUTTON_SIZE_MOBILE = 104

local OFFSET_X = 0
local OFFSET_Y = 0

local OUTER_RING_THICKNESS = 7

-- Dark ring, but no longer fully opaque.
local OUTER_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(22, 24, 28)
local OUTER_TRANSPARENCY = 0.22

-- Brighter outer outline so the button is visible over water/terrain.
local OUTER_STROKE_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(178, 188, 202)
local OUTER_STROKE_TRANSPARENCY = 0.18
local OUTER_STROKE_THICKNESS = 2.5

-- Much more transparent center.
local INNER_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(42, 45, 50)
local INNER_TRANSPARENCY = 0.80

-- Soft inner highlight ring.
local INNER_STROKE_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(140, 150, 166)
local INNER_STROKE_TRANSPARENCY = 0.42
local INNER_STROKE_THICKNESS = 1.5

local SHOW_TAP_TEXT = true
local TAP_TEXT = "TAP"
local TAP_TEXT_SIZE = 26

local PRESSED_SCALE = 0.92
local DISABLED_TRANSPARENCY = 0.48

-- =========================================================

local patchedButton = nil
local visualRoot = nil
local pressScale = nil
local innerCircle = nil
local tapLabel = nil
local activeTween = nil

local function normalize(value)
	return string.lower(
		tostring(value or "")
			:gsub("^%s+", "")
			:gsub("%s+$", "")
	)
end

local function disableOldTapVisualScripts()
	local oldNames = {
		"TapButtonVisualPatch",
		"TapButtonVisualPatchV2",
		"TapButtonVisualPatch_V2_EXACT_TARGET",
	}

	for _, name in ipairs(oldNames) do
		local oldScript = fishingGui:FindFirstChild(name)

		if oldScript
			and oldScript:IsA("LocalScript")
			and oldScript ~= script
		then
			oldScript.Enabled = false
		end
	end
end

local function isTapButton(instance)
	if not instance:IsA("GuiButton") then
		return false
	end

	local name = normalize(instance.Name)
	local text = instance:IsA("TextButton")
		and normalize(instance.Text)
		or ""

	if name:find("auto", 1, true) then
		return false
	end

	return name == "centercastbutton"
		or name == "castrodbutton"
		or name == "tapbutton"
		or name:find("centercast", 1, true) ~= nil
		or name:find("castrod", 1, true) ~= nil
		or text == "tap"
		or text == "cast rod"
		or text == "fishing..."
end

local function findTapButton()
	-- Prefer exact names first.
	for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiButton") then
			local name = normalize(descendant.Name)

			if name == "centercastbutton"
				or name == "castrodbutton"
				or name == "tapbutton"
			then
				return descendant
			end
		end
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if isTapButton(descendant) then
			return descendant
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function addCircleCorner(parent)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
	corner.Parent = parent
	return corner
end

local function addStroke(parent, color, thickness, transparency)
	local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
	stroke.Color = color
	stroke.Thickness = thickness
	stroke.Transparency = transparency
	stroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
	stroke.Parent = parent
	return stroke
end

local function getTargetSize()
	if UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
		return BUTTON_SIZE_MOBILE
	end

	return BUTTON_SIZE_DESKTOP
end

local function hideOldButtonVisual(button)
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.ClipsDescendants = false

	if button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button.TextTransparency = 1
		button.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
	elseif button:IsA("ImageButton") then
		button.ImageTransparency = 1
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(button:GetChildren()) do
		if child.Name == "CodeCircleVisual" then
			continue
		end

		if child.Name == "ModernTapVisual"
			or child.Name == "TapArtwork"
		then
			child:Destroy()
		elseif child:IsA("UIStroke") then
			child.Enabled = false
		elseif child:IsA("UIGradient") then
			child.Enabled = false
		elseif child:IsA("Frame")
			or child:IsA("ImageLabel")
			or child:IsA("ImageButton")
			or child:IsA("TextLabel")
			or child:IsA("TextButton")
		then
			child.Visible = false
		end
	end
end

local function tweenPressed(pressed)
	if not pressScale then
		return
	end

	if activeTween then
		activeTween:Cancel()
	end

	activeTween = TweenService:Create(
		pressScale,
		TweenInfo.new(
			0.08,
			Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
			Enum.EasingDirection.Out
		),
		{
			Scale = pressed and PRESSED_SCALE or 1,
		}
	)

	activeTween:Play()
end

local function updateEnabledLook()
	if not patchedButton or not innerCircle then
		return
	end

	local usable = patchedButton.Visible
		and patchedButton.Active

	innerCircle.BackgroundTransparency = usable
		and INNER_TRANSPARENCY
		or DISABLED_TRANSPARENCY

	if tapLabel then
		tapLabel.TextTransparency = usable and 0 or 0.45
	end
end

local function buildVisual(button)
	local oldVisual = button:FindFirstChild("CodeCircleVisual")
	if oldVisual then
		oldVisual:Destroy()
	end

	local size = getTargetSize()

	visualRoot = Instance.new("Frame")
	visualRoot.Name = "CodeCircleVisual"
	visualRoot.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	visualRoot.Position = UDim2.new(
		0.5,
		OFFSET_X,
		0.5,
		OFFSET_Y
	)
	visualRoot.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(size, size)
	visualRoot.BackgroundColor3 = OUTER_COLOR
	visualRoot.BackgroundTransparency = OUTER_TRANSPARENCY
	visualRoot.BorderSizePixel = 0
	visualRoot.Active = false
	visualRoot.ZIndex = button.ZIndex + 20
	visualRoot.Parent = button
	addCircleCorner(visualRoot)
	addStroke(
		visualRoot,
		OUTER_STROKE_COLOR,
		OUTER_STROKE_THICKNESS,
		OUTER_STROKE_TRANSPARENCY
	)

	local aspect = Instance.new("UIAspectRatioConstraint")
	aspect.AspectRatio = 1
	aspect.Parent = visualRoot

	pressScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	pressScale.Name = "PressScale"
	pressScale.Scale = 1
	pressScale.Parent = visualRoot

	innerCircle = Instance.new("Frame")
	innerCircle.Name = "TranslucentCenter"
	innerCircle.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(
		OUTER_RING_THICKNESS,
		OUTER_RING_THICKNESS
	)
	innerCircle.Size = UDim2.new(
		1,
		-(OUTER_RING_THICKNESS * 2),
		1,
		-(OUTER_RING_THICKNESS * 2)
	)
	innerCircle.BackgroundColor3 = INNER_COLOR
	innerCircle.BackgroundTransparency = INNER_TRANSPARENCY
	innerCircle.BorderSizePixel = 0
	innerCircle.Active = false
	innerCircle.ZIndex = visualRoot.ZIndex + 1
	innerCircle.Parent = visualRoot
	addCircleCorner(innerCircle)

	-- Soft inner highlight ring.
	addStroke(
		innerCircle,
		INNER_STROKE_COLOR,
		INNER_STROKE_THICKNESS,
		INNER_STROKE_TRANSPARENCY
	)

	if SHOW_TAP_TEXT then
		tapLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		tapLabel.Name = "TapText"
		tapLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		tapLabel.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		tapLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
		tapLabel.Text = TAP_TEXT
		tapLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
		tapLabel.TextSize = TAP_TEXT_SIZE
		tapLabel.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
		tapLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.45
		tapLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		tapLabel.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		tapLabel.Active = false
		tapLabel.ZIndex = innerCircle.ZIndex + 1
		tapLabel.Parent = innerCircle
	end

	updateEnabledLook()
end

local function patchButton(button)
	if patchedButton == button
		and button:FindFirstChild("CodeCircleVisual")
	then
		return
	end

	patchedButton = button
	hideOldButtonVisual(button)
	buildVisual(button)

	button.ChildAdded:Connect(function()
		task.defer(function()
			if button.Parent then
				hideOldButtonVisual(button)
			end
		end)
	end)

	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
		"BackgroundTransparency"
	):Connect(function()
		if button.BackgroundTransparency ~= 1 then
			button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		end
	end)

	if button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(function()
			button.TextTransparency = 1
			button.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
		end)
	end

	if button:IsA("ImageButton") then
		button:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
			"ImageTransparency"
		):Connect(function()
			if button.ImageTransparency ~= 1 then
				button.ImageTransparency = 1
			end
		end)
	end

	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Active"):Connect(
		updateEnabledLook
	)
	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible"):Connect(
		updateEnabledLook
	)

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if not button.Active then
			return
		end

		if input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			tweenPressed(true)
		end
	end)

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			tweenPressed(false)
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		tweenPressed(false)
	end)

	print(
		"[TapButtonCodeCircle] Patched:",
		button:GetFullName()
	)
end

disableOldTapVisualScripts()

-- Wait until FishingClient/HudControls creates the original Tap button.
task.spawn(function()
	while true do
		local button = findTapButton()

		if button then
			patchButton(button)
			break
		end

		task.wait(0.20)
	end
end)

-- Recover safely if the original button is recreated.
task.spawn(function()
	while true do
		task.wait(0.25)

		if patchedButton and patchedButton.Parent then
			hideOldButtonVisual(patchedButton)
			updateEnabledLook()
		else
			patchedButton = nil
			visualRoot = nil
			pressScale = nil
			innerCircle = nil
			tapLabel = nil

			local button = findTapButton()
			if button then
				patchButton(button)
			end
		end
	end
end)

print("[TapButtonCodeCircle] Transparent V2 loaded.")

-- TapButtonVisualPatch
-- Place this as a NEW LocalScript under:
-- StarterGui > FishingGui
--
-- This changes only the existing fishing-area Tap / Cast Rod button's visuals.
-- It does not replace FishingClient, HudControls, AutoFish, or the click logic.

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local fishingGui = playerGui:WaitForChild("FishingGui")

-- =========================================================
-- REQUIRED: Upload TapButton_Cropped_Transparent.png to
-- Asset Manager, then paste its image ID below.
-- Example: "rbxassetid://86146745555803"
-- =========================================================
local TAP_BUTTON_IMAGE = "rbxassetid://113864703941423"

-- EASY POSITION / SIZE CONTROLS
local TAP_VISUAL_SIZE = 200
local TAP_OFFSET_X = 0
local TAP_OFFSET_Y = -7

local PRESSED_SCALE = 0.90
local DISABLED_TRANSPARENCY = 0.42

local patchedButtons = setmetatable({}, {
	__mode = "k",
})

local function normalizeText(value)
	return string.lower(
		tostring(value or "")
			:gsub("^%s+", "")
			:gsub("%s+$", "")
	)
end

local function hasValidImageId()
	local numericId = TAP_BUTTON_IMAGE:match(
		"^rbxassetid://(%d+)$"
	)

	return numericId ~= nil
		and numericId ~= "0"
end

local function hasAutoFishSibling(button)
	local parent = button.Parent
	if not parent then
		return false
	end

	for _, sibling in ipairs(parent:GetChildren()) do
		if sibling:IsA("TextButton")
			and sibling ~= button
		then
			local text = normalizeText(sibling.Text)

			if text:find("autofish", 1, true) then
				return true
			end
		end
	end

	return false
end

local function isFishingTapButton(instance)
	if not instance:IsA("TextButton") then
		return false
	end

	local text = normalizeText(instance.Text)
	local name = normalizeText(instance.Name)

	local looksLikeTap =
		text == "tap"
		or text == "cast rod"
		or text == "fishing..."
		or name:find("cast", 1, true) ~= nil
		or name:find("tap", 1, true) ~= nil

	return looksLikeTap
		and hasAutoFishSibling(instance)
end

local function hideOldButtonChild(child)
	if child.Name == "ModernTapVisual" then
		return
	end

	if child:IsA("UIStroke") then
		child.Enabled = false
	elseif child:IsA("UIGradient") then
		child.Enabled = false
	elseif child:IsA("GuiObject") then
		child.Visible = false
	end
end

local function patchButton(button)
	if patchedButtons[button]
		or button:GetAttribute("ModernTapVisualPatched")
	then
		return
	end

	if not hasValidImageId() then
		warn(
			"[TapButtonVisualPatch] Replace TAP_BUTTON_IMAGE "
				.. "with the uploaded Roblox image asset ID."
		)
		return
	end

	patchedButtons[button] = true
	button:SetAttribute(
		"ModernTapVisualPatched",
		true
	)

	-- Keep the existing TextButton and its original MouseButton1Click
	-- connection. Only hide the old rectangular artwork.
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.TextTransparency = 1
	button.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
	button.ClipsDescendants = false

	for _, child in ipairs(button:GetChildren()) do
		hideOldButtonChild(child)
	end

	button.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		task.defer(hideOldButtonChild, child)
	end)

	local visual = Instance.new("Frame")
	visual.Name = "ModernTapVisual"
	visual.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	visual.Position = UDim2.new(
		0.5,
		TAP_OFFSET_X,
		0.5,
		TAP_OFFSET_Y
	)
	visual.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
		TAP_VISUAL_SIZE,
		TAP_VISUAL_SIZE
	)
	visual.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	visual.BorderSizePixel = 0
	visual.Active = false
	visual.ZIndex = button.ZIndex + 10
	visual.Parent = button

	local aspect = Instance.new(
		"UIAspectRatioConstraint"
	)
	aspect.AspectRatio = 1
	aspect.Parent = visual

	local visualScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	visualScale.Name = "PressScale"
	visualScale.Scale = 1
	visualScale.Parent = visual

	local artwork = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	artwork.Name = "TapArtwork"
	artwork.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	artwork.BorderSizePixel = 0
	artwork.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	artwork.Image = TAP_BUTTON_IMAGE
	artwork.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	artwork.ZIndex = visual.ZIndex
	artwork.Parent = visual

	local activeTween

	local function tweenScale(targetScale)
		if activeTween then
			activeTween:Cancel()
		end

		activeTween = TweenService:Create(
			visualScale,
			TweenInfo.new(
				0.08,
				Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,
				Enum.EasingDirection.Out
			),
			{
				Scale = targetScale,
			}
		)
		activeTween:Play()
	end

	local function updateEnabledLook()
		local canPress =
			button.Active
			and button.AutoButtonColor

		artwork.ImageTransparency =
			canPress and 0
			or DISABLED_TRANSPARENCY
	end

	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		if not (
			button.Active
				and button.AutoButtonColor
			) then
			return
		end

		if input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			tweenScale(PRESSED_SCALE)
		end
	end)

	button.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
		if input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
			or input.UserInputType
			== Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		then
			tweenScale(1)
		end
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		tweenScale(1)
	end)

	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
		"AutoButtonColor"
	):Connect(updateEnabledLook)

	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
		"Active"
	):Connect(updateEnabledLook)

	-- FishingClient rewrites the button text to Tap/Fishing...
	-- during refreshes. Keep that text invisible.
	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Text"):Connect(
		function()
			button.TextTransparency = 1
			button.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
		end
	)

	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal(
		"BackgroundTransparency"
	):Connect(function()
		if button.BackgroundTransparency ~= 1 then
			button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		end
	end)

	updateEnabledLook()

	print(
		"[TapButtonVisualPatch] Patched:",
		button:GetFullName()
	)
end

local function scanForTapButton()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(
		fishingGui:GetDescendants()
		) do
		if isFishingTapButton(descendant) then
			patchButton(descendant)
		end
	end
end

fishingGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	task.defer(function()
		if isFishingTapButton(descendant) then
			patchButton(descendant)
		else
			scanForTapButton()
		end
	end)
end)

local fishingGui = playerGui:WaitForChild("FishingGui")
local GameConfig = require(ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared"):WaitForChild("GameConfig"))

local BAIT_IMAGE_SCALES = {
	FreshBait = 1.55,
	TastyBait = 1.50,
}

local function getImageContent(baitId)
	return GameConfig.getBaitImage(baitId)
end

local function scaleUDim2(value, scale)
	return UDim2.new(
		value.X.Scale * scale,
		value.X.Offset * scale,
		value.Y.Scale * scale,
		value.Y.Offset * scale
	)
end

local function applyImagePresentation(image, baitId, size, position)
	local visualScale = BAIT_IMAGE_SCALES[baitId] or 1
	image.ImageRectOffset = Vector2.zero
	image.ImageRectSize = Vector2.zero
	image.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	image.Position = position + UDim2.new(size.X.Scale * 0.5, size.X.Offset * 0.5, size.Y.Scale * 0.5, size.Y.Offset * 0.5)
	image.Size = scaleUDim2(size, visualScale)
end

local function addImage(parent, baitId, size, position)
	local imageContent = getImageContent(baitId)
	if not imageContent or imageContent == "" then
		return false
	end

	local existing = parent:FindFirstChild("BaitIcon")
	if existing and existing:IsA("ImageLabel") then
		existing.Image = imageContent
		applyImagePresentation(existing, baitId, size, position)
		return true
	end

	local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	image.Name = "BaitIcon"
	image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	image.Image = imageContent
	image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	applyImagePresentation(image, baitId, size, position)
	image.ZIndex = 99
	image.Parent = parent
	task.spawn(function()
		ContentProvider:PreloadAsync({ image }, function(contentId, status)
			if status ~= Enum.AssetFetchStatus.Success then
				warn("[BaitIconController] Failed to load", baitId, contentId, status)
			end
		end)
	end)
	return true
end

local function decorateShopCard(card, baitId)
	if card:GetAttribute("BaitIconDecorated") then
		return
	end
	if not addImage(card, baitId, UDim2.fromOffset(68, 68), UDim2.fromOffset(10, 18)) then
		return
	end
	card:SetAttribute("BaitIconDecorated", true)
	for _, child in ipairs(card:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("TextLabel") and child.Position.X.Offset == 12 then
			child.Position = UDim2.new(child.Position.X.Scale, 90, child.Position.Y.Scale, child.Position.Y.Offset)
			child.Size = UDim2.new(child.Size.X.Scale, child.Size.X.Offset - 78, child.Size.Y.Scale, child.Size.Y.Offset)
		end
	end
end

local function decorateBagCard(card, baitId)
	if card:GetAttribute("BaitIconDecorated") then
		return
	end

	local badge = nil
	for _, child in ipairs(card:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Frame") and child.Position.X.Offset == 10 and child.Size.X.Offset == 56 then
			badge = child
			break
		end
	end

	if badge then
		if not addImage(badge, baitId, UDim2.new(1, -4, 1, -4), UDim2.fromOffset(2, 2)) then
			return
		end
		for _, child in ipairs(badge:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("TextLabel") then
				child.Visible = false
			end
		end
	else
		if not addImage(card, baitId, UDim2.fromOffset(56, 56), UDim2.fromOffset(10, 18)) then
			return
		end
		for _, child in ipairs(card:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("TextLabel") and child.Position.X.Offset <= 16 then
				child.Position = UDim2.new(child.Position.X.Scale, 78, child.Position.Y.Scale, child.Position.Y.Offset)
				child.Size = UDim2.new(child.Size.X.Scale, child.Size.X.Offset - 66, child.Size.Y.Scale, child.Size.Y.Offset)
			end
		end
	end
	card:SetAttribute("BaitIconDecorated", true)
end

local function decorateBaitCards()
	for _, baitId in ipairs(GameConfig.BaitOrder) do
		local bait = GameConfig.Baits[baitId]
		local shopCard = fishingGui:FindFirstChild(baitId .. "ShopOption", true)
		if shopCard and shopCard:IsA("GuiObject") then
			decorateShopCard(shopCard, baitId)
		end

		for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and descendant.Text == bait.displayName then
				local card = descendant.Parent
				if card and card:IsA("GuiObject") and card.Name ~= baitId .. "ShopOption" then
					decorateBagCard(card, baitId)
				end
			end
		end
	end
end

local refreshQueued = false
local function queueRefresh()
	if refreshQueued then
		return
	end
	refreshQueued = true
	task.defer(function()
		refreshQueued = false
		decorateBaitCards()
	end)
end

fishingGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(queueRefresh)
queueRefresh()

local HOTBAR_SCALE_PC = 1.6

-- Average Laptop 전용 크기.
-- Roblox Studio의 Average Laptop 미리보기나 1366x768 / 1440x900 / 1536x864 근처 화면에서 적용됨.

local HOTBAR_SCALE_PHONE_PORTRAIT = 1

local HOTBAR_BOTTOM_OFFSET_PC = -18
local HOTBAR_BOTTOM_OFFSET_TOUCH = -24
local HOTBAR_BOTTOM_OFFSET_SHORT_SCREEN = -12

deviceScale.Name = "DeviceScale"

deviceScale.Parent = holder

local cameraViewportConnection = nil

local function updateHotbarDeviceScale()
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	if not camera then
		return
	end

	local viewport = camera.ViewportSize
	local screenWidth = viewport.X
	local screenHeight = viewport.Y
	local minSide = math.min(screenWidth, screenHeight)
	local maxSide = math.max(screenWidth, screenHeight)
	local isTouch = UserInputService.TouchEnabled

	local scale = HOTBAR_SCALE_PC
	local bottomOffset = HOTBAR_BOTTOM_OFFSET_PC

	if isTouch then
		bottomOffset = HOTBAR_BOTTOM_OFFSET_TOUCH

		-- 작은 폰 세로 화면
		if minSide <= 430 and maxSide <= 950 then
			scale = HOTBAR_SCALE_TINY_PHONE

			-- 일반 폰 세로 화면
		elseif minSide <= 520 then
			scale = HOTBAR_SCALE_PHONE_PORTRAIT

			-- 폰 가로 또는 작은 태블릿
		elseif minSide <= 760 then
			scale = HOTBAR_SCALE_PHONE_LANDSCAPE

			-- 태블릿
		else
			scale = HOTBAR_SCALE_TABLET
		end
	else
		-- PC / Laptop 화면
		-- Average Laptop 미리보기는 보통 screenWidth <= 1600, screenHeight <= 1000 범위에 들어감.
		-- 이 조건을 먼저 검사해야 1366x768, 1440x900, 1536x864 같은 노트북에서 작게 보이지 않음.
		if screenWidth <= 1600 and screenHeight <= 1000 then
			scale = HOTBAR_SCALE_AVERAGE_LAPTOP

			-- PC 창을 아주 작게 줄였을 때만 축소
		elseif minSide <= 650 then
			scale = 0.82
		elseif minSide <= 850 then
			scale = 0.92
		else
			scale = HOTBAR_SCALE_PC
		end
	end

	-- 화면 높이가 낮은 가로 화면에서는 더 줄임
	if screenHeight <= 520 then
		scale = scale * 0.9
		bottomOffset = HOTBAR_BOTTOM_OFFSET_SHORT_SCREEN
	end

	deviceScale.Scale = math.clamp(scale, 0.58, 2)
	holder.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 1, bottomOffset)
end

local function bindCameraViewportScale()
	if cameraViewportConnection then
		cameraViewportConnection:Disconnect()
		cameraViewportConnection = nil
	end

	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	if camera then
		cameraViewportConnection = camera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ViewportSize"):Connect(updateHotbarDeviceScale)
		updateHotbarDeviceScale()
	end
end

local function cleanAssetId(value)
	if value == nil then
		return ""
	end

	local text = tostring(value)
	if text == "" then
		return ""
	end

	if string.find(text, "rbxassetid://") then
		return text
	end

	if tonumber(text) then
		return "rbxassetid://" .. text
	end

	return text
end

local function isBagTool(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") then
		return false
	end

	local name = string.lower(tool.Name)
	return name == "bag" or name == "backpack"
end

local function isFishdexTool(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") then
		return false
	end

	local name = string.lower(tool.Name)
	return name == "fishdex" or name == "fish dex" or name == "fishbook"
end

local function isAquariumTool(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") then
		return false
	end

	local name = string.lower(tool.Name)
	return string.find(name, "aquarium") ~= nil
end

local function isRodTool(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") then
		return false
	end

	if isBagTool(tool) or isFishdexTool(tool) or isAquariumTool(tool) then
		return false
	end

	local name = string.lower(tool.Name)

	if string.find(name, "rod") then
		return true
	end

	if string.find(name, "fishing") then
		return true
	end

	if tool:GetAttribute("RodId") ~= nil then
		return true
	end

	if tool:GetAttribute("HotbarType") == "Rod" then
		return true
	end

	return false
end

local function getAllTools()
	local tools = {}

	for _, child in ipairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Tool") then
			table.insert(tools, child)
		end
	end

	local character = player.Character
	if character then
		for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("Tool") then
				table.insert(tools, child)
			end
		end
	end

	return tools
end

local function getEquippedTool()
	local character = player.Character
	if not character then
		return nil
	end

	return character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Tool")
end

local function findRodTool(tools)
	local character = player.Character

	-- 1순위: 실제 손에 들고 있는 낚싯대 Tool
	if character then
		for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("Tool") and isRodTool(child) then
				return child
			end
		end
	end

	-- 2순위: Tool Attribute로 현재 장착 낚싯대 표시가 되어 있는 경우
	for _, tool in ipairs(tools) do
		if isRodTool(tool) and tool:GetAttribute("IsEquippedRod") == true then
			return tool
		end
	end

	-- 3순위: FishingClient가 player Attribute에 저장한 EquippedRodId와 일치하는 Tool
	local equippedRodId =
		player:GetAttribute("EquippedRodId")
		or player:GetAttribute("CurrentRodId")
		or player:GetAttribute("SelectedRodId")

	if equippedRodId then
		for _, tool in ipairs(tools) do
			if isRodTool(tool) then
				local toolRodId = tool:GetAttribute("RodId") or tool.Name
				if tostring(toolRodId) == tostring(equippedRodId) then
					return tool
				end
			end
		end
	end

	-- 4순위: 일반 낚싯대 Tool
	for _, tool in ipairs(tools) do
		if isRodTool(tool) then
			return tool
		end
	end

	-- 마지막 예비: Bag/Fishdex/Aquarium이 아닌 Tool
	for _, tool in ipairs(tools) do
		if tool:IsA("Tool") and not isBagTool(tool) and not isFishdexTool(tool) and not isAquariumTool(tool) then
			return tool
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function findToolForSlot(index, tools)
	if index == 1 then
		return findRodTool(tools)
	end

	for _, tool in ipairs(tools) do
		if index == 2 and isBagTool(tool) then
			return tool
		end

		if index == 3 and isFishdexTool(tool) then
			return tool
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function getToolIcon(tool, fallbackIcon)
	if tool then
		local textureId = cleanAssetId(tool.TextureId)
		if textureId ~= "" then
			return textureId
		end

		local icon =
			tool:GetAttribute("Icon")
			or tool:GetAttribute("ToolIcon")
			or tool:GetAttribute("Image")
			or tool:GetAttribute("ImageId")
			or tool:GetAttribute("TextureId")

		icon = cleanAssetId(icon)
		if icon ~= "" then
			return icon
		end
	end

	return cleanAssetId(fallbackIcon)
end

local function getRodName(tool)
	if not tool then
		return "Rod"
	end

	if tool.ToolTip and tool.ToolTip ~= "" then
		return tool.ToolTip
	end

	local displayName = tool:GetAttribute("DisplayName")
	if displayName then
		return tostring(displayName)
	end

	local rodId = tool:GetAttribute("RodId")
	if rodId then
		return tostring(rodId)
	end

	return tool.Name
end

local function getCurrentRodIcon(tool)
	-- FishingClient에서 저장한 현재 장착 낚싯대 이미지가 최우선
	local playerRodIcon =
		player:GetAttribute("EquippedRodIcon")
		or player:GetAttribute("CurrentRodIcon")
		or player:GetAttribute("SelectedRodIcon")

	playerRodIcon = cleanAssetId(playerRodIcon)
	if playerRodIcon ~= "" then
		return playerRodIcon
	end

	return getToolIcon(tool, ROD_FALLBACK_ICON)
end

local function getCurrentRodName(tool)
	-- FishingClient에서 저장한 현재 장착 낚싯대 이름이 최우선
	local playerRodName =
		player:GetAttribute("EquippedRodName")
		or player:GetAttribute("CurrentRodName")
		or player:GetAttribute("SelectedRodName")

	if playerRodName and tostring(playerRodName) ~= "" then
		return tostring(playerRodName)
	end

	return getRodName(tool)
end

local function openFishingPanel(tabName)
	local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
	if not fishingGui then
		warn("[CustomHotbar] FishingGui not found")
		return
	end

	local openPanelEvent = fishingGui:FindFirstChild("OpenFishingPanel", true)
	if openPanelEvent and openPanelEvent:IsA("BindableEvent") then
		openPanelEvent:Fire(tabName)
		print("[CustomHotbar] Opened panel:", tabName)
	else
		warn("[CustomHotbar] OpenFishingPanel BindableEvent not found")
	end
end

local function closeFishingPanels()
	local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
	if not fishingGui then
		return
	end
	local closeEvent = fishingGui:FindFirstChild("OpenFishingPanel", true)
	if closeEvent and closeEvent:IsA("BindableEvent") then
		closeEvent:Fire("__CloseFishingPanels")
	end


	local namesToClose = {
		MainPanel = true,
		BagPanel = true,
		FishdexPanel = true,
	}

	for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiObject") and namesToClose[descendant.Name] then
			descendant.Visible = false
		end
	end

	-- Panels 폴더 안의 직접 패널들도 같이 닫기
	local panelsFolder = fishingGui:FindFirstChild("Panels", true)
	if panelsFolder then
		for _, child in ipairs(panelsFolder:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("GuiObject") then
				child.Visible = false
			end
		end
	end
end

local function unequipCurrentTool()
	local character = player.Character
	local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

	if humanoid then
		humanoid:UnequipTools()
	end
end

-- 현재 캐릭터가 실제 낚싯대 Tool을 들고 있는지 확인합니다.
local function isRodCurrentlyEquipped()
	local character = player.Character
	if not character then
		return false
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Tool") and isRodTool(child) then
			return true
		end
	end

	return false
end

-- 클라이언트에서 즉시 맨손으로 바꾸고,
-- 서버에도 해제 요청을 보내 장착 상태가 다시 돌아오지 않게 합니다.
local function unequipAllTools()
	unequipCurrentTool()

	if hotbarEquipRequest and hotbarEquipRequest:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
		hotbarEquipRequest:FireServer("UnequipTools")
		print("[CustomHotbar] Requested server to unequip tools")
	end

	task.defer(updateHotbar)
	task.delay(0.12, updateHotbar)
	task.delay(0.35, updateHotbar)
end

-- Bag/Fishdex가 실제로 열려 있는지 확인합니다.
local function isFishingPanelVisible(tabName)
	local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
	if not fishingGui then
		return false
	end

	local targetName = tabName == "Bag" and "BagPanel" or "FishdexPanel"

	for _, descendant in ipairs(fishingGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiObject")
			and descendant.Name == targetName
			and descendant.Visible then
			return true
		end
	end

	return false
end

local function getCharacter()
	local character = player.Character

	if character and character.Parent then
		return character
	end

	character = workspace:FindFirstChild(player.Name)
	if character then
		return character
	end

	return player.CharacterAdded:Wait()
end

local function findFishingRodTool()
	local character = player.Character

	-- 이미 손에 들고 있는 낚싯대가 있으면 그걸 우선 사용
	if character then
		local exactEquippedRod = character:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
		if exactEquippedRod and exactEquippedRod:IsA("Tool") then
			return exactEquippedRod
		end

		for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("Tool") and isRodTool(child) then
				return child
			end
		end
	end

	-- Backpack 안의 실제 Fishing Rod Tool 찾기
	local exactBackpackRod = backpack:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
	if exactBackpackRod and exactBackpackRod:IsA("Tool") then
		return exactBackpackRod
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(backpack:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Tool") and isRodTool(child) then
			return child
		end
	end

	-- currentTools[1]에 잡힌 참조가 있으면 마지막 예비로 사용
	local currentRod = currentTools[1]
	if currentRod and currentRod:IsA("Tool") then
		return currentRod
	end

	return nil
end

local function equipRodTool()
	-- 서버에서 장착하게 해야 Explorer에서도 Backpack -> Workspace.Character 로 확실히 이동함.
	if hotbarEquipRequest and hotbarEquipRequest:IsA("RemoteEvent") then
		hotbarEquipRequest:FireServer("EquipRod")
		print("[CustomHotbar] Requested server to equip Fishing Rod")
		task.defer(updateHotbar)
		task.delay(0.15, updateHotbar)
		task.delay(0.4, updateHotbar)
		return
	end

	-- RemoteEvent가 없을 때만 클라이언트 예비 방식으로 시도
	local character = getCharacter()
	local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")

	if not humanoid then
		warn("[CustomHotbar] Humanoid not found in character")
		return
	end

	local tool = findFishingRodTool()

	if not tool then
		warn("[CustomHotbar] Fishing Rod tool not found in Backpack or Character")
		return
	end

	if tool.Parent == character then
		print("[CustomHotbar] Fishing Rod already equipped:", tool.Name)
		return
	end

	if tool.Parent ~= backpack then
		tool.Parent = backpack
		task.wait()
	end

	humanoid:EquipTool(tool)
	print("[CustomHotbar] Equipped Fishing Rod locally:", tool:GetFullName())

	task.defer(updateHotbar)
	task.delay(0.1, updateHotbar)
end

function activateSlot(index)
	if index == 2 then
		if UserInputService:GetFocusedTextBox() then
			return
		end

		local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
		local minigame = fishingGui and fishingGui:FindFirstChild("FishingMinigame", true)
		if minigame and minigame:IsA("GuiObject") and minigame.Visible then
			return
		end
	end

	if index == 1 then
		-- 1번: 장착 중이면 다시 눌렀을 때 맨손으로 돌아갑니다.
		closeFishingPanels()

		if isRodCurrentlyEquipped() then
			selectedSlot = nil
			unequipAllTools()
		else
			selectedSlot = 1
			equipRodTool()
		end

	elseif index == 2 then
		-- 2번: 현재 선택된 슬롯이 2번이면 Bag을 닫고 선택 해제합니다.
		-- 패널 이름/Visible 상태를 검사하지 않고 selectedSlot만 확인하므로 확실하게 토글됩니다.
		if selectedSlot == 2 then
			selectedSlot = nil
			closeFishingPanels()
			unequipAllTools()
			print("[CustomHotbar] Bag deselected")
		else
			selectedSlot = 2
			unequipAllTools()
			closeFishingPanels()

			task.defer(function()
				openFishingPanel("Bag")
			end)

			print("[CustomHotbar] Bag selected")
		end

	elseif index == 3 then
		-- 3번: 현재 선택된 슬롯이 3번이면 Fishdex를 닫고 선택 해제합니다.
		if selectedSlot == 3 then
			selectedSlot = nil
			closeFishingPanels()
			unequipAllTools()
			print("[CustomHotbar] Fishdex deselected")
		else
			selectedSlot = 3
			unequipAllTools()
			closeFishingPanels()

			task.defer(function()
				openFishingPanel("Fishdex")
			end)

			print("[CustomHotbar] Fishdex selected")
		end
	end

	updateHotbar()
end

function updateHotbar()
	local tools = getAllTools()
	local equippedTool = getEquippedTool()

	for index = 1, 3 do
		local slot = slots[index]
		local tool = findToolForSlot(index, tools)

		currentTools[index] = tool

		if index == 1 then
			slot.Icon.Image = getCurrentRodIcon(tool)
			slot.Icon.Visible = slot.Icon.Image ~= ""
			slot.Label.Text = getCurrentRodName(tool)
			slot.Label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(160, 255, 80)
		elseif index == 2 then
			slot.Icon.Image = getToolIcon(tool, BAG_ICON)
			slot.Icon.Visible = slot.Icon.Image ~= ""
			slot.Label.Text = "Bag"
			slot.Label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(45, 210, 255)
		elseif index == 3 then
			slot.Icon.Image = getToolIcon(tool, FISHDEX_ICON)
			slot.Icon.Visible = slot.Icon.Image ~= ""
			slot.Label.Text = "Fishdex"
			slot.Label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 220, 130)
		end

		-- 선택된 슬롯은 커짐.
		-- 1번은 실제 낚싯대 Tool을 손에 들고 있어도 커지게 함.
		local isSelected = selectedSlot == index or (index == 1 and tool ~= nil and equippedTool == tool)
		local targetScale = isSelected and SELECTED_SCALE or NORMAL_SCALE

		TweenService:Create(
			slot.Scale,
			TweenInfo.new(TWEEN_TIME, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out),
			{ Scale = targetScale }
		):Play()

		if isSelected then
			slot.Button.BackgroundTransparency = 0.1
			slot.Stroke.Thickness = 4
			slot.Button.ZIndex = 30

			if index == 1 then
				slot.Stroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(150, 255, 80)
			elseif index == 2 then
				slot.Stroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(45, 210, 255)
			elseif index == 3 then
				slot.Stroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 205, 80)
			end
		else
			slot.Button.BackgroundTransparency = 0.22
			slot.Stroke.Thickness = 3
			slot.Stroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
			slot.Button.ZIndex = 1
		end
	end
end

local function bindTool(tool)
	if not tool:IsA("Tool") then
		return
	end

	tool:GetPropertyChangedSignal("TextureId"):Connect(updateHotbar)
	tool:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ToolTip"):Connect(updateHotbar)

	tool.AttributeChanged:Connect(function()
		updateHotbar()
	end)
end

local function bindContainer(container)
	if not container then
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(container:GetChildren()) do
		bindTool(child)
	end

	container.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		bindTool(child)
		task.defer(updateHotbar)
	end)

	container.ChildRemoved:Connect(function()
		task.defer(updateHotbar)
	end)
end

bindContainer(backpack)

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(character)
	bindContainer(character)

	character.ChildAdded:Connect(function(child)
		bindTool(child)
		task.defer(updateHotbar)
	end)

	character.ChildRemoved:Connect(function()
		task.defer(updateHotbar)
	end)

	task.wait(0.3)
	updateHotbar()
end)

if player.Character then
	bindContainer(player.Character)
end

-- FishingClient가 현재 장착 낚싯대 정보를 업데이트하면 커스텀 핫바도 즉시 갱신
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("EquippedRodIcon"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("EquippedRodName"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("EquippedRodId"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("CurrentRodIcon"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("CurrentRodName"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("CurrentRodId"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("SelectedRodIcon"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("SelectedRodName"):Connect(updateHotbar)
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal("SelectedRodId"):Connect(updateHotbar)

ContextActionService:BindActionAtPriority(
	"CustomHotbarSlot1",
	function(_, inputState)
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
			activateSlot(1)
		end
		return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
	end,
	false,
	3000,
	Enum.KeyCode.One
)

ContextActionService:BindActionAtPriority(
	"CustomHotbarSlot2",
	function(_, inputState)
		if UserInputService:GetFocusedTextBox() then
			return Enum.ContextActionResult.Pass
		end
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
			activateSlot(2)
		end
		return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
	end,
	false,
	3000,
	Enum.KeyCode.Two
)

ContextActionService:BindActionAtPriority(
	"CustomHotbarSlot3",
	function(_, inputState)
		if inputState == Enum.UserInputState.Begin then
			activateSlot(3)
		end
		return Enum.ContextActionResult.Sink
	end,
	false,
	3000,
	Enum.KeyCode.Three
)

task.defer(updateHotbar)

task.spawn(function()
	while true do
		updateHotbar()
		task.wait(0.25)
	end
end)

print("[CustomHotbar] Created successfully")

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("FishingRemotes")

local MonetizationConfig = require(shared:WaitForChild("MonetizationConfig"))
local GetState = remotes:WaitForChild("GetState")
local ShopAction = remotes:WaitForChild("ShopAction")
local StateUpdated = remotes:WaitForChild("StateUpdated")

local state = nil
local seaStarsText = nil
local watchedItemButtons = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local activeShopSubtab = nil
local activeShopContent = nil

local SHOP_SUBTABS = {
	Passes = true,
	Items = true,
	Coins = true,
	Upgrades = true,
}

local SHORT_THEME_LABELS = {
	ModernGlass = { modern = true },
	DeepOcean = { deep = true },
	JapaneseKoiPond = { japanese = true },
	AncientRuins = { ancient = true },
}

local function formatNumber(value)
	local number = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0))
	local digits = tostring(number)
	return digits:reverse():gsub("(%d%d%d)", "%1,"):reverse():gsub("^,", "")
end

local function addCorner(parent, radius)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius or 8)
	corner.Parent = parent
	return corner
end

local function addStroke(parent, color, thickness, transparency)
	local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
	stroke.Color = color
	stroke.Thickness = thickness or 1
	stroke.Transparency = transparency or 0
	stroke.Parent = parent
	return stroke
end

local function makeText(parent, name, text, size, color, bold)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = name
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.Font = bold and Enum.Font.GothamBold or Enum.Font.Gotham
	label.Text = text
	label.TextColor3 = color
	label.TextSize = size
	label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	label.Parent = parent
	return label
end

local function getGuiButtonText(button)
	if button:IsA("TextButton") then
		return button.Text
	end
	if not button:IsA("GuiButton") then
		return nil
	end
	for _, descendant in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and descendant.Text ~= "" then
			return descendant.Text
		end
	end
	return nil
end

local function removeStandaloneSeaStarShop(instance)
	if instance.Name == "SeaStarShopOverlay" and instance:IsA("GuiObject") then
		instance.Visible = false
		instance.Parent = nil
	elseif instance.Name == "SeaStarLoginHud" and instance:IsA("GuiObject") then
		instance.Visible = false
		instance.Parent = nil
	elseif instance:IsA("TextButton") and string.find(instance.Text, "Sea Stars:", 1, true) == 1 then
		instance.Visible = false
		instance.Parent = nil
	end
end

local function removeExistingStandaloneShop()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		removeStandaloneSeaStarShop(descendant)
	end
end

local function findCoinsHud()
	local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
	local direct = fishingGui and fishingGui:FindFirstChild("CoinsHud")
	if direct and direct:IsA("GuiObject") and direct.Visible then
		return direct
	end

	local fallback = nil
	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiObject") and descendant.Name == "CoinsHud" then
			if descendant.Visible and descendant.AbsoluteSize.X > 0 and descendant.AbsoluteSize.Y > 0 then
				return descendant
			end
			fallback = fallback or descendant
		end
	end
	return fallback
end

local function getSeaStarsHudPosition(coinsHud)
	return UDim2.new(
		coinsHud.Position.X.Scale,
		coinsHud.Position.X.Offset,
		coinsHud.Position.Y.Scale,
		coinsHud.Position.Y.Offset + math.max(48, coinsHud.AbsoluteSize.Y) - 22
	)
end

local function mountSeaStarsHud()
	local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
	if not fishingGui then
		return false
	end

	local coinsHud = findCoinsHud()
	if not coinsHud or not coinsHud.Parent then
		return false
	end

	local hudParent = coinsHud.Parent
	local existing = hudParent:FindFirstChild("SeaStarsHud")
	if existing and existing:IsA("GuiObject") then
		existing.Position = getSeaStarsHudPosition(coinsHud)
		seaStarsText = existing:FindFirstChild("SeaStarsText", true)
		return seaStarsText ~= nil
	end

	local hud = Instance.new("Frame")
	hud.Name = "SeaStarsHud"
	hud.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	hud.BorderSizePixel = 0
	hud.ClipsDescendants = false
	hud.Size = coinsHud.Size
	hud.LayoutOrder = coinsHud.LayoutOrder + 1
	hud.ZIndex = coinsHud.ZIndex
	hud.Visible = true
	hud.Position = getSeaStarsHudPosition(coinsHud)

	local star = makeText(hud, "SeaStarIcon", "★", 48, Color3.fromRGB(255, 219, 62), true)
	star.Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 0, -2)
	star.Size = UDim2.new(0, 70, 1, 4)
	star.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	star.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	star.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(4, 35, 74)
	star.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	star.ZIndex = hud.ZIndex + 1

	local balanceLabel = makeText(hud, "SeaStarsText", "0", 30, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255), true)
	balanceLabel.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
	balanceLabel.Position = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 1)
	balanceLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -78, 0.62, 0)
	balanceLabel.TextScaled = true
	balanceLabel.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(3, 22, 53)
	balanceLabel.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	balanceLabel.ZIndex = hud.ZIndex + 1
	local valueConstraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
	valueConstraint.MinTextSize = 14
	valueConstraint.MaxTextSize = 30
	valueConstraint.Parent = balanceLabel

	local caption = makeText(hud, "SeaStarsCaption", "SEA STARS", 12, Color3.fromRGB(91, 218, 255), true)
	caption.Position = UDim2.new(0, 78, 0.6, -2)
	caption.Size = UDim2.new(1, -80, 0.34, 0)
	caption.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(3, 22, 53)
	caption.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.2
	caption.ZIndex = hud.ZIndex + 1

	seaStarsText = balanceLabel
	hud.Parent = hudParent
	return true
end

local function updateSeaStarsHud()
	if not seaStarsText or not seaStarsText.Parent then
		mountSeaStarsHud()
	end
	if seaStarsText then
		seaStarsText.Text = formatNumber(state and state.SeaStars or 0)
	end
end

local function makeSeaStarProductCard(parent, productKey, product)
	local card = Instance.new("Frame")
	card.Name = productKey .. "ShopItem"
	card.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 104)
	card.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(27, 33, 43)
	card.BorderSizePixel = 0
	card.ZIndex = parent.ZIndex + 1
	card.Parent = parent
	addCorner(card, 8)
	addStroke(card, Color3.fromRGB(57, 157, 205), 1, 0.2)

	local icon = Instance.new("Frame")
	icon.Name = "ShopSeaStarIcon"
	icon.Position = UDim2.new(0, 12, 0, 14)
	icon.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(54, 54)
	icon.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(47, 190, 232)
	icon.ZIndex = card.ZIndex + 1
	icon.Parent = card
	addCorner(icon, 9)

	local iconText = makeText(icon, "IconText", "★", 28, Color3.fromRGB(255, 245, 145), true)
	iconText.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	iconText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	iconText.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	iconText.ZIndex = icon.ZIndex + 1

	local title = makeText(card, "ProductName", product.name or productKey, 15, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255), true)
	title.Position = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 8)
	title.Size = UDim2.new(1, -194, 0, 22)
	title.ZIndex = card.ZIndex + 1

	local amount = formatNumber(product.seaStarAmount or 0) .. " Sea Stars"
	local description = makeText(card, "Description", amount, 13, Color3.fromRGB(130, 231, 255), true)
	description.Position = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 34)
	description.Size = UDim2.new(1, -194, 0, 24)
	description.ZIndex = card.ZIndex + 1

	local price = makeText(card, "Price", formatNumber(product.priceRobux or 0) .. " Robux", 12, Color3.fromRGB(255, 219, 92), true)
	price.Position = UDim2.new(0, 76, 0, 74)
	price.Size = UDim2.new(1, -194, 0, 18)
	price.ZIndex = card.ZIndex + 1

	local buy = Instance.new("TextButton")
	buy.Name = "BuyButton"
	buy.Position = UDim2.new(1, -104, 0, 35)
	buy.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(88, 34)
	buy.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(28, 160, 92)
	buy.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
	buy.Text = "Buy"
	buy.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	buy.TextSize = 13
	buy.ZIndex = card.ZIndex + 2
	buy.Parent = card
	addCorner(buy, 7)
	buy.Activated:Connect(function()
		ShopAction:FireServer("PromptProduct", "Product", productKey)
	end)
end

local function findShopContent()
	if activeShopContent and activeShopContent.Parent and activeShopContent:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return activeShopContent
	end

	local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
	local root = fishingGui and fishingGui:FindFirstChild("Root")
	local mainPanel = root and root:FindFirstChild("MainPanel")
	local content = mainPanel and mainPanel:FindFirstChild("Content")
	if content and content:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return content
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant.Name == "Content"
			and descendant:IsA("GuiObject")
			and descendant.Visible
			and descendant.AbsoluteSize.X > 0
		then
			local panel = descendant:FindFirstAncestor("MainPanel")
			if panel and panel:IsA("GuiObject") and panel.Visible then
				return descendant
			end
		end
	end
	return nil
end

local function itemsTabIsSelected(content)
	local contentPanel = content:FindFirstAncestor("MainPanel") or content.Parent
	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiButton")
			and getGuiButtonText(descendant) == "Items"
			and descendant.Visible
			and descendant.AbsoluteSize.X > 0
		then
			local color = descendant.BackgroundColor3
			local buttonPanel = descendant:FindFirstAncestor("MainPanel") or descendant.Parent
			if buttonPanel == contentPanel then
				return color.B > 0.55 and color.B > color.R * 1.45
			end
		end
	end
	return false
end

local function renderSeaStarsInItems()
	local content = findShopContent()
	if not content
		or (activeShopSubtab ~= "Items" and not itemsTabIsSelected(content))
		or content:FindFirstChild("SeaStarProductsHeading")
	then
		return
	end

	local heading = makeText(content, "SeaStarProductsHeading", "Sea Star Packs", 16, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255), true)
	heading.Size = UDim2.new(1, -8, 0, 28)
	heading.LayoutOrder = 1000
	heading.ZIndex = content.ZIndex + 1

	for index, productKey in ipairs(MonetizationConfig.SeaStarProductOrder or {}) do
		local product = MonetizationConfig.DeveloperProducts[productKey]
		if product then
			makeSeaStarProductCard(content, productKey, product)
			local card = content:FindFirstChild(productKey .. "ShopItem")
			if card then
				card.LayoutOrder = 1000 + index
			end
		end
	end
end

local function watchItemsButton(button)
	local tabName = getGuiButtonText(button)
	if watchedItemButtons[button] or not button:IsA("GuiButton") or not SHOP_SUBTABS[tabName] then
		return
	end
	watchedItemButtons[button] = true
	local buttonPanel = button:FindFirstAncestor("MainPanel")
	local buttonContent = button:FindFirstAncestor("Content")
		or (buttonPanel and buttonPanel:FindFirstChild("Content", true))
	button.Activated:Connect(function()
		activeShopSubtab = tabName
		activeShopContent = buttonContent
		if activeShopSubtab == "Items" then
			task.delay(0.05, renderSeaStarsInItems)
		end
	end)
end

local function watchShopUi(instance)
	if instance:IsA("GuiButton") then
		watchItemsButton(instance)
	end
	if instance.Name == "Content" and instance:IsA("GuiObject") then
		instance.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
			if descendant:IsA("GuiButton") then
				watchItemsButton(descendant)
			end
			task.defer(renderSeaStarsInItems)
		end)
	end
end

local function findThemeId(button)
	local taggedThemeId = button:GetAttribute("SeaStarThemeId")
	if type(taggedThemeId) == "string" then
		local taggedTheme = MonetizationConfig.AquariumDesigner.themes[taggedThemeId]
		if taggedTheme then
			return taggedThemeId, taggedTheme
		end
	end

	local text = string.lower(getGuiButtonText(button) or "")
	if text == "" then
		return nil, nil
	end
	for _, themeId in ipairs(MonetizationConfig.AquariumDesigner.themeOrder or {}) do
		local theme = MonetizationConfig.AquariumDesigner.themes[themeId]
		local name = theme and string.lower(theme.name or theme.displayName or themeId)
		local displayName = theme and string.lower(theme.displayName or theme.name or themeId)
		local aliases = SHORT_THEME_LABELS[themeId]
		if name and (
			text == string.lower(themeId)
			or text == name
			or text == displayName
			or (aliases and aliases[text])
			or string.find(text, name, 1, true)
		) then
			return themeId, theme
		end
	end
	return nil, nil
end

local function showFullThemeName(button, theme, themeId)
	local fullName = theme.displayName or theme.name or themeId
	if button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button.Text = fullName
		button.TextScaled = true
		return fullName
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and not descendant:FindFirstAncestor("SeaStarThemeLock") then
			descendant.Text = fullName
			descendant.TextScaled = true
			local constraint = descendant:FindFirstChild("SeaStarThemeTextConstraint")
			if not constraint then
				constraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
				constraint.Name = "SeaStarThemeTextConstraint"
				constraint.MinTextSize = 6
				constraint.MaxTextSize = 12
				constraint.Parent = descendant
			end
			break
		end
	end
	return fullName
end

local function updateThemeButton(button)
	if not button:IsA("GuiButton")
		or button.Name == "SeaStarThemeLock"
		or button:FindFirstAncestor("SeaStarThemeLock")
	then
		return
	end
	local themeId, theme = findThemeId(button)
	if not themeId or not theme then
		return
	end
	local fullName = showFullThemeName(button, theme, themeId)
	if theme.free == true then
		return
	end

	button:SetAttribute("SeaStarThemeId", themeId)
	local owned = state and state.SeaStarUnlocks and state.SeaStarUnlocks[themeId] == true
	local overlay = button:FindFirstChild("SeaStarThemeLock")
	if owned then
		if overlay then
			overlay:Destroy()
		end
		return
	end

	if overlay then
		overlay.Text = fullName .. "\nLOCK  " .. formatNumber(theme.seaStarPrice or 0)
		return
	end

	overlay = Instance.new("TextButton")
	overlay.Name = "SeaStarThemeLock"
	overlay.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	overlay.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(32, 37, 52)
	overlay.BackgroundTransparency = 0.05
	overlay.AutoButtonColor = true
	overlay.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
	overlay.Text = fullName .. "\nLOCK  " .. formatNumber(theme.seaStarPrice or 0)
	overlay.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 219, 92)
	overlay.TextScaled = true
	overlay.TextWrapped = true
	overlay.ZIndex = button.ZIndex + 20
	overlay.Parent = button
	addCorner(overlay, 6)
	local constraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
	constraint.MinTextSize = 5
	constraint.MaxTextSize = 10
	constraint.Parent = overlay
	overlay.Activated:Connect(function()
		ShopAction:FireServer("PurchaseAquariumTheme", "AquariumTheme", themeId)
	end)
end

local function updateThemeLocks()
	local editorGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("AquariumFreePlacementGui")
	if not editorGui then
		return
	end
	for _, descendant in ipairs(editorGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiButton") then
			updateThemeButton(descendant)
		end
	end
end

local function receiveState(newState)
	if type(newState) ~= "table" then
		return
	end
	state = newState
	MonetizationConfig.ApplyResolvedProductIds(newState.Monetization and newState.Monetization.DeveloperProductIds)
	updateSeaStarsHud()
	updateThemeLocks()
end
