local Debris = game:GetService("Debris")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local GameConfig = require(
	ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared"):WaitForChild("GameConfig")
)
local FishingWater = require(
	ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared"):WaitForChild("FishingWater")
)

local DEFAULT_FISHING_ISLAND_ID =
	(GameConfig.IslandOrder and GameConfig.IslandOrder[1])
	or (GameConfig.BiomeOrder and GameConfig.BiomeOrder[1])

local CHECK_INTERVAL = 0.15
local BIND_NAME = "FishingAreaButtonsVisibility"

local bottomButtonsFrame = nil
local visibilityConnection = nil
local shouldShow = false
local applyingVisibility = false

local function isLilyshoreIslandInstance(instance)
	while instance do
		if instance.Name == "LilyshoreIsland"
			or instance.Name == "LilyshoreFishingZone"
			or instance.Name == "BeginnerPondArea"
			or instance.Name == "BeginnerPond_ExtraLarge"
			or instance.Name == "Beginner Pond"
		then
			return true
		end

		instance = instance.Parent
	end

	return false
end

local function getGroundBiomeId(position, character)
	local params = RaycastParams.new()
	params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude
	params.FilterDescendantsInstances = character and { character } or {}

	local result = workspace:Raycast(
		position + Vector3.new(0, 12, 0),
		Vector3.new(0, -90, 0),
		params
	)

	if result and isLilyshoreIslandInstance(result.Instance) then
		return DEFAULT_FISHING_ISLAND_ID
	end

	return nil
end

local function getLocalFishingBiomeId()
	local character = player.Character
	local rootPart = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")

	if not rootPart then
		return nil
	end

	local biomeIdAtPosition = getGroundBiomeId(rootPart.Position, character)

	if not biomeIdAtPosition then
		for _, biomeId in ipairs(GameConfig.BiomeOrder or {}) do
			local biome = GameConfig.Biomes and GameConfig.Biomes[biomeId]
			local center = biome and biome.position

			if center then
				local dx = math.abs(rootPart.Position.X - center.X)
				local dz = math.abs(rootPart.Position.Z - center.Z)

				if dx <= 58 and dz <= 54 then
					biomeIdAtPosition = biomeId
					break
				end
			end
		end
	end

	if not biomeIdAtPosition
		or not FishingWater.isNearWater(rootPart.Position, { character })
	then
		return nil
	end

	return biomeIdAtPosition
end

local function applyVisibility()
	if not bottomButtonsFrame or not bottomButtonsFrame.Parent then
		return
	end

	local targetVisible = shouldShow or bottomButtonsFrame:GetAttribute("ForceFishingTapVisible") == true
	if bottomButtonsFrame.Visible == targetVisible then
		return
	end

	applyingVisibility = true
	bottomButtonsFrame.Visible = targetVisible
	applyingVisibility = false
end

local function bindBottomButtonsFrame(frame)
	if bottomButtonsFrame == frame then
		applyVisibility()
		return
	end

	if visibilityConnection then
		visibilityConnection:Disconnect()
		visibilityConnection = nil
	end

	bottomButtonsFrame = frame

	visibilityConnection = frame:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible"):Connect(function()
		if not applyingVisibility then
			applyVisibility()
		end
	end)

	applyVisibility()
end

local function findAndBindBottomButtonsFrame()
	local frame = playerGui:FindFirstChild("BottomButtonsFrame", true)

	if frame and frame:IsA("GuiObject") then
		bindBottomButtonsFrame(frame)
	else
		bottomButtonsFrame = nil
	end
end

local function updateFishingAreaState()
	shouldShow = getLocalFishingBiomeId() ~= nil

	if not bottomButtonsFrame or not bottomButtonsFrame.Parent then
		findAndBindBottomButtonsFrame()
	end

	applyVisibility()
end

playerGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	if descendant.Name == "BottomButtonsFrame" and descendant:IsA("GuiObject") then
		task.defer(function()
			bindBottomButtonsFrame(descendant)
			updateFishingAreaState()
		end)
	end
end)

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
	shouldShow = false
	applyVisibility()
	task.delay(0.3, updateFishingAreaState)
end)

findAndBindBottomButtonsFrame()
updateFishingAreaState()

RunService:BindToRenderStep(BIND_NAME, 3000, applyVisibility)

task.spawn(function()
	while true do
		updateFishingAreaState()
		task.wait(CHECK_INTERVAL)
	end
end)

print("[FishingAreaButtonsVisibility] Started")

local function startFishingRodSway()
	local CAST_FLEX_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodCastFlex"
	local CAST_TWIST_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodCastTwist"
	local CAST_SIDE_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodCastSide"
	local CAST_LINE_SWING_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodLineSwing"
	local MAX_SWAY = math.rad(6)
	local FORWARD_SWAY_PER_SPEED = math.rad(0.28)
	local SIDE_SWAY_PER_SPEED = math.rad(0.32)
	local STEP_SWAY = math.rad(0.8)
	local SPRING_STIFFNESS = 48
	local SPRING_DAMPING = 9
	local STEP_FREQUENCY = 8
	local swayStates = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
	local stowedRodConnections = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
	local CAST_TIP_ATTACHMENT_NAME = "FishingCastTipAttachment"
	local CAST_BOBBER_ATTACHMENT_NAME = "FishingCastBobberAttachment"
	local CAST_LINE_BEAM_NAME = "FishingCastLineBeam"
	local CAST_LINE_WIDTH = 0.035
	local CAST_LINE_FALLBACK_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(235, 235, 235)
	local CAST_LINE_MIN_BRIGHTNESS = 235 / 255
	-- These are the Fishing Line material colors from each original FBX model.
	-- Roblox flattens the imported material into a texture, so the MeshPart.Color
	-- property is white and cannot be used to recover the visible line color.
	local CAST_LINE_COLORS_BY_ROD_ID = {
		WoodenRod = Color3.fromRGB(224, 219, 199),
		IronRod = Color3.fromRGB(224, 224, 209),
		GoldenRod = Color3.fromRGB(242, 230, 184),
		EmeraldRod = Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 107),
		OceanRod = Color3.fromRGB(0, 217, 255),
	}

	local function playBobberSplash(worldPosition)
		local effectPart = Instance.new("Part")
		effectPart.Name = "FishingBobberPlopEffect"
		effectPart.Anchored = true
		effectPart.CanCollide = false
		effectPart.CanQuery = false
		effectPart.CanTouch = false
		effectPart.CastShadow = false
		effectPart.Transparency = 1
		effectPart.Size = Vector3.new(0.1, 0.1, 0.1)
		effectPart.Position = worldPosition + Vector3.new(0, 0.05, 0)
		effectPart.Parent = workspace

		local attachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
		attachment.Parent = effectPart

		local splash = Instance.new("ParticleEmitter")
		splash.Name = "WaterDroplets"
		splash.Texture = "rbxasset://textures/particles/sparkles_main.dds"
		splash.Color = ColorSequence.new(
			Color3.fromRGB(220, 248, 255),
			Color3.fromRGB(80, 185, 255)
		)
		splash.LightInfluence = 0.25
		splash.Lifetime = NumberRange.new(0.28, 0.42)
		splash.Speed = NumberRange.new(1.8, 3.2)
		splash.Drag = 2.5
		splash.Acceleration = Vector3.new(0, -8, 0)
		splash.SpreadAngle = Vector2.new(65, 65)
		splash.Rotation = NumberRange.new(0, 360)
		splash.RotSpeed = NumberRange.new(-100, 100)
		splash.Size = NumberSequence.new({
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.14),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.55, 0.09),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 0),
		})
		splash.Transparency = NumberSequence.new({
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0, 0.05),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(0.7, 0.25),
			NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(1, 1),
		})
		splash.Rate = 0
		splash.Parent = attachment
		splash:Emit(9)

		Debris:AddItem(effectPart, 2)
	end

	local function getSwayJoints(tool)
		local joints = {}
		for _, descendant in ipairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("Motor6D") and descendant:GetAttribute("FishingRodSwayJoint") == true then
				table.insert(joints, descendant)
			end
		end
		return joints
	end

	local function jointsAreValid(joints)
		if not joints or #joints == 0 then
			return false
		end
		for _, joint in ipairs(joints) do
			if not joint.Parent or not joint.Part0 or not joint.Part1 then
				return false
			end
		end
		return true
	end

	local function getCastingLineParts(tool)
		local stringParts = {}
		local bobberPart = nil

		for _, descendant in ipairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then
				local normalizedName = string.lower(descendant.Name)
				if string.find(normalizedName, "string", 1, true) then
					table.insert(stringParts, descendant)
				elseif not bobberPart and string.find(normalizedName, "bobber", 1, true) then
					bobberPart = descendant
				end
			end
		end

		return stringParts, bobberPart
	end

	local function getCastingLineAppearance(tool, stringParts)
		local sourceString = stringParts and stringParts[1]
		local rodId = tool and tool:GetAttribute("RodId")
		local modelLineColor = CAST_LINE_COLORS_BY_ROD_ID[rodId]
		if modelLineColor then
			return modelLineColor, sourceString and math.clamp(sourceString.Transparency, 0, 1) or 0
		end

		if not sourceString then
			return CAST_LINE_FALLBACK_COLOR, 0
		end

		-- Imported rods use separate texture atlases, and future rods may also tint
		-- the source string. Preserve that hue while lifting neutral imported gray
		-- to the bright, thread-like appearance visible on the original mesh.
		local sourceColor = sourceString.Color
		local brightestChannel = math.max(sourceColor.R, sourceColor.G, sourceColor.B)
		local brightnessScale = brightestChannel > 0
			and math.max(1, CAST_LINE_MIN_BRIGHTNESS / brightestChannel)
			or 1
		local lineColor = Color3.new(
			math.clamp(sourceColor.R * brightnessScale, 0, 1),
			math.clamp(sourceColor.G * brightnessScale, 0, 1),
			math.clamp(sourceColor.B * brightnessScale, 0, 1)
		)

		return lineColor, math.clamp(sourceString.Transparency, 0, 1)
	end

	local function getRodTipAnchor(tool, handle, joints, stringParts)
		local bestPart = nil
		local bestLength = -math.huge

		for _, descendant in ipairs(tool:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("BasePart") and descendant ~= handle then
				local normalizedName = string.gsub(string.lower(descendant.Name), "[^%w]", "")
				local isBodyPart = string.find(normalizedName, "rodbase", 1, true)
					or string.find(normalizedName, "body", 1, true)
					or string.find(normalizedName, "shaft", 1, true)
				if isBodyPart then
					local longestAxis = math.max(descendant.Size.X, descendant.Size.Y, descendant.Size.Z)
					if longestAxis > bestLength then
						bestPart = descendant
						bestLength = longestAxis
					end
				end
			end
		end

		if not bestPart then
			return handle, nil
		end

		local halfSize = bestPart.Size * 0.5
		local positiveEnd
		if bestPart.Size.X >= bestPart.Size.Y and bestPart.Size.X >= bestPart.Size.Z then
			positiveEnd = Vector3.new(halfSize.X, 0, 0)
		elseif bestPart.Size.Y >= bestPart.Size.X and bestPart.Size.Y >= bestPart.Size.Z then
			positiveEnd = Vector3.new(0, halfSize.Y, 0)
		else
			positiveEnd = Vector3.new(0, 0, halfSize.Z)
		end

		local negativeEnd = positiveEnd * -1
		local positiveWorld = bestPart.CFrame:PointToWorldSpace(positiveEnd)
		local negativeWorld = bestPart.CFrame:PointToWorldSpace(negativeEnd)
		local localTip = (positiveWorld - handle.Position).Magnitude >= (negativeWorld - handle.Position).Magnitude
			and positiveEnd
			or negativeEnd

		-- The rod mesh includes its reel in the same bounding box, so the center
		-- of the end face is not necessarily where the modeled string connects.
		-- Use the closest corner of the string's unrotated bounds to choose the
		-- correct point across that end face.
		local stringPart = stringParts and stringParts[1]
		local stringJoint = nil
		for _, joint in ipairs(joints or {}) do
			if joint.Part1 == stringPart then
				stringJoint = joint
				break
			end
		end
		if stringPart and stringJoint then
			local baselineStringCFrame = handle.CFrame * stringJoint.C0 * stringJoint.C1:Inverse()
			local bodyTipCenter = bestPart.CFrame:PointToWorldSpace(localTip)
			local stringHalfSize = stringPart.Size * 0.5
			local closestCorner = nil
			local closestDistance = math.huge
			for _, xSign in ipairs({ -1, 1 }) do
				for _, ySign in ipairs({ -1, 1 }) do
					for _, zSign in ipairs({ -1, 1 }) do
						local corner = baselineStringCFrame:PointToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(
							stringHalfSize.X * xSign,
							stringHalfSize.Y * ySign,
							stringHalfSize.Z * zSign
						))
						local distance = (corner - bodyTipCenter).Magnitude
						if distance < closestDistance then
							closestCorner = corner
							closestDistance = distance
						end
					end
				end
			end

			if closestCorner then
				local cornerOnBody = bestPart.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(closestCorner)
				if bestPart.Size.X >= bestPart.Size.Y and bestPart.Size.X >= bestPart.Size.Z then
					localTip = Vector3.new(localTip.X, math.clamp(cornerOnBody.Y, -halfSize.Y, halfSize.Y), math.clamp(cornerOnBody.Z, -halfSize.Z, halfSize.Z))
				elseif bestPart.Size.Y >= bestPart.Size.X and bestPart.Size.Y >= bestPart.Size.Z then
					-- The reel widens the positive-X side of this combined mesh. Move the
					-- modeled connection slightly toward the shaft corner, but keep it
					-- inside the visible cap instead of overshooting the rod bounds.
					local bodyX = -math.abs(math.clamp(cornerOnBody.X, -halfSize.X, halfSize.X))
					local bodyZ = math.clamp(cornerOnBody.Z, -halfSize.Z, halfSize.Z)
					localTip = Vector3.new(
						bodyX + ((-halfSize.X - bodyX) * 0.2),
						localTip.Y,
						bodyZ + ((-halfSize.Z - bodyZ) * 0.2)
					)
				else
					localTip = Vector3.new(math.clamp(cornerOnBody.X, -halfSize.X, halfSize.X), math.clamp(cornerOnBody.Y, -halfSize.Y, halfSize.Y), localTip.Z)
				end
			end
		end

		-- Start the cast Beam just inside the visible end cap. Imported MeshPart
		-- bounds can extend a little beyond the rendered rod, which otherwise
		-- leaves a small air gap between the rod tip and the procedural line.
		-- The slight overlap keeps the connection visually sealed at every angle.
		local tipInset = math.min(0.2, bestLength * 0.08)
		if bestPart.Size.X >= bestPart.Size.Y and bestPart.Size.X >= bestPart.Size.Z then
			localTip -= Vector3.new(math.sign(localTip.X) * tipInset, 0, 0)
		elseif bestPart.Size.Y >= bestPart.Size.X and bestPart.Size.Y >= bestPart.Size.Z then
			localTip -= Vector3.new(0, math.sign(localTip.Y) * tipInset, 0)
		else
			localTip -= Vector3.new(0, 0, math.sign(localTip.Z) * tipInset)
		end

		return bestPart, CFrame.new(localTip)
	end

	local function ensureCastingLine(tool, state)
		if state.castBeam and state.castBeam.Parent and state.bobberAttachment and state.bobberAttachment.Parent then
			return
		end
		if not jointsAreValid(state.joints) then
			return
		end

		local pivotJoint = state.joints[1]
		local handle = pivotJoint.Part0
		local stringParts, bobberPart = getCastingLineParts(tool)
		if not handle or not bobberPart then
			return
		end

		local tipPart, tipCFrame = getRodTipAnchor(tool, handle, state.joints, stringParts)
		local tipAttachment = tipPart:FindFirstChild(CAST_TIP_ATTACHMENT_NAME)
		if not tipAttachment or not tipAttachment:IsA("Attachment") then
			tipAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
			tipAttachment.Name = CAST_TIP_ATTACHMENT_NAME
			tipAttachment.Parent = tipPart
		end
		-- Anchor to the physical end of the imported rod body. The sway motors use
		-- an approximate model-bounds pivot, which is not always the mesh's tip.
		tipAttachment.CFrame = tipCFrame or pivotJoint.C0

		local bobberAttachment = bobberPart:FindFirstChild(CAST_BOBBER_ATTACHMENT_NAME)
		if not bobberAttachment or not bobberAttachment:IsA("Attachment") then
			bobberAttachment = Instance.new("Attachment")
			bobberAttachment.Name = CAST_BOBBER_ATTACHMENT_NAME
			bobberAttachment.Parent = bobberPart
		end
		bobberAttachment.CFrame = CFrame.new()

		local castBeam = handle:FindFirstChild(CAST_LINE_BEAM_NAME)
		if not castBeam or not castBeam:IsA("Beam") then
			castBeam = Instance.new("Beam")
			castBeam.Name = CAST_LINE_BEAM_NAME
			castBeam.Parent = handle
		end
		-- Match the original held line's appearance without changing that model.
		local lineColor, lineTransparency = getCastingLineAppearance(tool, stringParts)
		castBeam.Width0 = CAST_LINE_WIDTH
		castBeam.Width1 = CAST_LINE_WIDTH
		castBeam.Color = ColorSequence.new(lineColor)
		castBeam.Transparency = NumberSequence.new(lineTransparency)
		castBeam.LightInfluence = 0
		castBeam.FaceCamera = true
		castBeam.Segments = 1
		castBeam.Attachment0 = tipAttachment
		castBeam.Attachment1 = bobberAttachment
		castBeam.Enabled = false

		state.stringParts = stringParts
		state.bobberAttachment = bobberAttachment
		for _, joint in ipairs(state.joints) do
			if joint.Part1 == tipPart then
				state.tipJoint = joint
			end
			if joint.Part1 == bobberPart then
				state.bobberJoint = joint
			end
		end
		state.castBeam = castBeam
	end

	local function getJointPart1CFrame(joint)
		if not joint or not joint.Parent or not joint.Part0 or not joint.Part1 then
			return nil
		end

		return joint.Part0.CFrame * joint.C0 * joint.Transform * joint.C1:Inverse()
	end

	local function getCastingTipWorldPosition(state, tipAttachment)
		local tipPartCFrame = getJointPart1CFrame(state.tipJoint)
		if tipPartCFrame then
			return tipPartCFrame:PointToWorldSpace(tipAttachment.Position)
		end
		return tipAttachment.WorldPosition
	end

	local function alignBobberWithCastingLine(tool, state, lineSwing)
		local bobberJoint = state.bobberJoint
		local bobberAttachment = state.bobberAttachment
		local tipAttachment = state.castBeam and state.castBeam.Attachment0
		local bobberPart = bobberAttachment and bobberAttachment.Parent
		if not bobberJoint or not bobberJoint.Parent or not bobberJoint.Part0 or not bobberJoint.Part1 then
			return false
		end
		if not tipAttachment or not bobberPart or not bobberPart:IsA("BasePart") then
			return false
		end

		-- Read the baseline pose directly from the Motor6D equation. Part.CFrame is
		-- not updated immediately after Transform changes, so using it here caused
		-- the bobber to mirror its previous result and alternate sides every frame.
		local currentCFrame = getJointPart1CFrame(bobberJoint) or bobberPart.CFrame
		local tipWorld = getCastingTipWorldPosition(state, tipAttachment)
		local currentPosition = currentCFrame.Position
		local forwardOffset = currentPosition - tipWorld
		if forwardOffset.Magnitude < 0.0001 then
			return false
		end

		-- Cast in the direction the character is facing instead of treating the
		-- imported hanging offset as the forward endpoint. Keep the whole path on
		-- the rod-hand side of the avatar so neither the bobber nor the straight Beam
		-- connecting it to the tip cuts through the torso during the overhead swing.
		local swing = math.clamp(tonumber(lineSwing) or 0, 0, 1)
		local character = tool and tool.Parent
		local rootPart = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
		local horizontalForward = rootPart and Vector3.new(rootPart.CFrame.LookVector.X, 0, rootPart.CFrame.LookVector.Z)
			or Vector3.new(forwardOffset.X, 0, forwardOffset.Z)
		if horizontalForward.Magnitude < 0.0001 then
			horizontalForward = Vector3.new(currentCFrame.LookVector.X, 0, currentCFrame.LookVector.Z)
		end
		if horizontalForward.Magnitude < 0.0001 then
			return false
		end
		horizontalForward = horizontalForward.Unit

		local castLength = math.max(forwardOffset.Magnitude, 3.2)
		local safeSide
		if rootPart then
			local tipLocal = rootPart.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(tipWorld)
			local sideSign = tipLocal.X >= 0 and 1 or -1
			safeSide = rootPart.CFrame.RightVector * sideSign
		else
			safeSide = currentCFrame.RightVector
		end

		local pulledBackOffset = (-horizontalForward * castLength * 0.8)
			+ (Vector3.yAxis * castLength * 0.9)
			+ (safeSide * castLength * 0.78)
		local overheadOffset = (horizontalForward * castLength * 0.5)
			+ (Vector3.yAxis * castLength * 1.75)
			+ (safeSide * castLength * 0.62)
		local releasedOffset = (horizontalForward * castLength * 2.1)
			- (Vector3.yAxis * castLength * 0.62)
			+ (safeSide * castLength * 0.12)

		-- Resolve the release endpoint once in world space. This keeps the bobber at
		-- the water surface after the player's arm (or character) moves. Starting a
		-- new windup clears it so the next cast gets a fresh landing point.
		if swing <= 0.001 then
			state.landedBobberWorldPosition = nil
			state.landedOnWater = false
			state.bobberPlopPlayed = false
		elseif not state.landedBobberWorldPosition then
			local landingPosition = FishingWater.findCastSurface(
				tipWorld,
				horizontalForward,
				safeSide,
				character and { character } or {},
				{
					sideOffset = castLength * 0.12,
					rayHeight = 24,
					rayDepth = 120,
				}
			)

			-- There is intentionally no airborne fallback. If the shared water raycast
			-- cannot resolve a real surface, the procedural cast line stays hidden.
			state.landedBobberWorldPosition = landingPosition
			state.landedOnWater = landingPosition ~= nil
		end

		local landingPosition = state.landedBobberWorldPosition
		if not landingPosition then
			if swing <= 0.001 then
				-- The release target has zero influence at the beginning of the Bezier;
				-- retain it only so the pulled-back windup can be displayed.
				landingPosition = tipWorld + releasedOffset
			else
				return false
			end
		end
		if swing >= 0.995 and state.landedOnWater and not state.bobberPlopPlayed then
			state.bobberPlopPlayed = true
			playBobberSplash(landingPosition)
		end

		local inverseSwing = 1 - swing
		local pulledBackPosition = tipWorld + pulledBackOffset
		local overheadPosition = tipWorld + overheadOffset
		local desiredPosition = (pulledBackPosition * inverseSwing * inverseSwing)
			+ (overheadPosition * 2 * inverseSwing * swing)
			+ (landingPosition * swing * swing)
		local toTip = tipWorld - desiredPosition
		if toTip.Magnitude < 0.0001 then
			return false
		end

		local localAxis
		if bobberPart.Size.X >= bobberPart.Size.Y and bobberPart.Size.X >= bobberPart.Size.Z then
			localAxis = Vector3.new(1, 0, 0)
		elseif bobberPart.Size.Y >= bobberPart.Size.X and bobberPart.Size.Y >= bobberPart.Size.Z then
			localAxis = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
		else
			localAxis = Vector3.new(0, 0, 1)
		end

		-- Point whichever modeled end owns the connector toward the rod tip.
		local connectorSign = bobberAttachment.Position:Dot(localAxis) >= 0 and 1 or -1
		local currentConnectorAxis = currentCFrame:VectorToWorldSpace(localAxis * connectorSign)
		local desiredConnectorAxis = toTip.Unit
		local cross = currentConnectorAxis:Cross(desiredConnectorAxis)
		local dot = math.clamp(currentConnectorAxis:Dot(desiredConnectorAxis), -1, 1)
		local deltaRotation = CFrame.new()

		if cross.Magnitude > 0.0001 then
			deltaRotation = CFrame.fromAxisAngle(cross.Unit, math.atan2(cross.Magnitude, dot))
		elseif dot < 0 then
			local fallbackAxis = currentCFrame.RightVector
			if math.abs(fallbackAxis:Dot(currentConnectorAxis)) > 0.95 then
				fallbackAxis = currentCFrame.LookVector
			end
			deltaRotation = CFrame.fromAxisAngle(fallbackAxis, math.pi)
		end

		local currentRotation = currentCFrame - currentCFrame.Position
		local desiredCFrame = CFrame.new(desiredPosition) * deltaRotation * currentRotation
		bobberJoint.Transform = (bobberJoint.Part0.CFrame * bobberJoint.C0):Inverse()
			* desiredCFrame
			* bobberJoint.C1
		return true
	end

	local function setCastingLineActive(tool, state, active, lineSwing)
		ensureCastingLine(tool, state)
		for _, stringPart in ipairs(state.stringParts or {}) do
			if stringPart.Parent then
				stringPart.LocalTransparencyModifier = active and 1 or 0
			end
		end
		if state.castBeam and state.castBeam.Parent then
			local lineAligned = false
			if active and state.bobberAttachment and state.bobberAttachment.Parent then
				-- Connect to the center of the bobber end that faces the rod. Projecting
				-- diagonally toward the tip put the beam on an upper edge, so it looked
				-- detached from the modeled red-side connector.
				local tipAttachment = state.castBeam.Attachment0
				local bobberPart = state.bobberAttachment.Parent
				if tipAttachment and bobberPart:IsA("BasePart") then
					local halfSize = bobberPart.Size * 0.5
					local positiveEnd
					if bobberPart.Size.X >= bobberPart.Size.Y and bobberPart.Size.X >= bobberPart.Size.Z then
						positiveEnd = Vector3.new(halfSize.X, 0, 0)
					elseif bobberPart.Size.Y >= bobberPart.Size.X and bobberPart.Size.Y >= bobberPart.Size.Z then
						positiveEnd = Vector3.new(0, halfSize.Y, 0)
					else
						positiveEnd = Vector3.new(0, 0, halfSize.Z)
					end

					local negativeEnd = -positiveEnd
					local bobberCFrame = getJointPart1CFrame(state.bobberJoint) or bobberPart.CFrame
					local tipWorld = getCastingTipWorldPosition(state, tipAttachment)
					local positiveDistance = (bobberCFrame:PointToWorldSpace(positiveEnd) - tipWorld).Magnitude
					local negativeDistance = (bobberCFrame:PointToWorldSpace(negativeEnd) - tipWorld).Magnitude
					state.bobberAttachment.Position = positiveDistance <= negativeDistance and positiveEnd or negativeEnd
					lineAligned = alignBobberWithCastingLine(tool, state, lineSwing) == true
				end
			end
			state.castBeam.Enabled = active and lineAligned
		end
		if not active then
			state.landedBobberWorldPosition = nil
			state.landedOnWater = false
			state.bobberPlopPlayed = false
		end
	end

	local function resetState(state)
		for _, stringPart in ipairs(state.stringParts or {}) do
			if stringPart.Parent then
				stringPart.LocalTransparencyModifier = 0
			end
		end
		if state.castBeam and state.castBeam.Parent then
			state.castBeam.Enabled = false
		end
		state.landedBobberWorldPosition = nil
		state.landedOnWater = false
		state.bobberPlopPlayed = false
		if state.joints then
			for _, joint in ipairs(state.joints) do
				if joint.Parent then
					joint.Transform = CFrame.new()
				end
			end
		end
	end

	local function getState(tool)
		local state = swayStates[tool]
		if not state then
			state = {
				pitch = 0,
				roll = 0,
				pitchVelocity = 0,
				rollVelocity = 0,
				joints = nil,
				stringParts = nil,
				bobberAttachment = nil,
				tipJoint = nil,
				bobberJoint = nil,
				castBeam = nil,
				landedBobberWorldPosition = nil,
				landedOnWater = false,
				bobberPlopPlayed = false,
			}
			swayStates[tool] = state
		end
		if not jointsAreValid(state.joints) then
			state.joints = getSwayJoints(tool)
			state.stringParts = nil
			state.bobberAttachment = nil
			state.tipJoint = nil
			state.bobberJoint = nil
			state.castBeam = nil
			state.landedBobberWorldPosition = nil
			state.landedOnWater = false
			state.bobberPlopPlayed = false
		end
		return state
	end

	local function springAxis(position, velocity, target, deltaTime)
		local acceleration = ((target - position) * SPRING_STIFFNESS) - (velocity * SPRING_DAMPING)
		velocity += acceleration * deltaTime
		position += velocity * deltaTime
		return position, velocity
	end

	local function removeStowedRodClone(character)
		local backpackVisual = character and character:FindFirstChild("FishingBackpackVisual")
		local stowedRod = backpackVisual and backpackVisual:FindFirstChild("StowedFishingRodVisual")
		if stowedRod then
			-- This is only the cosmetic backpack clone. Removing it locally prevents a
			-- replicated replacement from flashing for a frame while the real rod is held.
			stowedRod:Destroy()
		end
	end

	local function bindStowedRodSuppression(character)
		if not character or stowedRodConnections[character] then
			return
		end

		stowedRodConnections[character] = character.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
			if descendant.Name == "Fishing Rod" or descendant.Name == "StowedFishingRodVisual" then
				task.defer(function()
					local heldRod = character:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
					if heldRod and heldRod:IsA("Tool") then
						removeStowedRodClone(character)
					end
				end)
			end
		end)
	end

	RunService.PreSimulation:Connect(function(deltaTime)
		local step = math.min(deltaTime, 1 / 20)
		local activeTools = {}

		for _, observedPlayer in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
			local character = observedPlayer.Character
			bindStowedRodSuppression(character)
			local rootPart = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
			local humanoid = character and character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
			local tool = character and character:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
			if tool and tool:IsA("Tool") then
				removeStowedRodClone(character)
			end

			if rootPart and humanoid and tool and tool:IsA("Tool") then
				local state = getState(tool)
				if jointsAreValid(state.joints) then
					activeTools[tool] = true
					local movementVelocity = rootPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity
					if humanoid.MoveDirection.Magnitude > 0.01 then
						movementVelocity = humanoid.MoveDirection * humanoid.WalkSpeed
					end
					local localVelocity = rootPart.CFrame:VectorToObjectSpace(movementVelocity)
					local horizontalSpeed = Vector3.new(localVelocity.X, 0, localVelocity.Z).Magnitude
					local walkScale = math.clamp(horizontalSpeed / math.max(humanoid.WalkSpeed, 1), 0, 1.25)
					local stepPhase = (os.clock() * STEP_FREQUENCY) + ((observedPlayer.UserId % 17) * 0.31)
					local targetPitch = math.clamp(localVelocity.Z * FORWARD_SWAY_PER_SPEED, -MAX_SWAY, MAX_SWAY)
					local targetRoll = math.clamp(-localVelocity.X * SIDE_SWAY_PER_SPEED, -MAX_SWAY, MAX_SWAY)
					targetRoll += math.sin(stepPhase) * STEP_SWAY * walkScale

					state.pitch, state.pitchVelocity = springAxis(state.pitch, state.pitchVelocity, targetPitch, step)
					state.roll, state.rollVelocity = springAxis(state.roll, state.rollVelocity, targetRoll, step)
					state.pitch = math.clamp(state.pitch, -MAX_SWAY, MAX_SWAY)
					state.roll = math.clamp(state.roll, -MAX_SWAY, MAX_SWAY)
					local castFlex = math.clamp(
						tonumber(tool:GetAttribute(CAST_FLEX_ATTRIBUTE)) or 0,
						math.rad(-12),
						math.rad(12)
					)
					local castTwist = math.clamp(
						tonumber(tool:GetAttribute(CAST_TWIST_ATTRIBUTE)) or 0,
						math.rad(-5),
						math.rad(5)
					)
					local castSide = math.clamp(
						tonumber(tool:GetAttribute(CAST_SIDE_ATTRIBUTE)) or 0,
						0,
						1
					)
					local lineSwing = math.clamp(
						tonumber(tool:GetAttribute(CAST_LINE_SWING_ATTRIBUTE)) or 0,
						0,
						1
					)
					-- During the casting game, angle only the hanging line and bobber
					-- downward from the rod tip. At castSide = 0 the imported idle pose
					-- remains untouched.
					local castSideCorrection = (math.pi / 2) * castSide
					local transform = CFrame.Angles(
						state.pitch - castFlex,
						castTwist,
						state.roll + castSideCorrection
					)
					for _, joint in ipairs(state.joints) do
						joint.Transform = transform
					end
					setCastingLineActive(tool, state, castSide > 0.001, lineSwing)
				end
			end
		end

		for tool, state in pairs(swayStates) do
			if not activeTools[tool] then
				resetState(state)
				swayStates[tool] = nil
			end
		end
	end)
end

startFishingRodSway()

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("FishingRemotes")
local FishingPrompt = remotes:WaitForChild("FishingPrompt")
local Notice = remotes:WaitForChild("Notice")

local CAST_FRAME_NAMES = {
	"CastPowerContent",
	"ModernCastPowerUI",
}
local ROD_FLEX_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodCastFlex"
local ROD_TWIST_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodCastTwist"
local ROD_CAST_SIDE_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodCastSide"
local ROD_LINE_SWING_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingRodLineSwing"
local FISHING_TOOL_SWITCH_LOCK_ATTRIBUTE = "FishingToolSwitchLocked"
local FORWARD_DURATION = 0.38
local FOLLOW_THROUGH_DURATION = 0.2
local RECOVERY_DURATION = 0.32
local CHARGE_RESPONSE = 12
local MINIGAME_HIDDEN_CONFIRMATION = 0.25

local POSE_KEYS = {
	"rightShoulder",
	"leftShoulder",
	"waist",
}

local JOINT_NAMES = {
	rightShoulder = { "RightShoulder", "Right Shoulder" },
	leftShoulder = { "LeftShoulder", "Left Shoulder" },
	waist = { "Waist", "RootJoint", "Root Joint" },
}

local IDENTITY_POSE = {
	rightShoulder = CFrame.new(),
	leftShoulder = CFrame.new(),
	waist = CFrame.new(),
}

-- Keep the character layer deliberately limited to the upper body. The newer
-- AnimationConstraint avatar joints already retarget the elbows, wrists, neck,
-- and legs from Roblox's Animator; adding a second procedural layer to those
-- joints can fold the limbs or pull the rod through the character.
local WINDUP_POSE = {
	rightShoulder = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-62), math.rad(-12), math.rad(38)),
	leftShoulder = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-12), math.rad(8), math.rad(-9)),
	waist = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-5), math.rad(-20), math.rad(3)),
}

local FORWARD_POSE = {
	rightShoulder = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-108), math.rad(8), math.rad(-12)),
	leftShoulder = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-22), math.rad(-6), math.rad(8)),
	waist = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(4), math.rad(18), math.rad(-3)),
}

local FOLLOW_THROUGH_POSE = {
	rightShoulder = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-78), math.rad(10), math.rad(-24)),
	leftShoulder = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(-8), 0, math.rad(4)),
	waist = CFrame.Angles(math.rad(2), math.rad(9), 0),
}

local character = nil
local joints = nil
local phase = "idle"
local phaseStartedAt = 0
local activeCastInput = nil
local releaseStartPose = nil
local releaseStartFlex = 0
local releaseStartTwist = 0
local releaseStartSide = 0
local releaseStartLineSwing = 0
local currentPose = table.clone(IDENTITY_POSE)
local currentFlex = 0
local currentTwist = 0
local currentCastSide = 0
local currentLineSwing = 0
local flexTool = nil
local landedSawMinigame = false
local landedMinigameHiddenAt = nil
local activeFishingSessionId = nil

local function copyPose(pose)
	local result = {}
	for _, key in ipairs(POSE_KEYS) do
		result[key] = pose[key] or CFrame.new()
	end
	return result
end

local function lerpPose(fromPose, toPose, alpha)
	local clampedAlpha = math.clamp(alpha, 0, 1)
	local result = {}
	for _, key in ipairs(POSE_KEYS) do
		result[key] = (fromPose[key] or CFrame.new()):Lerp(toPose[key] or CFrame.new(), clampedAlpha)
	end
	return result
end

local function easeOutCubic(value)
	local inverse = 1 - math.clamp(value, 0, 1)
	return 1 - (inverse * inverse * inverse)
end

local function easeInOutSine(value)
	return -(math.cos(math.pi * math.clamp(value, 0, 1)) - 1) / 2
end

local function findJoint(jointsByName, aliases)
	for _, motorName in ipairs(aliases) do
		if jointsByName[motorName] then
			return jointsByName[motorName]
		end
	end
	return nil
end

local function restoreJointC0s()
	currentPose = copyPose(IDENTITY_POSE)
end

local function applyPose(pose)
	currentPose = copyPose(pose)
end

local function getEquippedFishingRod()
	local tool = character and character:FindFirstChild("Fishing Rod")
	if tool and tool:IsA("Tool") then
		return tool
	end
	return nil
end

local function clearRodFlex()
	local equippedTool = getEquippedFishingRod()
	local function clearTool(tool)
		if tool and tool.Parent then
			tool:SetAttribute(ROD_FLEX_ATTRIBUTE, nil)
			tool:SetAttribute(ROD_TWIST_ATTRIBUTE, nil)
			tool:SetAttribute(ROD_CAST_SIDE_ATTRIBUTE, nil)
			tool:SetAttribute(ROD_LINE_SWING_ATTRIBUTE, nil)
		end
	end

	clearTool(flexTool)
	if equippedTool ~= flexTool then
		clearTool(equippedTool)
	end
	flexTool = nil
	currentFlex = 0
	currentTwist = 0
	currentCastSide = 0
	currentLineSwing = 0
end

local function applyRodFlex(flex, twist, castSide, lineSwing)
	local tool = getEquippedFishingRod()
	if flexTool ~= tool then
		clearRodFlex()
		flexTool = tool
	end

	currentFlex = flex
	currentTwist = twist
	currentCastSide = math.clamp(tonumber(castSide) or 0, 0, 1)
	currentLineSwing = math.clamp(tonumber(lineSwing) or 0, 0, 1)
	if tool then
		tool:SetAttribute(ROD_FLEX_ATTRIBUTE, flex)
		tool:SetAttribute(ROD_TWIST_ATTRIBUTE, twist)
		tool:SetAttribute(ROD_CAST_SIDE_ATTRIBUTE, currentCastSide)
		tool:SetAttribute(ROD_LINE_SWING_ATTRIBUTE, currentLineSwing)
	end
end

local function finishAnimation()
	currentPose = copyPose(IDENTITY_POSE)
	restoreJointC0s()
	clearRodFlex()
	activeCastInput = nil
	landedSawMinigame = false
	landedMinigameHiddenAt = nil
	activeFishingSessionId = nil
	phase = "idle"
end

local function setupCharacter(nextCharacter)
	restoreJointC0s()
	clearRodFlex()
	character = nextCharacter
	joints = nil
	phase = "idle"
	activeCastInput = nil
	landedSawMinigame = false
	landedMinigameHiddenAt = nil
	activeFishingSessionId = nil
	currentPose = copyPose(IDENTITY_POSE)

	local humanoid = character:WaitForChild("Humanoid", 10)
	if not humanoid then
		return
	end

	-- CharacterAdded can fire before an R15 rig has finished parenting its motors.
	-- Wait for both shoulders instead of permanently disabling the animation.
	local nextJoints = nil
	local jointDeadline = os.clock() + 10
	repeat
		local jointsByName = {}
		for _, descendant in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
			if descendant:IsA("AnimationConstraint") then
				-- Prefer upgraded avatar joints when both systems are present.
				jointsByName[descendant.Name] = descendant
			elseif descendant:IsA("Motor6D") and jointsByName[descendant.Name] == nil then
				jointsByName[descendant.Name] = descendant
			end
		end

		local candidateJoints = {}
		for key, aliases in pairs(JOINT_NAMES) do
			local joint = findJoint(jointsByName, aliases)
			if joint then
				candidateJoints[key] = joint
			end
		end

		if candidateJoints.rightShoulder and candidateJoints.leftShoulder then
			nextJoints = candidateJoints
			break
		end
		task.wait(0.05)
	until os.clock() >= jointDeadline or character.Parent == nil

	if not nextJoints then
		warn("[FishingCastAnimation] Character shoulders were not found")
		return
	end
	joints = nextJoints
end

local function isCastInput(input)
	return input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
		or input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.Space
end

local function hasEquippedFishingRod()
	return getEquippedFishingRod() ~= nil
end

local function isGuiObjectActuallyVisible(guiObject)
	if not guiObject.Visible then
		return false
	end

	local ancestor = guiObject.Parent
	while ancestor and ancestor ~= playerGui do
		if ancestor:IsA("GuiObject") and not ancestor.Visible then
			return false
		end
		if ancestor:IsA("LayerCollector") and not ancestor.Enabled then
			return false
		end
		ancestor = ancestor.Parent
	end

	return ancestor == playerGui
end

local function isCastMeterVisible()
	for _, frameName in ipairs(CAST_FRAME_NAMES) do
		local candidate = playerGui:FindFirstChild(frameName, true)
		if candidate and candidate:IsA("GuiObject") and isGuiObjectActuallyVisible(candidate) then
			return true
		end
	end

	return false
end

local function isFishingMinigameVisible()
	-- FishingClient owns one blur for the complete minigame lifecycle. Use it as
	-- the authoritative signal so duplicate legacy frames in PlayerGui cannot keep
	-- the landed bobber alive after the active game has closed.
	local fishingBlur = Lighting:FindFirstChild("FishyFishUiBlur")
	if fishingBlur and fishingBlur:IsA("BlurEffect") then
		return fishingBlur.Enabled and fishingBlur.Size > 0
	end

	-- Fallback for stripped-down test places that do not create the fishing blur.
	local frameNames = {
		CustomFishingMinigame = true,
		FishingGameContent = true,
	}
	for _, candidate in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if frameNames[candidate.Name]
			and candidate:IsA("GuiObject")
			and isGuiObjectActuallyVisible(candidate)
		then
			return true
		end
	end

	return false
end

local function beginRecovery()
	if phase == "idle" or phase == "release" then
		return
	end

	phase = "recover"
	phaseStartedAt = os.clock()
	releaseStartPose = copyPose(currentPose)
	releaseStartFlex = currentFlex
	releaseStartTwist = currentTwist
	releaseStartSide = currentCastSide
	releaseStartLineSwing = currentLineSwing
	activeCastInput = nil
end

-- FishingPrompt starts the exact manual fishing session associated with this
-- cast. The server's following Notice is the authoritative completion signal
-- for every result (caught, escaped, invalidated, or rod unequipped). This is
-- independent of whichever visual minigame layout is currently installed.
FishingPrompt.OnClientEvent:Connect(function(prompt)
	if type(prompt) ~= "table" or prompt.autoFish == true then
		return
	end

	activeFishingSessionId = prompt.sessionId or true
	landedSawMinigame = true
end)

Notice.OnClientEvent:Connect(function()
	if activeFishingSessionId == nil and phase == "idle" and flexTool == nil then
		return
	end

	finishAnimation()
end)

-- FishingClient owns the exact local lifecycle of a manual cast. It clears this
-- lock as soon as the minigame finishes, before the catch notice makes the
-- server round trip. Retract from that signal as well so a delayed/missed notice
-- or a minigame blur that lingers cannot leave the cast Beam and bobber active.
player:GetAttributeChangedSignal(FISHING_TOOL_SWITCH_LOCK_ATTRIBUTE):Connect(function()
	if player:GetAttribute(FISHING_TOOL_SWITCH_LOCK_ATTRIBUTE) == true then
		return
	end

	if phase ~= "idle" or flexTool ~= nil or activeFishingSessionId ~= nil then
		finishAnimation()
	end
end)

UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if not isCastInput(input)
		or activeCastInput ~= nil
		or phase ~= "idle"
		or not isCastMeterVisible()
		or not hasEquippedFishingRod()
		or not joints
	then
		return
	end

	activeCastInput = input
	phase = "charge"
	phaseStartedAt = os.clock()
end)

UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input ~= activeCastInput or phase ~= "charge" then
		return
	end

	activeCastInput = nil
	phase = "release"
	phaseStartedAt = os.clock()
	releaseStartPose = copyPose(currentPose)
	releaseStartFlex = currentFlex
	releaseStartTwist = currentTwist
	releaseStartSide = currentCastSide
	releaseStartLineSwing = currentLineSwing
end)

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	if not joints then
		return
	end

	if phase == "idle" then
		-- Pull the line behind the rod when the casting meter first appears. The
		-- release phase sweeps it over the tip and toward the water.
		if isCastMeterVisible() and hasEquippedFishingRod() then
			applyRodFlex(0, 0, 1, 0)
		elseif flexTool then
			clearRodFlex()
		end
		return
	end

	if phase == "charge" then
		if not isCastMeterVisible() or not hasEquippedFishingRod() then
			beginRecovery()
		else
			local elapsed = os.clock() - phaseStartedAt
			local blend = 1 - math.exp(-CHARGE_RESPONSE * elapsed)
			currentPose = lerpPose(IDENTITY_POSE, WINDUP_POSE, blend)

			local displayPose = copyPose(currentPose)
			local settleAmount = math.clamp(elapsed / 0.3, 0, 1)
			local loadedPulse = math.sin(elapsed * 5.5) * math.rad(1.2) * settleAmount
			displayPose.rightShoulder *= CFrame.Angles(loadedPulse, 0, 0)
			displayPose.waist *= CFrame.Angles(0, loadedPulse * -0.35, 0)
			applyPose(displayPose)

			local flex = math.rad(4) * settleAmount + loadedPulse * 0.45
			local twist = math.rad(-1.5) * settleAmount
			applyRodFlex(flex, twist, 1, 0)
		end
	elseif phase == "release" then
		local elapsed = os.clock() - phaseStartedAt
		if elapsed <= FORWARD_DURATION then
			local poseProgress = easeOutCubic(elapsed / FORWARD_DURATION)
			local lineProgress = easeInOutSine(elapsed / FORWARD_DURATION)
			currentPose = lerpPose(releaseStartPose or WINDUP_POSE, FORWARD_POSE, poseProgress)
			applyRodFlex(
				releaseStartFlex + (math.rad(-10) - releaseStartFlex) * poseProgress,
				releaseStartTwist + (math.rad(2.5) - releaseStartTwist) * poseProgress,
				releaseStartSide + (1 - releaseStartSide) * poseProgress,
				releaseStartLineSwing + (1 - releaseStartLineSwing) * lineProgress
			)
		elseif elapsed <= FORWARD_DURATION + FOLLOW_THROUGH_DURATION then
			local followProgress = (elapsed - FORWARD_DURATION) / FOLLOW_THROUGH_DURATION
			currentPose = lerpPose(FORWARD_POSE, FOLLOW_THROUGH_POSE, easeInOutSine(followProgress))
			local damping = 1 - followProgress
			local flex = math.rad(-10) * damping + math.sin(followProgress * math.pi * 2) * math.rad(3) * damping
			local twist = math.rad(2.5) * damping
			applyRodFlex(flex, twist, 1, 1)
		elseif elapsed <= FORWARD_DURATION + FOLLOW_THROUGH_DURATION + RECOVERY_DURATION then
			local recoveryProgress = (elapsed - FORWARD_DURATION - FOLLOW_THROUGH_DURATION) / RECOVERY_DURATION
			currentPose = lerpPose(FOLLOW_THROUGH_POSE, IDENTITY_POSE, easeInOutSine(recoveryProgress))
			-- The arm can recover, but the released line stays active and its cached
			-- world-space endpoint remains on the water.
			applyRodFlex(0, 0, 1, 1)
		else
			currentPose = copyPose(IDENTITY_POSE)
			applyPose(currentPose)
			applyRodFlex(0, 0, 1, 1)
			phase = "landed"
			phaseStartedAt = os.clock()
			landedSawMinigame = isFishingMinigameVisible()
			landedMinigameHiddenAt = nil
		end

		applyPose(currentPose)
	elseif phase == "landed" then
		if not hasEquippedFishingRod() then
			finishAnimation()
			return
		end

		currentPose = copyPose(IDENTITY_POSE)
		applyPose(currentPose)
		applyRodFlex(0, 0, 1, 1)

		local minigameVisible = isFishingMinigameVisible()
		if minigameVisible then
			landedSawMinigame = true
			landedMinigameHiddenAt = nil
		elseif landedSawMinigame then
			landedMinigameHiddenAt = landedMinigameHiddenAt or os.clock()
			if os.clock() - landedMinigameHiddenAt >= MINIGAME_HIDDEN_CONFIRMATION then
				finishAnimation()
			end
		end
	elseif phase == "recover" then
		local elapsed = os.clock() - phaseStartedAt
		local progress = easeInOutSine(elapsed / RECOVERY_DURATION)
		currentPose = lerpPose(releaseStartPose or currentPose, IDENTITY_POSE, progress)
		applyPose(currentPose)
		applyRodFlex(
			releaseStartFlex * (1 - progress),
			releaseStartTwist * (1 - progress),
			releaseStartSide * (1 - progress),
			releaseStartLineSwing * (1 - progress)
		)

		if elapsed >= RECOVERY_DURATION then
			finishAnimation()
		end
	end
end)

-- Roblox's Animator writes joint transforms before PreSimulation. Multiplying
-- our procedural layer here supports both AnimationConstraint and Motor6D rigs
-- without fighting the normal walk, idle, and tool animations.
RunService.PreSimulation:Connect(function()
	if not joints or phase == "idle" then
		return
	end

	for key, joint in pairs(joints) do
		if joint.Parent then
			joint.Transform = (currentPose[key] or CFrame.new()) * joint.Transform
		end
	end
end)

player.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(nextCharacter)
	task.spawn(setupCharacter, nextCharacter)
end)

script.Destroying:Connect(function()
	restoreJointC0s()
	clearRodFlex()
end)

if player.Character then
	task.spawn(setupCharacter, player.Character)
end

local function findButtons()
	local found = {}

	for _, obj in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if buttonNames[obj.Name] and obj:IsA("GuiButton") then
			found[obj.Name] = obj
		end
	end

	return found
end

local function forceButtonsToTop()
	forcedGui.Parent = playerGui
	forcedGui.Enabled = true
	forcedGui.DisplayOrder = 10000

	forcedFrame.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
	forcedFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, TOP_Y_OFFSET)
	forcedFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0, 220, 0, 64)
	forcedFrame.Visible = true
	forcedFrame.ZIndex = 10000

	local buttons = findButtons()
	local movedCount = 0

	for name, button in pairs(buttons) do
		if button.Parent ~= forcedFrame then
			button.Parent = forcedFrame
			movedCount += 1
		end

		button.Size = UDim2.new(0, BUTTON_SIZE, 0, BUTTON_SIZE)
		button.LayoutOrder = layoutOrder[name] or 1
		button.Visible = true
		button.ZIndex = 10001
		button.BackgroundTransparency = 1

		for _, child in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
			if child:IsA("GuiObject") then
				child.ZIndex = math.max(child.ZIndex, 10002)
			end
		end
	end

	return movedCount, buttons
end

task.spawn(function()
	while true do
		local movedCount, buttons = forceButtonsToTop()

		local count = 0
		for _ in pairs(buttons) do
			count += 1
		end

		if count > 0 then
			print("[ForceTopHudPosition] Found buttons:", count, "Moved:", movedCount)
		else
			warn("[ForceTopHudPosition] SettingsButton / QuestsButton / ShopButton not found yet")
		end

		task.wait(0.5)
	end
end)

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
	forceButtonsToTop()
end)

local function applyVirtualCrop(image, fullSize, crop)
	image.Position = UDim2.new(-(crop.Offset.X / crop.Size.X), 0, -(crop.Offset.Y / crop.Size.Y), 0)
	image.Size = UDim2.new(fullSize.X / crop.Size.X, 0, fullSize.Y / crop.Size.Y, 0)
	image.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Stretch
end

local function makeImage(parent, imageId)
	local image = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	image.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	image.Image = imageId or ""
	image.Parent = parent
	return image
end

local function makeImageButton(parent, imageId)
	local button = Instance.new("ImageButton")
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.AutoButtonColor = true
	button.Image = imageId or ""
	button.Parent = parent
	return button
end

local function styleOutlinedText(label, strokeColor)
	label.TextStrokeColor3 = strokeColor or Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
	label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
	return label
end

local function makeOutlinedText(parent, text, size, color, bold)
	local label = makeText(parent, text, size, color, bold)
	styleOutlinedText(label)
	return label
end


local function addCorner(instance, radius)
	local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
	corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius or 8)
	corner.Parent = instance
	return corner
end

local function addStroke(instance, color, thickness)
	local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
	stroke.Color = color or COLORS.stroke
	stroke.Thickness = thickness or 1
	stroke.Parent = instance
	return stroke
end

function makeText(parent, text, size, color, bold)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.Text = text or ""
	label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	label.TextSize = size or 14
	label.Font = bold and Enum.Font.GothamBold or Enum.Font.Gotham
	label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
	label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	label.Parent = parent
	return label
end

local function makeButton(parent, text, color)
	local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
	button.AutoButtonColor = true
	button.BackgroundColor3 = color or COLORS.blue
	button.Text = text
	button.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
	button.TextSize = 13
	button.TextWrapped = true
	button.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBold
	button.Parent = parent
	addCorner(button, 7)
	return button
end

	for _, child in ipairs(container:GetChildren()) do
		if not child:IsA("UIListLayout") and not child:IsA("UIGridLayout") and not child:IsA("UIPadding") then

		end
	end
end

local function createSeaStarHud()
	-- Same screen anchor and position as the previous Sea Star button.
	-- The blue button and the "SEA STARS" wording are intentionally removed.
	local SEA_STAR_ICON_IMAGE = "rbxassetid://102284604663190"
	local HUD_POSITION = UDim2.new(1, -18, 0, 18)

	local ICON_POSITION = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 4)
	local NUMBER_AREA_POSITION = UDim2.fromOffset(78, 3)
	local NUMBER_AREA_SIZE = Vector2.new(214, 76)
	local DIGIT_WIDTH = 25
	local COMMA_WIDTH = 11
	local DIGIT_HEIGHT = 72
	local NUMBER_MIN_TEXT_SIZE = 28
	local NUMBER_MAX_TEXT_SIZE = 66
	local NUMBER_OUTLINE_THICKNESS = 3.3
	local NUMBER_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
	local NUMBER_OUTLINE_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(0, 10, 21)
	local ROLL_TIME = 0.65

	local result = {}

	local root = Instance.new("Frame")
	root.Name = "SeaStarLoginHud"
	root.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 0)
	root.Position = HUD_POSITION
	root.Size = HUD_SIZE
	root.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	root.BorderSizePixel = 0
	root.Visible = true
	root.ZIndex = 1000
	root.ClipsDescendants = false
	root.Parent = gui

	-- Transparent click target preserves the old behavior of opening the Sea Star shop.
	local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
	button.Name = "SeaStarButton"
	button.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	button.BorderSizePixel = 0
	button.Text = ""
	button.AutoButtonColor = false
	button.Active = true
	button.ZIndex = 1000
	button.Parent = root

	local icon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	icon.Name = "SeaStarIcon"
	icon.Position = ICON_POSITION
	icon.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(ICON_SIZE, ICON_SIZE)
	icon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	icon.BorderSizePixel = 0
	icon.Image = SEA_STAR_ICON_IMAGE
	icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	icon.ZIndex = 1001
	icon.Parent = root

	local numberArea = Instance.new("Frame")
	numberArea.Name = "NumberArea"
	numberArea.Position = NUMBER_AREA_POSITION
	numberArea.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X, NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.Y)
	numberArea.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	numberArea.BorderSizePixel = 0
	numberArea.ClipsDescendants = false
	numberArea.ZIndex = 1001
	numberArea.Parent = root

	local digitsHolder = Instance.new("Frame")
	digitsHolder.Name = "DigitsHolder"
	digitsHolder.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
	digitsHolder.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0.5)
	digitsHolder.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
	digitsHolder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	digitsHolder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	digitsHolder.ClipsDescendants = false
	digitsHolder.ZIndex = 1002
	digitsHolder.Parent = numberArea

	local digitsScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	digitsScale.Name = "DigitsScale"
	digitsScale.Scale = 1
	digitsScale.Parent = digitsHolder

	local function formatNumber(value)
		local formatted = tostring(math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0)))
		local reversed = string.reverse(formatted)
		reversed = string.gsub(reversed, "(%d%d%d)", "%1,")
		formatted = string.reverse(reversed)
		return string.gsub(formatted, "^,", "")
	end

	local function createCharacterLabel(parent, name, character)
		local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
		label.Name = name
		label.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		label.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		label.BorderSizePixel = 0
		label.Text = character
		label.TextColor3 = NUMBER_COLOR
		label.TextTransparency = 0
		label.TextScaled = true
		label.TextWrapped = false
		label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
		label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
		label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
		label.ZIndex = 1004
		label.Parent = parent

		local sizeConstraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
		sizeConstraint.MinTextSize = NUMBER_MIN_TEXT_SIZE
		sizeConstraint.MaxTextSize = NUMBER_MAX_TEXT_SIZE
		sizeConstraint.Parent = label

		local outline = Instance.new("UIStroke")
		outline.Name = "NumberOutline"
		outline.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Contextual
		outline.Color = NUMBER_OUTLINE_COLOR
		outline.Thickness = NUMBER_OUTLINE_THICKNESS
		outline.Transparency = 0
		outline.LineJoinMode = Enum.LineJoinMode.Round
		outline.Parent = label

		return label
	end

	local function getCharacterWidth(character)
		return character == "," and COMMA_WIDTH or DIGIT_WIDTH
	end

	local function getTotalWidth(formatted)
		local total = 0
		for index = 1, #formatted do
			total += getCharacterWidth(string.sub(formatted, index, index))
		end
		return total
	end

	local activeTweens = {}
	local animationSerial = 0
	local currentValue = 0
	local hasInitialized = false

	local function cancelActiveTweens()
		for _, tween in ipairs(activeTweens) do
			tween:Cancel()
		end
		table.clear(activeTweens)
	end

	local function clearDigitSlots()
		for _, child in ipairs(digitsHolder:GetChildren()) do
			if child ~= digitsScale then
				child:Destroy()
			end
		end
	end

	local function configureHolderWidth(formatted)
		local totalWidth = getTotalWidth(formatted)
		digitsHolder.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(totalWidth, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
		digitsScale.Scale = totalWidth > NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X
			and (NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X / totalWidth)
			or 1
	end

	local function createSlot(xOffset, width)
		local slot = Instance.new("Frame")
		slot.Name = "DigitSlot"
		slot.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(xOffset, 0)
		slot.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(width, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
		slot.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		slot.BorderSizePixel = 0
		slot.ClipsDescendants = true
		slot.ZIndex = 1003
		slot.Parent = digitsHolder
		return slot
	end

	local function renderImmediate(value)
		cancelActiveTweens()
		clearDigitSlots()

		currentValue = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0))
		local formatted = formatNumber(currentValue)
		configureHolderWidth(formatted)

		local xOffset = 0
		for index = 1, #formatted do
			local character = string.sub(formatted, index, index)
			local width = getCharacterWidth(character)
			local slot = createSlot(xOffset, width)
			createCharacterLabel(slot, "Character", character)
			xOffset += width
		end
	end

	local function getOldCharacterForNewPosition(oldText, newText, newIndex)
		local distanceFromRight = #newText - newIndex
		local oldIndex = #oldText - distanceFromRight
		if oldIndex < 1 or oldIndex > #oldText then
			return ""
		end
		return string.sub(oldText, oldIndex, oldIndex)
	end

	local function animateTo(value)
		value = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0))

		if not hasInitialized then
			hasInitialized = true
			renderImmediate(value)
			return
		end

		if value == currentValue then
			return
		end

		cancelActiveTweens()
		clearDigitSlots()

		animationSerial += 1
		local thisAnimation = animationSerial
		local oldFormatted = formatNumber(currentValue)
		local newFormatted = formatNumber(value)
		local increasing = value > currentValue
		currentValue = value
		configureHolderWidth(newFormatted)

		local xOffset = 0
		local changedDigitCount = 0

		for newIndex = 1, #newFormatted do
			local newCharacter = string.sub(newFormatted, newIndex, newIndex)
			local oldCharacter = getOldCharacterForNewPosition(oldFormatted, newFormatted, newIndex)
			local width = getCharacterWidth(newCharacter)
			local slot = createSlot(xOffset, width)
			local isDigit = string.match(newCharacter, "%d") ~= nil
			local changed = oldCharacter ~= newCharacter

			if not isDigit or not changed then
				createCharacterLabel(slot, "StaticCharacter", newCharacter)
			else
				changedDigitCount += 1
				local outgoing = createCharacterLabel(slot, "OutgoingCharacter", oldCharacter)
				if oldCharacter == "" or string.match(oldCharacter, "%d") == nil then
					outgoing.TextTransparency = 1
				end

				local incoming = createCharacterLabel(slot, "IncomingCharacter", newCharacter)
				incoming.Position = increasing
					and UDim2.fromScale(0, 1)
					or UDim2.fromScale(0, -1)
				incoming.TextTransparency = 0.08

				local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
					ROLL_TIME,
					Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
					Enum.EasingDirection.Out
				)

				local outgoingTween = TweenService:Create(outgoing, tweenInfo, {
					Position = increasing
						and UDim2.fromScale(0, -1)
						or UDim2.fromScale(0, 1),
					TextTransparency = 0.35,
				})
				local incomingTween = TweenService:Create(incoming, tweenInfo, {
					Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0),
					TextTransparency = 0,
				})

				table.insert(activeTweens, outgoingTween)
				table.insert(activeTweens, incomingTween)
				outgoingTween:Play()
				incomingTween:Play()
			end

			xOffset += width
		end

		if changedDigitCount == 0 then
			renderImmediate(value)
			return
		end

		task.delay(ROLL_TIME + 0.06, function()
			if thisAnimation == animationSerial then
				renderImmediate(value)
			end
		end)
	end

	-- Small click feedback without adding a colored background.
	local pressScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	pressScale.Name = "PressScale"
	pressScale.Scale = 1
	pressScale.Parent = root

	local function setPressed(pressed)
		TweenService:Create(
			pressScale,
			TweenInfo.new(
				pressed and 0.07 or 0.16,
				pressed and Enum.EasingStyle.Quad or Enum.EasingStyle.Back,
				Enum.EasingDirection.Out
			),
			{ Scale = pressed and 0.92 or 1 }
		):Play()
	end

	button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
		setPressed(true)
	end)
	button.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
		setPressed(false)
	end)
	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		setPressed(false)
	end)
	button.Activated:Connect(function()
		setPressed(false)
	end)

	result.root = root
	result.button = button
	result.icon = icon
	result.update = animateTo
	result.update(0)
	return result
end

local seaStarHud = createSeaStarHud()

local loginButtonActivated = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
loginButtonActivated.Name = "LoginRewardTopButtonActivated"

local loginButton = nil

local function chooseIconDescendant(button)
	local best = nil
	local bestScore = -math.huge
	for _, descendant in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") or descendant:IsA("ImageButton") then
			local size = descendant.Size
			local score = math.abs(size.X.Scale) * 1000
				+ math.abs(size.Y.Scale) * 1000
				+ math.abs(size.X.Offset)
				+ math.abs(size.Y.Offset)
			if score > bestScore then
				best = descendant
				bestScore = score
			end
		end
	end
	return best
end

local function waitForNamedDescendant(root, name, timeoutSeconds)
	local deadline = os.clock() + (timeoutSeconds or 15)
	repeat
		local found = root:FindFirstChild(name, true)
		if found then
			return found
		end
		task.wait(0.1)
	until os.clock() >= deadline
	return nil
end

local function installTopButtonPressEffect(button, icon)
	-- Exact copy of TopButtonsHud.makeTopHudButton press behavior.
	button.AutoButtonColor = true

	local pressScale = button:FindFirstChild("PressScale")
	if not pressScale or not pressScale:IsA("UIScale") then
		pressScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
		pressScale.Name = "PressScale"
		pressScale.Scale = 1
		pressScale.Parent = button
	end

	local shadow = button:FindFirstChild("IconShadow")
	if not shadow or not shadow:IsA("Frame") then
		shadow = Instance.new("Frame")
		shadow.Name = "IconShadow"
		shadow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		shadow.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		shadow.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82)
		shadow.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
		shadow.BackgroundTransparency = 0.55
		shadow.BorderSizePixel = 0
		shadow.ZIndex = button.ZIndex
		shadow.Parent = button

		local shadowCorner = Instance.new("UICorner")
		shadowCorner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
		shadowCorner.Parent = shadow
	end

	icon.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	icon.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
	icon.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82)
	icon.ZIndex = math.max(icon.ZIndex, button.ZIndex + 1)

	shadow.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
	shadow.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
	shadow.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82)
	shadow.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
	shadow.BackgroundTransparency = 0.55

	local pressTweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(0.07, Enum.EasingStyle.Quad, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
	local releaseTweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(0.16, Enum.EasingStyle.Back, Enum.EasingDirection.Out)
	local isPressed = false

	local function tweenPressed(pressed)
		if isPressed == pressed then
			return
		end

		isPressed = pressed
		local tweenInfo = pressed and pressTweenInfo or releaseTweenInfo

		TweenService:Create(pressScale, tweenInfo, {
			Scale = pressed and 0.88 or 1,
		}):Play()

		TweenService:Create(icon, tweenInfo, {
			Position = pressed and UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.56) or UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5),
			Size = pressed and UDim2.fromScale(0.74, 0.74) or UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82),
		}):Play()

		TweenService:Create(shadow, tweenInfo, {
			Size = pressed and UDim2.fromScale(0.76, 0.76) or UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82),
			BackgroundTransparency = pressed and 0.43 or 0.55,
		}):Play()
	end

	button.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function()
		tweenPressed(true)
	end)

	button.MouseButton1Up:Connect(function()
		tweenPressed(false)
	end)

	button.MouseLeave:Connect(function()
		tweenPressed(false)
	end)

	button.Activated:Connect(function()
		tweenPressed(false)
	end)
end

local function mountLoginButtonToForcedTopFrame()
	local forcedTopGui = playerGui:WaitForChild("ForcedTopHudGui", 30)
	if not forcedTopGui then
		warn("[DailyReward] ForcedTopHudGui was not found.")
		return
	end

	local forcedFrame = forcedTopGui:WaitForChild("ForcedTopButtonsFrame", 30)
	if not forcedFrame or not forcedFrame:IsA("Frame") then
		warn("[DailyReward] ForcedTopButtonsFrame was not found.")
		return
	end

	-- The frame is often created before Settings/Quests/Shop are reparented into it.
	-- Wait until ShopButton actually exists instead of exiting immediately.
	local shopButton = waitForNamedDescendant(forcedFrame, "ShopButton", 20)
	if not shopButton then
		shopButton = waitForNamedDescendant(playerGui, "ShopButton", 10)
	end
	if not shopButton or not shopButton:IsA("GuiButton") then
		warn("[DailyReward] ShopButton did not appear, so the top reward button could not be cloned.")
		return
	end

	local previous = forcedFrame:FindFirstChild("DailyRewardButton")
	if previous then
		previous:Destroy()
	end

	local button = shopButton:Clone()
	button.Name = "DailyRewardButton"
	button.LayoutOrder = math.max(4, (shopButton.LayoutOrder or 0) + 1)
	button.Visible = true
	button.Active = true
	button.AutoButtonColor = shopButton.AutoButtonColor
	button.ZIndex = math.max(10001, shopButton.ZIndex)

	if button:IsA("TextButton") then
		button.Text = ""
	elseif button:IsA("ImageButton") then
		-- Preserve the circular background styling but remove a shop icon stored
		-- directly on the button itself.
		button.Image = ""
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") or descendant:IsA("TextButton") then
			descendant.Text = ""
		end
	end

	-- Replace the most likely existing icon. If the cloned button has no icon
	-- child, add a new centered ImageLabel while keeping the cloned circle.
	local icon = nil
	for _, descendant in ipairs(button:GetDescendants()) do
		if (descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") or descendant:IsA("ImageButton"))
			and string.find(string.lower(descendant.Name), "icon", 1, true) then
			icon = descendant
			break
		end
	end
	if not icon then
		icon = chooseIconDescendant(button)
	end

	if icon then
		icon.Image = "rbxassetid://78408484505332"
		icon.ImageRectOffset = Vector2.zero
		icon.ImageRectSize = Vector2.zero
		icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		icon.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		icon.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		icon.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82)
		icon.Visible = true
		icon.ZIndex = button.ZIndex + 1
		if icon:IsA("ImageButton") then
			icon.Active = false
			icon.AutoButtonColor = false
		end
	else
		icon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
		icon.Name = "DailyRewardIcon"
		icon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		icon.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
		icon.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.5)
		icon.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0.82, 0.82)
		icon.Image = "rbxassetid://78408484505332"
		icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
		icon.ZIndex = button.ZIndex + 1
		icon.Parent = button
	end

	button.Parent = forcedFrame

	-- Four 64px buttons with the existing 14px spacing.
	forcedFrame.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
	forcedFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, 12)
	forcedFrame.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(298, 64)
	forcedFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	forcedFrame.ClipsDescendants = false
	forcedFrame.ZIndex = 10000

	local layout = forcedFrame:FindFirstChildOfClass("UIListLayout")
	if layout then
		layout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
		layout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 14)
		layout.HorizontalAlignment = Enum.HorizontalAlignment.Left
		layout.VerticalAlignment = Enum.VerticalAlignment.Center
	else
		button.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0)
		button.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(234, 0)
		button.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(64, 64)
	end

	-- Recreate the exact TopButtonsHud press tween because cloned Instances do not
	-- carry over the original RBXScriptSignal connections.
	installTopButtonPressEffect(button, icon)

	button.Activated:Connect(function()
		loginButtonActivated:Fire()
	end)
	loginButton = button

	-- Another positioning script can reset this frame to its original 3-button
	-- width. Keep the fourth slot and visibility stable.
	local applying = false
	local function enforceFrameSettings()
		if applying or not forcedFrame.Parent or not button.Parent then
			return
		end
		applying = true
		forcedFrame.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0)
		forcedFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, 12)
		forcedFrame.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(298, 64)
		forcedFrame.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		forcedFrame.ClipsDescendants = false
		button.Visible = true
		button.Active = true
		button.LayoutOrder = 4
		applying = false
	end

	forcedFrame:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Position"):Connect(enforceFrameSettings)
	forcedFrame:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Size"):Connect(enforceFrameSettings)
	forcedFrame:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AnchorPoint"):Connect(enforceFrameSettings)
	button:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Visible"):Connect(enforceFrameSettings)
	task.defer(enforceFrameSettings)

	print("[DailyReward] Top reward button mounted with exact ShopButton press tween.")
end

local function updateLoginResponsiveScale()
	local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
	local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize or Vector2.new(1400, 1050)
	local scale = math.min(
		(viewport.X * 0.94) / DAILY_REWARD_CANVAS_SIZE.X,
		(viewport.Y * 0.94) / DAILY_REWARD_CANVAS_SIZE.Y
	)
	loginScale.Scale = math.clamp(scale, 0.50, 1)
end

	Enum.EasingDirection.Out

local closeReleaseTweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
	0.16,
	Enum.EasingStyle.Back,

)

local function setLoginClosePressed(pressed)
	if loginClosePressed == pressed then
		return
	end
	loginClosePressed = pressed

	TweenService:Create(
		loginClosePressScale,
		pressed and closePressTweenInfo or closeReleaseTweenInfo,
		{ Scale = pressed and 0.86 or 1 }
	):Play()
end

	setLoginClosePressed(false)

local draggingLoginThumb = false
local dragOffsetInsideThumb = 0

local function getLoginLogicalViewportHeight()
	local scale = math.max(loginScale.Scale, 0.001)
	local absoluteHeight = loginGrid.AbsoluteWindowSize.Y
	if absoluteHeight <= 0 then
		absoluteHeight = loginGrid.AbsoluteSize.Y
	end
	return absoluteHeight / scale
end

local function getLoginScrollMetrics()
	-- CanvasPosition and UDim2 offsets use the unscaled Daily Reward canvas.
	-- Convert AbsoluteSize back to logical coordinates so the thumb fills the lane correctly.
	local contentHeight = math.max(0, loginGrid.CanvasSize.Y.Offset)
	local viewHeight = getLoginLogicalViewportHeight()
	local scrollRange = math.max(0, contentHeight - viewHeight)
	local scale = math.max(loginScale.Scale, 0.001)
	local slotHeight = scrollSlot.AbsoluteSize.Y / scale
	local visibleRatio = contentHeight > 0 and math.clamp(viewHeight / contentHeight, 0, 1) or 1
	local thumbHeight = math.clamp(
		slotHeight * visibleRatio,
		math.min(DAILY_SCROLLBAR_MIN_THUMB_HEIGHT, slotHeight),
		slotHeight
	)
	local thumbTravel = math.max(0, slotHeight - thumbHeight)
	return scrollRange, thumbHeight, thumbTravel
end

local function updateLoginScrollbarThumb()
	local scrollRange, thumbHeight, thumbTravel = getLoginScrollMetrics()
	loginScrollbarArt.Visible = true
	loginScrollThumb.Visible = scrollRange > 0
	loginScrollThumb.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(DAILY_SCROLLBAR_THUMB_WIDTH, thumbHeight)

	if scrollRange <= 0 then
		loginScrollThumb.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, 0)
		return
	end

	local progress = math.clamp(loginGrid.CanvasPosition.Y / scrollRange, 0, 1)
	loginScrollThumb.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, 0, 0, thumbTravel * progress)
end

local function setLoginScrollProgress(progress)
	local scrollRange = getLoginScrollMetrics()
	loginGrid.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, math.clamp(progress, 0, 1) * scrollRange)
end

local function setLoginCanvasY(value)
	local scrollRange = getLoginScrollMetrics()
	loginGrid.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(0, math.clamp(value, 0, scrollRange))
end

loginScrollThumb.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
		draggingLoginThumb = true
		dragOffsetInsideThumb = input.Position.Y - loginScrollThumb.AbsolutePosition.Y
	end
end)

loginScrollThumb.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		or input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
		draggingLoginThumb = false
	end
end)

local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
UserInputService.InputChanged:Connect(function(input)
	if not draggingLoginThumb then
		return
	end
	if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement
		and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
		return
	end

	local _, _, logicalThumbTravel = getLoginScrollMetrics()
	local absoluteThumbTravel = math.max(0, scrollSlot.AbsoluteSize.Y - loginScrollThumb.AbsoluteSize.Y)
	if logicalThumbTravel <= 0 or absoluteThumbTravel <= 0 then
		return
	end
	local thumbTop = input.Position.Y - scrollSlot.AbsolutePosition.Y - dragOffsetInsideThumb
	setLoginScrollProgress(thumbTop / absoluteThumbTravel)
end)

scrollSlot.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		and input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.Touch then
		return
	end
	if draggingLoginThumb then
		return
	end

	local _, _, logicalThumbTravel = getLoginScrollMetrics()
	local absoluteThumbHeight = loginScrollThumb.AbsoluteSize.Y
	local absoluteThumbTravel = math.max(0, scrollSlot.AbsoluteSize.Y - absoluteThumbHeight)
	if logicalThumbTravel <= 0 or absoluteThumbTravel <= 0 then
		return
	end
	local localY = input.Position.Y - scrollSlot.AbsolutePosition.Y
	setLoginScrollProgress((localY - absoluteThumbHeight * 0.5) / absoluteThumbTravel)
end)

local function countLoginDayCards()
	local count = 0
	for _, child in ipairs(loginGrid:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("Frame") and string.match(child.Name, "^DayCard%d+$") then
			count += 1
		end
	end
	return count
end

local function refreshLoginCanvasAndScrollbar()
	-- Do not use UIGridLayout.AbsoluteContentSize here: the whole Daily Reward
	-- panel has a UIScale, so that value is screen-scaled and made CanvasSize too
	-- short. Calculate the 4-column grid in its original logical coordinates.
	local cardCount = countLoginDayCards()
	local rowCount = cardCount > 0 and math.ceil(cardCount / DAILY_GRID_COLUMNS) or 0
	local contentHeight = 0
	if rowCount > 0 then
		contentHeight = rowCount * DAILY_GRID_CELL_HEIGHT
			+ math.max(0, rowCount - 1) * DAILY_GRID_ROW_GAP
			+ 16
	end

	loginGrid.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, contentHeight)

	local scrollRange = math.max(0, contentHeight - getLoginLogicalViewportHeight())
	loginGrid:SetAttribute("DailyRewardCardCount", cardCount)
	loginGrid:SetAttribute("DailyRewardRowCount", rowCount)
	loginGrid:SetAttribute("DailyRewardScrollRange", scrollRange)
	loginGrid.CanvasPosition = Vector2.new(
		0,
		math.clamp(loginGrid.CanvasPosition.Y, 0, scrollRange)
	)

	task.defer(updateLoginScrollbarThumb)
end

gridLayout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"):Connect(refreshLoginCanvasAndScrollbar)
loginGrid:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteCanvasSize"):Connect(updateLoginScrollbarThumb)
loginGrid:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CanvasPosition"):Connect(updateLoginScrollbarThumb)
loginGrid:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateLoginScrollbarThumb)
loginPanel:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteSize"):Connect(updateLoginScrollbarThumb)

local function currentDesignWith(changes)
	local monetization = state and state.Monetization or {}
	local source = monetization.AquariumPreviewDesign or monetization.AquariumDesign or MonetizationConfig.AquariumDesigner.defaultDesign
	local result = {
		theme = source.theme or "Classic",
		backdropEnabled = source.backdropEnabled ~= false,
		backgroundColor = source.backgroundColor or "Aqua",
		lightingColor = source.lightingColor or "SoftWhite",
		signText = source.signText or "",
		decorations = {},
		freeDecorations = {},
	}
	for slotId, decorationId in pairs(source.decorations or {}) do
		result.decorations[slotId] = decorationId
	end
	for _, item in ipairs(source.freeDecorations or {}) do
		table.insert(result.freeDecorations, {
			decorationId = item.decorationId,
			x = item.x,
			y = item.y,
			z = item.z,
			scale = item.scale,
		})
	end
	for key, value in pairs(changes or {}) do
		result[key] = value
	end
	return result
end

local robuxPriceCache = {}
local function getProductPrice(product)
	local productId = tonumber(product.id) or tonumber(product.Id)
	local fallback = tonumber(product.priceRobux) or tonumber(product.Price)
	if not productId or productId <= 0 then
		return fallback
	end
	if robuxPriceCache[productId] ~= nil then
		return robuxPriceCache[productId]
	end
	local ok, info = pcall(function()
		return MarketplaceService:GetProductInfo(productId, Enum.InfoType.Product)
	end)
	local price = ok and type(info) == "table" and tonumber(info.PriceInRobux) or fallback
	robuxPriceCache[productId] = price
	return price
end

		ShopAction:FireServer("PreviewAquariumDesign", "Aquarium", "signText", currentDesignWith({ signText = signBox.Text }))
	end)
