end

renderShop = function()
	clearContainer(shopTabs)
	clearContainer(shopContent)
	shopBalance.Text = tostring(state and state.SeaStars or 0) .. " Sea Stars"
	for _, tabName in ipairs({ "Sea Stars", "Themes", "Free Editor" }) do
		local tab = makeButton(shopTabs, tabName, activeShopTab == tabName and COLORS.blue or COLORS.cardAlt)
		tab.Size = UDim2.new(0.333, -6, 1, 0)
		tab.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
			activeShopTab = tabName
			renderShop()
		end)
	end
	if activeShopTab == "Sea Stars" then
		renderSeaStarProducts()
	elseif activeShopTab == "Themes" then
		renderThemes()
	else
		renderEditorControls()
	end
end

local function renderLogin()
	clearContainer(loginGrid)
	local login = state and state.LoginRewards
	if not login then
		claimButton.Active = false
		claimButton.AutoButtonColor = false
		claimButtonArt.ImageColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(140, 140, 140)
		claimButtonLabel.Text = "Loading..."
		updateLoginScrollbarThumb()
		return
	end

	local daysInCycle = login.DaysInCycle or 31
	loginTitle.Text = "Daily Login Rewards"
	claimButtonLabel.Text = login.ClaimAvailable and ("Claim Day " .. tostring(login.CurrentDay)) or "Claimed"
	claimButton.Active = login.ClaimAvailable == true
	claimButton.AutoButtonColor = login.ClaimAvailable == true
	claimButtonArt.ImageColor3 = login.ClaimAvailable and Color3.new(1, 1, 1) or Color3.fromRGB(150, 150, 150)

	local function rewardLinesFromSummary(summary)
		summary = tostring(summary or "")
		local lines = {}
		local function add(icon, textValue)
			if textValue and textValue ~= "" then
				table.insert(lines, { Icon = icon, Text = textValue })
			end
		end
		local coins = string.match(summary, "(%d+)%s+Coins")
		if coins then add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.CoinIcon, coins .. " Coins") end
		local fresh = string.match(summary, "(%d+)%s+Fresh Bait")
		if fresh then add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.FreshBaitIcon, fresh .. " Fresh Bait") end
		local lucky = string.match(summary, "(%d+)%s+Lucky Bait")
		if lucky then add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.LuckyBaitIcon, lucky .. " Lucky Bait") end
		local mystic = string.match(summary, "(%d+)%s+Mystic Bait")
		if mystic then add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.SpecialDayIcon, mystic .. " Mystic Bait") end
		local seaStars = string.match(summary, "(%d+)%s+Sea Stars")
		if seaStars then add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.SpecialDayIcon, seaStars .. " Sea Stars") end
		local cycleSeaStars = string.match(summary, "(%d+)%s+Cycle Sea Stars")
		if cycleSeaStars then add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.SpecialDayIcon, cycleSeaStars .. " Cycle Sea Stars") end
		local resources = string.match(summary, "(%d+)%s+weighted resources")
		if resources then add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.SpecialDayIcon, resources .. " weighted resources") end
		if string.find(summary, "aquarium decoration", 1, true) then
			add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.SpecialDayIcon, "1 aquarium decoration")
		end
		if #lines == 0 and summary ~= "" then
			add(DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.SpecialDayIcon, summary)
		end
		return lines
	end

	local animatedClaimThisRender = false

	for _, slot in ipairs(login.RewardTrack or {}) do
		local day = slot.Day
		local claimed = day < (login.CurrentDay or 1)
		local isCurrentDay = day == (login.CurrentDay or 1)
		local isFinalDay = day == daysInCycle or slot.IsFinal
		local isMilestone = slot.IsMilestone == true or day == 7 or day == 14 or day == 21

		local imageId = DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.UnlockedDayTab
		local crop = DAILY_TAB_CROPS.Unlocked
		if isFinalDay then
			imageId = DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.RedTab
			crop = DAILY_TAB_CROPS.Red
		elseif isMilestone then
			imageId = DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.PurpleTab
			crop = DAILY_TAB_CROPS.Purple
		elseif isCurrentDay and login.ClaimAvailable then
			imageId = DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.TodayTab
			crop = DAILY_TAB_CROPS.Today
		end

		local card = Instance.new("Frame")
		card.Name = "DayCard" .. tostring(day)
		card.LayoutOrder = day
		card.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		card.ClipsDescendants = true
		card.Parent = loginGrid

		local cardImage = makeImage(card, imageId)
		applyVirtualCrop(cardImage, TRIMMED_IMAGE_SIZES.DayTab, crop)

		local dayLabel = makeOutlinedText(card, "Day " .. tostring(day), 25, Color3.new(1, 1, 1), true)
		dayLabel.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(20, 10)
		dayLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -40, 0, 32)
		dayLabel.Font = Enum.Font.FredokaOne
		dayLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left

		local summaryLines = rewardLinesFromSummary(slot.Summary)
		if isMilestone or isFinalDay then
			-- Milestone/final days can contain up to five rewards.
			-- Keep the existing card size, but raise the whole reward group,
			-- enlarge the text, and give long reward names more horizontal room.
			local milestoneIcon = makeImage(card, DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.SpecialDayIcon)
			milestoneIcon.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(18, 56)
			milestoneIcon.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(82, 82)
			milestoneIcon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit

			local visibleLineCount = math.min(#summaryLines, 5)
			local lineY = visibleLineCount >= 5 and 42 or 48
			local lineSpacing = visibleLineCount >= 5 and 22 or 23

			for index, line in ipairs(summaryLines) do
				if index > 5 then break end
				local lineLabel = makeOutlinedText(card, line.Text, 18, Color3.new(1, 1, 1), false)
				lineLabel.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(100, lineY)
				lineLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -106, 0, 23)
				lineLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
				lineLabel.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
				lineY += lineSpacing
			end
		else
			local startY = 60
			for index, line in ipairs(summaryLines) do
				if index > 3 then break end
				local icon = makeImage(card, line.Icon)
				icon.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(24, startY)
				icon.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(40, 40)
				icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
				local lineLabel = makeOutlinedText(card, line.Text, 20, Color3.new(1, 1, 1), false)
				lineLabel.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(82, startY + 4)
				lineLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, -94, 0, 26)
				lineLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
				startY += 32
			end
		end

		if claimed then
			local claimedOverlay = makeImage(card, DAILY_REWARD_ASSETS.DoneIcon)
			claimedOverlay.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
			claimedOverlay.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0.5, 0.53)
			claimedOverlay.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(160, 160)
			claimedOverlay.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
			claimedOverlay.ZIndex = 5

			-- Only the day claimed from the current Claim-button press fades in.
			-- Slow, smooth reveal: no bounce or sudden pop.
			if pendingClaimAnimationDay == day then
				animatedClaimThisRender = true
				claimedOverlay.ImageTransparency = 1

				local claimedScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
				claimedScale.Scale = 0.96
				claimedScale.Parent = claimedOverlay

				task.defer(function()
					local smoothFadeInfo = TweenInfo.new(
						1.55,
						Enum.EasingStyle.Sine,
						Enum.EasingDirection.InOut
					)

					TweenService:Create(
						claimedOverlay,
						smoothFadeInfo,
						{ ImageTransparency = 0 }
					):Play()

					TweenService:Create(
						claimedScale,
						smoothFadeInfo,
						{ Scale = 1 }
					):Play()
				end)
			end
		end
	end

	if animatedClaimThisRender then
		pendingClaimAnimationDay = nil
	end

	task.defer(function()
		refreshLoginCanvasAndScrollbar()
		RunService.Heartbeat:Wait()
		refreshLoginCanvasAndScrollbar()
	end)
end

local function enforceOwnedDecorationButtons()
	local editorGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("AquariumFreePlacementGui")
	if not editorGui then
		return
	end
	local owned = state and state.AquariumDecorations or {}
	for decorationId, decoration in pairs(MonetizationConfig.AquariumDesigner.decorations or {}) do
		if decorationId ~= "None" then
			for _, descendant in ipairs(editorGui:GetDescendants()) do
				if descendant:IsA("TextButton") then
					local taggedId = descendant:GetAttribute("Phase3DecorationId")
					if taggedId == decorationId or (taggedId == nil and descendant.Text == decoration.name) then
						descendant:SetAttribute("Phase3DecorationId", decorationId)
						local isOwned = (owned[decorationId] or 0) > 0
						descendant.Active = isOwned
						descendant.AutoButtonColor = isOwned
						descendant.Text = isOwned and decoration.name or (decoration.name .. "\nLocked")
						if not isOwned then
							descendant.BackgroundColor3 = COLORS.disabled
						end
					end
				end
			end
		end
	end
end

local function updateTimer()
	local login = state and state.LoginRewards
	if not login then
		loginTimer.Text = ""
		return
	end
	if login.ClaimAvailable then
		loginTimer.Text = "Daily rewards reset at 24:00 (Server's UTC Time)"
		return
	end
	local remaining = math.max(0, math.floor((login.SecondsUntilNextUtcClaim or 0) - (os.clock() - stateReceivedAt)))
	local hours = math.floor(remaining / 3600)
	local minutes = math.floor((remaining % 3600) / 60)
	local seconds = remaining % 60
	loginTimer.Text = string.format("Next UTC claim in %02d:%02d:%02d", hours, minutes, seconds)
	if remaining <= 0 and not requestedMidnightRefresh then
		requestedMidnightRefresh = true
		task.spawn(function()
			local ok, result = pcall(function()
				return GetState:InvokeServer()
			end)
			if ok and type(result) == "table" then
				state = result
				stateReceivedAt = os.clock()
				requestedMidnightRefresh = false
				renderLogin()
				updateTimer()
			end
		end)
	end
end

local function showShop(tabName)
	activeShopTab = tabName or activeShopTab
	loginOverlay.Visible = false
	shopOverlay.Visible = true
	renderShop()
end

local function showLogin()
	shopOverlay.Visible = false
	loginOverlay.Visible = true
	renderLogin()
	updateTimer()
end

local function receiveState(newState)
	if type(newState) ~= "table" then
		return
	end
	state = newState
	stateReceivedAt = os.clock()
	requestedMidnightRefresh = false
	seaStarHud.update(state.SeaStars or 0)
	local login = state.LoginRewards
	if shopOverlay.Visible then
		renderShop()
	end
	if loginOverlay.Visible then
		renderLogin()
		updateTimer()
	end
	task.defer(enforceOwnedDecorationButtons)
	if not autoOpenEvaluated then
		autoOpenEvaluated = true
		if login and login.ClaimAvailable and not loginOpenedAutomatically then
			loginOpenedAutomatically = true
			showLogin()
		end
	end
end

end)
loginButtonActivated.Event:Connect(showLogin)

playerGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)

	end

end)

task.defer(function()
	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("LocalScript") and descendant.Name == "AquariumDesignerShopCleanup" then
			descendant.Disabled = true
		end

RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(deltaTime)
	timerAccumulator += deltaTime
	if timerAccumulator >= 1 then
		timerAccumulator = 0
		if loginOverlay.Visible then
			updateTimer()
		end
	end
end)

print("[Phase3EconomyUI_v34] Final-day layout + Fresh Bait icon loaded")

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local GuiService = game:GetService("GuiService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")

local playerGui = Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

-- Fullscreen Studio with Device Emulator disabled is the visual source of truth.
-- A compact viewport is also treated as responsive because Studio's Device
-- Emulator does not always report TouchEnabled to LocalScripts.
local isTenFootInterface = GuiService:IsTenFootInterface()
local function waitForRealViewport()
	for _ = 1, 120 do
		local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
		local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize
		if viewport and viewport.X >= 64 and viewport.Y >= 64 then
			return viewport
		end
		RunService.RenderStepped:Wait()
	end

	return Vector2.new(1920, 1080)
end

local initialViewport = waitForRealViewport()
local isCompactViewport = math.min(initialViewport.X, initialViewport.Y) < 900
local isTouchPrimaryDevice = UserInputService.TouchEnabled
	and (
		not UserInputService.KeyboardEnabled
		or not UserInputService.MouseEnabled
	)

if not isCompactViewport and not isTouchPrimaryDevice and not isTenFootInterface then
	return
end

print(string.format(
	"[ResponsiveUiAdapter] Active at %dx%d (touch=%s, ten-foot=%s)",
	math.floor(initialViewport.X),
	math.floor(initialViewport.Y),
	tostring(UserInputService.TouchEnabled),
	tostring(isTenFootInterface)
))

local DEVICE_SCALE_NAME = "FishyFishDeviceScale"
local DAILY_REWARD_OVERLAY_NAME = "LoginRewardOverlay"

local namedHudTargets = {
	TopButtonsFrame = true,
	ForcedTopButtonsFrame = true,
	CoinsHud = true,
	SeaStarsHud = true,
	FishingXPText = true,
	BottomButtonsFrame = true,
	ClockFrame = true,
}

local safeInsetScreenGuis = {
	CustomHotbarGui = true,
	ServerUtcClockGui = true,
}

local managedScales = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local guardedScales = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local loggedHudTargets = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local dailyRewardUpdaters = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local boundHotbarGuis = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
local boundMenuButtons = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })

local currentHudScale = 1

local topButtonMenuGroup = {
	SettingsButton = "Settings",
	QuestsButton = "Quests",
	ShopButton = "Shop",
	TopLoginRewardButton = "DailyReward",
	DailyRewardButton = "DailyReward",
	LoginRewardButton = "DailyReward",
}

local menuRootGroup = {
	SettingsOverlay = "Settings",
	ModernQuestUI = "Quests",
	MainPanel = "Shop",
	LoginRewardOverlay = "DailyReward",
	ModernBagRoot = "Other",
	ModernFishdex = "Other",
	RodShopOverlay = "Other",
	SeaStarShopOverlay = "Other",
	ModernSupplyShop = "Other",
	ModernSeasideShop = "Other",
	BiomeWarpOverlay = "Other",
	FishmongerSellOverlay = "Other",
}

local function getViewportSize()
	local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
	if camera then
		return camera.ViewportSize
	end
	return Vector2.new(1920, 1080)
end

local function lerp(a, b, alpha)
	return a + (b - a) * alpha
end

local function calculateHudScale(viewport)
	if isTenFootInterface then
		return 1
	end

	-- Short-side breakpoints keep portrait and landscape versions of the same
	-- device visually consistent. The lower limit also keeps touch targets large.
	local shortSide = math.min(viewport.X, viewport.Y)
	if shortSide <= 480 then
		return 0.74
	elseif shortSide <= 640 then
		return lerp(0.74, 0.84, (shortSide - 480) / 160)
	elseif shortSide <= 900 then
		return lerp(0.84, 1, (shortSide - 640) / 260)
	end

	return 1
end

local function positionBottomLeftHud(target)
	if target.Name ~= "FishingXPText" and target.Name ~= "ClockFrame" then
		return
	end

	local viewport = getViewportSize()
	local logicalWidth = target.Size.X.Offset
	if logicalWidth <= 0 then
		logicalWidth = target.AbsoluteSize.X / math.max(currentHudScale, 0.01)
	end

	local leftMargin = math.max(8, math.floor(viewport.X * 0.015))
	local centerX = leftMargin + logicalWidth * currentHudScale * target.AnchorPoint.X

	if target.Name == "ClockFrame" then
		target.Position = UDim2.new(0, math.floor(centerX + 0.5), 1, -10)
		return
	end

	-- Keep the level row immediately above the coin HUD on compact screens.
	-- Use the coin HUD's scale coordinates so both rows stay together as the
	-- viewport changes, while the offsets account for their applied UIScales.
	local fishingGui = playerGui:FindFirstChild("FishingGui")
	local coinsHud = fishingGui and fishingGui:FindFirstChild("CoinsHud")
	local logicalHeight = target.Size.Y.Offset
	if logicalHeight <= 0 then
		logicalHeight = target.AbsoluteSize.Y / math.max(currentHudScale, 0.01)
	end

	local anchorXOffset = math.floor(logicalWidth * currentHudScale * target.AnchorPoint.X + 0.5)
	local anchorYOffset = math.floor(logicalHeight * currentHudScale * (1 - target.AnchorPoint.Y) + 0.5)
	if coinsHud and coinsHud:IsA("GuiObject") then
		target.Position = UDim2.new(
			coinsHud.Position.X.Scale,
			coinsHud.Position.X.Offset + anchorXOffset,
			coinsHud.Position.Y.Scale,
			coinsHud.Position.Y.Offset - anchorYOffset - 6
		)
		return
	end

	target.Position = UDim2.new(0, math.floor(centerX + 0.5), 0.10, -anchorYOffset - 6)
end

local function closeConflictingMenus(buttonName)
	local requestedGroup = topButtonMenuGroup[buttonName]
	if not requestedGroup then
		return
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiObject") and descendant.Visible then
			local openGroup = menuRootGroup[descendant.Name]
			if openGroup and openGroup ~= requestedGroup then
				descendant.Visible = false
			end
		end
	end
end

local function bindTopMenuButton(button)
	if boundMenuButtons[button] or not topButtonMenuGroup[button.Name] then
		return
	end

	boundMenuButtons[button] = true
	button.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
		local inputType = input.UserInputType
		if inputType == Enum.UserInputType.Touch
			or inputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1
		then
			closeConflictingMenus(button.Name)
		end
	end)
end

local function findDirectScale(target, preferredName)
	if preferredName then
		local preferred = target:FindFirstChild(preferredName)
		if preferred and preferred:IsA("UIScale") then
			return preferred
		end
	end

	-- BottomButtonsFrame already owns an otherwise-unused direct UIScale.
	if target.Name == "BottomButtonsFrame" then
		for _, child in ipairs(target:GetChildren()) do
			if child:IsA("UIScale") then
				return child
			end
		end
	end

	local existing = target:FindFirstChild(DEVICE_SCALE_NAME)
	if existing and existing:IsA("UIScale") then
		return existing
	end

	local scale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	scale.Name = DEVICE_SCALE_NAME
	scale.Scale = 1
	scale.Parent = target
	return scale
end

local function scaleHudTarget(target)
	if not target:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return
	end

	local preferredName = target.Name == "TopButtonsFrame" and "TopHudScale" or nil
	local scale = managedScales[target]
	if not scale or not scale.Parent then
		scale = findDirectScale(target, preferredName)
		managedScales[target] = scale
	end

	if not guardedScales[scale] then
		guardedScales[scale] = true
		scale:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Scale"):Connect(function()
			if target.Parent and math.abs(scale.Scale - currentHudScale) > 0.001 then
				task.defer(scaleHudTarget, target)
			end
		end)
	end

	if math.abs(scale.Scale - currentHudScale) > 0.001 then
		scale.Scale = currentHudScale
	end

	positionBottomLeftHud(target)

	if not loggedHudTargets[target] then
		loggedHudTargets[target] = true
		print(string.format(
			"[ResponsiveUiAdapter] Managed %s at scale %.3f",
			target.Name,
			currentHudScale
		))
	end
end

local function applySafeInsets(screenGui)
	if not screenGui:IsA("ScreenGui") or not safeInsetScreenGuis[screenGui.Name] then
		return
	end

	-- These two ScreenGuis contain edge HUD only, not full-screen artwork.
	-- CoreUISafeInsets protects both Roblox controls and device cutouts.
	screenGui.ScreenInsets = Enum.ScreenInsets.CoreUISafeInsets
	screenGui.SafeAreaCompatibility = Enum.SafeAreaCompatibility.None
	screenGui.ClipToDeviceSafeArea = true
end

local function isFullScreenObject(object, viewport)
	local size = object.AbsoluteSize
	return size.X >= viewport.X * 0.90 and size.Y >= viewport.Y * 0.75
end

local function findHotbarContainer(screenGui)
	local viewport = getViewportSize()
	local bestNamed = nil
	local bestNamedArea = 0

	for _, descendant in ipairs(screenGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiObject") and not isFullScreenObject(descendant, viewport) then
			local lowerName = string.lower(descendant.Name)
			local isContainerName = string.find(lowerName, "hotbar", 1, true)
				or string.find(lowerName, "slotsframe", 1, true)
				or string.find(lowerName, "slotscontainer", 1, true)
			if isContainerName then
				local area = descendant.AbsoluteSize.X * descendant.AbsoluteSize.Y
				if area > bestNamedArea then
					bestNamed = descendant
					bestNamedArea = area
				end
			end
		end
	end

	if bestNamed then
		return bestNamed
	end

	-- Some versions use a generic direct Frame name. Prefer the largest
	-- non-fullscreen direct object in the lower half of the screen.
	local bestDirect = nil
	local bestDirectArea = 0
	for _, child in ipairs(screenGui:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("GuiObject") and not isFullScreenObject(child, viewport) then
			local centerY = child.AbsolutePosition.Y + child.AbsoluteSize.Y * 0.5
			local area = child.AbsoluteSize.X * child.AbsoluteSize.Y
			if centerY >= viewport.Y * 0.5 and area > bestDirectArea then
				bestDirect = child
				bestDirectArea = area
			end
		end
	end

	return bestDirect
end

local function updateHotbar(screenGui)
	local container = findHotbarContainer(screenGui)
	if container then
		scaleHudTarget(container)
	end
end

local function bindHotbarGui(screenGui)
	if boundHotbarGuis[screenGui] then
		updateHotbar(screenGui)
		return
	end

	boundHotbarGuis[screenGui] = true
	applySafeInsets(screenGui)

	screenGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function()
		task.defer(updateHotbar, screenGui)
	end)

	-- Absolute sizes settle after the ScreenGui enters PlayerGui.
	task.defer(updateHotbar, screenGui)
end

local function getDailyRewardCanvas(overlay)
	for _, child in ipairs(overlay:GetChildren()) do
		if child:IsA("GuiObject") then
			local scale = child:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("UIScale")
			if scale and child.Size.X.Offset >= 1000 and child.Size.Y.Offset >= 700 then
				return child, scale
			end
		end
	end
	return nil, nil
end

local function bindDailyRewardFit(overlay)
	local canvas, scale = getDailyRewardCanvas(overlay)
	if not canvas or not scale or dailyRewardUpdaters[scale] then
		return
	end

	local applying = false
	local loggedFit = false

	local function fitCanvas()
		if applying or not canvas.Parent or not scale.Parent then
			return
		end

		local viewport = getViewportSize()
		local baseWidth = canvas.Size.X.Offset
		local baseHeight = canvas.Size.Y.Offset
		if baseWidth <= 0 or baseHeight <= 0 then
			return
		end

		local maximumFit = math.max(
			0.1,
			math.min(
				(viewport.X * 0.92) / baseWidth,
				(viewport.Y * 0.90) / baseHeight,
				1
			)
		)

		-- The source currently clamps Daily Rewards to 0.50. On phones that
		-- is larger than the viewport, so only cap values that would overflow.
		if scale.Scale > maximumFit + 0.001 then
			applying = true
			scale.Scale = maximumFit
			applying = false
		end

		if not loggedFit then
			loggedFit = true
			print(string.format(
				"[ResponsiveUiAdapter] Managed Daily Rewards at scale %.3f",
				scale.Scale
			))
		end
	end

	dailyRewardUpdaters[scale] = fitCanvas
	scale:GetPropertyChangedSignal("Scale"):Connect(fitCanvas)
	fitCanvas()
end

local function inspectInstance(instance)
	if instance:IsA("ScreenGui") then
		applySafeInsets(instance)
		if instance.Name == "CustomHotbarGui" then
			bindHotbarGui(instance)
		end
	end

	if instance:IsA("GuiObject") then
		if instance:IsA("GuiButton") then
			bindTopMenuButton(instance)
		end

		if namedHudTargets[instance.Name] then
			-- The HUD constructors parent Frames before adding their own UIScales.
			-- Defer one scheduler step so an existing design scale is reused.
			task.defer(function()
				if instance.Parent then
					scaleHudTarget(instance)
				end
			end)
		elseif instance.Name == DAILY_REWARD_OVERLAY_NAME then
			task.defer(bindDailyRewardFit, instance)
		end
	end
end

local function updateAll()
	currentHudScale = calculateHudScale(getViewportSize())

	for target in pairs(managedScales) do
		if target.Parent then
			scaleHudTarget(target)
		end
	end

	for screenGui in pairs(boundHotbarGuis) do
		if screenGui.Parent then
			updateHotbar(screenGui)
		end
	end

	for scale, fitCanvas in pairs(dailyRewardUpdaters) do
		if scale.Parent then
			fitCanvas()
		end
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant.Name == DAILY_REWARD_OVERLAY_NAME and descendant:IsA("GuiObject") then
			bindDailyRewardFit(descendant)
		end
	end
end

for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
	inspectInstance(descendant)
end

playerGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	inspectInstance(descendant)
end)

local cameraConnection = nil
local function bindCamera(camera)
	if cameraConnection then
		cameraConnection:Disconnect()
		cameraConnection = nil
	end

	if camera then
		cameraConnection = camera:GetPropertyChangedSignal("ViewportSize"):Connect(function()
			task.defer(updateAll)
		end)
	end

	updateAll()
end

Workspace:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CurrentCamera"):Connect(function()
	bindCamera(Workspace.CurrentCamera)
end)

bindCamera(Workspace.CurrentCamera)

-- SeaStarHudOverride.client.luau
-- Put this LocalScript in: StarterPlayer > StarterPlayerScripts
-- This script keeps the existing Sea Star HUD position, hides the old visuals,
-- and rebuilds only the icon + number in the same style as the coin HUD.

print("[SeaStarHudOverride] STARTED")

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")

local player = Players.LocalPlayer
local playerGui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

local Remotes = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("FishingRemotes")
local GetState = Remotes:WaitForChild("GetState")
local StateUpdated = Remotes:WaitForChild("StateUpdated")

local SEA_STAR_ICON = "rbxassetid://102284604663190"

local HUD_SIZE = UDim2.fromOffset(330, 96)
local ICON_SIZE = 75
local ICON_POSITION = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 4)
local NUMBER_AREA_POSITION = UDim2.fromOffset(80, 10)
local NUMBER_AREA_SIZE = Vector2.new(240, 76)

local DIGIT_WIDTH = 20
local COMMA_WIDTH = 9
local DIGIT_HEIGHT = 72

local NUMBER_MIN_TEXT_SIZE = 28
local NUMBER_MAX_TEXT_SIZE = 68
local NUMBER_OUTLINE_THICKNESS = 3.3
local NUMBER_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
local NUMBER_OUTLINE_COLOR = Color3.fromRGB(0, 10, 21)
local ROLL_TIME = 0.65

local VISUAL_NAME = "SeaStarCoinStyleVisual"
local currentValue = 0
local hasInitialized = false
local activeTweens = {}
local animationSerial = 0
local boundRoot = nil
local digitsHolder = nil
local digitsScale = nil

local function formatNumber(value)
	value = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0))
	local text = tostring(value)
	while true do
		local replaced, count = string.gsub(text, "^(-?%d+)(%d%d%d)", "%1,%2")
		text = replaced
		if count == 0 then
			break
		end
	end
	return text
end

local function normalizedText(value)
	return string.upper(
		tostring(value or "")
			:gsub("_", " ")
			:gsub("%s+", " ")
			:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
	)
end

local function isSeaStarText(value)
	local text = normalizedText(value)
	return text == "SEA STARS"
		or text == "SEASTARS"
		or string.find(text, "SEA STARS:", 1, true) == 1
end

local function isInsideNewVisual(instance)
	local current = instance
	while current do
		if current.Name == VISUAL_NAME then
			return true
		end
		current = current.Parent
	end
	return false
end

local function findLegacyRoot()
	local named = playerGui:FindFirstChild("SeaStarLoginHud", true)
	if named and named:IsA("GuiObject") then
		return named
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if (descendant:IsA("TextLabel") or descendant:IsA("TextButton"))
			and isSeaStarText(descendant.Text)
		then
			local current = descendant
			for _ = 1, 6 do
				current = current.Parent
				if not current then
					break
				end
				if current:IsA("Frame") or current:IsA("GuiButton") then
					return current
				end
			end
		end
	end

	return nil
end

local function findExistingClickButton(root)
	if root:IsA("GuiButton") then
		return root
	end

	local best = nil
	local bestArea = -1

	for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant:IsA("GuiButton") and not isInsideNewVisual(descendant) then
			local size = descendant.AbsoluteSize
			local area = size.X * size.Y
			if area > bestArea then
				best = descendant
				bestArea = area
			end
		end
	end

	return best
end

local function hideLegacyAppearance(root, clickButton)
	for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
		if isInsideNewVisual(descendant) then
			continue
		end

		if descendant:IsA("UIStroke") then
			descendant.Transparency = 1
		elseif descendant:IsA("TextLabel") then
			descendant.TextTransparency = 1
			descendant.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
			descendant.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		elseif descendant:IsA("TextButton") then
			descendant.TextTransparency = 1
			descendant.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
			descendant.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			if descendant ~= clickButton then
				descendant.Active = false
			end
		elseif descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") then
			descendant.ImageTransparency = 1
			descendant.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		elseif descendant:IsA("ImageButton") then
			descendant.ImageTransparency = 1
			descendant.BackgroundTransparency = 1
			if descendant ~= clickButton then
				descendant.Active = false
			end
		elseif descendant:IsA("Frame") then
			descendant.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		end
	end

	if clickButton then
		clickButton.Visible = true
		clickButton.Active = true
		clickButton.AutoButtonColor = false
		clickButton.AnchorPoint = Vector2.zero
		clickButton.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
		clickButton.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
		clickButton.BackgroundTransparency = 1
		clickButton.ZIndex = 5005

		if clickButton:IsA("TextButton") then
			clickButton.TextTransparency = 1
			clickButton.TextStrokeTransparency = 1
		elseif clickButton:IsA("ImageButton") then
			clickButton.ImageTransparency = 1
		end
	end
end

local function createCharacterLabel(parent, name, character)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Name = name
	label.AnchorPoint = Vector2.zero
	label.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
	label.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	label.BorderSizePixel = 0
	label.Text = character
	label.TextColor3 = NUMBER_COLOR
	label.TextTransparency = 0
	label.TextScaled = true
	label.TextWrapped = false
	label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Center
	label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
	label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
	label.ZIndex = 5004
	label.Parent = parent

	local sizeConstraint = Instance.new("UITextSizeConstraint")
	sizeConstraint.MinTextSize = NUMBER_MIN_TEXT_SIZE
	sizeConstraint.MaxTextSize = NUMBER_MAX_TEXT_SIZE
	sizeConstraint.Parent = label

	local outline = Instance.new("UIStroke")
	outline.Name = "NumberOutline"
	outline.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Contextual
	outline.Color = NUMBER_OUTLINE_COLOR
	outline.Thickness = NUMBER_OUTLINE_THICKNESS
	outline.Transparency = 0
	outline.LineJoinMode = Enum.LineJoinMode.Round
	outline.Parent = label

	return label
end

local function getCharacterWidth(character)
	return character == "," and COMMA_WIDTH or DIGIT_WIDTH
end

local function getTotalWidth(text)
	local total = 0
	for index = 1, #text do
		total += getCharacterWidth(string.sub(text, index, index))
	end
	return total
end

local function cancelActiveTweens()
	for _, tween in ipairs(activeTweens) do
		tween:Cancel()
	end
	table.clear(activeTweens)
end

local function clearDigitSlots()
	if not digitsHolder then
		return
	end

	for _, child in ipairs(digitsHolder:GetChildren()) do
		if child ~= digitsScale then
			child:Destroy()
		end
	end
end

local function configureHolderWidth(formatted)
	if not digitsHolder or not digitsScale then
		return
	end

	local totalWidth = getTotalWidth(formatted)
	digitsHolder.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(totalWidth, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
	digitsScale.Scale = totalWidth > NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X
		and (NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X / totalWidth)
		or 1
end

local function createSlot(xOffset, width)
	local slot = Instance.new("Frame")
	slot.Name = "DigitSlot"
	slot.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(xOffset, 0)
	slot.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(width, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
	slot.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	slot.BorderSizePixel = 0
	slot.ClipsDescendants = true
	slot.ZIndex = 5003
	slot.Parent = digitsHolder
	return slot
end

local function renderImmediate(value)
	if not digitsHolder then
		currentValue = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0))
		return
	end

	cancelActiveTweens()
	clearDigitSlots()

	currentValue = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0))
	local formatted = formatNumber(currentValue)
	configureHolderWidth(formatted)

	local xOffset = 0
	for index = 1, #formatted do
		local character = string.sub(formatted, index, index)
		local width = getCharacterWidth(character)
		local slot = createSlot(xOffset, width)
		createCharacterLabel(slot, "Character", character)
		xOffset += width
	end
end

local function getOldCharacterForNewPosition(oldText, newText, newIndex)
	local distanceFromRight = #newText - newIndex
	local oldIndex = #oldText - distanceFromRight

	if oldIndex < 1 or oldIndex > #oldText then
		return ""
	end

	return string.sub(oldText, oldIndex, oldIndex)
end

local function animateTo(value)
	value = math.max(0, math.floor(tonumber(value) or 0))

	if not digitsHolder then
		currentValue = value
		return
	end

	if not hasInitialized then
		hasInitialized = true
		renderImmediate(value)
		return
	end

	if value == currentValue then
		return
	end

	cancelActiveTweens()
	clearDigitSlots()

	animationSerial += 1
	local thisAnimation = animationSerial

	local oldFormatted = formatNumber(currentValue)
	local newFormatted = formatNumber(value)
	local increasing = value > currentValue

	currentValue = value
	configureHolderWidth(newFormatted)

	local xOffset = 0
	local changedDigitCount = 0

	for newIndex = 1, #newFormatted do
		local newCharacter = string.sub(newFormatted, newIndex, newIndex)
		local oldCharacter = getOldCharacterForNewPosition(
			oldFormatted,
			newFormatted,
			newIndex
		)
		local width = getCharacterWidth(newCharacter)
		local slot = createSlot(xOffset, width)

		local isDigit = string.match(newCharacter, "%d") ~= nil
		local changed = oldCharacter ~= newCharacter

		if not isDigit or not changed then
			createCharacterLabel(slot, "StaticCharacter", newCharacter)
		else
			changedDigitCount += 1

			local outgoing = createCharacterLabel(
				slot,
				"OutgoingCharacter",
				oldCharacter
			)
			if oldCharacter == ""
				or string.match(oldCharacter, "%d") == nil
			then
				outgoing.TextTransparency = 1
			end

			local incoming = createCharacterLabel(
				slot,
				"IncomingCharacter",
				newCharacter
			)
			incoming.Position = increasing
				and UDim2.fromScale(0, 1)
				or UDim2.fromScale(0, -1)
			incoming.TextTransparency = 0.08

			local tweenInfo = TweenInfo.new(
				ROLL_TIME,
				Enum.EasingStyle.Quint,
				Enum.EasingDirection.Out
			)

			local outgoingTween = TweenService:Create(
				outgoing,
				tweenInfo,
				{
					Position = increasing
						and UDim2.fromScale(0, -1)
						or UDim2.fromScale(0, 1),
					TextTransparency = 0.35,
				}
			)

			local incomingTween = TweenService:Create(
				incoming,
				tweenInfo,
				{
					Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0),
					TextTransparency = 0,
				}
			)

			table.insert(activeTweens, outgoingTween)
			table.insert(activeTweens, incomingTween)
			outgoingTween:Play()
			incomingTween:Play()
		end

		xOffset += width
	end

	if changedDigitCount == 0 then
		renderImmediate(value)
		return
	end

	task.delay(ROLL_TIME + 0.06, function()
		if thisAnimation == animationSerial then
			renderImmediate(value)
		end
	end)
end

local function hideDuplicateLegacyHuds(primaryRoot)
	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if descendant ~= primaryRoot
			and descendant.Name == "SeaStarLoginHud"
			and descendant:IsA("GuiObject")
		then
			descendant.Visible = false
		end
	end

	for _, descendant in ipairs(playerGui:GetDescendants()) do
		if (descendant:IsA("TextLabel") or descendant:IsA("TextButton"))
			and isSeaStarText(descendant.Text)
			and not descendant:IsDescendantOf(primaryRoot)
		then
			local current = descendant.Parent
			while current and current ~= playerGui do
				if current:IsA("GuiObject") then
					current.Visible = false
					break
				end
				current = current.Parent
			end
		end
	end
end

local function buildVisual(root)
	local previous = root:FindFirstChild(VISUAL_NAME)
	if previous then
		previous:Destroy()
	end

	root.Visible = true
	root.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	root.BorderSizePixel = 0
	root.ClipsDescendants = false
	root.Size = HUD_SIZE
	root.ZIndex = math.max(root.ZIndex, 5000)

	local clickButton = findExistingClickButton(root)
	hideLegacyAppearance(root, clickButton)
	hideDuplicateLegacyHuds(root)

	local visual = Instance.new("Frame")
	visual.Name = VISUAL_NAME
	visual.AnchorPoint = Vector2.zero
	visual.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0)
	visual.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
	visual.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	visual.BorderSizePixel = 0
	visual.Active = false
	visual.ZIndex = 5001
	visual.Parent = root

	local icon = Instance.new("ImageLabel")
	icon.Name = "SeaStarIcon"
	icon.Position = ICON_POSITION
	icon.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(ICON_SIZE, ICON_SIZE)
	icon.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	icon.BorderSizePixel = 0
	icon.Image = SEA_STAR_ICON
	icon.ScaleType = Enum.ScaleType.Fit
	icon.ZIndex = 5002
	icon.Parent = visual

	local numberArea = Instance.new("Frame")
	numberArea.Name = "NumberArea"
	numberArea.Position = NUMBER_AREA_POSITION
	numberArea.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(
		NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.X,
		NUMBER_AREA_SIZE.Y
	)
	numberArea.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	numberArea.BorderSizePixel = 0
	numberArea.ClipsDescendants = false
	numberArea.ZIndex = 5002
	numberArea.Parent = visual

	digitsHolder = Instance.new("Frame")
	digitsHolder.Name = "DigitsHolder"
	digitsHolder.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 0.5)
	digitsHolder.Position = UDim2.fromScale(0, 0.5)
	digitsHolder.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(0, DIGIT_HEIGHT)
	digitsHolder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	digitsHolder.BorderSizePixel = 0
	digitsHolder.ClipsDescendants = false
	digitsHolder.ZIndex = 5003
	digitsHolder.Parent = numberArea

	digitsScale = Instance.new("UIScale")
	digitsScale.Name = "DigitsScale"
	digitsScale.Scale = 1
	digitsScale.Parent = digitsHolder

	if clickButton then
		clickButton.ZIndex = 5005
	end

	boundRoot = root
	hasInitialized = false
	renderImmediate(currentValue)

	print(
		"[SeaStarHudOverride] HUD REBUILT:",
		root:GetFullName()
	)
end

local binding = false

local function ensureBound()
	if binding then
		return
	end
	binding = true

	local root = findLegacyRoot()
	if root then
		if root ~= boundRoot
			or not root:FindFirstChild(VISUAL_NAME)
		then
			buildVisual(root)
		else
			local clickButton = findExistingClickButton(root)
			hideLegacyAppearance(root, clickButton)
			hideDuplicateLegacyHuds(root)
			root.Visible = true
			root.Size = HUD_SIZE
		end
	end

	binding = false
end

local function receiveState(newState)
	if type(newState) ~= "table" then
		return
	end

	local nextValue = math.max(
		0,
		math.floor(tonumber(newState.SeaStars) or 0)
	)

	ensureBound()
	animateTo(nextValue)
end

StateUpdated.OnClientEvent:Connect(receiveState)

playerGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(descendant)
	if descendant.Name == "SeaStarLoginHud"
		or descendant.Name == "FishyFishPhase3Gui"
		or (descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and isSeaStarText(descendant.Text))
		or (descendant:IsA("TextButton") and isSeaStarText(descendant.Text))
	then
		task.defer(ensureBound)
	end
end)

task.spawn(function()
	local success, initialState = pcall(function()
		return GetState:InvokeServer()
	end)

	if success then
		receiveState(initialState)
	else
		warn(
			"[SeaStarHudOverride] GetState failed:",
			initialState
		)
	end
end)

-- The old UI script may finish building after this script.
-- Re-apply the override without changing the saved HUD position.
task.spawn(function()
	while player.Parent do
		ensureBound()
		task.wait(1)
	end
end)

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local playerGui = Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")

local existing = playerGui:FindFirstChild("ServerUtcClockGui")
if existing then
	existing:Destroy()
end

local gui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
gui.Name = "ServerUtcClockGui"
gui.DisplayOrder = 2100
gui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
gui.ResetOnSpawn = false
gui.ZIndexBehavior = Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling
gui.Parent = playerGui

local frame = Instance.new("Frame")
frame.Name = "ClockFrame"
frame.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0, 1)
frame.Position = UDim2.new(0, 8, 1, -8)
frame.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(380, 34)
frame.BackgroundTransparency = 1
frame.BorderSizePixel = 0
frame.Parent = gui

local clockText = Instance.new("TextLabel")
clockText.Name = "ServerUtcText"
clockText.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(8, 2)
clockText.Size = UDim2.new(1, -16, 1, -4)
clockText.BackgroundTransparency = 1
clockText.Font = Enum.Font.GothamBlack
clockText.Text = "SERVER UTC  •  --:--:--"
clockText.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
clockText.TextSize = 14
clockText.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
clockText.TextStrokeTransparency = 0
clockText.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
clockText.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
clockText.Parent = frame

local textStroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
textStroke.Name = "ServerUtcTextOutline"
textStroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Contextual
textStroke.Color = Color3.fromRGB(0, 0, 0)
textStroke.Thickness = 3
textStroke.Transparency = 0
textStroke.Parent = clockText

local lastDisplayedSecond = -1

local function updateClock()
	local serverSecond = math.floor(workspace:GetServerTimeNow())
	if serverSecond == lastDisplayedSecond then
		return
	end

	lastDisplayedSecond = serverSecond
	clockText.Text = "SERVER UTC  •  " .. os.date("!%H:%M:%S", serverSecond)
end

updateClock()
RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(updateClock)

-- Extra Large Beginner Pond Generator
-- Put this Script in ServerScriptService, press Play once, then keep/edit the generated model.
-- Style: Minecraft/blocky Roblox fishing pond area.
-- Extra large version designed for many players.
-- Sign text: "Beginner Pond"

local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local CollectionService = game:GetService("CollectionService")

-- ============================================================
-- SETTINGS
-- ============================================================

local BLOCK = 4
local AREA_NAME = "Beginner Pond"

-- Extra large dimensions
local GROUND_RADIUS_X = 24
local GROUND_RADIUS_Z = 22

local WATER_RADIUS_X = 14
local WATER_RADIUS_Z = 11

local BORDER_RADIUS_X = WATER_RADIUS_X + 1

-- ============================================================
-- HELPERS
-- ============================================================

local function makePart(parent, name, size, position, color, material, transparency, canCollide)
	local part = Instance.new("Part")
	part.Name = name
	part.Size = size
	part.Position = position
	part.Anchored = true
	part.Color = color
	part.Material = material or Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
	part.Transparency = transparency or 0
	part.CanCollide = canCollide ~= false
	part.TopSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	part.BottomSurface = Enum.SurfaceType.Smooth
	part.Parent = parent
	return part
end

local function makeBlock(parent, name, gridX, gridY, gridZ, color, material)
	return makePart(
		parent,
		name,
		Vector3.new(BLOCK, BLOCK, BLOCK),
		Vector3.new(gridX * BLOCK, gridY * BLOCK, gridZ * BLOCK),
		color,
		material
	)
end

local function makeLantern(position)
	local woodDark = Color3.fromRGB(90, 55, 28)

	makePart(
		decorFolder,
		"LanternPost",
		Vector3.new(0.8, 4, 0.8),
		position,
		woodDark,
		Enum.Material.Wood
	)

	local lantern = makePart(
		decorFolder,
		"Lantern",
		Vector3.new(1.3, 1.3, 1.3),
		position + Vector3.new(0, 2.6, 0),
		Color3.fromRGB(255, 215, 120),
		Enum.Material.Neon,
		0.1,
		false
	)

	local light = Instance.new("PointLight")
	light.Brightness = 1.15
	light.Range = 15
	light.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 220, 150)
	light.Parent = lantern
end

local function addFishingSpot(name, position, facingDirection)
	local spot = makePart(
		spotsFolder,
		name,
		Vector3.new(4, 1, 4),
		position,
		Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 120),
		Enum.Material.ForceField,
		1,
		false
	)

	spot:SetAttribute("AreaName", AREA_NAME)
	spot:SetAttribute("FishPool", "Beginner")
	spot:SetAttribute("FacingDirection", facingDirection)

	CollectionService:AddTag(spot, "FishingSpot")
	return spot
end

for x = -GROUND_RADIUS_X, GROUND_RADIUS_X do
	for z = -GROUND_RADIUS_Z, GROUND_RADIUS_Z do
		local isPondWater = math.abs(x) <= WATER_RADIUS_X and math.abs(z) <= WATER_RADIUS_Z

		if isPondWater then
			makeBlock(blocksFolder, "PondFloor", x, -1, z, dirtColor, Enum.Material.Ground)
		else
			makeBlock(blocksFolder, "GrassBlock", x, 0, z, grassColor, Enum.Material.Grass)
			makeBlock(blocksFolder, "DirtBlock", x, -1, z, dirtColor, Enum.Material.Ground)
		end
	end
end

-- Dock posts
local dockPosts = {}

local function addPost(x, z)
	table.insert(dockPosts, Vector3.new(x * BLOCK, 1.5, z * BLOCK))
end

-- East/West dock posts
for _, x in ipairs({12, 17, -12, -17}) do
	for _, z in ipairs({-3, 0, 3}) do
		addPost(x, z)
	end
end

-- North/South dock posts
for _, z in ipairs({-16, -11, 11, 16}) do
	for _, x in ipairs({-3, 0, 3}) do
		addPost(x, z)
	end
end

-- Corner platform posts
for _, data in ipairs(cornerPlatforms) do
	local centerX, centerZ = data[1], data[2]
	addPost(centerX - 1, centerZ - 1)
	addPost(centerX + 1, centerZ - 1)
	addPost(centerX - 1, centerZ + 1)
	addPost(centerX + 1, centerZ + 1)
end

for _, pos in ipairs(dockPosts) do
	makePart(dockFolder, "DockPost", Vector3.new(1, 4.5, 1), pos, woodDark, Enum.Material.Wood)
end
